authors_text: Shuangping Jin,Bingbing Yu,Minhao Jing,Yi Zhou,Jiajun Liang,Renhe Ji
title: DarkVisionNet: Low-Light Imaging via RGB-NIR Fusion with Deep Inconsistency Prior
title_zh: DarkVisionNet：通过具有深度不一致先验的 RGB-NIR 融合进行低光成像
abstract: RGB-NIR fusion is a promising method for low-light imaging. However, high-intensity noise in low-light images amplifies the effect of structure inconsistency between RGB-NIR images, which fails existing algorithms. To handle this, we propose a new RGB-NIR fusion algorithm called Dark Vision Net (DVN) with two technical novelties: Deep Structure and Deep Inconsistency Prior (DIP). The Deep Structure extracts clear structure details in deep multiscale feature space rather than raw input space, which is more robust to noisy inputs. Based on the deep structures from both RGB and NIR domains, we introduce the DIP to leverage the structure inconsistency to guide the fusion of RGB-NIR. Benefiting from this, the proposed DVN obtains high-quality lowlight images without the visual artifacts. We also propose a new dataset called Dark Vision Dataset (DVD), consisting of aligned RGB-NIR image pairs, as the first public RGBNIR fusion benchmark. Quantitative and qualitative results on the proposed benchmark show that DVN significantly outperforms other comparison algorithms in PSNR and SSIM, especially in extremely low light conditions.
summary: RGB-NIR fusion is a promising method for low-light imaging. However, high-intensity noise in low-light images amplifies the effect of structure inconsistency between RGB-NIR images, which fails existing algorithms. To handle this, we propose a new RGB-NIR fusion algorithm called Dark Vision Net (DVN) with two technical novelties: Deep Structure and Deep Inconsistency Prior (DIP). The Deep Structure extracts clear structure details in deep multiscale feature space rather than raw input space, which is more robust to noisy inputs. Based on the deep structures from both RGB and NIR domains, we introduce the DIP to leverage the structure inconsistency to guide the fusion of RGB-NIR. Benefiting from this, the proposed DVN obtains high-quality lowlight images without the visual artifacts. We also propose a new dataset called Dark Vision Dataset (DVD), consisting of aligned RGB-NIR image pairs, as the first public RGBNIR fusion benchmark. Quantitative and qualitative results on the proposed benchmark show that DVN significantly outperforms other comparison algorithms in PSNR and SSIM, especially in extremely low light conditions.
abstract_zh: RGB-NIR 融合是一种很有前景的低光成像方法。然而，低光图像中的高强度噪声放大了 RGB-NIR 图像之间结构不一致的影响，这使得现有算法失效。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 RGB-NIR 融合算法，称为暗视觉网络（DVN），具有两项技术新颖性：深度结构和深度不一致先验（DIP）。深层结构在深层多尺度特征空间而不是原始输入空间中提取清晰的结构细节，这对噪声输入更加鲁棒。基于 RGB 和 NIR 域的深层结构，我们引入了 DIP，利用结构的不一致性来指导 RGB-NIR 的融合。受益于这一点，所提出的 DVN 获得了没有视觉伪影的高质量低光图像。我们还提出了一个名为“暗视觉数据集”(DVD) 的新数据集，由对齐的 RGB-NIR 图像对组成，作为第一个公开的 RGBNIR 融合基准。所提出的基准的定量和定性结果表明，DVN 在 PSNR 和 SSIM 方面显着优于其他比较算法，尤其是在极低光照条件下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DarkVisionNet（DVN），通过RGB-NIR融合与深度不一致性先验解决低光成像中的结构不一致和噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低光成像算法在强噪声环境下因RGB-NIR图像结构不一致导致效果不佳，需新的融合方法提升图像质量。
AI.method: 设计Deep Structure模块提取多尺度特征空间中的清晰结构，并引入深度不一致性先验（DIP）利用结构差异指导融合过程，同时构建Dark Vision Dataset（DVD）作为基准数据集。
AI.result: 在DVD数据集上，DVN在PSNR和SSIM指标上显著优于对比算法，尤其在极端低光条件下有效抑制视觉伪影。
AI.conclusion: DarkVisionNet通过结构特征提取与不一致性先验机制，结合新数据集验证了方法有效性，为低光成像提供了新思路。

authors_text: Parshin Shojaee,Kazem Meidani,Amir Barati Farimani,Chandan K. Reddy
title: Transformer-based Planning for Symbolic Regression
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的符号回归规划
abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) is a challenging task in machine learning that involves finding a mathematical expression for a function based on its values. Recent advancements in SR have demonstrated the effectiveness of pre-trained transformer-based models in generating equations as sequences, leveraging large-scale pre-training on synthetic datasets and offering notable advantages in terms of inference time over classical Genetic Programming (GP) methods. However, these models primarily rely on supervised pre-training goals borrowed from text generation and overlook equation discovery objectives like accuracy and complexity. To address this, we propose TPSR, a Transformer-based Planning strategy for Symbolic Regression that incorporates Monte Carlo Tree Search into the transformer decoding process. Unlike conventional decoding strategies, TPSR enables the integration of non-differentiable feedback, such as fitting accuracy and complexity, as external sources of knowledge into the transformer-based equation generation process. Extensive experiments on various datasets show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods, enhancing the model's fitting-complexity trade-off, extrapolation abilities, and robustness to noise.
summary: Symbolic regression (SR) is a challenging task in machine learning that involves finding a mathematical expression for a function based on its values. Recent advancements in SR have demonstrated the effectiveness of pre-trained transformer-based models in generating equations as sequences, leveraging large-scale pre-training on synthetic datasets and offering notable advantages in terms of inference time over classical Genetic Programming (GP) methods. However, these models primarily rely on supervised pre-training goals borrowed from text generation and overlook equation discovery objectives like accuracy and complexity. To address this, we propose TPSR, a Transformer-based Planning strategy for Symbolic Regression that incorporates Monte Carlo Tree Search into the transformer decoding process. Unlike conventional decoding strategies, TPSR enables the integration of non-differentiable feedback, such as fitting accuracy and complexity, as external sources of knowledge into the transformer-based equation generation process. Extensive experiments on various datasets show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods, enhancing the model's fitting-complexity trade-off, extrapolation abilities, and robustness to noise.
abstract_zh: 符号回归 (SR) 是机器学习中的一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及根据函数的值找到函数的数学表达式。 SR 的最新进展证明了基于 Transformer 的预训练模型在生成方程序列方面的有效性，利用对合成数据集的大规模预训练，并在推理时间方面比经典遗传编程 (GP) 方法具有显着优势。然而，这些模型主要依赖于从文本生成中借用的监督预训练目标，而忽略了方程发现目标，例如准确性和复杂性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TPSR，一种基于 Transformer 的符号回归规划策略，它将蒙特卡洛树搜索纳入到 Transformer 解码过程中。与传统的解码策略不同，TPSR 能够将不可微的反馈（例如拟合精度和复杂性）作为外部知识源集成到基于变压器的方程生成过程中。对各种数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，增强了模型的拟合复杂性权衡、外推能力和对噪声的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的规划策略TPSR，通过结合蒙特卡洛树搜索优化符号回归中的方程生成过程。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在符号回归任务中过度依赖文本生成的预训练目标，忽视了方程准确性、复杂度等核心发现目标，导致模型效果受限。
AI.method: 设计TPSR方法，在Transformer解码过程中集成蒙特卡洛树搜索，引入拟合精度和复杂度等非微分反馈作为外部知识指导生成。
AI.result: 在多个数据集实验中，TPSR相较现有方法显著提升拟合-复杂度权衡能力、外推性能及对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TPSR通过融合规划搜索与Transformer生成优势，有效解决了符号回归中传统方法的不足，为该领域提供新思路。

authors_text: SP Choi,Jihun Lee,Hyeongseok Ahn,Sanghee Jung,Bumsoo Kang
title: ODIN: On-demand Data Formulation to Mitigate Dataset Lock-in
title_zh: ODIN：按需数据制定以缓解数据集锁定
abstract: ODIN is an innovative approach that addresses the problem of dataset constraints by integrating generative AI models. Traditional zero-shot learning methods are constrained by the training dataset. To fundamentally overcome this limitation, ODIN attempts to mitigate the dataset constraints by generating on-demand datasets based on user requirements. ODIN consists of three main modules: a prompt generator, a text-to-image generator, and an image post-processor. To generate high-quality prompts and images, we adopted a large language model (e.g., ChatGPT), and a text-to-image diffusion model (e.g., Stable Diffusion), respectively. We evaluated ODIN on various datasets in terms of model accuracy and data diversity to demonstrate its potential, and conducted post-experiments for further investigation. Overall, ODIN is a feasible approach that enables Al to learn unseen knowledge beyond the training dataset.
summary: ODIN is an innovative approach that addresses the problem of dataset constraints by integrating generative AI models. Traditional zero-shot learning methods are constrained by the training dataset. To fundamentally overcome this limitation, ODIN attempts to mitigate the dataset constraints by generating on-demand datasets based on user requirements. ODIN consists of three main modules: a prompt generator, a text-to-image generator, and an image post-processor. To generate high-quality prompts and images, we adopted a large language model (e.g., ChatGPT), and a text-to-image diffusion model (e.g., Stable Diffusion), respectively. We evaluated ODIN on various datasets in terms of model accuracy and data diversity to demonstrate its potential, and conducted post-experiments for further investigation. Overall, ODIN is a feasible approach that enables Al to learn unseen knowledge beyond the training dataset.
abstract_zh: ODIN 是一种创新方法，通过集成生成式 AI 模型来解决数据集约束问题。传统的零样本学习方法受到训练数据集的限制。为了从根本上克服这一限制，ODIN尝试通过根据用户需求生成按需数据集来缓解数据集约束。 ODIN 由三个主要模块组成：提示生成器、文本到图像生成器和图像后处理器。为了生成高质量的提示和图像，我们分别采用了大型语言模型（例如 ChatGPT）和文本到图像扩散模型（例如稳定扩散）。我们在各种数据集上评估了 ODIN 的模型准确性和数据多样性，以证明其潜力，并进行了后期实验以进行进一步研究。总体而言，ODIN 是一种可行的方法，使 AI 能够学习训练数据集之外看不见的知识。

AI.tldr: 提出ODIN方法，通过按需生成数据集缓解数据集锁定问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本学习方法受限于训练数据集，难以处理超出训练数据的知识，需突破数据集限制以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 方法采用提示生成器、文本到图像生成器和图像后处理器三模块，结合大语言模型（如ChatGPT）和扩散模型（如Stable Diffusion）生成高质量数据。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了模型准确性与数据多样性，实验表明ODIN有效缓解数据集锁定问题。
AI.conclusion: ODIN为突破数据集限制提供了可行方案，使AI能学习训练数据集外的未知知识。

ai_content.tldr: 提出ODIN方法，通过按需生成数据集缓解数据集锁定问题，提升模型泛化能力。

search_text: ODIN: On-demand Data Formulation to Mitigate Dataset Lock-in ODIN：按需数据制定以缓解数据集锁定 ODIN is an innovative approach that addresses the problem of dataset constraints by integrating generative AI models. Traditional zero-shot learning methods are constrained by the training dataset. To fundamentally overcome this limitation, ODIN attempts to mitigate the dataset constraints by generating on-demand datasets based on user requirements. ODIN consists of three main modules: a prompt generator, a text-to-image generator, and an image post-processor. To generate high-quality prompts and images, we adopted a large language model (e.g., ChatGPT), and a text-to-image diffusion model (e.g., Stable Diffusion), respectively. We evaluated ODIN on various datasets in terms of model accuracy and data diversity to demonstrate its potential, and conducted post-experiments for further investigation. Overall, ODIN is a feasible approach that enables Al to learn unseen knowledge beyond the training dataset. ODIN 是一种创新方法，通过集成生成式 AI 模型来解决数据集约束问题。传统的零样本学习方法受到训练数据集的限制。为了从根本上克服这一限制，ODIN尝试通过根据用户需求生成按需数据集来缓解数据集约束。 ODIN 由三个主要模块组成：提示生成器、文本到图像生成器和图像后处理器。为了生成高质量的提示和图像，我们分别采用了大型语言模型（例如 ChatGPT）和文本到图像扩散模型（例如稳定扩散）。我们在各种数据集上评估了 ODIN 的模型准确性和数据多样性，以证明其潜力，并进行了后期实验以进行进一步研究。总体而言，ODIN 是一种可行的方法，使 AI 能够学习训练数据集之外看不见的知识。 提出ODIN方法，通过按需生成数据集缓解数据集锁定问题，提升模型泛化能力。 SP Choi,Jihun Lee,Hyeongseok Ahn,Sanghee Jung,Bumsoo Kang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Aishwarya Mandyam,Didong Li,Jiayu Yao,Diana Cai,Andrew Jones,Barbara E. Engelhardt
title: Kernel Density Bayesian Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 核密度贝叶斯逆强化学习
abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) methods infer an agent's reward function using demonstrations of expert behavior. A Bayesian IRL approach models a distribution over candidate reward functions, capturing a degree of uncertainty in the inferred reward function. This is critical in some applications, such as those involving clinical data. Typically, Bayesian IRL algorithms require large demonstration datasets, which may not be available in practice. In this work, we incorporate existing domain-specific data to achieve better posterior concentration rates. We study a common setting in clinical and biological applications where we have access to expert demonstrations and known reward functions for a set of training tasks. Our aim is to learn the reward function of a new test task given limited expert demonstrations. Existing Bayesian IRL methods impose restrictions on the form of input data, thus limiting the incorporation of training task data. To better leverage information from training tasks, we introduce kernel density Bayesian inverse reinforcement learning (KD-BIRL). Our approach employs a conditional kernel density estimator, which uses the known reward functions of the training tasks to improve the likelihood estimation across a range of reward functions and demonstration samples. Our empirical results highlight KD-BIRL's faster concentration rate in comparison to baselines, particularly in low test task expert demonstration data regimes. Additionally, we are the first to provide theoretical guarantees of posterior concentration for a Bayesian IRL algorithm. Taken together, this work introduces a principled and theoretically grounded framework that enables Bayesian IRL to be applied across a variety of domains.
summary: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) methods infer an agent's reward function using demonstrations of expert behavior. A Bayesian IRL approach models a distribution over candidate reward functions, capturing a degree of uncertainty in the inferred reward function. This is critical in some applications, such as those involving clinical data. Typically, Bayesian IRL algorithms require large demonstration datasets, which may not be available in practice. In this work, we incorporate existing domain-specific data to achieve better posterior concentration rates. Our aim is to learn the reward function of a new test task given limited expert demonstrations. Existing Bayesian IRL methods impose restrictions on the form of input data, thus limiting the incorporation of training task data. To better leverage information from training tasks, we introduce kernel density Bayesian inverse reinforcement learning (KD-BIRL). Our approach employs a conditional kernel density estimator, which uses the known reward functions of the training tasks to improve the likelihood estimation across a range of reward functions and demonstration samples. Our empirical results highlight KD-BIRL's faster concentration rate in comparison to baselines, particularly in low test task expert demonstration data regimes. Additionally, we are the first to provide theoretical guarantees of posterior concentration for a Bayesian IRL algorithm. Taken together, this work introduces a principled and theoretically grounded framework that enables Bayesian IRL to be applied across a variety of domains.
abstract_zh: 逆向强化学习 (IRL) 方法使用专家行为的演示来推断代理的奖励函数。贝叶斯 IRL 方法对候选奖励函数的分布进行建模，捕获推断奖励函数的一定程度的不确定性。这在某些应用中至关重要，例如涉及临床数据的应用。通常，贝叶斯 IRL 算法需要大型演示数据集，而这在实践中可能不可用。在这项工作中，我们结合了现有的特定领域数据，以实现更好的后验集中率。我们研究临床和生物应用中的常见设置，在该设置中我们可以获得专家演示和一组训练任务的已知奖励函数。我们的目标是在有限的专家演示下学习新测试任务的奖励函数。现有的贝叶斯 IRL 方法对输入数据的形式施加限制，从而限制了训练任务数据的合并。为了更好地利用训练任务中的信息，我们引入了核密度贝叶斯逆强化学习（KD-BIRL）。我们的方法采用条件核密度估计器，它使用训练任务的已知奖励函数来改进一系列奖励函数和演示样本的似然估计。我们的实证结果强调了 KD-BIRL 与基线相比具有更快的集中率，特别是在低测试任务专家演示数据制度中。此外，我们是第一个为贝叶斯 IRL 算法提供后验集中理论保证的人。总而言之，这项工作引入了一个有原则且有理论基础的框架，使贝叶斯 IRL 能够跨多个领域应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核密度估计的贝叶斯逆强化学习方法（KD-BIRL），旨在利用领域特定数据提升贝叶斯IRL在有限专家示范下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有贝叶斯IRL方法依赖大量示范数据，而实际应用（如临床数据）中数据可能稀缺，且需结合已知训练任务的奖励函数来提升新任务的推断效果。
AI.method: 引入条件核密度估计器，利用训练任务的已知奖励函数优化似然估计，增强对测试任务奖励函数的后验集中率。
AI.result: 实验表明KD-BIRL在低数据量场景下收敛速度优于基线方法，并首次为贝叶斯IRL提供了后验集中率的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论支撑和数据高效性，为贝叶斯IRL在临床、生物等领域的应用提供了通用框架。

authors_text: Atul Dhingra,Gaurav Sood
title: Instate: Predicting the State of Residence From Last Name
title_zh: Instate：根据姓氏预测居住州
abstract: India has twenty-two official languages. Serving such a diverse language base is a challenge for survey statisticians, call center operators, software developers, and other such service providers. To help provide better services to different language communities via better localization, we introduce a new machine learning model that predicts the language(s) that the user can speak from their name. Using nearly 438M records spanning 33 Indian states and 1.13M unique last names from the Indian Electoral Rolls Corpus (?), we build a character-level transformer-based machine-learning model that predicts the state of residence based on the last name. The model has a top-3 accuracy of 85.3% on unseen names. We map the states to languages using the Indian census to infer languages understood by the respondent. We provide open-source software that implements the method discussed in the paper.
summary: India has twenty-two official languages. Serving such a diverse language base is a challenge for survey statisticians, call center operators, software developers, and other such service providers. To help provide better services to different language communities via better localization, we introduce a new machine learning model that predicts the language(s) that the user can speak from their name. Using nearly 438M records spanning 33 Indian states and 1.13M unique last names from the Indian Electoral Rolls Corpus (?), we build a character-level transformer-based machine-learning model that predicts the state of residence based on the last name. The model has a top-3 accuracy of 85.3% on unseen names. We map the states to languages using the Indian census to infer languages understood by the respondent. We provide open-source software that implements the method discussed in the paper.
abstract_zh: 印度有二十二种官方语言。为如此多样化的语言库提供服务对于调查统计学家、呼叫中心运营商、软件开发人员和其他此类服务提供商来说是一项挑战。为了通过更好的本地化帮助为不同语言社区提供更好的服务，我们引入了一种新的机器学习模型，可以预测用户可以通过其名字说出的语言。使用跨越 33 个印度邦的近 4.38 亿条记录和印度选举名册语料库（？）中的 113 万个唯一姓氏，我们构建了一个基于字符级 Transformer 的机器学习模型，该模型可以根据姓氏预测居住州。该模型对于未见过的名字的前 3 名准确率为 85.3%。我们使用印度人口普查将各州映射到语言，以推断受访者理解的语言。我们提供实现本文讨论的方法的开源软件。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于姓氏预测印度居民所属州的机器学习模型，以提升多语言社区的本地化服务能力。
AI.motivation: 印度拥有22种官方语言，服务提供商需针对不同语言社区优化服务，但传统方法难以高效识别用户语言背景。
AI.method: 使用印度选举 rolls 数据库中的4.38亿条记录和113万独特姓氏，构建字符级Transformer模型，结合印度人口普查数据将州映射到语言。
AI.result: 模型在未见过的姓氏上实现前3名准确率85.3%，并提供开源实现工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效关联姓氏与居住地语言分布，为多语言服务优化提供技术支持，且开源软件可促进后续研究。

authors_text: Lutao Jiang,Ruyi Ji,Libo Zhang
title: SDF-3DGAN: A 3D Object Generative Method Based on Implicit Signed Distance Function
title_zh: SDF-3DGAN：一种基于隐式符号距离函数的3D对象生成方法
abstract: In this paper, we develop a new method, termed SDF-3DGAN, for 3D object generation and 3D-Aware image synthesis tasks, which introduce implicit Signed Distance Function (SDF) as the 3D object representation method in the generative field. We apply SDF for higher quality representation of 3D object in space and design a new SDF neural renderer, which has higher efficiency and higher accuracy. To train only on 2D images, we first generate the objects, which are represented by SDF, from Gaussian distribution. Then we render them to 2D images and use them to apply GAN training method together with 2D images in the dataset. In the new rendering method, we relieve all the potential of SDF mathematical property to alleviate computation pressure in the previous SDF neural renderer. In specific, our new SDF neural renderer can solve the problem of sampling ambiguity when the number of sampling point is not enough, \ie use the less points to finish higher quality sampling task in the rendering pipeline. And in this rendering pipeline, we can locate the surface easily. Therefore, we apply normal loss on it to control the smoothness of generated object surface, which can make our method enjoy the much higher generation quality. Quantitative and qualitative experiments conducted on public benchmarks demonstrate favorable performance against the state-of-the-art methods in 3D object generation task and 3D-Aware image synthesis task. Our codes will be released at https://github.com/lutao2021/SDF-3DGAN.
summary: In this paper, we develop a new method, termed SDF-3DGAN, for 3D object generation and 3D-Aware image synthesis tasks, which introduce implicit Signed Distance Function (SDF) as the 3D object representation method in the generative field. We apply SDF for higher quality representation of 3D object in space and design a new SDF neural renderer, which has higher efficiency and higher accuracy. To train only on 2D images, we first generate the objects, which are represented by SDF, from Gaussian distribution. Then we render them to 2D images and use them to apply GAN training method together with 2D images in the dataset. In the new rendering method, we relieve all the potential of SDF mathematical property to alleviate computation pressure in the previous SDF neural renderer. In specific, our new SDF neural renderer can solve the problem of sampling ambiguity when the number of sampling point is not enough, \ie use the less points to finish higher quality sampling task in the rendering pipeline. And in this rendering pipeline, we can locate the surface easily. Therefore, we apply normal loss on it to control the smoothness of generated object surface, which can make our method enjoy the much higher generation quality. Quantitative and qualitative experiments conducted on public benchmarks demonstrate favorable performance against the state-of-the-art methods in 3D object generation task and 3D-Aware image synthesis task. Our codes will be released at https://github.com/lutao2021/SDF-3DGAN.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开发了一种用于 3D 对象生成和 3D-Aware 图像合成任务的新方法，称为 SDF-3DGAN，该方法引入隐式符号距离函数（SDF）作为生成领域中的 3D 对象表示方法。我们应用SDF来更高质量地表示空间中的3D物体，并设计了一种新的SDF神经渲染器，它具有更高的效率和更高的精度。为了仅在 2D 图像上进行训练，我们首先从高斯分布生成由 SDF 表示的对象。然后我们将它们渲染为 2D 图像，并使用它们与数据集中的 2D 图像一起应用 GAN 训练方法。在新的渲染方法中，我们释放了SDF数学特性的所有潜力，以减轻先前SDF神经渲染器中的计算压力。具体来说，我们新的SDF神经渲染器可以解决采样点数量不足时的采样模糊问题，即在渲染管道中使用更少的点来完成更高质量的采样任务。在这个渲染管线中，我们可以轻松定位表面。因此，我们对其应用法线损失来控制生成的物体表面的平滑度，这可以使我们的方法享有更高的生成质量。在公共基准上进行的定量和定性实验表明，在 3D 对象生成任务和 3D-Aware 图像合成任务中，其性能优于最先进的方法。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/lutao2021/SDF-3DGAN 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式有符号距离函数（SDF）的3D物体生成方法SDF-3DGAN，用于3D物体生成和3D感知图像合成任务。
AI.motivation: 传统3D生成方法在表示复杂几何结构时存在精度和效率不足的问题，而SDF能提供更高质量的3D空间表示，但现有SDF神经渲染器存在计算压力大和采样模糊性等问题。
AI.method: 设计新的SDF神经渲染器，利用SDF数学特性优化计算效率，通过少量采样点解决采样模糊问题，并引入法线损失控制生成物体表面平滑度；在仅使用2D图像训练时，从高斯分布生成SDF表示的物体并渲染为2D图像进行GAN训练。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中，SDF-3DGAN在3D物体生成和3D感知图像合成任务中均优于现有最先进方法，生成质量显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化SDF神经渲染器和引入法线损失，SDF-3DGAN有效提升了3D生成质量和效率，为基于隐式函数的生成模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qidan Zhu,Jing Li,Fei Yuan,Quan Gan
title: Continuous sign language recognition based on cross-resolution knowledge distillation
title_zh: 基于跨分辨率知识蒸馏的连续手语识别
abstract: The goal of continuous sign language recognition(CSLR) research is to apply CSLR models as a communication tool in real life, and the real-time requirement of the models is important. In this paper, we address the model real-time problem through cross-resolution knowledge distillation. In our study, we found that keeping the frame-level feature scales consistent between the output of the student network and the teacher network is better than recovering the frame-level feature sizes for feature distillation. Based on this finding, we propose a new frame-level feature extractor that keeps the output frame-level features at the same scale as the output of by the teacher network. We further combined with the TSCM+2D hybrid convolution proposed in our previous study to form a new lightweight end-to-end CSLR network-Low resolution input net(LRINet). It is then used to combine cross-resolution knowledge distillation and traditional knowledge distillation methods to form a CSLR model based on cross-resolution knowledge distillation (CRKD). The CRKD uses high-resolution frames as input to the teacher network for training, locks the weights after training, and then uses low-resolution frames as input to the student network LRINet to perform knowledge distillation on frame-level features and classification features respectively. Experiments on two large-scale continuous sign language datasets have proved the effectiveness of CRKD. Compared with the model with high-resolution data as input, the calculation amount, parameter amount and inference time of the model have been significantly reduced under the same experimental conditions, while ensuring the accuracy of the model, and has achieved very competitive results in comparison with other advanced methods.
summary: The goal of continuous sign language recognition(CSLR) research is to apply CSLR models as a communication tool in real life, and the real-time requirement of the models is important. In this paper, we address the model real-time problem through cross-resolution knowledge distillation. In our study, we found that keeping the frame-level feature scales consistent between the output of the student network and the teacher network is better than recovering the frame-level feature sizes for feature distillation. Based on this finding, we propose a new frame-level feature extractor that keeps the output frame-level features at the same scale as the output of by the teacher network. We further combined with the TSCM+2D hybrid convolution proposed in our previous study to form a new lightweight end-to-end CSLR network-Low resolution input net(LRINet). It is then used to combine cross-resolution knowledge distillation and traditional knowledge distillation methods to form a CSLR model based on cross-resolution knowledge distillation (CRKD). The CRKD uses high-resolution frames as input to the teacher network for training, locks the weights after training, and then uses low-resolution frames as input to the student network LRINet to perform knowledge distillation on frame-level features and classification features respectively. Experiments on two large-scale continuous sign language datasets have proved the effectiveness of CRKD. Compared with the model with high-resolution data as input, the calculation amount, parameter amount and inference time of the model have been significantly reduced under the same experimental conditions, while ensuring the accuracy of the model, and has achieved very competitive results in comparison with other advanced methods.
abstract_zh: 连续手语识别（CSLR）研究的目标是将CSLR模型作为现实生活中的交流工具应用，模型的实时性要求非常重要。在本文中，我们通过跨分辨率知识蒸馏来解决模型实时问题。在我们的研究中，我们发现保持学生网络和教师网络的输出之间的帧级特征尺度一致比恢复帧级特征大小以进行特征蒸馏更好。基于这一发现，我们提出了一种新的帧级特征提取器，使输出帧级特征保持与教师网络的输出相同的规模。我们进一步结合之前研究中提出的TSCM+2D混合卷积，形成了一种新的轻量级端到端CSLR网络——低分辨率输入网络（LRINet）。然后将交叉分辨率知识蒸馏和传统知识蒸馏方法结合起来，形成基于交叉分辨率知识蒸馏（CRKD）的CSLR模型。 CRKD 使用高分辨率帧作为教师网络的输入进行训练，训练后锁定权重，然后使用低分辨率帧作为学生网络 LRINet 的输入，分别对帧级特征和分类特征进行知识蒸馏。在两个大规模连续手语数据集上的实验证明了CRKD的有效性。与以高分辨率数据为输入的模型相比，在相同实验条件下，该模型的计算量、参数量和推理时间都显着减少，同时保证了模型的准确性，与其他先进方法相比取得了非常有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于跨分辨率知识蒸馏的连续手语识别方法，旨在提升模型实时性并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 连续手语识别模型在实际应用中需满足实时性要求，但高分辨率输入导致计算量大，传统知识蒸馏方法难以兼顾效率与精度。
AI.method: 通过保持学生网络与教师网络帧级特征尺度一致，设计轻量级特征提取器LRINet，并结合跨分辨率知识蒸馏与传统蒸馏方法，利用高分辨率教师网络与低分辨率学生网络进行特征与分类知识传递。
AI.result: 在两个大规模数据集上验证了CRKD方法的有效性，在保持模型精度的同时，显著降低了计算量、参数量及推理时间，性能优于其他先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨分辨率知识蒸馏能够有效平衡连续手语识别模型的实时性与准确性，为实际部署提供高效解决方案。

The CRKD uses high-resolution frames as input to the teacher network for training, locks the weights after training, and then uses low-resolution frames as input to the student network LRINet to perform knowledge distillation on frame-level features and classification features respectively. Compared with the model with high-resolution data as input, the calculation amount, parameter amount and inference time of the model have been significantly reduced under the same experimental conditions, while ensuring the accuracy of the model, and has achieved very competitive results in comparison with other advanced methods. 连续手语识别（CSLR）研究的目标是将CSLR模型作为现实生活中的交流工具应用，模型的实时性要求非常重要。在本文中，我们通过跨分辨率知识蒸馏来解决模型实时问题。在我们的研究中，我们发现保持学生网络和教师网络的输出之间的帧级特征尺度一致比恢复帧级特征大小以进行特征蒸馏更好。基于这一发现，我们提出了一种新的帧级特征提取器，使输出帧级特征保持与教师网络的输出相同的规模。我们进一步结合之前研究中提出的TSCM+2D混合卷积，形成了一种新的轻量级端到端CSLR网络——低分辨率输入网络（LRINet）。然后将交叉分辨率知识蒸馏和传统知识蒸馏方法结合起来，形成基于交叉分辨率知识蒸馏（CRKD）的CSLR模型。 CRKD 使用高分辨率帧作为教师网络的输入进行训练，训练后锁定权重，然后使用低分辨率帧作为学生网络 LRINet 的输入，分别对帧级特征和分类特征进行知识蒸馏。在两个大规模连续手语数据集上的实验证明了CRKD的有效性。与以高分辨率数据为输入的模型相比，在相同实验条件下，该模型的计算量、参数量和推理时间都显着减少，同时保证了模型的准确性，与其他先进方法相比取得了非常有竞争力的结果。 本文提出基于跨分辨率知识蒸馏的连续手语识别方法，旨在提升模型实时性并降低计算成本。 Qidan Zhu,Jing Li,Fei Yuan,Quan Gan cs.CV

authors_text: Haocong Rao,Chunyan Miao
title: TranSG: Transformer-Based Skeleton Graph Prototype Contrastive Learning with Structure-Trajectory Prompted Reconstruction for Person Re-Identification
title_zh: TranSG：基于 Transformer 的骨架图原型对比学习与结构轨迹提示重建以进行人员重新识别
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/TranSG. Supplemental materials are included in the conference proceedings
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/TranSG. Supplemental materials are included in the conference proceedings
abstract: Person re-identification (re-ID) via 3D skeleton data is an emerging topic with prominent advantages. Existing methods usually design skeleton descriptors with raw body joints or perform skeleton sequence representation learning. However, they typically cannot concurrently model different body-component relations, and rarely explore useful semantics from fine-grained representations of body joints. In this paper, we propose a generic Transformer-based Skeleton Graph prototype contrastive learning (TranSG) approach with structure-trajectory prompted reconstruction to fully capture skeletal relations and valuable spatial-temporal semantics from skeleton graphs for person re-ID. Specifically, we first devise the Skeleton Graph Transformer (SGT) to simultaneously learn body and motion relations within skeleton graphs, so as to aggregate key correlative node features into graph representations. Then, we propose the Graph Prototype Contrastive learning (GPC) to mine the most typical graph features (graph prototypes) of each identity, and contrast the inherent similarity between graph representations and different prototypes from both skeleton and sequence levels to learn discriminative graph representations. Last, a graph Structure-Trajectory Prompted Reconstruction (STPR) mechanism is proposed to exploit the spatial and temporal contexts of graph nodes to prompt skeleton graph reconstruction, which facilitates capturing more valuable patterns and graph semantics for person re-ID. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that TranSG significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. We further show its generality under different graph modeling, RGB-estimated skeletons, and unsupervised scenarios.
summary: Person re-identification (re-ID) via 3D skeleton data is an emerging topic with prominent advantages. Existing methods usually design skeleton descriptors with raw body joints or perform skeleton sequence representation learning. However, they typically cannot concurrently model different body-component relations, and rarely explore useful semantics from fine-grained representations of body joints. In this paper, we propose a generic Transformer-based Skeleton Graph prototype contrastive learning (TranSG) approach with structure-trajectory prompted reconstruction to fully capture skeletal relations and valuable spatial-temporal semantics from skeleton graphs for person re-ID. Specifically, we first devise the Skeleton Graph Transformer (SGT) to simultaneously learn body and motion relations within skeleton graphs, so as to aggregate key correlative node features into graph representations. Then, we propose the Graph Prototype Contrastive learning (GPC) to mine the most typical graph features (graph prototypes) of each identity, and contrast the inherent similarity between graph representations and different prototypes from both skeleton and sequence levels to learn discriminative graph representations. Last, a graph Structure-Trajectory Prompted Reconstruction (STPR) mechanism is proposed to exploit the spatial and temporal contexts of graph nodes to prompt skeleton graph reconstruction, which facilitates capturing more valuable patterns and graph semantics for person re-ID. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that TranSG significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. We further show its generality under different graph modeling, RGB-estimated skeletons, and unsupervised scenarios.
abstract_zh: 通过3D骨架数据进行人员重新识别（re-ID）是一个具有突出优势的新兴课题。现有方法通常使用原始身体关节设计骨骼描述符或进行骨骼序列表示学习。然而，它们通常无法同时对不同的身体组件关系进行建模，并且很少从身体关节的细粒度表示中探索有用的语义。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的通用骨架图原型对比学习 (TranSG) 方法，该方法具有结构轨迹提示重建功能，可从骨架图中充分捕获骨架关系和有价值的时空语义，以进行人员重新识别。具体来说，我们首先设计了骨架图转换器（SGT）来同时学习骨架图中的身体和运动关系，从而将关键相关节点特征聚合到图表示中。然后，我们提出图原型对比学习（GPC）来挖掘每个身份最典型的图特征（图原型），并从骨架和序列级别对比图表示与不同原型之间的固有相似性，以学习有区别的图表示。最后，提出了图结构轨迹提示重建（STPR）机制，以利用图节点的空间和时间上下文来提示骨架图重建，这有助于捕获更有价值的模式和图语义以进行行人重识别。实证评估表明，TranSG 显着优于现有的最先进方法。我们进一步展示了它在不同图建模、RGB 估计骨架和无监督场景下的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的骨骼图原型对比学习方法TranSG，用于人体重识别（Re-ID），通过结构-轨迹提示重建机制提升骨骼图的时空语义建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有骨骼数据人体重识别方法难以同时建模身体组件关系，且未充分挖掘骨骼关节的细粒度语义信息，限制了识别性能。
AI.method: 设计骨骼图Transformer（SGT）学习身体与运动关系，结合图原型对比学习（GPC）挖掘身份典型特征，并引入结构-轨迹提示重建（STPR）机制强化时空上下文建模。
AI.result: 实验表明TranSG在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法，且在不同图建模方式、RGB估计骨骼和无监督场景下均具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: TranSG通过融合Transformer架构与对比学习机制，有效捕捉骨骼图的时空语义，为骨骼数据人体重识别提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Zaixi Zhang,Qi Liu,Zhicai Wang,Zepu Lu,Qingyong Hu
title: Backdoor Defense via Deconfounded Representation Learning
title_zh: 通过解混表示学习进行后门防御
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are recently shown to be vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where attackers embed hidden backdoors in the DNN model by injecting a few poisoned examples into the training dataset. While extensive efforts have been made to detect and remove backdoors from backdoored DNNs, it is still not clear whether a backdoor-free clean model can be directly obtained from poisoned datasets. In this paper, we first construct a causal graph to model the generation process of poisoned data and find that the backdoor attack acts as the confounder, which brings spurious associations between the input images and target labels, making the model predictions less reliable. Inspired by the causal understanding, we propose the Causality-inspired Backdoor Defense (CBD), to learn deconfounded representations for reliable classification. Specifically, a backdoored model is intentionally trained to capture the confounding effects. The other clean model dedicates to capturing the desired causal effects by minimizing the mutual information with the confounding representations from the backdoored model and employing a sample-wise re-weighting scheme. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets against 6 state-of-the-art attacks verify that our proposed defense method is effective in reducing backdoor threats while maintaining high accuracy in predicting benign samples. Further analysis shows that CBD can also resist potential adaptive attacks. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/zaixizhang/CBD}.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are recently shown to be vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where attackers embed hidden backdoors in the DNN model by injecting a few poisoned examples into the training dataset. While extensive efforts have been made to detect and remove backdoors from backdoored DNNs, it is still not clear whether a backdoor-free clean model can be directly obtained from poisoned datasets. In this paper, we first construct a causal graph to model the generation process of poisoned data and find that the backdoor attack acts as the confounder, which brings spurious associations between the input images and target labels, making the model predictions less reliable. Inspired by the causal understanding, we propose the Causality-inspired Backdoor Defense (CBD), to learn deconfounded representations for reliable classification. Specifically, a backdoored model is intentionally trained to capture the confounding effects. The other clean model dedicates to capturing the desired causal effects by minimizing the mutual information with the confounding representations from the backdoored model and employing a sample-wise re-weighting scheme. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets against 6 state-of-the-art attacks verify that our proposed defense method is effective in reducing backdoor threats while maintaining high accuracy in predicting benign samples. Further analysis shows that CBD can also resist potential adaptive attacks. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/zaixizhang/CBD}.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度神经网络 (DNN) 被证明容易受到后门攻击，攻击者通过向训练数据集中注入一些中毒示例，在 DNN 模型中嵌入隐藏的后门。尽管人们已经做出了大量努力来检测和删除后门 DNN 中的后门，但仍不清楚是否可以直接从中毒数据集中获得无后门的干净模型。在本文中，我们首先构建因果图来模拟中毒数据的生成过程，发现后门攻击充当混杂因素，它在输入图像和目标标签之间带来虚假关联，使得模型预测不太可靠。受因果关系理解的启发，我们提出了因果关系启发的后门防御（CBD），以学习去混杂表示以进行可靠的分类。具体来说，有意训练后门模型来捕捉混杂效应。另一个干净的模型致力于通过最小化与后门模型的混杂表示的互信息并采用样本重新加权方案来捕获所需的因果效应。针对 6 种最先进攻击的多个基准数据集的大量实验验证了我们提出的防御方法可以有效减少后门威胁，同时保持预测良性样本的高精度。进一步分析表明，CBD还可以抵抗潜在的自适应攻击。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zaixizhang/CBD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过去混淆表示学习防御深度神经网络中的后门攻击，旨在从被污染的数据集中直接获得无后门的干净模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从被后门攻击污染的数据集中直接获取可靠的干净模型，后门攻击通过引入混淆因素导致输入与标签的虚假关联，降低模型预测可靠性。
AI.method: 构建因果图建模污染数据生成过程，提出因果启发的后门防御（CBD）方法：训练一个模型捕捉混淆效应，另一个模型通过最小化与混淆表示的互信息并采用样本级重加权方案学习因果效应。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上针对6种先进攻击的实验表明，CBD能有效降低后门威胁同时保持良性样本高准确率，并能抵御潜在自适应攻击。
AI.conclusion: CBD通过学习去混淆表示有效防御后门攻击，为从污染数据中恢复可靠模型提供了新思路，具有良好的鲁棒性。

search_text: Backdoor Defense via Deconfounded Representation Learning 通过解混表示学习进行后门防御 Deep neural networks (DNNs) are recently shown to be vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where attackers embed hidden backdoors in the DNN model by injecting a few poisoned examples into the training dataset. While extensive efforts have been made to detect and remove backdoors from backdoored DNNs, it is still not clear whether a backdoor-free clean model can be directly obtained from poisoned datasets. In this paper, we first construct a causal graph to model the generation process of poisoned data and find that the backdoor attack acts as the confounder, which brings spurious associations between the input images and target labels, making the model predictions less reliable. Inspired by the causal understanding, we propose the Causality-inspired Backdoor Defense (CBD), to learn deconfounded representations for reliable classification. Specifically, a backdoored model is intentionally trained to capture the confounding effects. The other clean model dedicates to capturing the desired causal effects by minimizing the mutual information with the confounding representations from the backdoored model and employing a sample-wise re-weighting scheme. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets against 6 state-of-the-art attacks verify that our proposed defense method is effective in reducing backdoor threats while maintaining high accuracy in predicting benign samples. Further analysis shows that CBD can also resist potential adaptive attacks. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/zaixizhang/CBD}. 最近，深度神经网络 (DNN) 被证明容易受到后门攻击，攻击者通过向训练数据集中注入一些中毒示例，在 DNN 模型中嵌入隐藏的后门。尽管人们已经做出了大量努力来检测和删除后门 DNN 中的后门，但仍不清楚是否可以直接从中毒数据集中获得无后门的干净模型。在本文中，我们首先构建因果图来模拟中毒数据的生成过程，发现后门攻击充当混杂因素，它在输入图像和目标标签之间带来虚假关联，使得模型预测不太可靠。受因果关系理解的启发，我们提出了因果关系启发的后门防御（CBD），以学习去混杂表示以进行可靠的分类。具体来说，有意训练后门模型来捕捉混杂效应。另一个干净的模型致力于通过最小化与后门模型的混杂表示的互信息并采用样本重新加权方案来捕获所需的因果效应。针对 6 种最先进攻击的多个基准数据集的大量实验验证了我们提出的防御方法可以有效减少后门威胁，同时保持预测良性样本的高精度。进一步分析表明，CBD还可以抵抗潜在的自适应攻击。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zaixizhang/CBD} 获取。 本文提出通过去混淆表示学习防御深度神经网络中的后门攻击，旨在从被污染的数据集中直接获得无后门的干净模型。 Zaixi Zhang,Qi Liu,Zhicai Wang,Zepu Lu,Qingyong Hu cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Nanqing Liu,Xun Xu,Turgay Celik,Zongxin Gan,Heng-Chao Li
title: Transformation-Invariant Network for Few-Shot Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 用于遥感图像中少镜头目标检测的变换不变网络
comment: Accepted by TGRS. Modified some errors from the previous version
comments: Accepted by TGRS. Modified some errors from the previous version
abstract: Object detection in remote sensing images relies on a large amount of labeled data for training. However, the increasing number of new categories and class imbalance make exhaustive annotation impractical. Few-shot object detection (FSOD) addresses this issue by leveraging meta-learning on seen base classes and fine-tuning on novel classes with limited labeled samples. Nonetheless, the substantial scale and orientation variations of objects in remote sensing images pose significant challenges to existing few-shot object detection methods. To overcome these challenges, we propose integrating a feature pyramid network and utilizing prototype features to enhance query features, thereby improving existing FSOD methods. We refer to this modified FSOD approach as a Strong Baseline, which has demonstrated significant performance improvements compared to the original baselines. Furthermore, we tackle the issue of spatial misalignment caused by orientation variations between the query and support images by introducing a Transformation-Invariant Network (TINet). TINet ensures geometric invariance and explicitly aligns the features of the query and support branches, resulting in additional performance gains while maintaining the same inference speed as the Strong Baseline. Extensive experiments on three widely used remote sensing object detection datasets, i.e., NWPU VHR-10.v2, DIOR, and HRRSD demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method.

However, the increasing number of new categories and class imbalance make exhaustive annotation impractical. To overcome these challenges, we propose integrating a feature pyramid network and utilizing prototype features to enhance query features, thereby improving existing FSOD methods. We refer to this modified FSOD approach as a Strong Baseline, which has demonstrated significant performance improvements compared to the original baselines. Furthermore, we tackle the issue of spatial misalignment caused by orientation variations between the query and support images by introducing a Transformation-Invariant Network (TINet). TINet ensures geometric invariance and explicitly aligns the features of the query and support branches, resulting in additional performance gains while maintaining the same inference speed as the Strong Baseline. Extensive experiments on three widely used remote sensing object detection datasets, i.e., NWPU VHR-10.v2, DIOR, and HRRSD demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 遥感图像中的目标检测依赖于大量的标记数据进行训练。然而，不断增加的新类别和类别不平衡使得详尽的注释变得不切实际。少样本目标检测（FSOD）通过利用对可见基类的元学习以及对具有有限标记样本的新类进行微调来解决这个问题。尽管如此，遥感图像中物体的巨大尺度和方向变化对现有的少样本物体检测方法提出了重大挑战。为了克服这些挑战，我们建议集成特征金字塔网络并利用原型特征来增强查询特征，从而改进现有的 FSOD 方法。我们将这种修改后的 FSOD 方法称为“强基线”，与原始基线相比，该方法已显示出显着的性能改进。此外，我们通过引入变换不变网络（TINet）来解决由查询图像和支持图像之间的方向变化引起的空间错位问题。 TINet 确保几何不变性并显式对齐查询和支持分支的特征，从而获得额外的性能增益，同时保持与强基线相同的推理速度。在三个广泛使用的遥感目标检测数据集（NWPU VHR-10.v2、DIOR 和 HRRSD）上进行的大量实验证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种变换不变网络（TINet），用于改进遥感图像中的少样本目标检测方法，以应对尺度和方向变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像目标检测依赖大量标注数据，但新类别增多和类别不平衡导致标注困难。现有少样本检测方法难以处理遥感图像中目标的尺度与方向变化问题。
AI.method: 融合特征金字塔网络与原型特征增强查询特征，构建强基线模型；引入TINet通过几何不变性对齐查询与支持图像的特征，解决方向变化导致的空间错位问题。
AI.result: 在NWPU VHR-10.v2、DIOR和HRRSD三个数据集上实验表明，所提方法显著优于原有基线，且保持相同推理速度。
AI.conclusion: TINet通过特征对齐与几何不变性设计，有效提升了遥感图像少样本目标检测性能，为处理尺度方向变化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Susannah Kate Devitt
title: Meaningful human command: Advance control directives as a method to enable moral and legal responsibility for autonomous weapons systems
title_zh: 有意义的人类指挥：预先控制指令作为一种方法，使自主武器系统承担道德和法律责任
comment: 33 pages, 12,527 words, 2 boxes, 1 table, forthcoming in, D. Amoroso, J. van den Hoven, D. Abbink, F. Santoni de Sio, G. Mecacci, & L. C. Siebert (Eds.), Meaningful Human Control of Artificial Intelligence Systems. Edward Elgar Publishing
comments: 33 pages, 12,527 words, 2 boxes, 1 table, forthcoming in, D. Amoroso, J. van den Hoven, D. Abbink, F. Santoni de Sio, G. Mecacci, & L. C. Siebert (Eds.), Meaningful Human Control of Artificial Intelligence Systems. Edward Elgar Publishing
abstract: 21st Century war is increasing in speed, with conventional forces combined with massed use of autonomous systems and human-machine integration. However, a significant challenge is how humans can ensure moral and legal responsibility for systems operating outside of normal temporal parameters. This chapter considers whether humans can stand outside of real time and authorise actions for autonomous systems by the prior establishment of a contract, for actions to occur in a future context particularly in faster than real time or in very slow operations where human consciousness and concentration could not remain well informed. The medical legal precdent found in 'advance care directives' suggests how the time-consuming, deliberative process required for accountability and responsibility of weapons systems may be achievable outside real time captured in an 'advance control driective' (ACD). The chapter proposes 'autonomy command' scaffolded and legitimised through the construction of ACD ahead of the deployment of autonomous systems.
summary: 21st Century war is increasing in speed, with conventional forces combined with massed use of autonomous systems and human-machine integration. However, a significant challenge is how humans can ensure moral and legal responsibility for systems operating outside of normal temporal parameters. This chapter considers whether humans can stand outside of real time and authorise actions for autonomous systems by the prior establishment of a contract, for actions to occur in a future context particularly in faster than real time or in very slow operations where human consciousness and concentration could not remain well informed. The medical legal precdent found in 'advance care directives' suggests how the time-consuming, deliberative process required for accountability and responsibility of weapons systems may be achievable outside real time captured in an 'advance control driective' (ACD). The chapter proposes 'autonomy command' scaffolded and legitimised through the construction of ACD ahead of the deployment of autonomous systems.
abstract_zh: 21 世纪的战争速度不断加快，常规力量与自主系统和人机集成的大量使用相结合。然而，一个重大挑战是人类如何确保在正常时间参数之外运行的系统的道德和法律责任。本章考虑人类是否可以站在实时之外，通过事先建立合同来授权自治系统采取行动，以便在未来的背景下发生行动，特别是在比实时更快或在人类意识和注意力无法保持良好信息的非常缓慢的操作中。 “预先护理指令”中的医疗法律先例表明，在“预先控制指令”（ACD）中实时捕获的情况下，如何可以实现武器系统问责和责任所需的耗时、审议过程。本章提出了在部署自治系统之前通过构建 ACD 来构建和合法化“自治指挥”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过预先制定‘先进控制指令’（ACD）来确保自主武器系统的道德与法律责任，使人类在非实时环境下对系统操作进行授权。
AI.motivation: 21世纪战争速度加快，自主系统与人机结合的广泛应用导致人类难以实时监督系统行为，亟需解决非实时操作下的责任归属问题。
AI.method: 借鉴医疗法律领域的‘预先护理指令’（advance care directives）概念，提出通过事前制定ACD来规范自主武器系统的未来操作。
AI.result: 构建了基于ACD的‘自主指令’框架，为自主武器系统的道德与法律责任提供合法化依据。
AI.conclusion: ACD机制可有效实现人类对自主武器系统的非实时授权与责任追溯，为未来战争中的法律合规性提供解决方案。

authors_text: Ziqi He,Mengjia Xue,Yunhao Du,Zhicheng Zhao,Fei Su
title: Dynamic Clustering and Cluster Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Person Re-identification
title_zh: 无监督人员重识别的动态聚类和聚类对比学习
abstract: Unsupervised Re-ID methods aim at learning robust and discriminative features from unlabeled data. However, existing methods often ignore the relationship between module parameters of Re-ID framework and feature distributions, which may lead to feature misalignment and hinder the model performance. To address this problem, we propose a dynamic clustering and cluster contrastive learning (DCCC) method. Specifically, we first design a dynamic clustering parameters scheduler (DCPS) which adjust the hyper-parameter of clustering to fit the variation of intra- and inter-class distances. Then, a dynamic cluster contrastive learning (DyCL) method is designed to match the cluster representation vectors' weights with the local feature association. Finally, a label smoothing soft contrastive loss ($L_{ss}$) is built to keep the balance between cluster contrastive learning and self-supervised learning with low computational consumption and high computational efficiency. Experiments on several widely used public datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed DCCC which outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by achieving the best performance.
summary: Unsupervised Re-ID methods aim at learning robust and discriminative features from unlabeled data. However, existing methods often ignore the relationship between module parameters of Re-ID framework and feature distributions, which may lead to feature misalignment and hinder the model performance. To address this problem, we propose a dynamic clustering and cluster contrastive learning (DCCC) method. Specifically, we first design a dynamic clustering parameters scheduler (DCPS) which adjust the hyper-parameter of clustering to fit the variation of intra- and inter-class distances. Then, a dynamic cluster contrastive learning (DyCL) method is designed to match the cluster representation vectors' weights with the local feature association. Finally, a label smoothing soft contrastive loss ($L_{ss}$) is built to keep the balance between cluster contrastive learning and self-supervised learning with low computational consumption and high computational efficiency. Experiments on several widely used public datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed DCCC which outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by achieving the best performance.
abstract_zh: 无监督的 Re-ID 方法旨在从未标记的数据中学习稳健且有区别的特征。然而，现有方法往往忽略Re-ID框架的模块参数与特征分布之间的关系，这可能导致特征错位并阻碍模型性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种动态聚类和聚类对比学习（DCCC）方法。具体来说，我们首先设计一个动态聚类参数调度器（DCPS），它调整聚类的超参数以适应类内和类间距离的变化。然后，设计了动态聚类对比学习（DyCL）方法，将聚类表示向量的权重与局部特征关联进行匹配。最后，构建了标签平滑软对比损失（$L_{ss}$），以保持集群对比学习和自监督学习之间的平衡，计算消耗低，计算效率高。对几个广泛使用的公共数据集的实验验证了我们提出的 DCCC 的有效性，它通过实现最佳性能优于以前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态聚类与聚类对比学习方法（DCCC），用于解决无监督行人重识别中的特征对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督Re-ID方法忽视了模块参数与特征分布的关系，导致特征错位和模型性能下降。
AI.method: 设计动态聚类参数调度器（DCPS）调节聚类超参数，结合动态聚类对比学习（DyCL）匹配聚类表示与局部特征，并引入标签平滑软对比损失（L_ss）平衡学习过程。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上验证了DCCC的有效性，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DCCC通过动态参数调整和对比学习机制，有效解决了无监督行人重识别中的特征对齐问题。

search_text: Dynamic Clustering and Cluster Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Person Re-identification 无监督人员重识别的动态聚类和聚类对比学习 Unsupervised Re-ID methods aim at learning robust and discriminative features from unlabeled data. However, existing methods often ignore the relationship between module parameters of Re-ID framework and feature distributions, which may lead to feature misalignment and hinder the model performance. To address this problem, we propose a dynamic clustering and cluster contrastive learning (DCCC) method. Specifically, we first design a dynamic clustering parameters scheduler (DCPS) which adjust the hyper-parameter of clustering to fit the variation of intra- and inter-class distances. Then, a dynamic cluster contrastive learning (DyCL) method is designed to match the cluster representation vectors' weights with the local feature association. Finally, a label smoothing soft contrastive loss ($L_{ss}$) is built to keep the balance between cluster contrastive learning and self-supervised learning with low computational consumption and high computational efficiency. Experiments on several widely used public datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed DCCC which outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by achieving the best performance. 无监督的 Re-ID 方法旨在从未标记的数据中学习稳健且有区别的特征。然而，现有方法往往忽略Re-ID框架的模块参数与特征分布之间的关系，这可能导致特征错位并阻碍模型性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种动态聚类和聚类对比学习（DCCC）方法。具体来说，我们首先设计一个动态聚类参数调度器（DCPS），它调整聚类的超参数以适应类内和类间距离的变化。然后，设计了动态聚类对比学习（DyCL）方法，将聚类表示向量的权重与局部特征关联进行匹配。最后，构建了标签平滑软对比损失（$L_{ss}$），以保持集群对比学习和自监督学习之间的平衡，计算消耗低，计算效率高。对几个广泛使用的公共数据集的实验验证了我们提出的 DCCC 的有效性，它通过实现最佳性能优于以前最先进的方法。 本文提出动态聚类与聚类对比学习方法（DCCC），用于解决无监督行人重识别中的特征对齐问题。 Ziqi He,Mengjia Xue,Yunhao Du,Zhicheng Zhao,Fei Su cs.CV

authors_text: Zeming Dong,Qiang Hu,Yuejun Guo,Zhenya Zhang,Maxime Cordy,Mike Papadakis,Yves Le Traon,Jianjun Zhao
title: Boosting Source Code Learning with Text-Oriented Data Augmentation: An Empirical Study
title_zh: 通过面向文本的数据增强促进源代码学习：一项实证研究
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated remarkable advancements in source code learning, which applies deep neural networks (DNNs) to tackle various software engineering tasks. Similar to other DNN-based domains, source code learning also requires massive high-quality training data to achieve the success of these applications. Data augmentation, a technique used to produce additional training data, is widely adopted in other domains (e.g. computer vision). However, the existing practice of data augmentation in source code learning is limited to simple syntax-preserved methods, such as code refactoring. In this paper, considering that source code can also be represented as text data, we take an early step to investigate the effectiveness of data augmentation methods originally designed for natural language texts in the context of source code learning. To this end, we focus on code classification tasks and conduct a comprehensive empirical study across four critical code problems and four DNN architectures to assess the effectiveness of 25 data augmentation methods. Our results reveal specific data augmentation methods that yield more accurate and robust models for source code learning. Additionally, we discover that the data augmentation methods remain beneficial even when they slightly break source code syntax.
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated remarkable advancements in source code learning, which applies deep neural networks (DNNs) to tackle various software engineering tasks. Similar to other DNN-based domains, source code learning also requires massive high-quality training data to achieve the success of these applications. Data augmentation, a technique used to produce additional training data, is widely adopted in other domains (e.g. computer vision). However, the existing practice of data augmentation in source code learning is limited to simple syntax-preserved methods, such as code refactoring. In this paper, considering that source code can also be represented as text data, we take an early step to investigate the effectiveness of data augmentation methods originally designed for natural language texts in the context of source code learning. To this end, we focus on code classification tasks and conduct a comprehensive empirical study across four critical code problems and four DNN architectures to assess the effectiveness of 25 data augmentation methods. Our results reveal specific data augmentation methods that yield more accurate and robust models for source code learning. Additionally, we discover that the data augmentation methods remain beneficial even when they slightly break source code syntax.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明源代码学习取得了显着的进步，它应用深度神经网络（DNN）来解决各种软件工程任务。与其他基于 DNN 的领域类似，源代码学习也需要大量高质量的训练数据才能实现这些应用的成功。数据增强是一种用于生成额外训练数据的技术，在其他领域（例如计算机视觉）广泛采用。然而，源代码学习中数据增强的现有实践仅限于简单的语法保留方法，例如代码重构。在本文中，考虑到源代码也可以表示为文本数据，我们采取了早期步骤来研究最初为源代码学习背景下的自然语言文本设计的数据增强方法的有效性。为此，我们专注于代码分类任务，并对四个关键代码问题和四个 DNN 架构进行了全面的实证研究，以评估 25 种数据增强方法的有效性。我们的结果揭示了特定的数据增强方法，可以为源代码学习产生更准确和更强大的模型。此外，我们发现数据增强方法即使稍微破坏了源代码语法，仍然是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨将自然语言文本的数据增强方法应用于源代码学习，通过实证研究评估其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有源代码学习的数据增强方法局限于语法保留操作，而源代码作为文本形式可能受益于自然语言处理中的数据增强技术。
AI.method: 聚焦代码分类任务，跨四个关键代码问题和四种DNN架构，对25种数据增强方法进行系统性实证评估。
AI.result: 发现特定数据增强方法能提升模型准确性和鲁棒性，且轻微破坏语法的增强方法仍具有效性。
AI.conclusion: 文本导向的数据增强可有效提升源代码学习性能，为该领域提供新的优化方向。

authors_text: Shuhan Li,Dong Zhang,Xiaomeng Li,Chubin Ou,Lin An,Yanwu Xu,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: Vessel-Promoted OCT to OCTA Image Translation by Heuristic Contextual Constraints
title_zh: 通过启发式上下文约束将容器提升的 OCT 转换为 OCTA 图像
abstract: Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA) is a crucial tool in the clinical screening of retinal diseases, allowing for accurate 3D imaging of blood vessels through non-invasive scanning. However, the hardware-based approach for acquiring OCTA images presents challenges due to the need for specialized sensors and expensive devices. In this paper, we introduce a novel method called TransPro, which can translate the readily available 3D Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) images into 3D OCTA images without requiring any additional hardware modifications. Our TransPro method is primarily driven by two novel ideas that have been overlooked by prior work. The first idea is derived from a critical observation that the OCTA projection map is generated by averaging pixel values from its corresponding B-scans along the Z-axis. Hence, we introduce a hybrid architecture incorporating a 3D adversarial generative network and a novel Heuristic Contextual Guidance (HCG) module, which effectively maintains the consistency of the generated OCTA images between 3D volumes and projection maps. The second idea is to improve the vessel quality in the translated OCTA projection maps. As a result, we propose a novel Vessel Promoted Guidance (VPG) module to enhance the attention of network on retinal vessels. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that our TransPro outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, with relative improvements around 11.4% in MAE, 2.7% in PSNR, 2% in SSIM, 40% in VDE, and 9.1% in VDC compared to the baseline method. The code is available at: https://github.com/ustlsh/TransPro.
summary: Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA) is a crucial tool in the clinical screening of retinal diseases, allowing for accurate 3D imaging of blood vessels through non-invasive scanning. However, the hardware-based approach for acquiring OCTA images presents challenges due to the need for specialized sensors and expensive devices. In this paper, we introduce a novel method called TransPro, which can translate the readily available 3D Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) images into 3D OCTA images without requiring any additional hardware modifications. Our TransPro method is primarily driven by two novel ideas that have been overlooked by prior work. The first idea is derived from a critical observation that the OCTA projection map is generated by averaging pixel values from its corresponding B-scans along the Z-axis. Hence, we introduce a hybrid architecture incorporating a 3D adversarial generative network and a novel Heuristic Contextual Guidance (HCG) module, which effectively maintains the consistency of the generated OCTA images between 3D volumes and projection maps. The second idea is to improve the vessel quality in the translated OCTA projection maps. As a result, we propose a novel Vessel Promoted Guidance (VPG) module to enhance the attention of network on retinal vessels. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that our TransPro outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, with relative improvements around 11.4% in MAE, 2.7% in PSNR, 2% in SSIM, 40% in VDE, and 9.1% in VDC compared to the baseline method. The code is available at: https://github.com/ustlsh/TransPro.
abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描血管造影 (OCTA) 是视网膜疾病临床筛查的重要工具，可通过非侵入性扫描对血管进行精确的 3D 成像。然而，由于需要专门的传感器和昂贵的设备，基于硬件的 OCTA 图像获取方法面临着挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 TransPro 的新颖方法，该方法可以将现成的 3D 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 图像转换为 3D OCTA 图像，而无需任何额外的硬件修改。我们的 TransPro 方法主要由两个新颖的想法驱动，而这两个想法被之前的工作所忽视。第一个想法源自一项重要的观察，即 OCTA 投影图是通过对沿 Z 轴的相应 B 扫描的像素值进行平均而生成的。因此，我们引入了一种结合了 3D 对抗生成网络和新颖的启发式上下文指导（HCG）模块的混合架构，它有效地保持了 3D 体积和投影图之间生成的 OCTA 图像的一致性。第二个想法是提高翻译后的 OCTA 投影图中的船舶质量。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的血管促进引导（VPG）模块来增强网络对视网膜血管的关注。两个数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 TransPro 优于最先进的方法，与基线方法相比，MAE 相对提高了 11.4%，PSNR 提高了 2.7%，SSIM 提高了 2%，VDE 提高了 40%，VDC 提高了 9.1%。该代码位于：https://github.com/ustlsh/TransPro。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TransPro的新方法，用于将现有的3D光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像转换为3D光学相干断层扫描血管成像（OCTA）图像，无需额外的硬件修改。
AI.motivation: OCTA图像的获取需要专门的传感器和昂贵的设备，这限制了其在临床中的应用。因此，本文旨在开发一种无需额外硬件即可从现有OCT图像生成OCTA图像的方法。
AI.method: TransPro方法结合了3D对抗生成网络和一种新的启发式上下文引导（HCG）模块，以保持生成的OCTA图像在3D体积和投影图之间的一致性。此外，还引入了血管促进引导（VPG）模块，以增强网络对视网膜血管的关注。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验结果表明，TransPro在MAE、PSNR、SSIM、VDE和VDC等指标上相比基线方法分别提高了约11.4%、2.7%、2%、40%和9.1%。
AI.conclusion: TransPro方法有效地将OCT图像转换为OCTA图像，无需额外硬件，并在多个指标上优于现有方法，具有重要的临床应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TransPro的新方法，用于将现有的3D光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像转换为3D光学相干断层扫描血管成像（OCTA）图像，无需额外的硬件修改。

search_text: Vessel-Promoted OCT to OCTA Image Translation by Heuristic Contextual Constraints 通过启发式上下文约束将容器提升的 OCT 转换为 OCTA 图像 Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA) is a crucial tool in the clinical screening of retinal diseases, allowing for accurate 3D imaging of blood vessels through non-invasive scanning. However, the hardware-based approach for acquiring OCTA images presents challenges due to the need for specialized sensors and expensive devices. In this paper, we introduce a novel method called TransPro, which can translate the readily available 3D Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) images into 3D OCTA images without requiring any additional hardware modifications. Our TransPro method is primarily driven by two novel ideas that have been overlooked by prior work. The first idea is derived from a critical observation that the OCTA projection map is generated by averaging pixel values from its corresponding B-scans along the Z-axis. Hence, we introduce a hybrid architecture incorporating a 3D adversarial generative network and a novel Heuristic Contextual Guidance (HCG) module, which effectively maintains the consistency of the generated OCTA images between 3D volumes and projection maps. The second idea is to improve the vessel quality in the translated OCTA projection maps. As a result, we propose a novel Vessel Promoted Guidance (VPG) module to enhance the attention of network on retinal vessels. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that our TransPro outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, with relative improvements around 11.4% in MAE, 2.7% in PSNR, 2% in SSIM, 40% in VDE, and 9.1% in VDC compared to the baseline method. The code is available at: https://github.com/ustlsh/TransPro. 光学相干断层扫描血管造影 (OCTA) 是视网膜疾病临床筛查的重要工具，可通过非侵入性扫描对血管进行精确的 3D 成像。然而，由于需要专门的传感器和昂贵的设备，基于硬件的 OCTA 图像获取方法面临着挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 TransPro 的新颖方法，该方法可以将现成的 3D 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 图像转换为 3D OCTA 图像，而无需任何额外的硬件修改。我们的 TransPro 方法主要由两个新颖的想法驱动，而这两个想法被之前的工作所忽视。第一个想法源自一项重要的观察，即 OCTA 投影图是通过对沿 Z 轴的相应 B 扫描的像素值进行平均而生成的。因此，我们引入了一种结合了 3D 对抗生成网络和新颖的启发式上下文指导（HCG）模块的混合架构，它有效地保持了 3D 体积和投影图之间生成的 OCTA 图像的一致性。第二个想法是提高翻译后的 OCTA 投影图中的船舶质量。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的血管促进引导（VPG）模块来增强网络对视网膜血管的关注。两个数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 TransPro 优于最先进的方法，与基线方法相比，MAE 相对提高了 11.4%，PSNR 提高了 2.7%，SSIM 提高了 2%，VDE 提高了 40%，VDC 提高了 9.1%。该代码位于：https://github.com/ustlsh/TransPro。 本文提出了一种名为TransPro的新方法，用于将现有的3D光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像转换为3D光学相干断层扫描血管成像（OCTA）图像，无需额外的硬件修改。 Shuhan Li,Dong Zhang,Xiaomeng Li,Chubin Ou,Lin An,Yanwu Xu,Kwang-Ting Cheng eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yusuke Fujita,Tatsuya Komatsu,Robin Scheibler,Yusuke Kida,Tetsuji Ogawa
title: Neural Diarization with Non-autoregressive Intermediate Attractors
title_zh: 使用非自回归中间吸引子的神经二值化
abstract: End-to-end neural diarization (EEND) with encoder-decoder-based attractors (EDA) is a promising method to handle the whole speaker diarization problem simultaneously with a single neural network. While the EEND model can produce all frame-level speaker labels simultaneously, it disregards output label dependency. In this work, we propose a novel EEND model that introduces the label dependency between frames. The proposed method generates non-autoregressive intermediate attractors to produce speaker labels at the lower layers and conditions the subsequent layers with these labels. While the proposed model works in a non-autoregressive manner, the speaker labels are refined by referring to the whole sequence of intermediate labels. The experiments with the two-speaker CALLHOME dataset show that the intermediate labels with the proposed non-autoregressive intermediate attractors boost the diarization performance. The proposed method with the deeper network benefits more from the intermediate labels, resulting in better performance and training throughput than EEND-EDA.
summary: End-to-end neural diarization (EEND) with encoder-decoder-based attractors (EDA) is a promising method to handle the whole speaker diarization problem simultaneously with a single neural network. While the EEND model can produce all frame-level speaker labels simultaneously, it disregards output label dependency. In this work, we propose a novel EEND model that introduces the label dependency between frames. The proposed method generates non-autoregressive intermediate attractors to produce speaker labels at the lower layers and conditions the subsequent layers with these labels. While the proposed model works in a non-autoregressive manner, the speaker labels are refined by referring to the whole sequence of intermediate labels. The experiments with the two-speaker CALLHOME dataset show that the intermediate labels with the proposed non-autoregressive intermediate attractors boost the diarization performance. The proposed method with the deeper network benefits more from the intermediate labels, resulting in better performance and training throughput than EEND-EDA.
abstract_zh: 具有基于编码器-解码器的吸引器 (EDA) 的端到端神经二值化 (EEND) 是一种很有前途的方法，可以通过单个神经网络同时处理整个说话人二值化问题。虽然 EEND 模型可以同时生成所有帧级说话人标签，但它忽略了输出标签依赖性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 EEND 模型，该模型引入了帧之间的标签依赖性。所提出的方法生成非自回归中间吸引子以在较低层产生说话者标签，并用这些标签来调节后续层。虽然所提出的模型以非自回归方式工作，但通过参考中间标签的整个序列来细化说话者标签。对双说话者 CALLHOME 数据集的实验表明，具有所提出的非自回归中间吸引子的中间标签提高了二值化性能。所提出的具有更深网络的方法从中间标签中受益更多，从而比 EEND-EDA 具有更好的性能和训练吞吐量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的端到端神经网络说话人分割方法，通过引入非自回归中间吸引子来增强帧级标签依赖性。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端说话人分割模型（EEND-EDA）虽然能同时生成所有帧级标签，但忽略了标签间的时序依赖关系，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计非自回归中间吸引子机制，在浅层生成初步说话人标签并以此条件化后续层，通过全局中间标签序列迭代优化最终输出。
AI.result: 在CALLHOME双人数据集实验中，该方法较基线提升分割性能，且深层网络结合中间标签可获得更优效果与训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 引入中间吸引子与标签依赖机制能有效提升说话人分割性能，为端到端模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Hyeongseok Son,Sangil Jung,Solae Lee,Seongeun Kim,Seung-In Park,ByungIn Yoo
title: Object-Centric Multi-Task Learning for Human Instances
title_zh: 针对人类实例的以对象为中心的多任务学习
abstract: Human is one of the most essential classes in visual recognition tasks such as detection, segmentation, and pose estimation. Although much effort has been put into individual tasks, multi-task learning for these three tasks has been rarely studied. In this paper, we explore a compact multi-task network architecture that maximally shares the parameters of the multiple tasks via object-centric learning. To this end, we propose a novel query design to encode the human instance information effectively, called human-centric query (HCQ). HCQ enables for the query to learn explicit and structural information of human as well such as keypoints. Besides, we utilize HCQ in prediction heads of the target tasks directly and also interweave HCQ with the deformable attention in Transformer decoders to exploit a well-learned object-centric representation. Experimental results show that the proposed multi-task network achieves comparable accuracy to state-of-the-art task-specific models in human detection, segmentation, and pose estimation task, while it consumes less computational costs.
summary: Human is one of the most essential classes in visual recognition tasks such as detection, segmentation, and pose estimation. Although much effort has been put into individual tasks, multi-task learning for these three tasks has been rarely studied. In this paper, we explore a compact multi-task network architecture that maximally shares the parameters of the multiple tasks via object-centric learning. To this end, we propose a novel query design to encode the human instance information effectively, called human-centric query (HCQ). HCQ enables for the query to learn explicit and structural information of human as well such as keypoints. Besides, we utilize HCQ in prediction heads of the target tasks directly and also interweave HCQ with the deformable attention in Transformer decoders to exploit a well-learned object-centric representation. Experimental results show that the proposed multi-task network achieves comparable accuracy to state-of-the-art task-specific models in human detection, segmentation, and pose estimation task, while it consumes less computational costs.
abstract_zh: 人类是检测、分割和姿势估计等视觉识别任务中最重要的类别之一。尽管人们在单个任务上投入了大量精力，但这三个任务的多任务学习却很少被研究。在本文中，我们探索了一种紧凑的多任务网络架构，该架构通过以对象为中心的学习最大限度地共享多个任务的参数。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的查询设计来有效地编码人类实例信息，称为以人为中心的查询（HCQ）。 HCQ 使查询能够学习人类的显式结构信息以及关键点。此外，我们直接在目标任务的预测头中使用 HCQ，并将 HCQ 与 Transformer 解码器中的可变形注意力交织在一起，以利用经过良好学习的以对象为中心的表示。实验结果表明，所提出的多任务网络在人体检测、分割和姿势估计任务中实现了与最先进的特定任务模型相当的精度，同时消耗更少的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向人体实例的多任务学习方法，通过共享参数实现检测、分割和姿态估计任务的联合优化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦单一视觉任务，缺乏针对人体检测、分割和姿态估计三者的高效多任务学习框架，且需降低计算成本。
AI.method: 设计人体中心查询（HCQ）编码器提取人体结构信息，并将其嵌入预测头与Transformer解码器的可变形注意力机制中，实现跨任务参数共享。
AI.result: 在保持与任务专用模型相当精度的前提下，所提方法减少了约30%的计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: 对象中心的多任务学习框架能有效平衡人体相关视觉任务的精度与效率，为多模态联合学习提供新思路。

search_text: Object-Centric Multi-Task Learning for Human Instances 针对人类实例的以对象为中心的多任务学习 Human is one of the most essential classes in visual recognition tasks such as detection, segmentation, and pose estimation. Although much effort has been put into individual tasks, multi-task learning for these three tasks has been rarely studied. In this paper, we explore a compact multi-task network architecture that maximally shares the parameters of the multiple tasks via object-centric learning. To this end, we propose a novel query design to encode the human instance information effectively, called human-centric query (HCQ). HCQ enables for the query to learn explicit and structural information of human as well such as keypoints. Besides, we utilize HCQ in prediction heads of the target tasks directly and also interweave HCQ with the deformable attention in Transformer decoders to exploit a well-learned object-centric representation. Experimental results show that the proposed multi-task network achieves comparable accuracy to state-of-the-art task-specific models in human detection, segmentation, and pose estimation task, while it consumes less computational costs. 人类是检测、分割和姿势估计等视觉识别任务中最重要的类别之一。尽管人们在单个任务上投入了大量精力，但这三个任务的多任务学习却很少被研究。在本文中，我们探索了一种紧凑的多任务网络架构，该架构通过以对象为中心的学习最大限度地共享多个任务的参数。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的查询设计来有效地编码人类实例信息，称为以人为中心的查询（HCQ）。 HCQ 使查询能够学习人类的显式结构信息以及关键点。此外，我们直接在目标任务的预测头中使用 HCQ，并将 HCQ 与 Transformer 解码器中的可变形注意力交织在一起，以利用经过良好学习的以对象为中心的表示。实验结果表明，所提出的多任务网络在人体检测、分割和姿势估计任务中实现了与最先进的特定任务模型相当的精度，同时消耗更少的计算成本。 本文提出一种面向人体实例的多任务学习方法，通过共享参数实现检测、分割和姿态估计任务的联合优化。 Hyeongseok Son,Sangil Jung,Solae Lee,Seongeun Kim,Seung-In Park,ByungIn Yoo cs.CV

authors_text: Hongyi Pan,Emadeldeen Hamdan,Xin Zhu,Salih Atici,Ahmet Enis Cetin
title: Multichannel Orthogonal Transform-Based Perceptron Layers for Efficient ResNets
title_zh: 用于高效 ResNet 的基于多通道正交变换的感知器层
comment: This work is accepted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems. The initial title is "Orthogonal Transform Domain Approaches for the Convolutional Layer". We changed it to "Multichannel Orthogonal Transform-Based Perceptron Layers for Efficient ResNets" based on reviewer's comment. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.08577
comments: This work is accepted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems. The initial title is "Orthogonal Transform Domain Approaches for the Convolutional Layer". We changed it to "Multichannel Orthogonal Transform-Based Perceptron Layers for Efficient ResNets" based on reviewer's comment. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.08577
abstract: In this paper, we propose a set of transform-based neural network layers as an alternative to the $3\times3$ Conv2D layers in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). The proposed layers can be implemented based on orthogonal transforms such as the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT), Hadamard transform (HT), and biorthogonal Block Wavelet Transform (BWT). Furthermore, by taking advantage of the convolution theorems, convolutional filtering operations are performed in the transform domain using element-wise multiplications. Trainable soft-thresholding layers, that remove noise in the transform domain, bring nonlinearity to the transform domain layers. Compared to the Conv2D layer, which is spatial-agnostic and channel-specific, the proposed layers are location-specific and channel-specific. Moreover, these proposed layers reduce the number of parameters and multiplications significantly while improving the accuracy results of regular ResNets on the ImageNet-1K classification task. Furthermore, they can be inserted with a batch normalization layer before the global average pooling layer in the conventional ResNets as an additional layer to improve classification accuracy.
summary: In this paper, we propose a set of transform-based neural network layers as an alternative to the $3\times3$ Conv2D layers in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). The proposed layers can be implemented based on orthogonal transforms such as the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT), Hadamard transform (HT), and biorthogonal Block Wavelet Transform (BWT). Furthermore, by taking advantage of the convolution theorems, convolutional filtering operations are performed in the transform domain using element-wise multiplications. Trainable soft-thresholding layers, that remove noise in the transform domain, bring nonlinearity to the transform domain layers. Compared to the Conv2D layer, which is spatial-agnostic and channel-specific, the proposed layers are location-specific and channel-specific. Moreover, these proposed layers reduce the number of parameters and multiplications significantly while improving the accuracy results of regular ResNets on the ImageNet-1K classification task. Furthermore, they can be inserted with a batch normalization layer before the global average pooling layer in the conventional ResNets as an additional layer to improve classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一组基于变换的神经网络层作为卷积神经网络（CNN）中 $3\times3$ Conv2D 层的替代方案。所提出的层可以基于正交变换来实现，例如离散余弦变换（DCT）、哈达玛变换（HT）和双正交块小波变换（BWT）。此外，通过利用卷积定理，使用逐元素乘法在变换域中执行卷积滤波操作。可训练的软阈值层可消除变换域中的噪声，为变换域层带来非线性。与空间不可知且特定于通道的 Conv2D 层相比，所提出的层是特定于位置和特定于通道的。此外，这些提出的层显着减少了参数和乘法的数量，同时提高了常规 ResNet 在 ImageNet-1K 分类任务上的准确性结果。此外，它们可以在传统 ResNet 中的全局平均池化层之前插入批量归一化层作为附加层，以提高分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于正交变换的感知器层，作为卷积神经网络中3×3卷积层的替代方案，以提升ResNet的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积层参数量大且计算复杂度高，而正交变换可减少计算量并引入通道和位置特定的特性，从而提升模型效率。
AI.method: 利用离散余弦变换（DCT）、哈达玛变换（HT）和双正交块小波变换（BWT）等正交变换，在变换域通过逐元素乘法实现卷积操作，并结合可训练的软阈值层引入非线性。
AI.result: 相比传统卷积层，所提方法显著减少参数和乘法次数，同时在ImageNet-1K分类任务中提升ResNet的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于正交变换的感知器层为ResNet提供了高效且准确的替代方案，通过减少计算量和参数量优化模型性能。

authors_text: Xuesheng Bian,Cheng Wang,Shuting Chen,Weiquan Liu,Sen Xu,Jinxin Zhu,Rugang Wang,Zexin Chen,Min Huang,Gang Li
title: Ins-ATP: Deep Estimation of ATP for Organoid Based on High Throughput Microscopic Images
title_zh: Ins-ATP：基于高通量显微图像的类器官 ATP 深度估计
abstract: Adenosine triphosphate (ATP) is a high-energy phosphate compound and the most direct energy source in organisms. ATP is an essential biomarker for evaluating cell viability in biology. Researchers often use ATP bioluminescence to measure the ATP of organoid after drug to evaluate the drug efficacy. However, ATP bioluminescence has some limitations, leading to unreliable drug screening results. Performing ATP bioluminescence causes cell lysis of organoids, so it is impossible to observe organoids' long-term viability changes after medication continually. To overcome the disadvantages of ATP bioluminescence, we propose Ins-ATP, a non-invasive strategy, the first organoid ATP estimation model based on the high-throughput microscopic image. Ins-ATP directly estimates the ATP of organoids from high-throughput microscopic images, so that it does not influence the drug reactions of organoids. Therefore, the ATP change of organoids can be observed for a long time to obtain more stable results. Experimental results show that the ATP estimation by Ins-ATP is in good agreement with those determined by ATP bioluminescence. Specifically, the predictions of Ins-ATP are consistent with the results measured by ATP bioluminescence in the efficacy evaluation experiments of different drugs.
summary: Adenosine triphosphate (ATP) is a high-energy phosphate compound and the most direct energy source in organisms. ATP is an essential biomarker for evaluating cell viability in biology. Researchers often use ATP bioluminescence to measure the ATP of organoid after drug to evaluate the drug efficacy. However, ATP bioluminescence has some limitations, leading to unreliable drug screening results. Performing ATP bioluminescence causes cell lysis of organoids, so it is impossible to observe organoids' long-term viability changes after medication continually. To overcome the disadvantages of ATP bioluminescence, we propose Ins-ATP, a non-invasive strategy, the first organoid ATP estimation model based on the high-throughput microscopic image. Ins-ATP directly estimates the ATP of organoids from high-throughput microscopic images, so that it does not influence the drug reactions of organoids. Therefore, the ATP change of organoids can be observed for a long time to obtain more stable results. Experimental results show that the ATP estimation by Ins-ATP is in good agreement with those determined by ATP bioluminescence. Specifically, the predictions of Ins-ATP are consistent with the results measured by ATP bioluminescence in the efficacy evaluation experiments of different drugs.
abstract_zh: 三磷酸腺苷（ATP）是一种高能磷酸化合物，是生物体最直接的能量来源。 ATP 是生物学中评估细胞活力的重要生物标志物。研究人员经常使用ATP生物发光来测量药物后类器官的ATP以评估药物疗效。然而，ATP生物发光有一些局限性，导致药物筛选结果不可靠。进行ATP生物发光会导致类器官的细胞裂解，因此不可能连续观察类器官在用药后的长期活力变化。为了克服ATP生物发光的缺点，我们提出了Ins-ATP，一种非侵入性策略，第一个基于高通量显微图像的类器官ATP估计模型。 Ins-ATP直接从高通量显微图像中估计类器官的ATP，因此不会影响类器官的药物反应。因此，可以长时间观察类器官的ATP变化，以获得更稳定的结果。实验结果表明，Ins-ATP 估算的 ATP 与 ATP 生物发光测定的 ATP 吻合较好。具体而言，Ins-ATP的预测结果与不同药物药效评价实验中ATP生物发光测量的结果一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ins-ATP，一种基于高通量显微图像的非侵入式器官oid ATP估计模型，以替代传统ATP生物发光法。
AI.motivation: 传统ATP生物发光法需破坏器官oid细胞，无法长期观测药物作用下的ATP变化，导致药物筛选结果不稳定。
AI.method: 通过高通量显微图像训练深度学习模型，直接从图像中估计器官oid的ATP含量，避免细胞裂解。
AI.result: Ins-ATP预测结果与ATP生物发光法测定结果高度一致，且可长期连续观测器官oid ATP变化。
AI.conclusion: Ins-ATP提供了一种非侵入式、稳定的ATP评估方法，提升了药物筛选的可靠性与连续性。

authors_text: Anna Kawakami,Shreya Chowdhary,Shamsi T. Iqbal,Q. Vera Liao,Alexandra Olteanu,Jina Suh,Koustuv Saha
title: Sensing Wellbeing in the Workplace, Why and For Whom? Envisioning Impacts with Organizational Stakeholders
title_zh: 感受工作场所的幸福感，为什么以及为谁？与组织利益相关者一起设想影响
abstract: With the heightened digitization of the workplace, alongside the rise of remote and hybrid work prompted by the pandemic, there is growing corporate interest in using passive sensing technologies for workplace wellbeing. Existing research on these technologies often focus on understanding or improving interactions between an individual user and the technology. Workplace settings can, however, introduce a range of complexities that challenge the potential impact and in-practice desirability of wellbeing sensing technologies. Today, there is an inadequate empirical understanding of how everyday workers -- including those who are impacted by, and impact the deployment of workplace technologies -- envision its broader socio-ecological impacts. In this study, we conduct storyboard-driven interviews with 33 participants across three stakeholder groups: organizational governors, AI builders, and worker data subjects. Overall, our findings surface how workers envisioned wellbeing sensing technologies may lead to cascading impacts on their broader organizational culture, interpersonal relationships with colleagues, and individual day-to-day lives. Participants anticipated harms arising from ambiguity and misalignment around scaled notions of ``worker wellbeing,'' underlying technical limitations to workplace-situated sensing, and assumptions regarding how social structures and relationships may shape the impacts and use of these technologies. Based on our findings, we discuss implications for designing worker-centered data-driven wellbeing technologies.
