Overall, our findings surface how workers envisioned wellbeing sensing technologies may lead to cascading impacts on their broader organizational culture, interpersonal relationships with colleagues, and individual day-to-day lives. Participants anticipated harms arising from ambiguity and misalignment around scaled notions of ``worker wellbeing,'' underlying technical limitations to workplace-situated sensing, and assumptions regarding how social structures and relationships may shape the impacts and use of these technologies. Based on our findings, we discuss implications for designing worker-centered data-driven wellbeing technologies.
abstract_zh: 随着工作场所数字化程度的提高，以及疫情引发的远程和混合工作的兴起，企业对使用被动传感技术来改善工作场所福祉的兴趣日益浓厚。对这些技术的现有研究通常侧重于理解或改进单个用户与技术之间的交互。然而，工作场所设置可能会带来一系列复杂性，从而挑战健康传感技术的潜在影响和实际需求。如今，对于日常工作人员（包括那些受工作场所技术影响并影响工作场所技术部署的人）如何设想其更广泛的社会生态影响，我们还缺乏充分的实证理解。在这项研究中，我们对来自三个利益相关群体的 33 名参与者进行了故事板驱动的访谈：组织管理者、人工智能构建者和工人数据主体。总体而言，我们的研究结果揭示了员工所设想的健康传感技术如何对其更广泛的组织文化、与同事的人际关系以及个人日常生活产生连锁影响。参与者预计，由于“工人福祉”概念的模糊性和错位、工作场所感知的潜在技术限制以及关于社会结构和关系如何影响这些技术的影响和使用的假设，会产生危害。根据我们的发现，我们讨论了设计以工人为中心的数据驱动的健康技术的影响。

AI.tldr: 探讨职场幸福感感知技术对组织利益相关者的影响及其潜在挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注个体与技术的互动，忽视职场环境中的技术局限性、社会结构假设及复杂影响。
AI.method: 通过故事板驱动的访谈，调研33名组织管理者、AI开发者及工人数据主体的视角。
AI.result: 发现幸福感技术可能引发组织文化、人际关系及个人生活的连锁影响，并暴露技术局限性与社会结构假设的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 需以工人为核心设计数据驱动的幸福感技术，充分考虑其社会生态影响与伦理风险。

search_text: Sensing Wellbeing in the Workplace, Why and For Whom? Envisioning Impacts with Organizational Stakeholders 感受工作场所的幸福感，为什么以及为谁？与组织利益相关者一起设想影响 With the heightened digitization of the workplace, alongside the rise of remote and hybrid work prompted by the pandemic, there is growing corporate interest in using passive sensing technologies for workplace wellbeing. Existing research on these technologies often focus on understanding or improving interactions between an individual user and the technology. Workplace settings can, however, introduce a range of complexities that challenge the potential impact and in-practice desirability of wellbeing sensing technologies. Today, there is an inadequate empirical understanding of how everyday workers -- including those who are impacted by, and impact the deployment of workplace technologies -- envision its broader socio-ecological impacts. In this study, we conduct storyboard-driven interviews with 33 participants across three stakeholder groups: organizational governors, AI builders, and worker data subjects. Overall, our findings surface how workers envisioned wellbeing sensing technologies may lead to cascading impacts on their broader organizational culture, interpersonal relationships with colleagues, and individual day-to-day lives. Participants anticipated harms arising from ambiguity and misalignment around scaled notions of ``worker wellbeing,'' underlying technical limitations to workplace-situated sensing, and assumptions regarding how social structures and relationships may shape the impacts and use of these technologies. Based on our findings, we discuss implications for designing worker-centered data-driven wellbeing technologies. 随着工作场所数字化程度的提高，以及疫情引发的远程和混合工作的兴起，企业对使用被动传感技术来改善工作场所福祉的兴趣日益浓厚。对这些技术的现有研究通常侧重于理解或改进单个用户与技术之间的交互。然而，工作场所设置可能会带来一系列复杂性，从而挑战健康传感技术的潜在影响和实际需求。如今，对于日常工作人员（包括那些受工作场所技术影响并影响工作场所技术部署的人）如何设想其更广泛的社会生态影响，我们还缺乏充分的实证理解。在这项研究中，我们对来自三个利益相关群体的 33 名参与者进行了故事板驱动的访谈：组织管理者、人工智能构建者和工人数据主体。总体而言，我们的研究结果揭示了员工所设想的健康传感技术如何对其更广泛的组织文化、与同事的人际关系以及个人日常生活产生连锁影响。参与者预计，由于“工人福祉”概念的模糊性和错位、工作场所感知的潜在技术限制以及关于社会结构和关系如何影响这些技术的影响和使用的假设，会产生危害。根据我们的发现，我们讨论了设计以工人为中心的数据驱动的健康技术的影响。 探讨职场幸福感感知技术对组织利益相关者的影响及其潜在挑战。 Anna Kawakami,Shreya Chowdhary,Shamsi T. Iqbal,Q. Vera Liao,Alexandra Olteanu,Jina Suh,Koustuv Saha cs.HC

authors_text: Guangyao Zheng,Michael A. Jacobs,Vladimir Braverman,Vishwa S. Parekh
title: Asynchronous Decentralized Federated Lifelong Learning for Landmark Localization in Medical Imaging
title_zh: 用于医学成像里程碑定位的异步分散联合终身学习
abstract: Federated learning is a recent development in the machine learning area that allows a system of devices to train on one or more tasks without sharing their data to a single location or device. However, this framework still requires a centralized global model to consolidate individual models into one, and the devices train synchronously, which both can be potential bottlenecks for using federated learning. In this paper, we propose a novel method of asynchronous decentralized federated lifelong learning (ADFLL) method that inherits the merits of federated learning and can train on multiple tasks simultaneously without the need for a central node or synchronous training. Thus, overcoming the potential drawbacks of conventional federated learning. We demonstrate excellent performance on the brain tumor segmentation (BRATS) dataset for localizing the left ventricle on multiple image sequences and image orientation. Our framework allows agents to achieve the best performance with a mean distance error of 7.81, better than the conventional all-knowing agent's mean distance error of 11.78, and significantly (p=0.01) better than a conventional lifelong learning agent with a distance error of 15.17 after eight rounds of training. In addition, all ADFLL agents have comparable or better performance than a conventional LL agent. In conclusion, we developed an ADFLL framework with excellent performance and speed-up compared to conventional RL agents.
summary: Federated learning is a recent development in the machine learning area that allows a system of devices to train on one or more tasks without sharing their data to a single location or device. However, this framework still requires a centralized global model to consolidate individual models into one, and the devices train synchronously, which both can be potential bottlenecks for using federated learning. In this paper, we propose a novel method of asynchronous decentralized federated lifelong learning (ADFLL) method that inherits the merits of federated learning and can train on multiple tasks simultaneously without the need for a central node or synchronous training. Thus, overcoming the potential drawbacks of conventional federated learning. We demonstrate excellent performance on the brain tumor segmentation (BRATS) dataset for localizing the left ventricle on multiple image sequences and image orientation. Our framework allows agents to achieve the best performance with a mean distance error of 7.81, better than the conventional all-knowing agent's mean distance error of 11.78, and significantly (p=0.01) better than a conventional lifelong learning agent with a distance error of 15.17 after eight rounds of training. In addition, all ADFLL agents have comparable or better performance than a conventional LL agent. In conclusion, we developed an ADFLL framework with excellent performance and speed-up compared to conventional RL agents.
abstract_zh: 联合学习是机器学习领域的最新发展，它允许设备系统训练一项或多项任务，而无需将数据共享到单个位置或设备。然而，该框架仍然需要一个集中的全局模型来将各个模型整合为一个模型，并且设备同步训练，这两者都可能成为使用联邦学习的潜在瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的异步分散联邦终身学习（ADFLL）方法，该方法继承了联邦学习的优点，可以同时训练多个任务，而不需要中心节点或同步训练。因此，克服了传统联邦学习的潜在缺点。我们在脑肿瘤分割（BRATS）数据集上展示了在多个图像序列和图像方向上定位左心室的出色性能。我们的框架允许智能体达到最佳性能，平均距离误差为 7.81，优于传统全知智能体的平均距离误差 11.78，并且显着（p=0.01）优于经过八轮训练后距离误差为 15.17 的传统终身学习智能体。此外，所有 ADFLL 试剂都具有与传统 LL 试剂相当或更好的性能。总之，我们开发了一个 ADFLL 框架，与传统的 RL 代理相比，具有出色的性能和速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异步去中心化联邦终身学习框架（ADFLL），用于医学影像中的地标定位，无需中央节点或同步训练。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖集中式全局模型和同步训练，存在潜在瓶颈，需开发无需中心节点且支持异步训练的新方法。
AI.method: 设计异步去中心化联邦终身学习（ADFLL）方法，通过去中心化架构和异步更新机制实现多任务并行训练。
AI.result: 在BRATS数据集上，ADFLL平均距离误差为7.81，优于传统全能代理的11.78（p=0.01）和传统终身学习代理的15.17，且所有ADFLL代理性能均优于或接近传统LL代理。
AI.conclusion: 开发的ADFLL框架在性能和训练速度上均优于传统方法，适用于医学影像地标定位任务。

authors_text: SM Hasan Mansur,Sabiha Salma,Damilola Awofisayo,Kevin Moran
title: AidUI: Toward Automated Recognition of Dark Patterns in User Interfaces
title_zh: AidUI：实现用户界面中深色图案的自动识别
comment: 13 pages, Accepted at The 45th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2023), Melbourne, Australia, May 14th-20th, 2023
comments: 13 pages, Accepted at The 45th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2023), Melbourne, Australia, May 14th-20th, 2023
abstract: Past studies have illustrated the prevalence of UI dark patterns, or user interfaces that can lead end-users toward (unknowingly) taking actions that they may not have intended. Such deceptive UI designs can result in adverse effects on end users, such as oversharing personal information or financial loss. While significant research progress has been made toward the development of dark pattern taxonomies, developers and users currently lack guidance to help recognize, avoid, and navigate these often subtle design motifs. However, automated recognition of dark patterns is a challenging task, as the instantiation of a single type of pattern can take many forms, leading to significant variability. In this paper, we take the first step toward understanding the extent to which common UI dark patterns can be automatically recognized in modern software applications. To do this, we introduce AidUI, a novel automated approach that uses computer vision and natural language processing techniques to recognize a set of visual and textual cues in application screenshots that signify the presence of ten unique UI dark patterns, allowing for their detection, classification, and localization. To evaluate our approach, we have constructed ContextDP, the current largest dataset of fully-localized UI dark patterns that spans 175 mobile and 83 web UI screenshots containing 301 dark pattern instances. The results of our evaluation illustrate that \AidUI achieves an overall precision of 0.66, recall of 0.67, F1-score of 0.65 in detecting dark pattern instances, reports few false positives, and is able to localize detected patterns with an IoU score of ~0.84. Furthermore, a significant subset of our studied dark patterns can be detected quite reliably (F1 score of over 0.82), and future research directions may allow for improved detection of additional patterns.
summary: Past studies have illustrated the prevalence of UI dark patterns, or user interfaces that can lead end-users toward (unknowingly) taking actions that they may not have intended. Such deceptive UI designs can result in adverse effects on end users, such as oversharing personal information or financial loss. While significant research progress has been made toward the development of dark pattern taxonomies, developers and users currently lack guidance to help recognize, avoid, and navigate these often subtle design motifs. However, automated recognition of dark patterns is a challenging task, as the instantiation of a single type of pattern can take many forms, leading to significant variability. In this paper, we take the first step toward understanding the extent to which common UI dark patterns can be automatically recognized in modern software applications. To do this, we introduce AidUI, a novel automated approach that uses computer vision and natural language processing techniques to recognize a set of visual and textual cues in application screenshots that signify the presence of ten unique UI dark patterns, allowing for their detection, classification, and localization. To evaluate our approach, we have constructed ContextDP, the current largest dataset of fully-localized UI dark patterns that spans 175 mobile and 83 web UI screenshots containing 301 dark pattern instances. The results of our evaluation illustrate that \AidUI achieves an overall precision of 0.66, recall of 0.67, F1-score of 0.65 in detecting dark pattern instances, reports few false positives, and is able to localize detected patterns with an IoU score of ~0.84. Furthermore, a significant subset of our studied dark patterns can be detected quite reliably (F1 score of over 0.82), and future research directions may allow for improved detection of additional patterns.
abstract_zh: 过去的研究表明，UI 暗模式或用户界面的普遍存在，可能会导致最终用户（不知不觉地）采取他们可能无意的操作。这种欺骗性的 UI 设计可能会给最终用户带来不利影响，例如过度共享个人信息或经济损失。虽然在开发深色图案分类法方面已经取得了重大研究进展，但开发人员和用户目前缺乏指导来帮助识别、避免和导航这些通常微妙的设计主题。然而，暗图案的自动识别是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为单一类型图案的实例化可以采取多种形式，从而导致显着的可变性。在本文中，我们迈出了了解现代软件应用程序中常见 UI 深色模式自动识别程度的第一步。为此，我们引入了 AidUI，这是一种新颖的自动化方法，它使用计算机视觉和自然语言处理技术来识别应用程序屏幕截图中的一组视觉和文本线索，这些线索表示十种独特的 UI 暗模式的存在，从而可以对其进行检测、分类和本地化。为了评估我们的方法，我们构建了 ContextDP，这是当前最大的完全本地化 UI 深色模式数据集，涵盖 175 个移动设备和 83 个 Web UI 屏幕截图，其中包含 301 个深色模式实例。我们的评估结果表明，\AidUI 在检测暗模式实例方面实现了 0.66 的总体精度、0.67 的召回率、0.65 的 F1 分数、很少的误报，并且能够以约 0.84 的 IoU 分数定位检测到的模式。此外，我们研究的暗图案的一个重要子集可以非常可靠地检测到（F1 分数超过 0.82），未来的研究方向可能会改进对其他图案的检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AidUI，一种利用计算机视觉和自然语言处理技术自动识别用户界面中十种暗模式的方法，并构建了ContextDP数据集进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽已建立暗模式分类体系，但开发者和用户缺乏有效工具来识别这些可能诱导用户非自愿行为的隐蔽设计模式，且自动识别面临模式表现形式多样的挑战。
AI.method: 开发AidUI系统，结合计算机视觉与自然语言处理技术分析应用截图中的视觉和文本线索，构建包含175个移动和83个网页界面截图的ContextDP数据集进行验证。
AI.result: AidUI在检测暗模式实例时达到0.66精确率、0.67召回率和0.65 F1分数，定位准确率IoU达0.84，部分模式检测F1分数超过0.82。
AI.conclusion: AidUI为暗模式自动化识别提供了可行方案，尤其在特定模式检测上表现优异，未来研究可进一步提升整体检测效果。

search_text: AidUI: Toward Automated Recognition of Dark Patterns in User Interfaces AidUI：实现用户界面中深色图案的自动识别 Past studies have illustrated the prevalence of UI dark patterns, or user interfaces that can lead end-users toward (unknowingly) taking actions that they may not have intended. Such deceptive UI designs can result in adverse effects on end users, such as oversharing personal information or financial loss. While significant research progress has been made toward the development of dark pattern taxonomies, developers and users currently lack guidance to help recognize, avoid, and navigate these often subtle design motifs. However, automated recognition of dark patterns is a challenging task, as the instantiation of a single type of pattern can take many forms, leading to significant variability. In this paper, we take the first step toward understanding the extent to which common UI dark patterns can be automatically recognized in modern software applications. To do this, we introduce AidUI, a novel automated approach that uses computer vision and natural language processing techniques to recognize a set of visual and textual cues in application screenshots that signify the presence of ten unique UI dark patterns, allowing for their detection, classification, and localization. To evaluate our approach, we have constructed ContextDP, the current largest dataset of fully-localized UI dark patterns that spans 175 mobile and 83 web UI screenshots containing 301 dark pattern instances. The results of our evaluation illustrate that \AidUI achieves an overall precision of 0.66, recall of 0.67, F1-score of 0.65 in detecting dark pattern instances, reports few false positives, and is able to localize detected patterns with an IoU score of ~0.84. Furthermore, a significant subset of our studied dark patterns can be detected quite reliably (F1 score of over 0.82), and future research directions may allow for improved detection of additional patterns. 过去的研究表明，UI 暗模式或用户界面的普遍存在，可能会导致最终用户（不知不觉地）采取他们可能无意的操作。这种欺骗性的 UI 设计可能会给最终用户带来不利影响，例如过度共享个人信息或经济损失。虽然在开发深色图案分类法方面已经取得了重大研究进展，但开发人员和用户目前缺乏指导来帮助识别、避免和导航这些通常微妙的设计主题。然而，暗图案的自动识别是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为单一类型图案的实例化可以采取多种形式，从而导致显着的可变性。在本文中，我们迈出了了解现代软件应用程序中常见 UI 深色模式自动识别程度的第一步。为此，我们引入了 AidUI，这是一种新颖的自动化方法，它使用计算机视觉和自然语言处理技术来识别应用程序屏幕截图中的一组视觉和文本线索，这些线索表示十种独特的 UI 暗模式的存在，从而可以对其进行检测、分类和本地化。为了评估我们的方法，我们构建了 ContextDP，这是当前最大的完全本地化 UI 深色模式数据集，涵盖 175 个移动设备和 83 个 Web UI 屏幕截图，其中包含 301 个深色模式实例。我们的评估结果表明，\AidUI 在检测暗模式实例方面实现了 0.66 的总体精度、0.67 的召回率、0.65 的 F1 分数、很少的误报，并且能够以约 0.84 的 IoU 分数定位检测到的模式。此外，我们研究的暗图案的一个重要子集可以非常可靠地检测到（F1 分数超过 0.82），未来的研究方向可能会改进对其他图案的检测。 本文提出AidUI，一种利用计算机视觉和自然语言处理技术自动识别用户界面中十种暗模式的方法，并构建了ContextDP数据集进行评估。 SM Hasan Mansur,Sabiha Salma,Damilola Awofisayo,Kevin Moran cs.SE,cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Joshua Horowitz,Jeffrey Heer
title: Live, Rich, and Composable: Qualities for Programming Beyond Static Text
title_zh: 生动、丰富且可组合：超越静态文本的编程品质
comment: To appear in the proceedings of PLATEAU 2023
comments: To appear in the proceedings of PLATEAU 2023
abstract: Efforts to push programming beyond static textual code have sought to imbue programming with multiple distinct qualities. One long-acknowledged quality is liveness: providing programmers with in-depth feedback about a program's dynamic behavior as the program is edited. A second quality, long-explored but lacking a shared term of art, is richness: allowing programmers to edit programs though domain-specific representations and interactions rather than solely through text. In this paper, we map the relationship between these two qualities and survey past work that exemplifies them. We observe that systems combining liveness and richness often do so at the cost of an essential quality of traditional programming: composability. We argue that, by combining liveness, richness, and composability, programming systems can better capture the full potential of interactive computation without leaving behind the expressivity of traditional code.
summary: Efforts to push programming beyond static textual code have sought to imbue programming with multiple distinct qualities. One long-acknowledged quality is liveness: providing programmers with in-depth feedback about a program's dynamic behavior as the program is edited. A second quality, long-explored but lacking a shared term of art, is richness: allowing programmers to edit programs though domain-specific representations and interactions rather than solely through text. In this paper, we map the relationship between these two qualities and survey past work that exemplifies them. We observe that systems combining liveness and richness often do so at the cost of an essential quality of traditional programming: composability. We argue that, by combining liveness, richness, and composability, programming systems can better capture the full potential of interactive computation without leaving behind the expressivity of traditional code.
abstract_zh: 推动编程超越静态文本代码的努力试图赋予编程多种不同的品质。活跃性是一项长期被认可的品质：在程序编辑时为程序员提供有关程序动态行为的深入反馈。第二个品质是丰富性，这是人们长期探索但缺乏共同的艺术术语：允许程序员通过特定领域的表示和交互而不是仅仅通过文本来编辑程序。在本文中，我们绘制了这两种品质之间的关系，并调查了过去例证它们的工作。我们观察到，将活跃性和丰富性结合起来的系统通常会以牺牲传统编程的基本品质为代价：可组合性。我们认为，通过结合活跃性、丰富性和可组合性，编程系统可以更好地捕捉交互式计算的全部潜力，而不会放弃传统代码的表达能力。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了动态反馈、丰富交互和组合性在编程系统中的关系，探讨如何结合这三种特性以提升交互式计算的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统编程依赖静态文本，而现有系统在结合动态反馈和丰富交互时牺牲了组合性，需要探索三者兼顾的方法。
AI.method: 通过分析现有系统，映射liveness与richness的关系，并探讨其对组合性的影响。
AI.result: 发现结合三者可提升交互式计算潜力，同时保持传统代码的表达力。
AI.conclusion: 编程系统应结合动态反馈、丰富交互和组合性，以充分发挥交互式计算的潜力。

ai_content.conclusion: 编程系统应结合动态反馈、丰富交互和组合性，以充分发挥交互式计算的潜力。

authors_text: Aniketh Ramesh,Madeleine Englund,Andreas Theodorou,Rustam Stolkin,Manolis Chiou
title: Robot Health Indicator: A Visual Cue to Improve Level of Autonomy Switching Systems
title_zh: 机器人健康指示器：提高自主切换系统水平的视觉提示
comment: Accepted for Variable Autonomy for human-robot Teaming (VAT) workshop at ACM/IEEE HRI 2023
comments: Accepted for Variable Autonomy for human-robot Teaming (VAT) workshop at ACM/IEEE HRI 2023
abstract: Using different Levels of Autonomy (LoA), a human operator can vary the extent of control they have over a robot's actions. LoAs enable operators to mitigate a robot's performance degradation or limitations in the its autonomous capabilities. However, LoA regulation and other tasks may often overload an operator's cognitive abilities. Inspired by video game user interfaces, we study if adding a 'Robot Health Bar' to the robot control UI can reduce the cognitive demand and perceptual effort required for LoA regulation while promoting trust and transparency. This Health Bar uses the robot vitals and robot health framework to quantify and present runtime performance degradation in robots. Results from our pilot study indicate that when using a health bar, operators used to manual control more to minimise the risk of robot failure during high performance degradation. It also gave us insights and lessons to inform subsequent experiments on human-robot teaming.
summary: Using different Levels of Autonomy (LoA), a human operator can vary the extent of control they have over a robot's actions. LoAs enable operators to mitigate a robot's performance degradation or limitations in the its autonomous capabilities. However, LoA regulation and other tasks may often overload an operator's cognitive abilities. Inspired by video game user interfaces, we study if adding a 'Robot Health Bar' to the robot control UI can reduce the cognitive demand and perceptual effort required for LoA regulation while promoting trust and transparency. This Health Bar uses the robot vitals and robot health framework to quantify and present runtime performance degradation in robots. Results from our pilot study indicate that when using a health bar, operators used to manual control more to minimise the risk of robot failure during high performance degradation. It also gave us insights and lessons to inform subsequent experiments on human-robot teaming.
abstract_zh: 使用不同的自主级别（LoA），人类操作员可以改变他们对机器人行为的控制程度。 LoA 使操作员能够减轻机器人的性能下降或自主能力的限制。然而，LoA 调节和其他任务通常可能会使操作员的认知能力超负荷。受视频游戏用户界面的启发，我们研究在机器人控制 UI 中添加“机器人健康栏”是否可以减少 LoA 监管所需的认知需求和感知努力，同时促进信任和透明度。该健康栏使用机器人生命体征和机器人健康框架来量化和呈现机器人的运行时性能下降情况。我们的试点研究结果表明，在使用生命条时，操作员习惯于更多地进行手动控制，以最大程度地降低机器人在高性能下降期间发生故障的风险。它还为我们提供了见解和教训，为后续的人机协作实验提供参考。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种名为'机器人健康条'的视觉提示，旨在优化自主级别切换系统，以降低操作员认知负担并提升人机协作的透明度和信任度。
AI.motivation: 现有自主级别调节机制可能使操作员面临认知过载，需通过直观界面降低操作难度并增强对机器人状态的信任。
AI.method: 借鉴视频游戏界面设计，开发'机器人健康条'量化展示机器人运行时性能退化状态，并通过试点实验验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验表明健康条使操作员在机器人性能下降时更倾向手动接管，有效降低故障风险，并为后续人机协作研究提供关键洞见。
AI.conclusion: 健康条有效降低认知负荷并提升系统透明度，为构建高效人机协作系统提供了可行的可视化解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计了一种名为'机器人健康条'的视觉提示，旨在优化自主级别切换系统，以降低操作员认知负担并提升人机协作的透明度和信任度。

search_text: Robot Health Indicator: A Visual Cue to Improve Level of Autonomy Switching Systems 机器人健康指示器：提高自主切换系统水平的视觉提示 Using different Levels of Autonomy (LoA), a human operator can vary the extent of control they have over a robot's actions. LoAs enable operators to mitigate a robot's performance degradation or limitations in the its autonomous capabilities. However, LoA regulation and other tasks may often overload an operator's cognitive abilities. Inspired by video game user interfaces, we study if adding a 'Robot Health Bar' to the robot control UI can reduce the cognitive demand and perceptual effort required for LoA regulation while promoting trust and transparency. This Health Bar uses the robot vitals and robot health framework to quantify and present runtime performance degradation in robots. Results from our pilot study indicate that when using a health bar, operators used to manual control more to minimise the risk of robot failure during high performance degradation. It also gave us insights and lessons to inform subsequent experiments on human-robot teaming. 使用不同的自主级别（LoA），人类操作员可以改变他们对机器人行为的控制程度。 LoA 使操作员能够减轻机器人的性能下降或自主能力的限制。然而，LoA 调节和其他任务通常可能会使操作员的认知能力超负荷。受视频游戏用户界面的启发，我们研究在机器人控制 UI 中添加“机器人健康栏”是否可以减少 LoA 监管所需的认知需求和感知努力，同时促进信任和透明度。该健康栏使用机器人生命体征和机器人健康框架来量化和呈现机器人的运行时性能下降情况。我们的试点研究结果表明，在使用生命条时，操作员习惯于更多地进行手动控制，以最大程度地降低机器人在高性能下降期间发生故障的风险。它还为我们提供了见解和教训，为后续的人机协作实验提供参考。 本文设计了一种名为'机器人健康条'的视觉提示，旨在优化自主级别切换系统，以降低操作员认知负担并提升人机协作的透明度和信任度。 Aniketh Ramesh,Madeleine Englund,Andreas Theodorou,Rustam Stolkin,Manolis Chiou cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Hyeonchang Jeon,Kyung-Joong Kim
title: Behavioral Differences is the Key of Ad-hoc Team Cooperation in Multiplayer Games Hanabi
title_zh: 行为差异是多人游戏 Hanabi 中临时团队合作的关键
abstract: Ad-hoc team cooperation is the problem of cooperating with other players that have not been seen in the learning process. Recently, this problem has been considered in the context of Hanabi, which requires cooperation without explicit communication with the other players. While in self-play strategies cooperating on reinforcement learning (RL) process has shown success, there is the problem of failing to cooperate with other unseen agents after the initial learning is completed. In this paper, we categorize the results of ad-hoc team cooperation into Failure, Success, and Synergy and analyze the associated failures. First, we confirm that agents learning via RL converge to one strategy each, but not necessarily the same strategy and that these agents can deploy different strategies even though they utilize the same hyperparameters. Second, we confirm that the larger the behavioral difference, the more pronounced the failure of ad-hoc team cooperation, as demonstrated using hierarchical clustering and Pearson correlation. We confirm that such agents are grouped into distinctly different groups through hierarchical clustering, such that the correlation between behavioral differences and ad-hoc team performance is -0.978. Our results improve understanding of key factors to form successful ad-hoc team cooperation in multi-player games.
summary: Ad-hoc team cooperation is the problem of cooperating with other players that have not been seen in the learning process. Recently, this problem has been considered in the context of Hanabi, which requires cooperation without explicit communication with the other players. While in self-play strategies cooperating on reinforcement learning (RL) process has shown success, there is the problem of failing to cooperate with other unseen agents after the initial learning is completed. In this paper, we categorize the results of ad-hoc team cooperation into Failure, Success, and Synergy and analyze the associated failures. First, we confirm that agents learning via RL converge to one strategy each, but not necessarily the same strategy and that these agents can deploy different strategies even though they utilize the same hyperparameters. Second, we confirm that the larger the behavioral difference, the more pronounced the failure of ad-hoc team cooperation, as demonstrated using hierarchical clustering and Pearson correlation. We confirm that such agents are grouped into distinctly different groups through hierarchical clustering, such that the correlation between behavioral differences and ad-hoc team performance is -0.978. Our results improve understanding of key factors to form successful ad-hoc team cooperation in multi-player games.
abstract_zh: Ad-hoc团队合作是指与学习过程中没有见过的其他玩家进行合作的问题。最近，这个问题在 Hanabi 的背景下被考虑，它需要与其他玩家没有明确沟通的合作。虽然在强化学习（RL）过程中的自我博弈策略合作取得了成功，但存在初始学习完成后无法与其他看不见的智能体合作的问题。在本文中，我们将临时团队合作的结果分为失败、成功和协同，并分析了相关的失败。首先，我们确认通过强化学习学习的智能体各自收敛于一种策略，但不一定是相同的策略，并且这些智能体即使使用相同的超参数也可以部署不同的策略。其次，我们确认行为差异越大，临时团队合作的失败就越明显，正如使用层次聚类和皮尔逊相关性所证明的那样。我们确认这些代理通过层次聚类被分为明显不同的组，因此行为差异和临时团队绩效之间的相关性为-0.978。我们的结果提高了对在多人游戏中形成成功的临时团队合作的关键因素的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多人游戏《Hanabi》中自适应团队合作的关键因素，重点分析行为差异对合作成功率的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在训练出的智能体间无法有效与未见过的智能体合作，需明确导致合作失败的核心原因。
AI.method: 通过层次聚类分析智能体行为差异，并利用皮尔逊相关系数量化行为差异与合作表现的关系。
AI.result: 发现行为差异越大合作失败率越高（相关系数-0.978），且不同策略智能体被明显聚类分组。
AI.conclusion: 行为一致性是实现多智能体自适应合作的关键因素，需在训练中强化策略收敛性以提升协作效能。

authors_text: Yiyuan Lee,Katie Lee,Panpan Cai,David Hsu,Lydia E. Kavraki
title: The Planner Optimization Problem: Formulations and Frameworks
title_zh: 规划器优化问题：公式和框架
abstract: Identifying internal parameters for planning is crucial to maximizing the performance of a planner. However, automatically tuning internal parameters which are conditioned on the problem instance is especially challenging. A recent line of work focuses on learning planning parameter generators, but lack a consistent problem definition and software framework. This work proposes the unified planner optimization problem (POP) formulation, along with the Open Planner Optimization Framework (OPOF), a highly extensible software framework to specify and to solve these problems in a reusable manner.
summary: Identifying internal parameters for planning is crucial to maximizing the performance of a planner. However, automatically tuning internal parameters which are conditioned on the problem instance is especially challenging. A recent line of work focuses on learning planning parameter generators, but lack a consistent problem definition and software framework. This work proposes the unified planner optimization problem (POP) formulation, along with the Open Planner Optimization Framework (OPOF), a highly extensible software framework to specify and to solve these problems in a reusable manner.
abstract_zh: 确定规划的内部参数对于最大限度地提高规划人员的绩效至关重要。然而，自动调整以问题实例为条件的内部参数尤其具有挑战性。最近的工作重点是学习规划参数生成器，但缺乏一致的问题定义和软件框架。这项工作提出了统一规划器优化问题（POP）公式以及开放规划器优化框架（OPOF），这是一个高度可扩展的软件框架，以可重用的方式指定和解决这些问题。

AI.tldr: 提出统一的规划器优化问题（POP）公式及可扩展的OPOF框架，以解决规划器内部参数自动调整的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在自动调整规划器内部参数时面临挑战，缺乏统一的问题定义和软件框架，导致解决方案难以复用和扩展。
AI.method: 提出统一的规划器优化问题（POP）数学公式，并开发Open Planner Optimization Framework（OPOF）软件框架，支持问题定义和求解的模块化与可扩展性。
AI.result: 实现了POP问题的标准化表述及OPOF框架的原型，支持多种规划器参数优化任务的统一处理。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一问题定义和可扩展框架，为规划器参数优化提供了系统性解决方案，促进了相关研究的复用与推进。

authors_text: Jun Yang,Jason Rebello,Steven L. Waslander
title: Next-Best-View Selection for Robot Eye-in-Hand Calibration
title_zh: 机器人手眼校准的下一个最佳视图选择
abstract: Robotic eye-in-hand calibration is the task of determining the rigid 6-DoF pose of the camera with respect to the robot end-effector frame. In this paper, we formulate this task as a non-linear optimization problem and introduce an active vision approach to strategically select the robot pose for maximizing calibration accuracy. Specifically, given an initial collection of measurement sets, our system first computes the calibration parameters and estimates the parameter uncertainties. We then predict the next robot pose from which to collect the next measurement that brings about the maximum information gain (uncertainty reduction) in the calibration parameters. We test our approach on a simulated dataset and validate the results on a real 6-axis robot manipulator. The results demonstrate that our approach can achieve accurate calibrations using many fewer viewpoints than other commonly used baseline calibration methods.
summary: Robotic eye-in-hand calibration is the task of determining the rigid 6-DoF pose of the camera with respect to the robot end-effector frame. In this paper, we formulate this task as a non-linear optimization problem and introduce an active vision approach to strategically select the robot pose for maximizing calibration accuracy. Specifically, given an initial collection of measurement sets, our system first computes the calibration parameters and estimates the parameter uncertainties. We then predict the next robot pose from which to collect the next measurement that brings about the maximum information gain (uncertainty reduction) in the calibration parameters. We test our approach on a simulated dataset and validate the results on a real 6-axis robot manipulator. The results demonstrate that our approach can achieve accurate calibrations using many fewer viewpoints than other commonly used baseline calibration methods.
abstract_zh: 机器人手眼校准是确定相机相对于机器人末端执行器框架的刚性 6-DoF 位姿的任务。在本文中，我们将此任务表述为非线性优化问题，并引入主动视觉方法来战略性地选择机器人姿势，以最大限度地提高校准精度。具体来说，给定测量集的初始集合，我们的系统首先计算校准参数并估计参数不确定性。然后，我们预测下一个机器人姿势，从中收集下一个测量结果，从而在校准参数中带来最大信息增益（不确定性降低）。我们在模拟数据集上测试我们的方法，并在真实的 6 轴机器人操纵器上验证结果。结果表明，与其他常用的基线校准方法相比，我们的方法可以使用更少的视点实现准确的校准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人眼手标定的下一最佳视角选择方法，以提高标定精度。
AI.motivation: 传统的机器人眼手标定方法需要大量的视角数据，这在实际应用中效率较低，因此需要一种能够减少所需视角数量同时保持高精度的方法。
AI.method: 本文将眼手标定问题建模为非线性优化问题，并引入主动视觉方法，通过预测能够带来最大信息增益（不确定性减少）的机器人姿态，以选择最佳视角进行测量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与常用基线标定方法相比，该方法在使用更少视角的情况下实现了准确的标定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过主动选择最佳视角，有效提高了机器人眼手标定的效率和精度。

search_text: Next-Best-View Selection for Robot Eye-in-Hand Calibration 机器人手眼校准的下一个最佳视图选择 Robotic eye-in-hand calibration is the task of determining the rigid 6-DoF pose of the camera with respect to the robot end-effector frame. In this paper, we formulate this task as a non-linear optimization problem and introduce an active vision approach to strategically select the robot pose for maximizing calibration accuracy. Specifically, given an initial collection of measurement sets, our system first computes the calibration parameters and estimates the parameter uncertainties. We then predict the next robot pose from which to collect the next measurement that brings about the maximum information gain (uncertainty reduction) in the calibration parameters. We test our approach on a simulated dataset and validate the results on a real 6-axis robot manipulator. The results demonstrate that our approach can achieve accurate calibrations using many fewer viewpoints than other commonly used baseline calibration methods. 机器人手眼校准是确定相机相对于机器人末端执行器框架的刚性 6-DoF 位姿的任务。在本文中，我们将此任务表述为非线性优化问题，并引入主动视觉方法来战略性地选择机器人姿势，以最大限度地提高校准精度。具体来说，给定测量集的初始集合，我们的系统首先计算校准参数并估计参数不确定性。然后，我们预测下一个机器人姿势，从中收集下一个测量结果，从而在校准参数中带来最大信息增益（不确定性降低）。我们在模拟数据集上测试我们的方法，并在真实的 6 轴机器人操纵器上验证结果。结果表明，与其他常用的基线校准方法相比，我们的方法可以使用更少的视点实现准确的校准。 本文提出了一种用于机器人眼手标定的下一最佳视角选择方法，以提高标定精度。 Jun Yang,Jason Rebello,Steven L. Waslander cs.RO

authors_text: Dominik Bork,Syed Juned Ali,Ben Roelens
title: Conceptual Modeling and Artificial Intelligence: A Systematic Mapping Study
title_zh: 概念建模和人工智能：系统映射研究
abstract: In conceptual modeling (CM), humans apply abstraction to represent excerpts of reality for means of understanding and communication, and processing by machines. Artificial Intelligence (AI) is applied to vast amounts of data to automatically identify patterns or classify entities. While CM produces comprehensible and explicit knowledge representations, the outcome of AI algorithms often lacks these qualities while being able to extract knowledge from large and unstructured representations. Recently, a trend toward intertwining CM and AI emerged. This systematic mapping study shows how this interdisciplinary research field is structured, which mutual benefits are gained by the intertwining, and future research directions.
summary: In conceptual modeling (CM), humans apply abstraction to represent excerpts of reality for means of understanding and communication, and processing by machines. Artificial Intelligence (AI) is applied to vast amounts of data to automatically identify patterns or classify entities. While CM produces comprehensible and explicit knowledge representations, the outcome of AI algorithms often lacks these qualities while being able to extract knowledge from large and unstructured representations. Recently, a trend toward intertwining CM and AI emerged. This systematic mapping study shows how this interdisciplinary research field is structured, which mutual benefits are gained by the intertwining, and future research directions.
abstract_zh: 在概念建模（CM）中，人类应用抽象来表示现实的摘录，以供机器理解、交流和处理。人工智能（AI）应用于大量数据以自动识别模式或对实体进行分类。虽然 CM 产生可理解且明确的知识表示，但人工智能算法的结果通常缺乏这些品质，同时能够从大型非结构化表示中提取知识。最近，出现了一种将 CM 和 AI 交织在一起的趋势。这项系统性的映射研究展示了这个跨学科研究领域的结构、通过相互交织获得的互惠互利以及未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统映射研究，探讨概念建模与人工智能的结合现状、相互影响及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 概念建模与人工智能各自存在优势与局限，二者结合可能产生协同效应，但缺乏系统性研究，需通过系统映射明确研究结构与未来方向。
AI.method: 采用系统映射方法，通过文献综述分析相关研究，梳理跨学科领域结构及研究趋势。
AI.result: 研究揭示了概念建模与人工智能结合的跨学科结构，明确了二者互补优势，并指出了未来研究方向，如方法整合与应用扩展。
AI.conclusion: 概念建模与人工智能的结合能够增强知识表示与处理能力，未来需深化方法整合与应用研究以推动跨学科发展。

authors_text: Saqib Javed,Chengkun Li,Andrew Price,Yinlin Hu,Mathieu Salzmann
title: Modular Quantization-Aware Training for 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于 6D 物体姿态估计的模块化量化感知训练
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2024
comments: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2024
abstract: Edge applications, such as collaborative robotics and spacecraft rendezvous, demand efficient 6D object pose estimation on resource-constrained embedded platforms. Existing 6D pose estimation networks are often too large for such deployments, necessitating compression while maintaining reliable performance. To address this challenge, we introduce Modular Quantization-Aware Training (MQAT), an adaptive and mixed-precision quantization-aware training strategy that exploits the modular structure of modern 6D pose estimation architectures. MQAT guides a systematic gradated modular quantization sequence and determines module-specific bit precisions, leading to quantized models that outperform those produced by state-of-the-art uniform and mixed-precision quantization techniques. Our experiments showcase the generality of MQAT across datasets, architectures, and quantization algorithms. Remarkably, MQAT-trained quantized models achieve a significant accuracy boost (>7%) over the baseline full-precision network while reducing model size by a factor of 4x or more. Our project website is at: https://saqibjaved1.github.io/MQAT_/
summary: Edge applications, such as collaborative robotics and spacecraft rendezvous, demand efficient 6D object pose estimation on resource-constrained embedded platforms. Existing 6D pose estimation networks are often too large for such deployments, necessitating compression while maintaining reliable performance. To address this challenge, we introduce Modular Quantization-Aware Training (MQAT), an adaptive and mixed-precision quantization-aware training strategy that exploits the modular structure of modern 6D pose estimation architectures. MQAT guides a systematic gradated modular quantization sequence and determines module-specific bit precisions, leading to quantized models that outperform those produced by state-of-the-art uniform and mixed-precision quantization techniques. Our experiments showcase the generality of MQAT across datasets, architectures, and quantization algorithms. Remarkably, MQAT-trained quantized models achieve a significant accuracy boost (>7%) over the baseline full-precision network while reducing model size by a factor of 4x or more. Our project website is at: https://saqibjaved1.github.io/MQAT_/
abstract_zh: 协作机器人和航天器交会等边缘应用需要在资源有限的嵌入式平台上进行高效的 6D 物体姿态估计。现有的 6D 姿态估计网络通常对于此类部署而言太大，因此需要在保持可靠性能的同时进行压缩。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了模块化量化感知训练（MQAT），这是一种自适应混合精度量化感知训练策略，利用现代 6D 位姿估计架构的模块化结构。 MQAT 引导系统分级模块化量化序列并确定特定于模块的位精度，从而生成优于最先进的统一和混合精度量化技术生成的量化模型。我们的实验展示了 MQAT 跨数据集、架构和量化算法的通用性。值得注意的是，经过 MQAT 训练的量化模型比基线全精度网络实现了显着的精度提升 (>7%)，同时将模型大小减小了 4 倍或更多。我们的项目网站位于：https://saqibjaved1.github.io/MQAT_/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模块化量化感知训练方法（MQAT），用于在资源受限的边缘设备上高效压缩6D目标位姿估计模型。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人、航天器对接等边缘应用需要轻量化6D位姿估计模型，但现有网络参数量大难以部署，需在保持性能的前提下实现模型压缩。
AI.method: 基于现代6D位姿估计网络的模块化结构，设计自适应混合精度量化方案，通过模块级比特精度分配实现渐进式量化训练。
AI.result: 在保持模型精度的同时，压缩后模型体积缩小4倍以上，关键指标准确率较全精度模型提升7%以上。
AI.conclusion: MQAT方法在不同数据集、网络结构和量化算法中均表现优异，为边缘设备部署提供了高效可靠的模型压缩解决方案。

Our experiments showcase the generality of MQAT across datasets, architectures, and quantization algorithms. Remarkably, MQAT-trained quantized models achieve a significant accuracy boost (>7%) over the baseline full-precision network while reducing model size by a factor of 4x or more. Our project website is at: https://saqibjaved1.github.io/MQAT_/ 协作机器人和航天器交会等边缘应用需要在资源有限的嵌入式平台上进行高效的 6D 物体姿态估计。现有的 6D 姿态估计网络通常对于此类部署而言太大，因此需要在保持可靠性能的同时进行压缩。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了模块化量化感知训练（MQAT），这是一种自适应混合精度量化感知训练策略，利用现代 6D 位姿估计架构的模块化结构。 MQAT 引导系统分级模块化量化序列并确定特定于模块的位精度，从而生成优于最先进的统一和混合精度量化技术生成的量化模型。我们的实验展示了 MQAT 跨数据集、架构和量化算法的通用性。值得注意的是，经过 MQAT 训练的量化模型比基线全精度网络实现了显着的精度提升 (>7%)，同时将模型大小减小了 4 倍或更多。我们的项目网站位于：https://saqibjaved1.github.io/MQAT_/ 本文提出一种模块化量化感知训练方法（MQAT），用于在资源受限的边缘设备上高效压缩6D目标位姿估计模型。 Saqib Javed,Chengkun Li,Andrew Price,Yinlin Hu,Mathieu Salzmann cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Chenzhong Yin,Zhihong Pan,Xin Zhou,Le Kang,Paul Bogdan
title: Raising The Limit Of Image Rescaling Using Auxiliary Encoding
title_zh: 使用辅助编码提高图像缩放的限制
abstract: Normalizing flow models using invertible neural networks (INN) have been widely investigated for successful generative image super-resolution (SR) by learning the transformation between the normal distribution of latent variable $z$ and the conditional distribution of high-resolution (HR) images gave a low-resolution (LR) input. Recently, image rescaling models like IRN utilize the bidirectional nature of INN to push the performance limit of image upscaling by optimizing the downscaling and upscaling steps jointly. While the random sampling of latent variable $z$ is useful in generating diverse photo-realistic images, it is not desirable for image rescaling when accurate restoration of the HR image is more important. Hence, in places of random sampling of $z$, we propose auxiliary encoding modules to further push the limit of image rescaling performance. Two options to store the encoded latent variables in downscaled LR images, both readily supported in existing image file format, are proposed. One is saved as the alpha-channel, the other is saved as meta-data in the image header, and the corresponding modules are denoted as suffixes -A and -M respectively. Optimal network architectural changes are investigated for both options to demonstrate their effectiveness in raising the rescaling performance limit on different baseline models including IRN and DLV-IRN.
summary: Normalizing flow models using invertible neural networks (INN) have been widely investigated for successful generative image super-resolution (SR) by learning the transformation between the normal distribution of latent variable $z$ and the conditional distribution of high-resolution (HR) images gave a low-resolution (LR) input. Recently, image rescaling models like IRN utilize the bidirectional nature of INN to push the performance limit of image upscaling by optimizing the downscaling and upscaling steps jointly. While the random sampling of latent variable $z$ is useful in generating diverse photo-realistic images, it is not desirable for image rescaling when accurate restoration of the HR image is more important. Hence, in places of random sampling of $z$, we propose auxiliary encoding modules to further push the limit of image rescaling performance. Two options to store the encoded latent variables in downscaled LR images, both readily supported in existing image file format, are proposed. One is saved as the alpha-channel, the other is saved as meta-data in the image header, and the corresponding modules are denoted as suffixes -A and -M respectively. Optimal network architectural changes are investigated for both options to demonstrate their effectiveness in raising the rescaling performance limit on different baseline models including IRN and DLV-IRN.
abstract_zh: 使用可逆神经网络 (INN) 的归一化流模型已被广泛研究，通过学习潜在变量 $z$ 的正态分布与给定低分辨率 (LR) 输入的高分辨率 (HR) 图像的条件分布之间的转换，成功地生成图像超分辨率 (SR)。最近，像 IRN 这样的图像缩放模型利用 INN 的双向性质，通过联合优化缩小和放大步骤来突破图像放大的性能极限。虽然潜在变量 $z$ 的随机采样对于生成各种逼真的图像很有用，但当 HR 图像的准确恢复更重要时，对于图像重新缩放来说是不可取的。因此，在 $z$ 的随机采样处，我们提出了辅助编码模块，以进一步突破图像缩放性能的极限。提出了两种在缩小的 LR 图像中存储编码潜在变量的选项，这两种选项都很容易在现有图像文件格式中得到支持。一个保存为alpha通道，另一个保存为图像头中的元数据，对应的模块分别用后缀-A和-M表示。研究了这两个选项的最佳网络架构变化，以证明它们在提高不同基线模型（包括 IRN 和 DLV-IRN）的重新缩放性能限制方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过辅助编码模块提升图像缩放性能，替代传统随机采样方法以提高高分辨率图像还原准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于归一化流模型的图像缩放方法依赖随机采样生成多样化图像，但牺牲了高分辨率图像的精确还原能力，需改进以提升缩放精度。
AI.method: 设计两种辅助编码模块（-A和-M），分别将编码后的潜在变量存储于图像的alpha通道和元数据中，并优化网络结构以适配不同基线模型。
AI.result: 在IRN和DLV-IRN等模型上验证，两种方法均有效提升图像缩放性能，尤其在保持细节和结构准确性方面表现显著。
AI.conclusion: 辅助编码策略通过精确控制潜在变量存储，突破传统随机采样限制，为图像缩放任务提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Nguyen Tuan,Phi Nguyen,Dai Tran,Hung Pham,Quang Nguyen,Thanh Le,Hanh Van,Bach Do,Phuong Tran,Vinh Le,Thuy Nguyen,Long Tran,Hieu Pham
title: Ensemble Learning of Myocardial Displacements for Myocardial Infarction Detection in Echocardiography
title_zh: 超声心动图心肌梗塞检测中心肌位移的集成学习
abstract: Early detection and localization of myocardial infarction (MI) can reduce the severity of cardiac damage through timely treatment interventions. In recent years, deep learning techniques have shown promise for detecting MI in echocardiographic images. However, there has been no examination of how segmentation accuracy affects MI classification performance and the potential benefits of using ensemble learning approaches. Our study investigates this relationship and introduces a robust method that combines features from multiple segmentation models to improve MI classification performance by leveraging ensemble learning. Our method combines myocardial segment displacement features from multiple segmentation models, which are then input into a typical classifier to estimate the risk of MI. We validated the proposed approach on two datasets: the public HMC-QU dataset (109 echocardiograms) for training and validation, and an E-Hospital dataset (60 echocardiograms) from a local clinical site in Vietnam for independent testing. Model performance was evaluated based on accuracy, sensitivity, and specificity. The proposed approach demonstrated excellent performance in detecting MI. The results showed that the proposed approach outperformed the state-of-the-art feature-based method. Further research is necessary to determine its potential use in clinical settings as a tool to assist cardiologists and technicians with objective assessments and reduce dependence on operator subjectivity. Our research codes are available on GitHub at https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/mi-detection-echo.
summary: Early detection and localization of myocardial infarction (MI) can reduce the severity of cardiac damage through timely treatment interventions. In recent years, deep learning techniques have shown promise for detecting MI in echocardiographic images. However, there has been no examination of how segmentation accuracy affects MI classification performance and the potential benefits of using ensemble learning approaches. Our study investigates this relationship and introduces a robust method that combines features from multiple segmentation models to improve MI classification performance by leveraging ensemble learning. Our method combines myocardial segment displacement features from multiple segmentation models, which are then input into a typical classifier to estimate the risk of MI. We validated the proposed approach on two datasets: the public HMC-QU dataset (109 echocardiograms) for training and validation, and an E-Hospital dataset (60 echocardiograms) from a local clinical site in Vietnam for independent testing. Model performance was evaluated based on accuracy, sensitivity, and specificity. The proposed approach demonstrated excellent performance in detecting MI. The results showed that the proposed approach outperformed the state-of-the-art feature-based method. Further research is necessary to determine its potential use in clinical settings as a tool to assist cardiologists and technicians with objective assessments and reduce dependence on operator subjectivity. Our research codes are available on GitHub at https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/mi-detection-echo.
abstract_zh: 心肌梗死（MI）的早期发现和定位可以通过及时的治疗干预来减轻心脏损伤的严重程度。近年来，深度学习技术在超声心动图图像中检测心肌梗死方面显示出了良好的前景。然而，目前还没有研究分割精度如何影响 MI 分类性能以及使用集成学习方法的潜在好处。我们的研究调查了这种关系，并引入了一种鲁棒的方法，该方法结合了多个分割模型的特征，通过利用集成学习来提高 MI 分类性能。我们的方法结合了来自多个分割模型的心肌节段位移特征，然后将其输入到典型的分类器中以估计 MI 的风险。我们在两个数据集上验证了所提出的方法：用于训练和验证的公共 HMC-QU 数据集（109 个超声心动图），以及来自越南当地临床站点的用于独立测试的电子医院数据集（60 个超声心动图）。根据准确性、敏感性和特异性评估模型性能。所提出的方法在检测 MI 方面表现出了出色的性能。结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的基于特征的方法。需要进一步的研究来确定其在临床环境中的潜在用途，作为协助心脏病专家和技术人员进行客观评估并减少对操作员主观性的依赖的工具。我们的研究代码可在 GitHub 上获取：https://github.com/vinuni-vishc/mi-detection-echo。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于集成学习的心肌位移特征融合方法，用于超声心动图中心肌梗死的检测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未系统探讨分割精度对MI分类性能的影响，且缺乏集成学习在该领域的应用验证，需开发更稳健的检测方法。
AI.method: 融合多分割模型提取的心肌位移特征，输入分类器进行MI风险评估，使用HMC-QU和E-Hospital两个数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 所提方法在准确率、灵敏度和特异性指标上优于现有特征方法，但需进一步临床验证其应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为辅助工具提升MI检测客观性，未来需探索其在临床场景中的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Mohsen Sombolestan,Quan Nguyen
title: Hierarchical Adaptive Control for Collaborative Manipulation of a Rigid Object by Quadrupedal Robots
title_zh: 四足机器人协同操纵刚性物体的分层自适应控制
comment: Accepted to appear at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems, IROS, 2023
comments: Accepted to appear at IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems, IROS, 2023
abstract: Despite the potential benefits of collaborative robots, effective manipulation tasks with quadruped robots remain difficult to realize. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical control system that can handle real-world collaborative manipulation tasks, including uncertainties arising from object properties, shape, and terrain. Our approach consists of three levels of controllers. Firstly, an adaptive controller computes the required force and moment for object manipulation without prior knowledge of the object's properties and terrain. The computed force and moment are then optimally distributed between the team of quadruped robots using a Quadratic Programming (QP)-based controller. This QP-based controller optimizes each robot's contact point location with the object while satisfying constraints associated with robot-object contact. Finally, a decentralized loco-manipulation controller is designed for each robot to apply manipulation force while maintaining the robot's stability. We successfully validated our approach in a high-fidelity simulation environment where a team of quadruped robots manipulated an unknown object weighing up to 18 kg on different terrains while following the desired trajectory.
summary: Despite the potential benefits of collaborative robots, effective manipulation tasks with quadruped robots remain difficult to realize. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical control system that can handle real-world collaborative manipulation tasks, including uncertainties arising from object properties, shape, and terrain. Our approach consists of three levels of controllers. Firstly, an adaptive controller computes the required force and moment for object manipulation without prior knowledge of the object's properties and terrain. The computed force and moment are then optimally distributed between the team of quadruped robots using a Quadratic Programming (QP)-based controller. This QP-based controller optimizes each robot's contact point location with the object while satisfying constraints associated with robot-object contact. Finally, a decentralized loco-manipulation controller is designed for each robot to apply manipulation force while maintaining the robot's stability. We successfully validated our approach in a high-fidelity simulation environment where a team of quadruped robots manipulated an unknown object weighing up to 18 kg on different terrains while following the desired trajectory.
abstract_zh: 尽管协作机器人具有潜在的优势，但四足机器人的有效操纵任务仍然难以实现。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层控制系统，可以处理现实世界的协作操纵任务，包括对象属性、形状和地形引起的不确定性。我们的方法由三个级别的控制器组成。首先，自适应控制器计算物体操纵所需的力和力矩，而无需事先了解物体的属性和地形。然后使用基于二次规划 (QP) 的控制器将计算出的力和力矩在四足机器人团队之间进行最佳分配。这种基于 QP 的控制器优化每个机器人与物体的接触点位置，同时满足与机器人-物体接触相关的约束。最后，为每个机器人设计了一个分散的局部操纵控制器，在保持机器人稳定性的同时施加操纵力。我们在高保真模拟环境中成功验证了我们的方法，其中一组四足机器人在不同地形上操纵重达 18 公斤的未知物体，同时遵循所需的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层自适应控制方法，使四足机器人团队能够在未知物体和复杂地形条件下协作操作刚性物体。
AI.motivation: 尽管协作机器人具有潜力，但四足机器人在实际操作任务中面临物体特性、形状和地形不确定性等挑战，现有方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 设计三级控制器：1) 自适应控制器计算操作力矩；2) 基于二次规划的控制器优化机器人间力分布；3) 分布式运动-操作控制器确保机器人稳定性。
AI.result: 在高保真仿真中验证了方法有效性，机器人团队成功操控18kg未知物体并沿期望轨迹移动，适应不同地形。
AI.conclusion: 该分层控制框架有效解决了协作操作中的不确定性问题，为四足机器人团队操作提供了稳定可靠的解决方案。

Firstly, an adaptive controller computes the required force and moment for object manipulation without prior knowledge of the object's properties and terrain. This QP-based controller optimizes each robot's contact point location with the object while satisfying constraints associated with robot-object contact. Finally, a decentralized loco-manipulation controller is designed for each robot to apply manipulation force while maintaining the robot's stability. authors_text: Salah Zaiem,Robin Algayres,Titouan Parcollet,Slim Essid,Mirco Ravanelli
title: Fine-tuning Strategies for Faster Inference using Speech Self-Supervised Models: A Comparative Study
title_zh: 使用语音自监督模型进行更快推理的微调策略：比较研究
comment: Submitted to ICASSP "Self-supervision in Audio, Speech and Beyond" workshop
comments: Submitted to ICASSP "Self-supervision in Audio, Speech and Beyond" workshop
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has allowed substantial progress in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) performance in low-resource settings. In this context, it has been demonstrated that larger self-supervised feature extractors are crucial for achieving lower downstream ASR error rates. Thus, better performance might be sanctioned with longer inferences. This article explores different approaches that may be deployed during the fine-tuning to reduce the computations needed in the SSL encoder, leading to faster inferences. We adapt a number of existing techniques to common ASR settings and benchmark them, displaying performance drops and gains in inference times. Interestingly, we found that given enough downstream data, a simple downsampling of the input sequences outperforms the other methods with both low performance drops and high computational savings, reducing computations by 61.3% with an WER increase of only 0.81. Finally, we analyze the robustness of the comparison to changes in dataset conditions, revealing sensitivity to dataset size.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has allowed substantial progress in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) performance in low-resource settings. In this context, it has been demonstrated that larger self-supervised feature extractors are crucial for achieving lower downstream ASR error rates. Thus, better performance might be sanctioned with longer inferences. This article explores different approaches that may be deployed during the fine-tuning to reduce the computations needed in the SSL encoder, leading to faster inferences. We adapt a number of existing techniques to common ASR settings and benchmark them, displaying performance drops and gains in inference times. Interestingly, we found that given enough downstream data, a simple downsampling of the input sequences outperforms the other methods with both low performance drops and high computational savings, reducing computations by 61.3% with an WER increase of only 0.81. Finally, we analyze the robustness of the comparison to changes in dataset conditions, revealing sensitivity to dataset size.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 使资源匮乏环境下的自动语音识别 (ASR) 性能取得了显着进步。在这种情况下，事实证明，更大的自监督特征提取器对于实现较低的下游 ASR 错误率至关重要。因此，更好的性能可能需要更长的推论来认可。本文探讨了微调期间可以部署的不同方法，以减少 SSL 编码器中所需的计算，从而加快推理速度。我们将许多现有技术适应常见的 ASR 设置并对它们进行基准测试，显示推理时间的性能下降和增益。有趣的是，我们发现，在给定足够的下游数据的情况下，对输入序列进行简单的下采样优于其他方法，性能下降较小，但计算量节省较多，计算量减少了 61.3%，WER 仅增加 0.81。最后，我们分析了数据集条件变化比较的稳健性，揭示了对数据集大小的敏感性。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了在细调过程中减少SSL编码器计算量的不同策略，以加快语音识别的推理速度。
AI.motivation: 更大的自监督学习模型虽能提升低资源场景下的语音识别性能，但会导致推理时间增加，需寻找减少计算量的方法。
AI.method: 适应性调整现有技术至常见ASR场景，通过基准测试对比不同方法的性能下降与推理时间提升。
AI.result: 在充足下游数据条件下，输入序列下采样方法在计算量减少61.3%的同时仅使词错误率增加0.81。
AI.conclusion: 下采样策略在数据充足时表现最优，但结果对数据集规模变化较敏感。

authors_text: Sagar Suhas Joshi,Panagiotis Tsiotras
title: Non-Trivial Query Sampling For Efficient Learning To Plan
title_zh: 用于高效学习计划的非平凡查询采样
abstract: In recent years, learning-based approaches have revolutionized motion planning. The data generation process for these methods involves caching a large number of high quality paths for different queries (start, goal pairs) in various environments. Conventionally, a uniform random strategy is used for sampling these queries. However, this leads to inclusion of "trivial paths" in the dataset (e.g.,, straight line paths in case of length-optimal planning), which can be solved efficiently if the planner has access to a steering function. This work proposes a "non-trivial" query sampling procedure to add more complex paths in the dataset. Numerical experiments show that a higher success rate can be attained for neural planners trained on such a non-trivial dataset.
summary: In recent years, learning-based approaches have revolutionized motion planning. The data generation process for these methods involves caching a large number of high quality paths for different queries (start, goal pairs) in various environments. Conventionally, a uniform random strategy is used for sampling these queries. However, this leads to inclusion of "trivial paths" in the dataset (e.g.,, straight line paths in case of length-optimal planning), which can be solved efficiently if the planner has access to a steering function. This work proposes a "non-trivial" query sampling procedure to add more complex paths in the dataset. Numerical experiments show that a higher success rate can be attained for neural planners trained on such a non-trivial dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于学习的方法彻底改变了运动规划。这些方法的数据生成过程涉及为各种环境中的不同查询（开始、目标对）缓存大量高质量路径。通常，使用统一的随机策略对这些查询进行采样。然而，这导致数据集中包含“琐碎路径”（例如，长度最优规划的直线路径），如果规划器可以访问转向功能，则可以有效地解决该问题。这项工作提出了一种“不平凡的”查询采样过程，以在数据集中添加更复杂的路径。数值实验表明，在如此重要的数据集上训练的神经规划器可以获得更高的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非平凡查询采样方法，通过生成更复杂的路径数据集来提升神经规划器的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统均匀随机采样导致数据集中包含大量可被转向函数高效解决的平凡路径，限制了模型学习复杂路径的能力。
AI.method: 设计非平凡查询采样策略，在训练数据中增加需要复杂规划的路径样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于非平凡数据集训练的神经规划器在任务成功率上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 非平凡采样方法能有效提升学习规划的性能，证明了数据质量对模型训练的关键影响。

search_text: Non-Trivial Query Sampling For Efficient Learning To Plan 用于高效学习计划的非平凡查询采样 In recent years, learning-based approaches have revolutionized motion planning. The data generation process for these methods involves caching a large number of high quality paths for different queries (start, goal pairs) in various environments. Conventionally, a uniform random strategy is used for sampling these queries. However, this leads to inclusion of "trivial paths" in the dataset (e.g.,, straight line paths in case of length-optimal planning), which can be solved efficiently if the planner has access to a steering function. This work proposes a "non-trivial" query sampling procedure to add more complex paths in the dataset. Numerical experiments show that a higher success rate can be attained for neural planners trained on such a non-trivial dataset. 近年来，基于学习的方法彻底改变了运动规划。这些方法的数据生成过程涉及为各种环境中的不同查询（开始、目标对）缓存大量高质量路径。通常，使用统一的随机策略对这些查询进行采样。然而，这导致数据集中包含“琐碎路径”（例如，长度最优规划的直线路径），如果规划器可以访问转向功能，则可以有效地解决该问题。这项工作提出了一种“不平凡的”查询采样过程，以在数据集中添加更复杂的路径。数值实验表明，在如此重要的数据集上训练的神经规划器可以获得更高的成功率。 本文提出一种非平凡查询采样方法，通过生成更复杂的路径数据集来提升神经规划器的学习效率。 Sagar Suhas Joshi,Panagiotis Tsiotras cs.RO

authors_text: Zahra Sobhaninia,Nasrin Abharian,Nader Karimi,Shahram Shirani,Shadrokh Samavi
title: Endoscopy Classification Model Using Swin Transformer and Saliency Map
title_zh: 使用 Swin Transformer 和显着图的内窥镜分类模型
abstract: Endoscopy is a valuable tool for the early diagnosis of colon cancer. However, it requires the expertise of endoscopists and is a time-consuming process. In this work, we propose a new multi-label classification method, which considers two aspects of learning approaches (local and global views) for endoscopic image classification. The model consists of a Swin transformer branch and a modified VGG16 model as a CNN branch. To help the learning process of the CNN branch, the model employs saliency maps and endoscopy images and concatenates them. The results demonstrate that this method performed well for endoscopic medical images by utilizing local and global features of the images. Furthermore, quantitative evaluations prove the proposed method's superiority over state-of-the-art works.
summary: Endoscopy is a valuable tool for the early diagnosis of colon cancer. However, it requires the expertise of endoscopists and is a time-consuming process. In this work, we propose a new multi-label classification method, which considers two aspects of learning approaches (local and global views) for endoscopic image classification. The model consists of a Swin transformer branch and a modified VGG16 model as a CNN branch. To help the learning process of the CNN branch, the model employs saliency maps and endoscopy images and concatenates them. The results demonstrate that this method performed well for endoscopic medical images by utilizing local and global features of the images. Furthermore, quantitative evaluations prove the proposed method's superiority over state-of-the-art works.
abstract_zh: 内窥镜检查是结肠癌早期诊断的重要工具。然而，它需要内窥镜医师的专业知识，并且是一个耗时的过程。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的多标签分类方法，该方法考虑了内窥镜图像分类的学习方法（局部视图和全局视图）的两个方面。该模型由 Swin Transformer 分支和作为 CNN 分支的修改版 VGG16 模型组成。为了帮助 CNN 分支的学习过程，该模型采用显着图和内窥镜图像并将它们连接起来。结果表明，该方法利用图像的局部和全局特征在内窥镜医学图像上表现良好。此外，定量评估证明了所提出的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Swin Transformer和显著性图的内镜图像分类模型，用于结肠癌早期诊断。
AI.motivation: 内镜检查依赖专家且耗时，需开发自动化、高效的分类方法以提高诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 模型融合Swin Transformer分支与改进VGG16 CNN分支，通过显著性图增强CNN对局部特征的学习能力，结合局部与全局特征进行分类。
AI.result: 定量评估显示该方法在内镜医学图像分类任务中优于现有先进方法，具有较高的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合Transformer与CNN架构并引入显著性图，有效提升了内镜图像分类性能，为临床辅助诊断提供了新思路。

authors_text: Philippe Weitz,Viktoria Sartor,Balazs Acs,Stephanie Robertson,Daniel Budelmann,Johan Hartman,Mattias Rantalainen
title: Increasing the usefulness of already existing annotations through WSI registration
title_zh: 通过 WSI 注册增加现有注释的实用性
abstract: Computational pathology methods have the potential to improve access to precision medicine, as well as the reproducibility and accuracy of pathological diagnoses. Particularly the analysis of whole-slide-images (WSIs) of immunohistochemically (IHC) stained tissue sections could benefit from computational pathology methods. However, scoring biomarkers such as KI67 in IHC WSIs often necessitates the detection of areas of invasive cancer. Training cancer detection models often requires annotations, which is time-consuming and therefore costly. Currently, cancer regions are typically annotated in WSIs of haematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained tissue sections. In this study, we investigate the possibility to register annotations that were made in H&E WSIs to their IHC counterparts. Two pathologists annotated regions of invasive cancer in WSIs of 272 breast cancer cases. For each case, a matched H&E and KI67 WSI are available, resulting in 544 WSIs with invasive cancer annotations. We find that cancer detection CNNs that were trained with annotations registered from the H&E to the KI67 WSIs only differ slightly in calibration but not in performance compared to cancer detection models trained on annotations made directly in the KI67 WSIs in a test set consisting of 54 cases. The mean slide-level AUROC is 0.974 [0.964, 0.982] for models trained with the KI67 annotations and 0.974 [0.965, 0.982] for models trained using registered annotations. This indicates that WSI registration has the potential to reduce the need for IHC-specific annotations. This could significantly increase the usefulness of already existing annotations.
summary: Computational pathology methods have the potential to improve access to precision medicine, as well as the reproducibility and accuracy of pathological diagnoses. Particularly the analysis of whole-slide-images (WSIs) of immunohistochemically (IHC) stained tissue sections could benefit from computational pathology methods. However, scoring biomarkers such as KI67 in IHC WSIs often necessitates the detection of areas of invasive cancer. Training cancer detection models often requires annotations, which is time-consuming and therefore costly. Currently, cancer regions are typically annotated in WSIs of haematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained tissue sections. In this study, we investigate the possibility to register annotations that were made in H&E WSIs to their IHC counterparts. Two pathologists annotated regions of invasive cancer in WSIs of 272 breast cancer cases. For each case, a matched H&E and KI67 WSI are available, resulting in 544 WSIs with invasive cancer annotations. We find that cancer detection CNNs that were trained with annotations registered from the H&E to the KI67 WSIs only differ slightly in calibration but not in performance compared to cancer detection models trained on annotations made directly in the KI67 WSIs in a test set consisting of 54 cases. The mean slide-level AUROC is 0.974 [0.964, 0.982] for models trained with the KI67 annotations and 0.974 [0.965, 0.982] for models trained using registered annotations. This indicates that WSI registration has the potential to reduce the need for IHC-specific annotations. This could significantly increase the usefulness of already existing annotations.
abstract_zh: 计算病理学方法有可能提高精准医学的可及性以及病理诊断的可重复性和准确性。特别是免疫组织化学 (IHC) 染色组织切片的全切片图像 (WSI) 分析可以受益于计算病理学方法。然而，在 IHC WSI 中对 KI67 等生物标志物进行评分通常需要检测浸润性癌症区域。训练癌症检测模型通常需要注释，这非常耗时且成本高昂。目前，癌症区域通常在苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 染色的组织切片的 WSI 中进行注释。在本研究中，我们研究了将 H&E WSI 中所做的注释注册到 IHC 对应项的可能性。两位病理学家在 272 例乳腺癌病例的 WSI 中注释了浸润性癌症区域。对于每个病例，都有匹配的 H&E 和 KI67 WSI，从而产生 544 个带有侵袭性癌症注释的 WSI。我们发现，与在由 54 个病例组成的测试集中直接在 KI67 WSI 中进行的注释训练的癌症检测模型相比，使用从 H&E 注册到 KI67 WSI 的注释进行训练的癌症检测 CNN 在校准方面仅略有不同，但在性能上没有差异。对于使用 KI67 注释训练的模型，平均滑动级 AUROC 为 0.974 [0.964, 0.982]，对于使用注册注释训练的模型，平均滑动级 AUROC 为 0.974 [0.965, 0.982]。这表明 WSI 注册有可能减少对 IHC 特定注释的需求。这可以显着增加现有注释的有用性。

AI.tldr: 通过WSI配准提高现有注释的实用性
AI.motivation: 免疫组化（IHC）WSI的生物标志物评分需要检测侵袭性癌区，但直接注释IHC切片耗时耗力，而H&E切片注释已存在。
AI.method: 将272例乳腺癌病例的H&E切片注释配准到对应KI67 IHC切片，训练卷积神经网络（CNN）进行癌症检测。
AI.result: 配准注释训练的模型与直接IHC注释训练的模型在测试集上表现相近（AUROC均为0.974）。
AI.conclusion: WSI配准可有效复用现有H&E注释，显著减少IHC特异性注释需求。

authors_text: Teddy Lazebnik,Liron Simon-Keren
title: Knowledge-integrated AutoEncoder Model
title_zh: 知识集成自动编码器模型
abstract: Data encoding is a common and central operation in most data analysis tasks. The performance of other models downstream in the computational process highly depends on the quality of data encoding. One of the most powerful ways to encode data is using the neural network AutoEncoder (AE) architecture. However, the developers of AE cannot easily influence the produced embedding space, as it is usually treated as a black box technique. This means the embedding space is uncontrollable and does not necessarily possess the properties desired for downstream tasks. This paper introduces a novel approach for developing AE models that can integrate external knowledge sources into the learning process, possibly leading to more accurate results. The proposed Knowledge-integrated AutoEncoder (KiAE) model can leverage domain-specific information to make sure the desired distance and neighborhood properties between samples are preservative in the embedding space. The proposed model is evaluated on three large-scale datasets from three scientific fields and is compared to nine existing encoding models. The results demonstrate that the KiAE model effectively captures the underlying structures and relationships between the input data and external knowledge, meaning it generates a more useful representation. This leads to outperforming the rest of the models in terms of reconstruction accuracy.
summary: Data encoding is a common and central operation in most data analysis tasks. The performance of other models downstream in the computational process highly depends on the quality of data encoding. One of the most powerful ways to encode data is using the neural network AutoEncoder (AE) architecture. However, the developers of AE cannot easily influence the produced embedding space, as it is usually treated as a black box technique. This means the embedding space is uncontrollable and does not necessarily possess the properties desired for downstream tasks. This paper introduces a novel approach for developing AE models that can integrate external knowledge sources into the learning process, possibly leading to more accurate results. The proposed Knowledge-integrated AutoEncoder (KiAE) model can leverage domain-specific information to make sure the desired distance and neighborhood properties between samples are preservative in the embedding space. The proposed model is evaluated on three large-scale datasets from three scientific fields and is compared to nine existing encoding models. The results demonstrate that the KiAE model effectively captures the underlying structures and relationships between the input data and external knowledge, meaning it generates a more useful representation. This leads to outperforming the rest of the models in terms of reconstruction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 数据编码是大多数数据分析任务中常见且核心的操作。计算过程中下游其他模型的性能很大程度上取决于数据编码的质量。对数据进行编码的最强大方法之一是使用神经网络自动编码器 (AE) 架构。然而，AE 的开发人员无法轻易影响生成的嵌入空间，因为它通常被视为黑盒技术。这意味着嵌入空间是不可控的，并且不一定具有下游任务所需的属性。本文介绍了一种开发 AE 模型的新方法，可以将外部知识源集成到学习过程中，从而可能产生更准确的结果。所提出的知识集成自动编码器（KiAE）模型可以利用特定领域的信息来确保样本之间所需的距离和邻域属性在嵌入空间中保持不变。所提出的模型在来自三个科学领域的三个大型数据集上进行评估，并与九个现有的编码模型进行比较。结果表明，KiAE 模型有效地捕获了输入数据与外部知识之间的底层结构和关系，这意味着它生成了更有用的表示。这导致在重建精度方面优于其他模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种整合外部知识的自编码器模型（KiAE），以提升数据嵌入空间的质量和可控性。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器的嵌入空间作为黑箱难以控制，无法保证下游任务所需的距离和邻域特性。
AI.method: 设计Knowledge-integrated AutoEncoder（KiAE）模型，在学习过程中引入领域知识约束，确保嵌入空间保留样本间的关键关系。
AI.result: 在三个科学领域的大型数据集上，KiAE在重构准确率上优于九种现有模型，有效捕捉数据与知识间的结构关系。
AI.conclusion: 整合外部知识的KiAE模型能生成更符合下游任务需求的表示，显著提升重构性能。

search_text: Knowledge-integrated AutoEncoder Model 知识集成自动编码器模型 Data encoding is a common and central operation in most data analysis tasks. The performance of other models downstream in the computational process highly depends on the quality of data encoding. One of the most powerful ways to encode data is using the neural network AutoEncoder (AE) architecture. However, the developers of AE cannot easily influence the produced embedding space, as it is usually treated as a black box technique. This means the embedding space is uncontrollable and does not necessarily possess the properties desired for downstream tasks. This paper introduces a novel approach for developing AE models that can integrate external knowledge sources into the learning process, possibly leading to more accurate results. The proposed Knowledge-integrated AutoEncoder (KiAE) model can leverage domain-specific information to make sure the desired distance and neighborhood properties between samples are preservative in the embedding space. The proposed model is evaluated on three large-scale datasets from three scientific fields and is compared to nine existing encoding models. The results demonstrate that the KiAE model effectively captures the underlying structures and relationships between the input data and external knowledge, meaning it generates a more useful representation. This leads to outperforming the rest of the models in terms of reconstruction accuracy. 数据编码是大多数数据分析任务中常见且核心的操作。计算过程中下游其他模型的性能很大程度上取决于数据编码的质量。对数据进行编码的最强大方法之一是使用神经网络自动编码器 (AE) 架构。然而，AE 的开发人员无法轻易影响生成的嵌入空间，因为它通常被视为黑盒技术。这意味着嵌入空间是不可控的，并且不一定具有下游任务所需的属性。本文介绍了一种开发 AE 模型的新方法，可以将外部知识源集成到学习过程中，从而可能产生更准确的结果。所提出的知识集成自动编码器（KiAE）模型可以利用特定领域的信息来确保样本之间所需的距离和邻域属性在嵌入空间中保持不变。所提出的模型在来自三个科学领域的三个大型数据集上进行评估，并与九个现有的编码模型进行比较。结果表明，KiAE 模型有效地捕获了输入数据与外部知识之间的底层结构和关系，这意味着它生成了更有用的表示。这导致在重建精度方面优于其他模型。 本文提出一种整合外部知识的自编码器模型（KiAE），以提升数据嵌入空间的质量和可控性。 Teddy Lazebnik,Liron Simon-Keren cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Haichuan Li,Liguo Zhou,Alois Knoll
title: BCSSN: Bi-direction Compact Spatial Separable Network for Collision Avoidance in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: BCSSN：用于自动驾驶防撞的双向紧凑空间可分离网络
abstract: Autonomous driving has been an active area of research and development, with various strategies being explored for decision-making in autonomous vehicles. Rule-based systems, decision trees, Markov decision processes, and Bayesian networks have been some of the popular methods used to tackle the complexities of traffic conditions and avoid collisions. However, with the emergence of deep learning, many researchers have turned towards CNN-based methods to improve the performance of collision avoidance. Despite the promising results achieved by some CNN-based methods, the failure to establish correlations between sequential images often leads to more collisions. In this paper, we propose a CNN-based method that overcomes the limitation by establishing feature correlations between regions in sequential images using variants of attention. Our method combines the advantages of CNN in capturing regional features with a bi-directional LSTM to enhance the relationship between different local areas. Additionally, we use an encoder to improve computational efficiency. Our method takes "Bird's Eye View" graphs generated from camera and LiDAR sensors as input, simulates the position (x, y) and head offset angle (Yaw) to generate future trajectories. Experiment results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms existing vision-based strategies, achieving an average of only 3.7 collisions per 1000 miles of driving distance on the L5kit test set. This significantly improves the success rate of collision avoidance and provides a promising solution for autonomous driving.
summary: Autonomous driving has been an active area of research and development, with various strategies being explored for decision-making in autonomous vehicles. Rule-based systems, decision trees, Markov decision processes, and Bayesian networks have been some of the popular methods used to tackle the complexities of traffic conditions and avoid collisions. However, with the emergence of deep learning, many researchers have turned towards CNN-based methods to improve the performance of collision avoidance. Despite the promising results achieved by some CNN-based methods, the failure to establish correlations between sequential images often leads to more collisions. In this paper, we propose a CNN-based method that overcomes the limitation by establishing feature correlations between regions in sequential images using variants of attention. Our method combines the advantages of CNN in capturing regional features with a bi-directional LSTM to enhance the relationship between different local areas. Additionally, we use an encoder to improve computational efficiency. Our method takes "Bird's Eye View" graphs generated from camera and LiDAR sensors as input, simulates the position (x, y) and head offset angle (Yaw) to generate future trajectories. Experiment results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms existing vision-based strategies, achieving an average of only 3.7 collisions per 1000 miles of driving distance on the L5kit test set. This significantly improves the success rate of collision avoidance and provides a promising solution for autonomous driving.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶一直是一个活跃的研究和开发领域，人们正在探索各种用于自动驾驶汽车决策的策略。基于规则的系统、决策树、马尔可夫决策过程和贝叶斯网络是用于解决复杂的交通状况和避免碰撞的一些流行方法。然而，随着深度学习的出现，许多研究人员转向基于 CNN 的方法来提高防撞性能。尽管一些基于 CNN 的方法取得了有希望的结果，但未能在连续图像之间建立相关性往往会导致更多的冲突。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 的方法，该方法通过使用注意力的变体在序列图像中的区域之间建立特征相关性来克服该限制。我们的方法将 CNN 在捕获区域特征方面的优势与双向 LSTM 结合起来，以增强不同局部区域之间的关系。此外，我们使用编码器来提高计算效率。我们的方法以相机和 LiDAR 传感器生成的“鸟瞰图”图作为输入，模拟位置 (x, y) 和头部偏移角 (Yaw) 以生成未来的轨迹。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法优于现有的基于视觉的策略，在 L5kit 测试集上平均每 1000 英里行驶距离仅发生 3.7 次碰撞。这显着提高了避碰的成功率，为自动驾驶提供了一种有前途的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自动驾驶避障的双向紧凑空间可分网络（BCSSN），通过结合卷积神经网络与双向LSTM增强序列图像特征关联性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于规则或传统CNN的方法在处理连续图像序列的时空关联性时存在不足，导致避障成功率不足。
AI.method: 设计包含双向LSTM与注意力机制的CNN架构，通过编码器提升计算效率，输入鸟瞰图数据预测车辆未来轨迹。
AI.result: 在L5kit测试集上实现每千英里仅3.7次碰撞，显著优于现有视觉避障方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效建模时空特征关联性，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的避障解决方案。

authors_text: Siddharth Singi,Zhanpeng He,Alvin Pan,Sandip Patel,Gunnar A. Sigurdsson,Robinson Piramuthu,Shuran Song,Matei Ciocarlie
title: Decision Making for Human-in-the-loop Robotic Agents via Uncertainty-Aware Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过不确定性感知强化学习进行人机循环机器人代理的决策
abstract: In a Human-in-the-Loop paradigm, a robotic agent is able to act mostly autonomously in solving a task, but can request help from an external expert when needed. However, knowing when to request such assistance is critical: too few requests can lead to the robot making mistakes, but too many requests can overload the expert. In this paper, we present a Reinforcement Learning based approach to this problem, where a semi-autonomous agent asks for external assistance when it has low confidence in the eventual success of the task. The confidence level is computed by estimating the variance of the return from the current state. We show that this estimate can be iteratively improved during training using a Bellman-like recursion. On discrete navigation problems with both fully- and partially-observable state information, we show that our method makes effective use of a limited budget of expert calls at run-time, despite having no access to the expert at training time.
summary: In a Human-in-the-Loop paradigm, a robotic agent is able to act mostly autonomously in solving a task, but can request help from an external expert when needed. However, knowing when to request such assistance is critical: too few requests can lead to the robot making mistakes, but too many requests can overload the expert. In this paper, we present a Reinforcement Learning based approach to this problem, where a semi-autonomous agent asks for external assistance when it has low confidence in the eventual success of the task. The confidence level is computed by estimating the variance of the return from the current state. We show that this estimate can be iteratively improved during training using a Bellman-like recursion. On discrete navigation problems with both fully- and partially-observable state information, we show that our method makes effective use of a limited budget of expert calls at run-time, despite having no access to the expert at training time.
abstract_zh: 在“人在环”范例中，机器人代理能够在解决任务时大部分自主行动，但可以在需要时请求外部专家的帮助。然而，知道何时请求此类帮助至关重要：请求太少可能会导致机器人犯错误，但请求太多可能会使专家超负荷。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的方法来解决这个问题，其中半自主代理在对任务最终成功的信心较低时会请求外部援助。置信水平是通过估计当前状态返回的方差来计算的。我们表明，在训练过程中可以使用类似贝尔曼的递归来迭代改进该估计。在具有完全和部分可观察状态信息的离散导航问题上，我们表明我们的方法在运行时有效地利用了专家调用的有限预算，尽管在训练时无法访问专家。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性感知的强化学习方法，使机器人在需要时能有效请求人类专家帮助，从而在自主性和专家干预之间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 在人机协作的机器人系统中，如何判断何时请求专家帮助是关键问题。过度依赖自主可能引发错误，而频繁请求则会增加专家负担，现有方法难以在无专家参与的情况下训练出有效策略。
AI.method: 通过估计当前状态的回报方差衡量不确定性，结合强化学习框架构建置信度评估模型，并利用Bellman递归迭代优化该估计值，训练过程中无需专家参与。
AI.result: 在离散导航任务中，该方法能有效利用有限的专家请求次数，分别在全可观测和部分可观测环境下实现优于基准算法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过不确定性驱动的专家请求机制，成功实现了训练与推理阶段的解耦，在资源受限场景下展现出良好的适应性与实用性。
