method: 通过估计当前状态的回报方差衡量不确定性，结合强化学习框架构建置信度评估模型，并利用Bellman递归迭代优化该估计值，训练过程中无需专家参与。
result: 在离散导航任务中，该方法能有效利用有限的专家请求次数，分别在全可观测和部分可观测环境下实现优于基准算法的性能表现。
conclusion: 所提方法通过不确定性驱动的专家请求机制，成功实现了训练与推理阶段的解耦，在资源受限场景下展现出良好的适应性与实用性。
search_text: Decision Making for Human-in-the-loop Robotic Agents via Uncertainty-Aware Reinforcement Learning 通过不确定性感知强化学习进行人机循环机器人代理的决策 In a Human-in-the-Loop paradigm, a robotic agent is able to act mostly autonomously in solving a task, but can request help from an external expert when needed. However, knowing when to request such assistance is critical: too few requests can lead to the robot making mistakes, but too many requests can overload the expert. In this paper, we present a Reinforcement Learning based approach to this problem, where a semi-autonomous agent asks for external assistance when it has low confidence in the eventual success of the task. The confidence level is computed by estimating the variance of the return from the current state. We show that this estimate can be iteratively improved during training using a Bellman-like recursion. On discrete navigation problems with both fully- and partially-observable state information, we show that our method makes effective use of a limited budget of expert calls at run-time, despite having no access to the expert at training time. 在“人在环”范例中，机器人代理能够在解决任务时大部分自主行动，但可以在需要时请求外部专家的帮助。然而，知道何时请求此类帮助至关重要：请求太少可能会导致机器人犯错误，但请求太多可能会使专家超负荷。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的方法来解决这个问题，其中半自主代理在对任务最终成功的信心较低时会请求外部援助。置信水平是通过估计当前状态返回的方差来计算的。我们表明，在训练过程中可以使用类似贝尔曼的递归来迭代改进该估计。在具有完全和部分可观察状态信息的离散导航问题上，我们表明我们的方法在运行时有效地利用了专家调用的有限预算，尽管在训练时无法访问专家。 本文提出一种基于不确定性感知的强化学习方法，使机器人在需要时能有效请求人类专家帮助，从而在自主性和专家干预之间取得平衡。 Siddharth Singi,Zhanpeng He,Alvin Pan,Sandip Patel,Gunnar A. Sigurdsson,Robinson Piramuthu,Shuran Song,Matei Ciocarlie cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuanhao Cai,Hao Bian,Jing Lin,Haoqian Wang,Radu Timofte,Yulun Zhang
title: Retinexformer: One-stage Retinex-based Transformer for Low-light Image Enhancement
title_zh: Retinexformer：用于低光图像增强的基于 Retinex 的一级变压器
comment: ICCV 2023; The first Transformer-based method for low-light image enhancement
comments: ICCV 2023; The first Transformer-based method for low-light image enhancement
abstract: When enhancing low-light images, many deep learning algorithms are based on the Retinex theory. However, the Retinex model does not consider the corruptions hidden in the dark or introduced by the light-up process. Besides, these methods usually require a tedious multi-stage training pipeline and rely on convolutional neural networks, showing limitations in capturing long-range dependencies. In this paper, we formulate a simple yet principled One-stage Retinex-based Framework (ORF). ORF first estimates the illumination information to light up the low-light image and then restores the corruption to produce the enhanced image. We design an Illumination-Guided Transformer (IGT) that utilizes illumination representations to direct the modeling of non-local interactions of regions with different lighting conditions. By plugging IGT into ORF, we obtain our algorithm, Retinexformer. Comprehensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that our Retinexformer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on thirteen benchmarks. The user study and application on low-light object detection also reveal the latent practical values of our method. Code, models, and results are available at https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/Retinexformer
summary: When enhancing low-light images, many deep learning algorithms are based on the Retinex theory. However, the Retinex model does not consider the corruptions hidden in the dark or introduced by the light-up process. Besides, these methods usually require a tedious multi-stage training pipeline and rely on convolutional neural networks, showing limitations in capturing long-range dependencies. In this paper, we formulate a simple yet principled One-stage Retinex-based Framework (ORF). ORF first estimates the illumination information to light up the low-light image and then restores the corruption to produce the enhanced image. We design an Illumination-Guided Transformer (IGT) that utilizes illumination representations to direct the modeling of non-local interactions of regions with different lighting conditions. By plugging IGT into ORF, we obtain our algorithm, Retinexformer. Comprehensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that our Retinexformer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on thirteen benchmarks. The user study and application on low-light object detection also reveal the latent practical values of our method. Code, models, and results are available at https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/Retinexformer
abstract_zh: 在增强低光图像时，许多深度学习算法都是基于 Retinex 理论。然而，Retinex 模型没有考虑隐藏在黑暗中或由点亮过程引入的损坏。此外，这些方法通常需要繁琐的多阶段训练流程，并依赖于卷积神经网络，在捕获远程依赖性方面表现出局限性。在本文中，我们制定了一个简单但有原则的基于 Retinex 的单阶段框架（ORF）。 ORF 首先估计照明信息以照亮低光图像，然后恢复损坏以生成增强的图像。我们设计了一个照明引导变压器（IGT），它利用照明表示来指导不同照明条件下区域的非局部交互的建模。通过将 IGT 插入 ORF，我们获得了我们的算法 Retinexformer。全面的定量和定性实验表明，我们的 Retinexformer 在 13 个基准测试中显着优于最先进的方法。弱光物体检测的用户研究和应用也揭示了我们的方法的潜在实用价值。代码、模型和结果可在 https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/Retinexformer 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Retinex理论的单阶段Transformer框架Retinexformer，用于低光图像增强。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法依赖Retinex理论但未考虑暗光中的噪声及光照过程引入的干扰，且多阶段训练流程复杂，卷积网络难以捕捉长距离依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计单阶段Retinex框架（ORF），通过估计光照信息并修复噪声生成增强图像，结合光照引导的Transformer（IGT）建模不同光照区域的非局部交互。
AI.result: 在十三个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，用户研究及低光目标检测应用验证了方法的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: Retinexformer通过融合Retinex理论与Transformer架构，有效解决了低光图像增强中的关键问题，具有理论与应用价值。

authors_text: Xinyi Hu,Jasper C. H. Lee,Jimmy H. M. Lee
title: Branch & Learn with Post-hoc Correction for Predict+Optimize with Unknown Parameters in Constraints
title_zh: 通过事后校正进行分支和学习，以在约束中使用未知参数进行预测+优化
abstract: Combining machine learning and constrained optimization, Predict+Optimize tackles optimization problems containing parameters that are unknown at the time of solving. Prior works focus on cases with unknowns only in the objectives. A new framework was recently proposed to cater for unknowns also in constraints by introducing a loss function, called Post-hoc Regret, that takes into account the cost of correcting an unsatisfiable prediction. Since Post-hoc Regret is non-differentiable, the previous work computes only its approximation. While the notion of Post-hoc Regret is general, its specific implementation is applicable to only packing and covering linear programming problems. In this paper, we first show how to compute Post-hoc Regret exactly for any optimization problem solvable by a recursive algorithm satisfying simple conditions. Experimentation demonstrates substantial improvement in the quality of solutions as compared to the earlier approximation approach. Furthermore, we show experimentally the empirical behavior of different combinations of correction and penalty functions used in the Post-hoc Regret of the same benchmarks. Results provide insights for defining the appropriate Post-hoc Regret in different application scenarios.
summary: Combining machine learning and constrained optimization, Predict+Optimize tackles optimization problems containing parameters that are unknown at the time of solving. Prior works focus on cases with unknowns only in the objectives. A new framework was recently proposed to cater for unknowns also in constraints by introducing a loss function, called Post-hoc Regret, that takes into account the cost of correcting an unsatisfiable prediction. Since Post-hoc Regret is non-differentiable, the previous work computes only its approximation. While the notion of Post-hoc Regret is general, its specific implementation is applicable to only packing and covering linear programming problems. In this paper, we first show how to compute Post-hoc Regret exactly for any optimization problem solvable by a recursive algorithm satisfying simple conditions. Experimentation demonstrates substantial improvement in the quality of solutions as compared to the earlier approximation approach. Furthermore, we show experimentally the empirical behavior of different combinations of correction and penalty functions used in the Post-hoc Regret of the same benchmarks. Results provide insights for defining the appropriate Post-hoc Regret in different application scenarios.
abstract_zh: Predict+Optimize 将机器学习和约束优化相结合，解决包含求解时未知参数的优化问题。先前的工作只关注目标未知的情况。最近提出了一个新的框架，通过引入称为事后遗憾的损失函数来满足约束中的未知因素，该函数考虑了纠正不可满足的预测的成本。由于事后遗憾是不可微的，之前的工作仅计算其近似值。虽然事后遗憾的概念是通用的，但其具体实现仅适用于打包和覆盖线性规划问题。在本文中，我们首先展示如何针对可通过满足简单条件的递归算法解决的任何优化问题精确计算事后遗憾。实验表明，与早期的近似方法相比，解决方案的质量有了显着提高。此外，我们通过实验展示了相同基准的事后遗憾中使用的校正和惩罚函数的不同组合的经验行为。结果为在不同应用场景中定义适当的事后遗憾提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种精确计算Post-hoc Regret的方法，用于解决约束中存在未知参数的优化问题，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有Predict+Optimize方法仅处理目标函数中的未知参数，而约束中的未知参数需通过近似Post-hoc Regret解决，但近似方法存在精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计精确计算Post-hoc Regret的算法，适用于递归求解的优化问题，并通过实验对比不同校正与惩罚函数组合的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验显示精确方法显著优于近似方法，且不同函数组合在基准测试中表现出不同的效果，为实际应用提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 精确计算Post-hoc Regret能提升优化质量，合理选择校正与惩罚函数组合对不同应用场景至关重要。

authors_text: Hao Chen,Jiaze Wang,Kun Shao,Furui Liu,Jianye Hao,Chenyong Guan,Guangyong Chen,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Traj-MAE: Masked Autoencoders for Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: Traj-MAE：用于轨迹预测的屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Trajectory prediction has been a crucial task in building a reliable autonomous driving system by anticipating possible dangers. One key issue is to generate consistent trajectory predictions without colliding. To overcome the challenge, we propose an efficient masked autoencoder for trajectory prediction (Traj-MAE) that better represents the complicated behaviors of agents in the driving environment. Specifically, our Traj-MAE employs diverse masking strategies to pre-train the trajectory encoder and map encoder, allowing for the capture of social and temporal information among agents while leveraging the effect of environment from multiple granularities. To address the catastrophic forgetting problem that arises when pre-training the network with multiple masking strategies, we introduce a continual pre-training framework, which can help Traj-MAE learn valuable and diverse information from various strategies efficiently. Our experimental results in both multi-agent and single-agent settings demonstrate that Traj-MAE achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art methods and significantly outperforms our baseline model.
summary: Trajectory prediction has been a crucial task in building a reliable autonomous driving system by anticipating possible dangers. One key issue is to generate consistent trajectory predictions without colliding. To overcome the challenge, we propose an efficient masked autoencoder for trajectory prediction (Traj-MAE) that better represents the complicated behaviors of agents in the driving environment. Specifically, our Traj-MAE employs diverse masking strategies to pre-train the trajectory encoder and map encoder, allowing for the capture of social and temporal information among agents while leveraging the effect of environment from multiple granularities. To address the catastrophic forgetting problem that arises when pre-training the network with multiple masking strategies, we introduce a continual pre-training framework, which can help Traj-MAE learn valuable and diverse information from various strategies efficiently. Our experimental results in both multi-agent and single-agent settings demonstrate that Traj-MAE achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art methods and significantly outperforms our baseline model.
abstract_zh: 通过预测可能的危险，轨迹预测一直是构建可靠的自动驾驶系统的一项关键任务。一个关键问题是生成一致的轨迹预测而不发生碰撞。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了一种用于轨迹预测的高效掩码自动编码器（Traj-MAE），它可以更好地表示驾驶环境中智能体的复杂行为。具体来说，我们的 Traj-MAE 采用不同的掩蔽策略来预训练轨迹编码器和地图编码器，允许捕获代理之间的社交和时间信息，同时利用多个粒度的环境影响。为了解决使用多种掩蔽策略预训练网络时出现的灾难性遗忘问题，我们引入了持续预训练框架，它可以帮助 Traj-MAE 有效地从各种策略中学习有价值且多样化的信息。我们在多智能体和单智能体设置中的实验结果表明，Traj-MAE 通过最先进的方法实现了有竞争力的结果，并且显着优于我们的基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Traj-MAE的掩码自编码器，用于改进自动驾驶系统中的轨迹预测任务，以生成更一致且无碰撞的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法难以有效捕捉交通参与者之间的社会交互和时空信息，同时在多策略预训练中存在灾难性遗忘问题，需设计更高效的模型架构与训练框架。
AI.method: 通过多样化掩码策略预训练轨迹编码器和地图编码器，结合连续预训练框架解决灾难性遗忘问题，从而学习多粒度环境信息与社会交互特征。
AI.result: 在多智能体和单智能体场景下，Traj-MAE均优于基线模型，且在多个指标上达到与现有最先进方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: Traj-MAE通过掩码自编码结构和连续预训练机制，有效建模了交通场景中的社会交互与时空依赖关系，为轨迹预测任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dana Azouri,Oz Granit,Michael Alburquerque,Yishay Mansour,Tal Pupko,Itay Mayrose
title: The tree reconstruction game: phylogenetic reconstruction using reinforcement learning
title_zh: 树重建游戏：使用强化学习进行系统发育重建
abstract: We propose a reinforcement-learning algorithm to tackle the challenge of reconstructing phylogenetic trees. The search for the tree that best describes the data is algorithmically challenging, thus all current algorithms for phylogeny reconstruction use various heuristics to make it feasible. In this study, we demonstrate that reinforcement learning can be used to learn an optimal search strategy, thus providing a novel paradigm for predicting the maximum-likelihood tree. Our proposed method does not require likelihood calculation with every step, nor is it limited to greedy uphill moves in the likelihood space. We demonstrate the use of the developed deep-Q-learning agent on a set of unseen empirical data, namely, on unseen environments defined by nucleotide alignments of up to 20 sequences. Our results show that the likelihood scores of the inferred phylogenies are similar to those obtained from widely-used software. It thus establishes a proof-of-concept that it is beneficial to optimize a sequence of moves in the search-space, rather than optimizing the progress made in every single move only. This suggests that a reinforcement-learning based method provides a promising direction for phylogenetic reconstruction.
summary: We propose a reinforcement-learning algorithm to tackle the challenge of reconstructing phylogenetic trees. The search for the tree that best describes the data is algorithmically challenging, thus all current algorithms for phylogeny reconstruction use various heuristics to make it feasible. In this study, we demonstrate that reinforcement learning can be used to learn an optimal search strategy, thus providing a novel paradigm for predicting the maximum-likelihood tree. Our proposed method does not require likelihood calculation with every step, nor is it limited to greedy uphill moves in the likelihood space. We demonstrate the use of the developed deep-Q-learning agent on a set of unseen empirical data, namely, on unseen environments defined by nucleotide alignments of up to 20 sequences. Our results show that the likelihood scores of the inferred phylogenies are similar to those obtained from widely-used software. It thus establishes a proof-of-concept that it is beneficial to optimize a sequence of moves in the search-space, rather than optimizing the progress made in every single move only. This suggests that a reinforcement-learning based method provides a promising direction for phylogenetic reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种强化学习算法来应对重建系统发育树的挑战。搜索最能描述数据的树在算法上具有挑战性，因此当前所有系统发育重建算法都使用各种启发式方法使其可行。在这项研究中，我们证明强化学习可用于学习最佳搜索策略，从而为预测最大似然树提供一种新的范式。我们提出的方法不需要每一步都进行似然计算，也不限于似然空间中贪婪的上坡移动。我们展示了开发的深度 Q 学习代理在一组看不见的经验数据上的使用，即由最多 20 个序列的核苷酸比对定义的看不见的环境。我们的结果表明，推断的系统发育的似然评分与从广泛使用的软件中获得的相似。因此，它建立了一个概念验证，即优化搜索空间中的一系列移动，而不是仅优化每个移动所取得的进展是有益的。这表明基于强化学习的方法为系统发育重建提供了一个有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的算法，用于优化系统发育树的重建过程。
AI.motivation: 传统系统发育树重建方法依赖启发式策略，难以全局优化搜索路径，而强化学习可能提供更优的搜索策略。
AI.method: 采用深度Q学习代理，在无需每步计算似然的情况下，优化搜索空间中的动作序列。
AI.result: 在未见过的核酸序列数据集上，重建树的似然分数与主流软件结果相当。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为系统发育重建提供了新范式，证明优化动作序列优于局部贪心策略。

authors_text: Kwabena Nuamah,Alan Bundy
title: ALIST: Associative Logic for Inference, Storage and Transfer. A Lingua Franca for Inference on the Web
title_zh: ALIST：用于推理、存储和传输的关联逻辑。网络推理通用语言
abstract: Recent developments in support for constructing knowledge graphs have led to a rapid rise in their creation both on the Web and within organisations. Added to existing sources of data, including relational databases, APIs, etc., there is a strong demand for techniques to query these diverse sources of knowledge. While formal query languages, such as SPARQL, exist for querying some knowledge graphs, users are required to know which knowledge graphs they need to query and the unique resource identifiers of the resources they need. Although alternative techniques in neural information retrieval embed the content of knowledge graphs in vector spaces, they fail to provide the representation and query expressivity needed (e.g. inability to handle non-trivial aggregation functions such as regression). We believe that a lingua franca, i.e. a formalism, that enables such representational flexibility will increase the ability of intelligent automated agents to combine diverse data sources by inference. Our work proposes a flexible representation (alists) to support intelligent federated querying of diverse knowledge sources. Our contribution includes (1) a formalism that abstracts the representation of queries from the specific query language of a knowledge graph; (2) a representation to dynamically curate data and functions (operations) to perform non-trivial inference over diverse knowledge sources; (3) a demonstration of the expressiveness of alists to represent the diversity of representational formalisms, including SPARQL queries, and more generally first-order logic expressions.
summary: Recent developments in support for constructing knowledge graphs have led to a rapid rise in their creation both on the Web and within organisations. Added to existing sources of data, including relational databases, APIs, etc., there is a strong demand for techniques to query these diverse sources of knowledge. While formal query languages, such as SPARQL, exist for querying some knowledge graphs, users are required to know which knowledge graphs they need to query and the unique resource identifiers of the resources they need. Although alternative techniques in neural information retrieval embed the content of knowledge graphs in vector spaces, they fail to provide the representation and query expressivity needed (e.g. inability to handle non-trivial aggregation functions such as regression). We believe that a lingua franca, i.e. a formalism, that enables such representational flexibility will increase the ability of intelligent automated agents to combine diverse data sources by inference. Our work proposes a flexible representation (alists) to support intelligent federated querying of diverse knowledge sources. Our contribution includes (1) a formalism that abstracts the representation of queries from the specific query language of a knowledge graph; (2) a representation to dynamically curate data and functions (operations) to perform non-trivial inference over diverse knowledge sources; (3) a demonstration of the expressiveness of alists to represent the diversity of representational formalisms, including SPARQL queries, and more generally first-order logic expressions.
abstract_zh: 支持构建知识图谱的最新发展导致其在网络上和组织内的创建迅速增加。添加到现有的数据源（包括关系数据库、API 等）中，对查询这些不同知识源的技术有着强烈的需求。虽然存在诸如SPARQL之类的正式查询语言用于查询某些知识图谱，但用户需要知道他们需要查询哪些知识图谱以及他们需要的资源的唯一资源标识符。尽管神经信息检索中的替代技术将知识图的内容嵌入向量空间中，但它们无法提供所需的表示和查询表达能力（例如，无法处理回归等非平凡的聚合函数）。我们相信，能够实现这种表征灵活性的通用语言（即形式主义）将提高智能自动化代理通过推理组合不同数据源的能力。我们的工作提出了一种灵活的表示（列表）来支持不同知识源的智能联合查询。我们的贡献包括（1）一种形式主义，从知识图的特定查询语言中抽象出查询的表示； (2) 动态管理数据和函数（操作）的表示，以对不同的知识源执行重要的推理； (3) 展示 alist 的表达能力，以表示表征形式主义的多样性，包括 SPARQL 查询，以及更一般的一阶逻辑表达式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ALIST（关联逻辑），作为一种通用形式化语言，用于支持对网络上多样化知识源的智能联合查询。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱查询技术（如SPARQL）要求用户明确指定知识图谱和资源标识符，且难以处理复杂聚合操作；神经检索方法虽能嵌入知识图谱内容，但缺乏表达能力和推理灵活性。
AI.method: 设计ALIST形式化框架，抽象查询语言与知识图谱的具体表示，动态整合数据与操作函数，支持复杂推理，并通过SPARQL和一阶逻辑表达式验证其表现力。
AI.result: 实现了跨知识源的联合查询抽象表示，支持动态数据管理与非平凡推理，展示了对SPARQL等现有查询语言及一阶逻辑的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: ALIST通过统一形式化表示，提升了智能代理整合多源异构知识的能力，为网络环境下的联邦查询提供了灵活解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ALIST（关联逻辑），作为一种通用形式化语言，用于支持对网络上多样化知识源的智能联合查询。

search_text: ALIST: Associative Logic for Inference, Storage and Transfer. A Lingua Franca for Inference on the Web ALIST：用于推理、存储和传输的关联逻辑。网络推理通用语言 Recent developments in support for constructing knowledge graphs have led to a rapid rise in their creation both on the Web and within organisations. Added to existing sources of data, including relational databases, APIs, etc., there is a strong demand for techniques to query these diverse sources of knowledge. While formal query languages, such as SPARQL, exist for querying some knowledge graphs, users are required to know which knowledge graphs they need to query and the unique resource identifiers of the resources they need. Although alternative techniques in neural information retrieval embed the content of knowledge graphs in vector spaces, they fail to provide the representation and query expressivity needed (e.g. inability to handle non-trivial aggregation functions such as regression). We believe that a lingua franca, i.e. a formalism, that enables such representational flexibility will increase the ability of intelligent automated agents to combine diverse data sources by inference. Our work proposes a flexible representation (alists) to support intelligent federated querying of diverse knowledge sources. Our contribution includes (1) a formalism that abstracts the representation of queries from the specific query language of a knowledge graph; (2) a representation to dynamically curate data and functions (operations) to perform non-trivial inference over diverse knowledge sources; (3) a demonstration of the expressiveness of alists to represent the diversity of representational formalisms, including SPARQL queries, and more generally first-order logic expressions. 支持构建知识图谱的最新发展导致其在网络上和组织内的创建迅速增加。添加到现有的数据源（包括关系数据库、API 等）中，对查询这些不同知识源的技术有着强烈的需求。虽然存在诸如SPARQL之类的正式查询语言用于查询某些知识图谱，但用户需要知道他们需要查询哪些知识图谱以及他们需要的资源的唯一资源标识符。尽管神经信息检索中的替代技术将知识图的内容嵌入向量空间中，但它们无法提供所需的表示和查询表达能力（例如，无法处理回归等非平凡的聚合函数）。我们相信，能够实现这种表征灵活性的通用语言（即形式主义）将提高智能自动化代理通过推理组合不同数据源的能力。我们的工作提出了一种灵活的表示（列表）来支持不同知识源的智能联合查询。我们的贡献包括（1）一种形式主义，从知识图的特定查询语言中抽象出查询的表示； (2) 动态管理数据和函数（操作）的表示，以对不同的知识源执行重要的推理； (3) 展示 alist 的表达能力，以表示表征形式主义的多样性，包括 SPARQL 查询，以及更一般的一阶逻辑表达式。 本文提出ALIST（关联逻辑），作为一种通用形式化语言，用于支持对网络上多样化知识源的智能联合查询。 Kwabena Nuamah,Alan Bundy cs.AI

authors_text: Jan Jakubův,Karel Chvalovský,Zarathustra Goertzel,Cezary Kaliszyk,Mirek Olšák,Bartosz Piotrowski,Stephan Schulz,Martin Suda,Josef Urban
title: MizAR 60 for Mizar 50
title_zh: 开阳 60 换 开阳 50
abstract: As a present to Mizar on its 50th anniversary, we develop an AI/TP system that automatically proves about 60\% of the Mizar theorems in the hammer setting. We also automatically prove 75\% of the Mizar theorems when the automated provers are helped by using only the premises used in the human-written Mizar proofs. We describe the methods and large-scale experiments leading to these results. This includes in particular the E and Vampire provers, their ENIGMA and Deepire learning modifications, a number of learning-based premise selection methods, and the incremental loop that interleaves growing a corpus of millions of ATP proofs with training increasingly strong AI/TP systems on them. We also present a selection of Mizar problems that were proved automatically.
summary: As a present to Mizar on its 50th anniversary, we develop an AI/TP system that automatically proves about 60\% of the Mizar theorems in the hammer setting. We also automatically prove 75\% of the Mizar theorems when the automated provers are helped by using only the premises used in the human-written Mizar proofs. We describe the methods and large-scale experiments leading to these results. This includes in particular the E and Vampire provers, their ENIGMA and Deepire learning modifications, a number of learning-based premise selection methods, and the incremental loop that interleaves growing a corpus of millions of ATP proofs with training increasingly strong AI/TP systems on them. We also present a selection of Mizar problems that were proved automatically.
abstract_zh: 作为 Mizar 成立 50 周年的礼物，我们开发了一个 AI/TP 系统，可以在锤子设置中自动证明大约 60% 的 Mizar 定理。当自动证明者仅使用人工编写的 Mizar 证明中使用的前提来帮助自动证明者时，我们还可以自动证明 75% 的 Mizar 定理。我们描述了导致这些结果的方法和大规模实验。这尤其包括 E 和 Vampire 证明者、他们的 ENIGMA 和 Deepire 学习修改、许多基于学习的前提选择方法，以及将数百万个 ATP 证明的语料库与在其上训练日益强大的 AI/TP 系统交织在一起的增量循环。我们还提出了一系列自动证明的 Mizar 问题。

AI.tldr: 开发一种AI/TP系统，自动证明Mizar定理的60%，并在结合人类证明前提的情况下达到75%。
AI.motivation: 为庆祝Mizar系统50周年，推动自动化定理证明技术的发展与应用。
AI.method: 使用E和Vampire证明器及其ENIGMA、Deepire学习模块，结合基于学习的前提选择方法，并通过增量循环训练AI/TP系统。
AI.result: 自动证明了约60%的Mizar定理，结合人类前提时提升至75%，并展示了部分自动证明的案例。
AI.conclusion: AI与自动化证明器的结合显著提升了定理证明效率，未来可进一步优化学习模型与证明策略。

authors_text: Yuchun Miao,Lefei Zhang,Liangpei Zhang,Dacheng Tao
title: DDS2M: Self-Supervised Denoising Diffusion Spatio-Spectral Model for Hyperspectral Image Restoration
title_zh: DDS2M：用于高光谱图像恢复的自监督去噪扩散空间光谱模型
abstract: Diffusion models have recently received a surge of interest due to their impressive performance for image restoration, especially in terms of noise robustness. However, existing diffusion-based methods are trained on a large amount of training data and perform very well in-distribution, but can be quite susceptible to distribution shift. This is especially inappropriate for data-starved hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration. To tackle this problem, this work puts forth a self-supervised diffusion model for HSI restoration, namely Denoising Diffusion Spatio-Spectral Model (\texttt{DDS2M}), which works by inferring the parameters of the proposed Variational Spatio-Spectral Module (VS2M) during the reverse diffusion process, solely using the degraded HSI without any extra training data. In VS2M, a variational inference-based loss function is customized to enable the untrained spatial and spectral networks to learn the posterior distribution, which serves as the transitions of the sampling chain to help reverse the diffusion process. Benefiting from its self-supervised nature and the diffusion process, \texttt{DDS2M} enjoys stronger generalization ability to various HSIs compared to existing diffusion-based methods and superior robustness to noise compared to existing HSI restoration methods. Extensive experiments on HSI denoising, noisy HSI completion and super-resolution on a variety of HSIs demonstrate \texttt{DDS2M}'s superiority over the existing task-specific state-of-the-arts.
summary: Diffusion models have recently received a surge of interest due to their impressive performance for image restoration, especially in terms of noise robustness. However, existing diffusion-based methods are trained on a large amount of training data and perform very well in-distribution, but can be quite susceptible to distribution shift. This is especially inappropriate for data-starved hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration. To tackle this problem, this work puts forth a self-supervised diffusion model for HSI restoration, namely Denoising Diffusion Spatio-Spectral Model (\texttt{DDS2M}), which works by inferring the parameters of the proposed Variational Spatio-Spectral Module (VS2M) during the reverse diffusion process, solely using the degraded HSI without any extra training data. In VS2M, a variational inference-based loss function is customized to enable the untrained spatial and spectral networks to learn the posterior distribution, which serves as the transitions of the sampling chain to help reverse the diffusion process. Benefiting from its self-supervised nature and the diffusion process, \texttt{DDS2M} enjoys stronger generalization ability to various HSIs compared to existing diffusion-based methods and superior robustness to noise compared to existing HSI restoration methods. Extensive experiments on HSI denoising, noisy HSI completion and super-resolution on a variety of HSIs demonstrate \texttt{DDS2M}'s superiority over the existing task-specific state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型最近因其在图像恢复方面令人印象深刻的性能（尤其是在噪声鲁棒性方面）而受到了极大的关注。然而，现有的基于扩散的方法是在大量训练数据上进行训练的，并且在分布中表现良好，但很容易受到分布偏移的影响。这对于数据匮乏的高光谱图像 (HSI) 恢复尤其不合适。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了一种用于 HSI 恢复的自监督扩散模型，即去噪扩散时空谱模型（\texttt{DDS2M}），该模型通过在反向扩散过程中推断所提出的变分时空谱模块（VS2M）的参数来工作，仅使用退化的 HSI，无需任何额外的训练数据。在 VS2M 中，定制了基于变分推理的损失函数，使未经训练的空间和频谱网络能够学习后验分布，该后验分布充当采样链的转换，以帮助逆转扩散过程。得益于其自监督性质和扩散过程，与现有的基于扩散的方法相比，\texttt{DDS2M} 对各种 HSI 具有更强的泛化能力，与现有的 HSI 恢复方法相比，对噪声具有优异的鲁棒性。对 HSI 去噪、噪声 HSI 完成和各种 HSI 超分辨率的广泛实验证明了 DDS2M 相对于现有的特定任务最先进技术的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督去噪扩散时空光谱模型（DDS2M），用于解决高光谱图像（HSI）在数据稀缺情况下的恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的HSI恢复方法依赖大量训练数据，且在分布偏移时表现不佳，难以应对数据稀缺的HSI场景。
AI.method: 设计自监督扩散模型DDS2M，通过逆扩散过程推断变分时空光谱模块（VS2M）参数，仅利用退化HSI数据进行训练，无需额外数据。
AI.result: 在HSI去噪、补全和超分辨率任务中，DDS2M优于现有任务特定方法，展现出更强的泛化能力和抗噪鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DDS2M通过自监督机制和扩散过程有效解决了HSI数据稀缺与分布偏移问题，为高光谱图像恢复提供了新思路。

Extensive experiments on HSI denoising, noisy HSI completion and super-resolution on a variety of HSIs demonstrate \texttt{DDS2M}'s superiority over the existing task-specific state-of-the-arts. 扩散模型最近因其在图像恢复方面令人印象深刻的性能（尤其是在噪声鲁棒性方面）而受到了极大的关注。然而，现有的基于扩散的方法是在大量训练数据上进行训练的，并且在分布中表现良好，但很容易受到分布偏移的影响。这对于数据匮乏的高光谱图像 (HSI) 恢复尤其不合适。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了一种用于 HSI 恢复的自监督扩散模型，即去噪扩散时空谱模型（\texttt{DDS2M}），该模型通过在反向扩散过程中推断所提出的变分时空谱模块（VS2M）的参数来工作，仅使用退化的 HSI，无需任何额外的训练数据。在 VS2M 中，定制了基于变分推理的损失函数，使未经训练的空间和频谱网络能够学习后验分布，该后验分布充当采样链的转换，以帮助逆转扩散过程。得益于其自监督性质和扩散过程，与现有的基于扩散的方法相比，\texttt{DDS2M} 对各种 HSI 具有更强的泛化能力，与现有的 HSI 恢复方法相比，对噪声具有优异的鲁棒性。对 HSI 去噪、噪声 HSI 完成和各种 HSI 超分辨率的广泛实验证明了 DDS2M 相对于现有的特定任务最先进技术的优越性。 本文提出了一种自监督去噪扩散时空光谱模型（DDS2M），用于解决高光谱图像（HSI）在数据稀缺情况下的恢复问题。 Yuchun Miao,Lefei Zhang,Liangpei Zhang,Dacheng Tao cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yiqun Lin,Zhongjin Luo,Wei Zhao,Xiaomeng Li
title: Learning Deep Intensity Field for Extremely Sparse-View CBCT Reconstruction
title_zh: 学习深度强度场以实现极稀疏视图 CBCT 重建
abstract: Sparse-view cone-beam CT (CBCT) reconstruction is an important direction to reduce radiation dose and benefit clinical applications. Previous voxel-based generation methods represent the CT as discrete voxels, resulting in high memory requirements and limited spatial resolution due to the use of 3D decoders. In this paper, we formulate the CT volume as a continuous intensity field and develop a novel DIF-Net to perform high-quality CBCT reconstruction from extremely sparse (fewer than 10) projection views at an ultrafast speed. The intensity field of a CT can be regarded as a continuous function of 3D spatial points. Therefore, the reconstruction can be reformulated as regressing the intensity value of an arbitrary 3D point from given sparse projections. Specifically, for a point, DIF-Net extracts its view-specific features from different 2D projection views. These features are subsequently aggregated by a fusion module for intensity estimation. Notably, thousands of points can be processed in parallel to improve efficiency during training and testing. In practice, we collect a knee CBCT dataset to train and evaluate DIF-Net. Extensive experiments show that our approach can reconstruct CBCT with high image quality and high spatial resolution from extremely sparse views within 1.6 seconds, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Our code will be available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/DIF-Net.
summary: Sparse-view cone-beam CT (CBCT) reconstruction is an important direction to reduce radiation dose and benefit clinical applications. Previous voxel-based generation methods represent the CT as discrete voxels, resulting in high memory requirements and limited spatial resolution due to the use of 3D decoders. In this paper, we formulate the CT volume as a continuous intensity field and develop a novel DIF-Net to perform high-quality CBCT reconstruction from extremely sparse (fewer than 10) projection views at an ultrafast speed. The intensity field of a CT can be regarded as a continuous function of 3D spatial points. Therefore, the reconstruction can be reformulated as regressing the intensity value of an arbitrary 3D point from given sparse projections. Specifically, for a point, DIF-Net extracts its view-specific features from different 2D projection views. These features are subsequently aggregated by a fusion module for intensity estimation. Notably, thousands of points can be processed in parallel to improve efficiency during training and testing. In practice, we collect a knee CBCT dataset to train and evaluate DIF-Net. Extensive experiments show that our approach can reconstruct CBCT with high image quality and high spatial resolution from extremely sparse views within 1.6 seconds, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Our code will be available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/DIF-Net.
abstract_zh: 稀疏视锥束CT（CBCT）重建是降低辐射剂量、有利于临床应用的重要方向。以前基于体素的生成方法将 CT 表示为离散体素，由于使用 3D 解码器，导致内存要求较高且空间分辨率有限。在本文中，我们将 CT 体积表示为连续强度场，并开发了一种新颖的 DIF-Net，以超快的速度从极其稀疏（少于 10）的投影视图执行高质量 CBCT 重建。 CT 的强度场可以被视为 3D 空间点的连续函数。因此，重建可以重新表述为根据给定的稀疏投影回归任意 3D 点的强度值。具体来说，对于一个点，DIF-Net 从不同的 2D 投影视图中提取其特定于视图的特征。这些特征随后由融合模块聚合以进行强度估计。值得注意的是，可以并行处理数千个点，以提高训练和测试期间的效率。在实践中，我们收集膝盖 CBCT 数据集来训练和评估 DIF-Net。大量实验表明，我们的方法可以在 1.6 秒内从极其稀疏的视图中重建具有高图像质量和高空间分辨率的 CBCT，显着优于最先进的方法。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/xmed-lab/DIF-Net 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强度场的极稀疏视角CBCT重建方法DIF-Net，以提高重建质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统体素基于的方法因使用3D解码器导致内存需求高且空间分辨率受限，亟需更高效的稀疏视角CBCT重建方案。
AI.method: 将CT体积建模为连续强度场，通过DIF-Net从稀疏投影中回归任意3D点的强度值，利用视图特定特征提取与融合模块实现高效并行处理。
AI.result: 在膝关节CBCT数据集上，DIF-Net以1.6秒内从少于10个投影视角重建出高分辨率高质量图像，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DIF-Net通过连续强度场建模与并行处理机制，为极稀疏视角CBCT重建提供了高效且高保真的解决方案。

In this paper, we formulate the CT volume as a continuous intensity field and develop a novel DIF-Net to perform high-quality CBCT reconstruction from extremely sparse (fewer than 10) projection views at an ultrafast speed. Therefore, the reconstruction can be reformulated as regressing the intensity value of an arbitrary 3D point from given sparse projections. Specifically, for a point, DIF-Net extracts its view-specific features from different 2D projection views. These features are subsequently aggregated by a fusion module for intensity estimation. Notably, thousands of points can be processed in parallel to improve efficiency during training and testing. In practice, we collect a knee CBCT dataset to train and evaluate DIF-Net. Extensive experiments show that our approach can reconstruct CBCT with high image quality and high spatial resolution from extremely sparse views within 1.6 seconds, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods. authors_text: Min Zhang,Zifeng Zhuang,Zhitao Wang,Donglin Wang,Wenbin Li
title: RotoGBML: Towards Out-of-Distribution Generalization for Gradient-Based Meta-Learning
title_zh: RotoGBML：面向基于梯度的元学习的分布外泛化
abstract: Gradient-based meta-learning (GBML) algorithms are able to fast adapt to new tasks by transferring the learned meta-knowledge, while assuming that all tasks come from the same distribution (in-distribution, ID). However, in the real world, they often suffer from an out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization problem, where tasks come from different distributions. OOD exacerbates inconsistencies in magnitudes and directions of task gradients, which brings challenges for GBML to optimize the meta-knowledge by minimizing the sum of task gradients in each minibatch. To address this problem, we propose RotoGBML, a novel approach to homogenize OOD task gradients. RotoGBML uses reweighted vectors to dynamically balance diverse magnitudes to a common scale and uses rotation matrixes to rotate conflicting directions close to each other. To reduce overhead, we homogenize gradients with the features rather than the network parameters. On this basis, to avoid the intervention of non-causal features (e.g., backgrounds), we also propose an invariant self-information (ISI) module to extract invariant causal features (e.g., the outlines of objects). Finally, task gradients are homogenized based on these invariant causal features. Experiments show that RotoGBML outperforms other state-of-the-art methods on various few-shot image classification benchmarks.
summary: Gradient-based meta-learning (GBML) algorithms are able to fast adapt to new tasks by transferring the learned meta-knowledge, while assuming that all tasks come from the same distribution (in-distribution, ID). However, in the real world, they often suffer from an out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization problem, where tasks come from different distributions. OOD exacerbates inconsistencies in magnitudes and directions of task gradients, which brings challenges for GBML to optimize the meta-knowledge by minimizing the sum of task gradients in each minibatch. To address this problem, we propose RotoGBML, a novel approach to homogenize OOD task gradients. RotoGBML uses reweighted vectors to dynamically balance diverse magnitudes to a common scale and uses rotation matrixes to rotate conflicting directions close to each other. To reduce overhead, we homogenize gradients with the features rather than the network parameters. On this basis, to avoid the intervention of non-causal features (e.g., backgrounds), we also propose an invariant self-information (ISI) module to extract invariant causal features (e.g., the outlines of objects). Finally, task gradients are homogenized based on these invariant causal features. Experiments show that RotoGBML outperforms other state-of-the-art methods on various few-shot image classification benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 基于梯度的元学习（GBML）算法能够通过迁移学到的元知识来快速适应新任务，同时假设所有任务都来自相同的分布（分布内，ID）。然而，在现实世界中，它们经常遇到分布外（OOD）泛化问题，即任务来自不同的分布。 OOD加剧了任务梯度大小和方向的不一致，这给GBML通过最小化每个小批量中任务梯度之和来优化元知识带来了挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 RotoGBML，一种均匀化 OOD 任务梯度的新方法。 RotoGBML 使用重新加权的向量将不同的幅度动态平衡到共同的比例，并使用旋转矩阵将冲突的方向旋转为彼此接近。为了减少开销，我们使用特征而不是网络参数来均匀化梯度。在此基础上，为了避免非因果特征（例如背景）的干扰，我们还提出了一种不变的自信息（ISI）模块来提取不变的因果特征（例如物体的轮廓）。最后，基于这些不变的因果特征对任务梯度进行均质化。实验表明，RotoGBML 在各种少样本图像分类基准上优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RotoGBML方法，旨在解决基于梯度的元学习（GBML）在分布外（OOD）任务中的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GBML方法假设所有任务来自相同分布，但现实场景中任务分布差异导致梯度方向和幅度不一致，影响元知识优化效果。
AI.method: 通过重加权向量平衡梯度幅度，利用旋转矩阵对齐方向冲突，并引入不变自信息模块提取因果特征以避免非因果因素干扰。
AI.result: 在多个少样本图像分类基准测试中，RotoGBML优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RotoGBML通过梯度同质化和因果特征提取，显著提升了GBML在分布外场景下的泛化能力。

authors_text: Yi Wang,Jiaze Wang,Jinpeng Li,Zixu Zhao,Guangyong Chen,Anfeng Liu,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: PointPatchMix: Point Cloud Mixing with Patch Scoring
title_zh: PointPatchMix：点云混合与补丁评分
abstract: Data augmentation is an effective regularization strategy for mitigating overfitting in deep neural networks, and it plays a crucial role in 3D vision tasks, where the point cloud data is relatively limited. While mixing-based augmentation has shown promise for point clouds, previous methods mix point clouds either on block level or point level, which has constrained their ability to strike a balance between generating diverse training samples and preserving the local characteristics of point clouds. Additionally, the varying importance of each part of the point clouds has not been fully considered, cause not all parts contribute equally to the classification task, and some parts may contain unimportant or redundant information. To overcome these challenges, we propose PointPatchMix, a novel approach that mixes point clouds at the patch level and integrates a patch scoring module to generate content-based targets for mixed point clouds. Our approach preserves local features at the patch level, while the patch scoring module assigns targets based on the content-based significance score from a pre-trained teacher model. We evaluate PointPatchMix on two benchmark datasets, ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, and demonstrate significant improvements over various baselines in both synthetic and real-world datasets, as well as few-shot settings. With Point-MAE as our baseline, our model surpasses previous methods by a significant margin, achieving 86.3% accuracy on ScanObjectNN and 94.1% accuracy on ModelNet40. Furthermore, our approach shows strong generalization across multiple architectures and enhances the robustness of the baseline model.
summary: Data augmentation is an effective regularization strategy for mitigating overfitting in deep neural networks, and it plays a crucial role in 3D vision tasks, where the point cloud data is relatively limited. While mixing-based augmentation has shown promise for point clouds, previous methods mix point clouds either on block level or point level, which has constrained their ability to strike a balance between generating diverse training samples and preserving the local characteristics of point clouds. Additionally, the varying importance of each part of the point clouds has not been fully considered, cause not all parts contribute equally to the classification task, and some parts may contain unimportant or redundant information. To overcome these challenges, we propose PointPatchMix, a novel approach that mixes point clouds at the patch level and integrates a patch scoring module to generate content-based targets for mixed point clouds. Our approach preserves local features at the patch level, while the patch scoring module assigns targets based on the content-based significance score from a pre-trained teacher model. We evaluate PointPatchMix on two benchmark datasets, ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, and demonstrate significant improvements over various baselines in both synthetic and real-world datasets, as well as few-shot settings. With Point-MAE as our baseline, our model surpasses previous methods by a significant margin, achieving 86.3% accuracy on ScanObjectNN and 94.1% accuracy on ModelNet40. Furthermore, our approach shows strong generalization across multiple architectures and enhances the robustness of the baseline model.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是缓解深度神经网络过度拟合的有效正则化策略，在点云数据相对有限的 3D 视觉任务中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然基于混合的增强在点云方面表现出了希望，但以前的方法要么在块级要么在点级混合点云，这限制了它们在生成不同训练样本和保留点云局部特征之间取得平衡的能力。此外，尚未充分考虑点云每个部分的不同重要性，导致并非所有部分对分类任务的贡献均等，并且某些部分可能包含不重要或冗余信息。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 PointPatchMix，这是一种在补丁级别混合点云并集成补丁评分模块来为混合点云生成基于内容的目标的新颖方法。我们的方法保留了补丁级别的局部特征，而补丁评分模块根据来自预训练教师模型的基于内容的重要性得分来分配目标。我们在两个基准数据集 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN 上评估 PointPatchMix，并在合成数据集和真实数据集以及少样本设置中展示了相对于各种基线的显着改进。以 Point-MAE 作为基准，我们的模型大幅超越了之前的方法，在 ScanObjectNN 上实现了 86.3% 的准确率，在 ModelNet40 上实现了 94.1% 的准确率。此外，我们的方法显示了跨多种架构的强大泛化性，并增强了基线模型的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于补丁评分的点云混合方法PointPatchMix，通过在补丁级别混合点云并结合预训练模型的显著性评分，提升3D分类任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有点云混合方法在块或点级别操作，难以平衡样本多样性与局部特征保留，且未考虑点云不同区域的重要性差异，导致冗余信息干扰模型学习。
AI.method: 设计PointPatchMix框架，在补丁级别进行点云混合，并引入补丁评分模块，利用预训练教师模型计算各区域内容显著性，生成基于重要性的混合目标。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40和ScanObjectNN数据集上分别达到94.1%和86.3%的准确率，显著优于Point-MAE等基线方法，且在少样本场景下表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: PointPatchMix通过补丁级混合与显著性评分机制有效提升了点云数据增强效果，在多种架构和场景下均展现优越的泛化能力与鲁棒性。

To overcome these challenges, we propose PointPatchMix, a novel approach that mixes point clouds at the patch level and integrates a patch scoring module to generate content-based targets for mixed point clouds. Our approach preserves local features at the patch level, while the patch scoring module assigns targets based on the content-based significance score from a pre-trained teacher model. We evaluate PointPatchMix on two benchmark datasets, ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, and demonstrate significant improvements over various baselines in both synthetic and real-world datasets, as well as few-shot settings. authors_text: Bin Yan,Yi Jiang,Jiannan Wu,Dong Wang,Ping Luo,Zehuan Yuan,Huchuan Lu
title: Universal Instance Perception as Object Discovery and Retrieval
title_zh: 作为对象发现和检索的通用实例感知
abstract: All instance perception tasks aim at finding certain objects specified by some queries such as category names, language expressions, and target annotations, but this complete field has been split into multiple independent subtasks. In this work, we present a universal instance perception model of the next generation, termed UNINEXT. UNINEXT reformulates diverse instance perception tasks into a unified object discovery and retrieval paradigm and can flexibly perceive different types of objects by simply changing the input prompts. This unified formulation brings the following benefits: (1) enormous data from different tasks and label vocabularies can be exploited for jointly training general instance-level representations, which is especially beneficial for tasks lacking in training data. (2) the unified model is parameter-efficient and can save redundant computation when handling multiple tasks simultaneously. UNINEXT shows superior performance on 20 challenging benchmarks from 10 instance-level tasks including classical image-level tasks (object detection and instance segmentation), vision-and-language tasks (referring expression comprehension and segmentation), and six video-level object tracking tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/UNINEXT.
summary: All instance perception tasks aim at finding certain objects specified by some queries such as category names, language expressions, and target annotations, but this complete field has been split into multiple independent subtasks. In this work, we present a universal instance perception model of the next generation, termed UNINEXT. UNINEXT reformulates diverse instance perception tasks into a unified object discovery and retrieval paradigm and can flexibly perceive different types of objects by simply changing the input prompts. This unified formulation brings the following benefits: (1) enormous data from different tasks and label vocabularies can be exploited for jointly training general instance-level representations, which is especially beneficial for tasks lacking in training data. (2) the unified model is parameter-efficient and can save redundant computation when handling multiple tasks simultaneously. UNINEXT shows superior performance on 20 challenging benchmarks from 10 instance-level tasks including classical image-level tasks (object detection and instance segmentation), vision-and-language tasks (referring expression comprehension and segmentation), and six video-level object tracking tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/UNINEXT.
abstract_zh: 所有实例感知任务都旨在找到某些查询指定的某些对象，例如类别名称、语言表达和目标注释，但这个完整的领域已被分割成多个独立的子任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了下一代通用实例感知模型，称为 UNINEXT。 UNINEXT将多样化的实例感知任务重新表述为统一的对象发现和检索范式，只需改变输入提示就可以灵活地感知不同类型的对象。这种统一的公式带来了以下好处：（1）可以利用来自不同任务和标签词汇的大量数据来联合训练通用实例级表示，这对于缺乏训练数据的任务特别有益。 （2）统一模型参数效率高，在同时处理多个任务时可以节省冗余计算。 UNINEXT 在 10 个实例级任务的 20 个具有挑战性的基准测试中表现出卓越的性能，包括经典图像级任务（对象检测和实例分割）、视觉和语言任务（涉及表达理解和分割）以及 6 个视频级对象跟踪任务。代码可在 https://github.com/MasterBin-IIAU/UNINEXT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用实例感知模型UNINEXT，通过统一的物体发现与检索范式，灵活处理多种实例级感知任务。
AI.motivation: 现有实例感知任务被分割为多个独立子任务，导致数据利用效率低、模型冗余计算多，缺乏统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计UNINEXT模型，将不同任务（如目标检测、视觉语言理解、视频追踪等）统一为物体发现与检索问题，通过调整输入提示实现多任务灵活感知。
AI.result: 在10类共20个基准测试中表现优异，涵盖图像级、视觉语言和视频级任务，尤其在数据稀缺任务中展现优势。
AI.conclusion: 统一范式可高效融合多任务数据，提升参数效率，为通用实例感知提供新思路。

authors_text: Kota Kondo,Reinaldo Figueroa,Juan Rached,Jesus Tordesillas,Parker C. Lusk,Jonathan P. How
title: Robust MADER: Decentralized Multiagent Trajectory Planner Robust to Communication Delay in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: Robust MADER：去中心化多智能体轨迹规划器，对动态环境中的通信延迟具有鲁棒性
comment: 8 pagers, 10 figures,. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.13667
comments: 8 pagers, 10 figures,. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.13667
abstract: Communication delays can be catastrophic for multiagent systems. However, most existing state-of-the-art multiagent trajectory planners assume perfect communication and therefore lack a strategy to rectify this issue in real-world environments. To address this challenge, we propose Robust MADER (RMADER), a decentralized, asynchronous multiagent trajectory planner robust to communication delay. RMADER ensures safety by introducing (1) a Delay Check step, (2) a two-step trajectory publication scheme, and (3) a novel trajectory-storing-and-checking approach. Our primary contributions include: proving recursive feasibility for collision-free trajectory generation in asynchronous decentralized trajectory-sharing, simulation benchmark studies, and hardware experiments with different network topologies and dynamic obstacles. We show that RMADER outperforms existing approaches by achieving a 100% success rate of collision-free trajectory generation, whereas the next best asynchronous decentralized method only achieves 83% success.
summary: Communication delays can be catastrophic for multiagent systems. However, most existing state-of-the-art multiagent trajectory planners assume perfect communication and therefore lack a strategy to rectify this issue in real-world environments. To address this challenge, we propose Robust MADER (RMADER), a decentralized, asynchronous multiagent trajectory planner robust to communication delay. RMADER ensures safety by introducing (1) a Delay Check step, (2) a two-step trajectory publication scheme, and (3) a novel trajectory-storing-and-checking approach. Our primary contributions include: proving recursive feasibility for collision-free trajectory generation in asynchronous decentralized trajectory-sharing, simulation benchmark studies, and hardware experiments with different network topologies and dynamic obstacles. We show that RMADER outperforms existing approaches by achieving a 100% success rate of collision-free trajectory generation, whereas the next best asynchronous decentralized method only achieves 83% success.
abstract_zh: 对于多代理系统来说，通信延迟可能是灾难性的。然而，大多数现有的最先进的多智能体轨迹规划器都假设完美的通信，因此缺乏在现实环境中纠正此问题的策略。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 Robust MADER (RMADER)，这是一种对通信延迟具有鲁棒性的去中心化异步多智能体轨迹规划器。 RMADER 通过引入 (1) 延迟检查步骤、(2) 两步轨迹发布方案和 (3) 新颖的轨迹存储和检查方法来确保安全。我们的主要贡献包括：证明异步分散轨迹共享中无碰撞轨迹生成的递归可行性、模拟基准研究以及不同网络拓扑和动态障碍的硬件实验。我们表明，RMADER 的无碰撞轨迹生成成功率达到 100%，优于现有方法，而次优的异步分散方法仅取得 83% 的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Robust MADER（RMADER）的去中心化多智能体轨迹规划方法，旨在解决动态环境中通信延迟导致的碰撞问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数多智能体轨迹规划方法假设通信完美，无法应对实际环境中的通信延迟，可能导致严重安全问题。
AI.method: 通过引入延迟检测机制、两阶段轨迹发布方案以及创新的轨迹存储与检查方法，确保异步去中心化环境下的轨迹生成安全性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在仿真和硬件实验中，RMADER实现了100%的无碰撞轨迹生成成功率，显著优于现有最佳异步方法的83%。
AI.conclusion: RMADER有效解决了通信延迟问题，在动态环境中实现了安全高效的多智能体轨迹规划。

search_text: Robust MADER: Decentralized Multiagent Trajectory Planner Robust to Communication Delay in Dynamic Environments Robust MADER：去中心化多智能体轨迹规划器，对动态环境中的通信延迟具有鲁棒性 Communication delays can be catastrophic for multiagent systems. However, most existing state-of-the-art multiagent trajectory planners assume perfect communication and therefore lack a strategy to rectify this issue in real-world environments. To address this challenge, we propose Robust MADER (RMADER), a decentralized, asynchronous multiagent trajectory planner robust to communication delay. RMADER ensures safety by introducing (1) a Delay Check step, (2) a two-step trajectory publication scheme, and (3) a novel trajectory-storing-and-checking approach. Our primary contributions include: proving recursive feasibility for collision-free trajectory generation in asynchronous decentralized trajectory-sharing, simulation benchmark studies, and hardware experiments with different network topologies and dynamic obstacles. We show that RMADER outperforms existing approaches by achieving a 100% success rate of collision-free trajectory generation, whereas the next best asynchronous decentralized method only achieves 83% success. 对于多代理系统来说，通信延迟可能是灾难性的。然而，大多数现有的最先进的多智能体轨迹规划器都假设完美的通信，因此缺乏在现实环境中纠正此问题的策略。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 Robust MADER (RMADER)，这是一种对通信延迟具有鲁棒性的去中心化异步多智能体轨迹规划器。 RMADER 通过引入 (1) 延迟检查步骤、(2) 两步轨迹发布方案和 (3) 新颖的轨迹存储和检查方法来确保安全。我们的主要贡献包括：证明异步分散轨迹共享中无碰撞轨迹生成的递归可行性、模拟基准研究以及不同网络拓扑和动态障碍的硬件实验。我们表明，RMADER 的无碰撞轨迹生成成功率达到 100%，优于现有方法，而次优的异步分散方法仅取得 83% 的成功率。 本文提出了一种名为Robust MADER（RMADER）的去中心化多智能体轨迹规划方法，旨在解决动态环境中通信延迟导致的碰撞问题。 Kota Kondo,Reinaldo Figueroa,Juan Rached,Jesus Tordesillas,Parker C. Lusk,Jonathan P. How cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Bill Tomlinson,Rebecca W. Black,Donald J. Patterson,Andrew W. Torrance
title: The Carbon Emissions of Writing and Illustrating Are Lower for AI than for Humans
title_zh: 人工智能写作和插画的碳排放量低于人类
abstract: As AI systems proliferate, their greenhouse gas emissions are an increasingly important concern for human societies. We analyze the emissions of several AI systems (ChatGPT, BLOOM, DALL-E2, Midjourney) relative to those of humans completing the same tasks. We find that an AI writing a page of text emits 130 to 1500 times less CO2e than a human doing so. Similarly, an AI creating an image emits 310 to 2900 times less. Emissions analysis do not account for social impacts such as professional displacement, legality, and rebound effects. In addition, AI is not a substitute for all human tasks. Nevertheless, at present, the use of AI holds the potential to carry out several major activities at much lower emission levels than can humans.
summary: As AI systems proliferate, their greenhouse gas emissions are an increasingly important concern for human societies. We analyze the emissions of several AI systems (ChatGPT, BLOOM, DALL-E2, Midjourney) relative to those of humans completing the same tasks. We find that an AI writing a page of text emits 130 to 1500 times less CO2e than a human doing so. Similarly, an AI creating an image emits 310 to 2900 times less. Emissions analysis do not account for social impacts such as professional displacement, legality, and rebound effects. In addition, AI is not a substitute for all human tasks. Nevertheless, at present, the use of AI holds the potential to carry out several major activities at much lower emission levels than can humans.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能系统的激增，其温室气体排放成为人类社会日益重要的关注点。我们分析了几种人工智能系统（ChatGPT、BLOOM、DALL-E2、Midjourney）相对于人类完成相同任务的排放量。我们发现，人工智能编写一页文本所排放的二氧化碳当量比人类少 130 到 1500 倍。同样，创建图像的 AI 发出的辐射量要少 310 到 2900 倍。排放分析没有考虑职业替代、合法性和反弹效应等社会影响。此外，人工智能并不能替代所有人类任务。尽管如此，目前人工智能的使用有可能以比人类低得多的排放水平来开展几项重大活动。

AI.tldr: 比较AI与人类在写作和图像创作任务中的碳排放差异
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统普及，其温室气体排放成为社会关注的问题，需评估AI在减少碳排放方面的潜力
AI.method: 分析多种AI系统（ChatGPT、BLOOM、DALL-E2、Midjourney）与人类完成相同任务的碳排放数据
AI.result: AI写作排放为人类的1/130至1/1500，图像生成排放为人类的1/310至1/2900
AI.conclusion: AI在特定任务中显著降低碳排放，但无法替代所有人类工作，且需考虑社会影响因素

authors_text: Dilrukshi Gamage,Hariharan Ravinthran,Kazutoshi Sasahara
title: Moral intuitions behind deepfake-related discussions in Reddit communities
title_zh: Reddit 社区中与 Deepfake 相关的讨论背后的道德直觉
comment: This is more related to CSCW, societal implications. Manuscript to be submitted to SM+S Journal (Sage Group)
comments: This is more related to CSCW, societal implications. Manuscript to be submitted to SM+S Journal (Sage Group)
abstract: Deepfakes are AI-synthesized content that are becoming popular on many social media platforms, meaning the use of deepfakes is increasing in society, regardless of its societal implications. Its implications are harmful if the moral intuitions behind deepfakes are problematic; thus, it is important to explore how the moral intuitions behind deepfakes unfold in communities at scale. However, understanding perceived moral viewpoints unfolding in digital contexts is challenging, due to the complexities in conversations. In this research, we demonstrate how Moral Foundations Theory (MFT) can be used as a lens through which to operationalize moral viewpoints in discussions about deepfakes on Reddit communities. Using the extended Moral Foundations Dictionary (eMFD), we measured the strengths of moral intuition (moral loading) behind 101,869 Reddit posts. We present the discussions that unfolded on Reddit in 2018 to 2022 wherein intuitions behind some posts were found to be morally questionable to society. Our results may help platforms detect and take action against immoral activities related to deepfakes.
summary: Deepfakes are AI-synthesized content that are becoming popular on many social media platforms, meaning the use of deepfakes is increasing in society, regardless of its societal implications. Its implications are harmful if the moral intuitions behind deepfakes are problematic; thus, it is important to explore how the moral intuitions behind deepfakes unfold in communities at scale. However, understanding perceived moral viewpoints unfolding in digital contexts is challenging, due to the complexities in conversations. In this research, we demonstrate how Moral Foundations Theory (MFT) can be used as a lens through which to operationalize moral viewpoints in discussions about deepfakes on Reddit communities. Using the extended Moral Foundations Dictionary (eMFD), we measured the strengths of moral intuition (moral loading) behind 101,869 Reddit posts. We present the discussions that unfolded on Reddit in 2018 to 2022 wherein intuitions behind some posts were found to be morally questionable to society. Our results may help platforms detect and take action against immoral activities related to deepfakes.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 是人工智能合成的内容，在许多社交媒体平台上变得流行，这意味着无论其社会影响如何，deepfakes 在社会中的使用正在增加。如果深度造假背后的道德直觉有问题，那么它的影响就是有害的。因此，探索深度造假背后的道德直觉如何在大规模社区中展开非常重要。然而，由于对话的复杂性，理解在数字环境中展开的感知道德观点具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们展示了如何使用道德基础理论（MFT）作为一个镜头，通过它在 Reddit 社区上有关深度伪造的讨论中实践道德观点。使用扩展的道德基础词典 (eMFD)，我们测量了 101,869 个 Reddit 帖子背后的道德直觉（道德负载）的强度。我们展示了 2018 年至 2022 年 Reddit 上展开的讨论，其中一些帖子背后的直觉被发现在道德上对社会有疑问。我们的结果可能有助于平台检测与深度伪造相关的不道德活动并采取行动。

AI.tldr: 本文通过道德基础理论（MFT）和扩展道德基础词典（eMFD）分析Reddit社区中关于深度伪造的讨论，以量化其道德直觉并识别潜在有害内容。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造技术的普及可能引发社会危害，但其背后道德观点的复杂性尚未被系统研究，需探索社区讨论中的道德倾向以辅助平台治理。
AI.method: 利用eMFD工具分析2018至2022年间101,869条Reddit帖子，测量其道德直觉强度，并结合时间序列分析讨论趋势。
AI.result: 发现部分深度伪造相关内容存在道德争议，如伤害他人、欺骗等，为平台识别不道德活动提供了数据依据。
AI.conclusion: 道德基础理论框架可有效解析社交媒体中深度伪造讨论的伦理风险，助力平台制定针对性治理策略。

We present the discussions that unfolded on Reddit in 2018 to 2022 wherein intuitions behind some posts were found to be morally questionable to society. Our results may help platforms detect and take action against immoral activities related to deepfakes. Deepfakes 是人工智能合成的内容，在许多社交媒体平台上变得流行，这意味着无论其社会影响如何，deepfakes 在社会中的使用正在增加。如果深度造假背后的道德直觉有问题，那么它的影响就是有害的。因此，探索深度造假背后的道德直觉如何在大规模社区中展开非常重要。然而，由于对话的复杂性，理解在数字环境中展开的感知道德观点具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们展示了如何使用道德基础理论（MFT）作为一个镜头，通过它在 Reddit 社区上有关深度伪造的讨论中实践道德观点。使用扩展的道德基础词典 (eMFD)，我们测量了 101,869 个 Reddit 帖子背后的道德直觉（道德负载）的强度。我们展示了 2018 年至 2022 年 Reddit 上展开的讨论，其中一些帖子背后的直觉被发现在道德上对社会有疑问。我们的结果可能有助于平台检测与深度伪造相关的不道德活动并采取行动。 本文通过道德基础理论（MFT）和扩展道德基础词典（eMFD）分析Reddit社区中关于深度伪造的讨论，以量化其道德直觉并识别潜在有害内容。 Dilrukshi Gamage,Hariharan Ravinthran,Kazutoshi Sasahara cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.SI

authors_text: Yumeng Song,Yu Gu,Tianyi Li,Jianzhong Qi,Zhenghao Liu,Christian S. Jensen,Ge Yu
title: CHGNN: A Semi-Supervised Contrastive Hypergraph Learning Network
title_zh: CHGNN：半监督对比超图学习网络
abstract: Hypergraphs can model higher-order relationships among data objects that are found in applications such as social networks and bioinformatics. However, recent studies on hypergraph learning that extend graph convolutional networks to hypergraphs cannot learn effectively from features of unlabeled data. To such learning, we propose a contrastive hypergraph neural network, CHGNN, that exploits self-supervised contrastive learning techniques to learn from labeled and unlabeled data. First, CHGNN includes an adaptive hypergraph view generator that adopts an auto-augmentation strategy and learns a perturbed probability distribution of minimal sufficient views. Second, CHGNN encompasses an improved hypergraph encoder that considers hyperedge homogeneity to fuse information effectively. Third, CHGNN is equipped with a joint loss function that combines a similarity loss for the view generator, a node classification loss, and a hyperedge homogeneity loss to inject supervision signals. It also includes basic and cross-validation contrastive losses, associated with an enhanced contrastive loss training process. Experimental results on nine real datasets offer insight into the effectiveness of CHGNN, showing that it outperforms 13 competitors in terms of classification accuracy consistently.
summary: Hypergraphs can model higher-order relationships among data objects that are found in applications such as social networks and bioinformatics. However, recent studies on hypergraph learning that extend graph convolutional networks to hypergraphs cannot learn effectively from features of unlabeled data. To such learning, we propose a contrastive hypergraph neural network, CHGNN, that exploits self-supervised contrastive learning techniques to learn from labeled and unlabeled data. First, CHGNN includes an adaptive hypergraph view generator that adopts an auto-augmentation strategy and learns a perturbed probability distribution of minimal sufficient views. Second, CHGNN encompasses an improved hypergraph encoder that considers hyperedge homogeneity to fuse information effectively. Third, CHGNN is equipped with a joint loss function that combines a similarity loss for the view generator, a node classification loss, and a hyperedge homogeneity loss to inject supervision signals. It also includes basic and cross-validation contrastive losses, associated with an enhanced contrastive loss training process. Experimental results on nine real datasets offer insight into the effectiveness of CHGNN, showing that it outperforms 13 competitors in terms of classification accuracy consistently.
abstract_zh: 超图可以对社交网络和生物信息学等应用中发现的数据对象之间的高阶关系进行建模。然而，最近将图卷积网络扩展到超图的超图学习研究无法有效地从未标记数据的特征中学习。对于这种学习，我们提出了一种对比超图神经网络 CHGNN，它利用自监督对比学习技术从标记和未标记数据中学习。首先，CHGNN 包括一个自适应超图视图生成器，它采用自动增强策略并学习最小足够视图的扰动概率分布。其次，CHGNN 包含改进的超图编码器，该编码器考虑超边缘同质性以有效地融合信息。第三，CHGNN 配备了联合损失函数，该函数结合了视图生成器的相似性损失、节点分类损失和超边缘同质性损失来注入监督信号。它还包括与增强的对比损失训练过程相关的基本和交叉验证对比损失。在 9 个真实数据集上的实验结果提供了对 CHGNN 有效性的深入了解，表明它在分类准确性方面始终优于 13 个竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督对比超图学习网络CHGNN，用于有效利用有标签和无标签数据进行超图学习。
AI.motivation: 现有超图学习方法难以有效利用无标签数据特征，需通过对比学习技术提升半监督场景下的模型性能。
AI.method: 包含自适应超图视图生成器、考虑超边同质性的改进编码器，以及结合相似性损失、节点分类损失和超边同质性损失的联合损失函数，并引入增强对比损失训练过程。
AI.result: 在九个真实数据集上的实验表明，CHGNN在分类准确率上持续优于13种竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: CHGNN通过对比学习和超边同质性建模，有效解决了半监督超图学习中无标签数据利用不足的问题。

authors_text: Vignesh Viswanathan,Yair Zick
title: Weighted Notions of Fairness with Binary Supermodular Chores
title_zh: 二元超模杂务的公平加权概念
abstract: We study the problem of allocating indivisible chores among agents with binary supermodular cost functions. In other words, each chore has a marginal cost of $0$ or $1$ and chores exhibit increasing marginal costs (or decreasing marginal utilities). In this note, we combine the techniques of Viswanathan and Zick (2022) and Barman et al. (2023) to present a general framework for fair allocation with this class of valuation functions. Our framework allows us to generalize the results of Barman et al. (2023) and efficiently compute allocations which satisfy weighted notions of fairness like weighted leximin or min weighted $p$-mean malfare for any $p \ge 1$.
summary: We study the problem of allocating indivisible chores among agents with binary supermodular cost functions. In other words, each chore has a marginal cost of $0$ or $1$ and chores exhibit increasing marginal costs (or decreasing marginal utilities). In this note, we combine the techniques of Viswanathan and Zick (2022) and Barman et al. (2023) to present a general framework for fair allocation with this class of valuation functions. Our framework allows us to generalize the results of Barman et al. (2023) and efficiently compute allocations which satisfy weighted notions of fairness like weighted leximin or min weighted $p$-mean malfare for any $p \ge 1$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在具有二元超模成本函数的代理之间分配不可分割的杂务的问题。换句话说，每项杂务的边际成本为 0 美元或 1 美元，并且杂务表现出边际成本增加（或边际效用减少）。在这篇文章中，我们结合了 Viswanathan 和 Zick (2022) 以及 Barman 等人的技术。 （2023）提出了具有此类估值函数的公平分配的总体框架。我们的框架使我们能够概括 Barman 等人的结果。 （2023）并有效地计算满足加权公平概念的分配，例如加权 lexim 或最小加权 $p$-任何 $p \ge 1$ 的平均恶意。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有二元超模成本函数的代理之间分配不可分割任务的问题，并提出了一种通用框架以实现加权公平分配。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理具有递增边际成本的任务分配时，难以满足不同权重的公平性需求，需更高效的算法框架。
AI.method: 结合Viswanathan和Zick（2022）及Barman等（2023）的技术，构建通用分配框架以支持加权公平准则。
AI.result: 推广了Barman等人的结果，可高效计算满足加权leximin或min加权p-均值福利的分配方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了二元超模成本下的公平分配问题，为后续研究提供了理论基础与计算工具。

authors_text: Shuai Yuan,Shuzhi Yu,Hannah Kim,Carlo Tomasi
title: SemARFlow: Injecting Semantics into Unsupervised Optical Flow Estimation for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: SemARFlow：将语义注入自动驾驶的无监督光流估计中
comment: Accepted by ICCV-2023; Code is available at https://github.com/duke-vision/semantic-unsup-flow-release
comments: Accepted by ICCV-2023; Code is available at https://github.com/duke-vision/semantic-unsup-flow-release
abstract: Unsupervised optical flow estimation is especially hard near occlusions and motion boundaries and in low-texture regions. We show that additional information such as semantics and domain knowledge can help better constrain this problem. We introduce SemARFlow, an unsupervised optical flow network designed for autonomous driving data that takes estimated semantic segmentation masks as additional inputs. This additional information is injected into the encoder and into a learned upsampler that refines the flow output. In addition, a simple yet effective semantic augmentation module provides self-supervision when learning flow and its boundaries for vehicles, poles, and sky. Together, these injections of semantic information improve the KITTI-2015 optical flow test error rate from 11.80% to 8.38%. We also show visible improvements around object boundaries as well as a greater ability to generalize across datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/duke-vision/semantic-unsup-flow-release.
summary: Unsupervised optical flow estimation is especially hard near occlusions and motion boundaries and in low-texture regions. We show that additional information such as semantics and domain knowledge can help better constrain this problem. We introduce SemARFlow, an unsupervised optical flow network designed for autonomous driving data that takes estimated semantic segmentation masks as additional inputs. This additional information is injected into the encoder and into a learned upsampler that refines the flow output. In addition, a simple yet effective semantic augmentation module provides self-supervision when learning flow and its boundaries for vehicles, poles, and sky. Together, these injections of semantic information improve the KITTI-2015 optical flow test error rate from 11.80% to 8.38%. We also show visible improvements around object boundaries as well as a greater ability to generalize across datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/duke-vision/semantic-unsup-flow-release.
abstract_zh: 无监督光流估计在遮挡和运动边界附近以及低纹理区域尤其困难。我们表明，语义和领域知识等附加信息可以帮助更好地限制这个问题。我们引入了 SemARFlow，这是一种专为自动驾驶数据而设计的无监督光流网络，它将估计的语义分割掩模作为额外的输入。这些附加信息被注入编码器和学习的上采样器中，以细化流输出。此外，一个简单而有效的语义增强模块在学习车辆、电线杆和天空的流量及其边界时提供自我监督。总之，这些语义信息的注入将 KITTI-2015 光流测试错误率从 11.80% 提高到 8.38%。我们还展示了围绕对象边界的明显改进以及跨数据集泛化的更强能力。代码可在 https://github.com/duke-vision/semantic-unsup-flow-release 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为SemARFlow的无监督光流估计方法，通过注入语义信息来提升自动驾驶场景下的光流估计性能。
AI.motivation: 无监督光流估计在遮挡、运动边界和低纹理区域表现不佳，因此作者希望通过引入语义信息和领域知识来更好地约束这一问题。
AI.method: 作者设计了SemARFlow网络，将估计的语义分割掩码作为额外输入，并将其注入到编码器和一个学习的上采样器中，以优化光流输出。此外，还引入了一个简单的语义增强模块，用于学习车辆、杆子和天空等对象的光流及其边界。
AI.result: 该方法在KITTI-2015数据集上的光流测试错误率从11.80%降低到8.38%，并且在物体边界和跨数据集泛化能力方面也有明显提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入语义信息，SemARFlow在无监督光流估计任务中取得了显著的性能提升，并展示了在自动驾驶场景中的广泛应用前景。

ai_content.motivation: 无监督光流估计在遮挡、运动边界和低纹理区域表现不佳，因此作者希望通过引入语义信息和领域知识来更好地约束这一问题。
ai_content.method: 作者设计了SemARFlow网络，将估计的语义分割掩码作为额外输入，并将其注入到编码器和一个学习的上采样器中，以优化光流输出。此外，还引入了一个简单的语义增强模块，用于学习车辆、杆子和天空等对象的光流及其边界。
ai_content.result: 该方法在KITTI-2015数据集上的光流测试错误率从11.80%降低到8.38%，并且在物体边界和跨数据集泛化能力方面也有明显提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过引入语义信息，SemARFlow在无监督光流估计任务中取得了显著的性能提升，并展示了在自动驾驶场景中的广泛应用前景。

search_text: SemARFlow: Injecting Semantics into Unsupervised Optical Flow Estimation for Autonomous Driving SemARFlow：将语义注入自动驾驶的无监督光流估计中 Unsupervised optical flow estimation is especially hard near occlusions and motion boundaries and in low-texture regions. We show that additional information such as semantics and domain knowledge can help better constrain this problem. We introduce SemARFlow, an unsupervised optical flow network designed for autonomous driving data that takes estimated semantic segmentation masks as additional inputs. This additional information is injected into the encoder and into a learned upsampler that refines the flow output. In addition, a simple yet effective semantic augmentation module provides self-supervision when learning flow and its boundaries for vehicles, poles, and sky. Together, these injections of semantic information improve the KITTI-2015 optical flow test error rate from 11.80% to 8.38%. We also show visible improvements around object boundaries as well as a greater ability to generalize across datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/duke-vision/semantic-unsup-flow-release. 无监督光流估计在遮挡和运动边界附近以及低纹理区域尤其困难。我们表明，语义和领域知识等附加信息可以帮助更好地限制这个问题。我们引入了 SemARFlow，这是一种专为自动驾驶数据而设计的无监督光流网络，它将估计的语义分割掩模作为额外的输入。这些附加信息被注入编码器和学习的上采样器中，以细化流输出。此外，一个简单而有效的语义增强模块在学习车辆、电线杆和天空的流量及其边界时提供自我监督。总之，这些语义信息的注入将 KITTI-2015 光流测试错误率从 11.80% 提高到 8.38%。我们还展示了围绕对象边界的明显改进以及跨数据集泛化的更强能力。代码可在 https://github.com/duke-vision/semantic-unsup-flow-release 获取。 该论文提出了一种名为SemARFlow的无监督光流估计方法，通过注入语义信息来提升自动驾驶场景下的光流估计性能。 Shuai Yuan,Shuzhi Yu,Hannah Kim,Carlo Tomasi cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Sheng Cheng
title: A New Super-Resolution Measurement of Perceptual Quality and Fidelity
title_zh: 感知质量和保真度的新超分辨率测量
abstract: Super-resolution results are usually measured by full-reference image quality metrics or human rating scores. However, these evaluation methods are general image quality measurement, and do not account for the nature of the super-resolution problem. In this work, we analyze the evaluation problem based on the one-to-many mapping nature of super-resolution, and propose a novel distribution-based metric for super-resolution. Starting from the distribution distance, we derive the proposed metric to make it accessible and easy to compute. Through a human subject study on super-resolution, we show that the proposed metric is highly correlated with the human perceptual quality, and better than most existing metrics. Moreover, the proposed metric has a higher correlation with the fidelity measure compared to the perception-based metrics. To understand the properties of the proposed metric, we conduct extensive evaluation in terms of its design choices, and show that the metric is robust to its design choices. Finally, we show that the metric can be used to train super-resolution networks for better perceptual quality.
summary: Super-resolution results are usually measured by full-reference image quality metrics or human rating scores. However, these evaluation methods are general image quality measurement, and do not account for the nature of the super-resolution problem. In this work, we analyze the evaluation problem based on the one-to-many mapping nature of super-resolution, and propose a novel distribution-based metric for super-resolution. Starting from the distribution distance, we derive the proposed metric to make it accessible and easy to compute. Through a human subject study on super-resolution, we show that the proposed metric is highly correlated with the human perceptual quality, and better than most existing metrics. Moreover, the proposed metric has a higher correlation with the fidelity measure compared to the perception-based metrics. To understand the properties of the proposed metric, we conduct extensive evaluation in terms of its design choices, and show that the metric is robust to its design choices. Finally, we show that the metric can be used to train super-resolution networks for better perceptual quality.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率结果通常通过全参考图像质量指标或人类评分来衡量。然而，这些评估方法都是一般的图像质量测量，并没有考虑到超分辨率问题的本质。在这项工作中，我们分析了基于超分辨率的一对多映射性质的评估问题，并提出了一种新颖的基于分布的超分辨率度量。从分布距离开始，我们推导出建议的度量，使其易于访问和计算。通过对超分辨率的人类主题研究，我们表明所提出的指标与人类感知质量高度相关，并且优于大多数现有指标。此外，与基于感知的指标相比，所提出的指标与保真度测量具有更高的相关性。为了了解所提出的指标的属性，我们对其设计选择进行了广泛的评估，并表明该指标对其设计选择是稳健的。最后，我们表明该度量可用于训练超分辨率网络以获得更好的感知质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布距离的新超分辨率评估指标，用于衡量感知质量和保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率评估方法（如全参考图像质量指标或人工评分）未能反映超分辨率问题中的一对多映射特性，缺乏对感知质量与保真度的针对性衡量。
AI.method: 从分布距离出发推导出可计算的分布型指标，通过人工主观实验验证其与感知质量的相关性，并分析其设计选择的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 新指标与人类感知质量高度相关，优于多数现有指标，且比基于感知的指标更关联保真度；可应用于训练超分辨率网络以提升感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 该指标有效解决了超分辨率评估中的关键问题，为平衡感知质量与保真度提供了新的评价工具。

authors_text: Vinit Katariya,Ghazal Alinezhad Noghre,Armin Danesh Pazho,Hamed Tabkhi
title: A POV-based Highway Vehicle Trajectory Dataset and Prediction Architecture
title_zh: 基于 POV 的公路车辆轨迹数据集和预测架构
abstract: Vehicle Trajectory datasets that provide multiple point-of-views (POVs) can be valuable for various traffic safety and management applications. Despite the abundance of trajectory datasets, few offer a comprehensive and diverse range of driving scenes, capturing multiple viewpoints of various highway layouts, merging lanes, and configurations. This limits their ability to capture the nuanced interactions between drivers, vehicles, and the roadway infrastructure. We introduce the \emph{Carolinas Highway Dataset (CHD\footnote{\emph{CHD} available at: \url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/Carolinas\_Dataset}})}, a vehicle trajectory, detection, and tracking dataset. \emph{CHD} is a collection of 1.6 million frames captured in highway-based videos from eye-level and high-angle POVs at eight locations across Carolinas with 338,000 vehicle trajectories. The locations, timing of recordings, and camera angles were carefully selected to capture various road geometries, traffic patterns, lighting conditions, and driving behaviors. We also present \emph{PishguVe}\footnote{\emph{PishguVe} code available at: \url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/PishguVe}}, a novel vehicle trajectory prediction architecture that uses attention-based graph isomorphism and convolutional neural networks. The results demonstrate that \emph{PishguVe} outperforms existing algorithms to become the new state-of-the-art (SotA) in bird's-eye, eye-level, and high-angle POV trajectory datasets. Specifically, it achieves a 12.50\% and 10.20\% improvement in ADE and FDE, respectively, over the current SotA on NGSIM dataset. Compared to best-performing models on CHD, \emph{PishguVe} achieves lower ADE and FDE on eye-level data by 14.58\% and 27.38\%, respectively, and improves ADE and FDE on high-angle data by 8.3\% and 6.9\%, respectively.
summary: Vehicle Trajectory datasets that provide multiple point-of-views (POVs) can be valuable for various traffic safety and management applications. Despite the abundance of trajectory datasets, few offer a comprehensive and diverse range of driving scenes, capturing multiple viewpoints of various highway layouts, merging lanes, and configurations. This limits their ability to capture the nuanced interactions between drivers, vehicles, and the roadway infrastructure. We introduce the \emph{Carolinas Highway Dataset (CHD\footnote{\emph{CHD} available at: \url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/Carolinas\_Dataset}})}, a vehicle trajectory, detection, and tracking dataset. \emph{CHD} is a collection of 1.6 million frames captured in highway-based videos from eye-level and high-angle POVs at eight locations across Carolinas with 338,000 vehicle trajectories. The locations, timing of recordings, and camera angles were carefully selected to capture various road geometries, traffic patterns, lighting conditions, and driving behaviors. We also present \emph{PishguVe}\footnote{\emph{PishguVe} code available at: \url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/PishguVe}}, a novel vehicle trajectory prediction architecture that uses attention-based graph isomorphism and convolutional neural networks. The results demonstrate that \emph{PishguVe} outperforms existing algorithms to become the new state-of-the-art (SotA) in bird's-eye, eye-level, and high-angle POV trajectory datasets. Specifically, it achieves a 12.50\% and 10.20\% improvement in ADE and FDE, respectively, over the current SotA on NGSIM dataset. Compared to best-performing models on CHD, \emph{PishguVe} achieves lower ADE and FDE on eye-level data by 14.58\% and 27.38\%, respectively, and improves ADE and FDE on high-angle data by 8.3\% and 6.9\%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 提供多个视角 (POV) 的车辆轨迹数据集对于各种交通安全和管理应用程序非常有价值。尽管轨迹数据集非常丰富，但很少有数据集能够提供全面且多样化的驾驶场景，捕捉各种高速公路布局、合并车道和配置的多个视角。这限制了他们捕捉驾驶员、车辆和道路基础设施之间微妙相互作用的能力。我们介绍了 \emph{Carolinas Highway Dataset（CHD\footnote{\emph{CHD}，可在：\url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/Carolinas\_Dataset}}）}，这是一个车辆轨迹、检测和跟踪数据集。 \emph{CHD} 是在卡罗来纳州八个地点以视线水平和高角度 POV 拍摄的高速公路视频中捕获的 160 万帧的集合，包含 338,000 条车辆轨迹。地点、录制时间和摄像机角度都经过精心选择，以捕捉各种道路几何形状、交通模式、照明条件和驾驶行为。我们还提供了 \emph{PishguVe}\footnote{\emph{PishguVe} 代码，可在以下位置获得：\url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/PishguVe}}，这是一种新颖的车辆轨迹预测架构，它使用基于注意力的图同构和卷积神经网络。结果表明，\emph{PishguVe} 的性能优于现有算法，成为鸟瞰、平视和高角度 POV 轨迹数据集的最新算法 (SotA)。具体来说，与 NGSIM 数据集上当前的 SotA 相比，它在 ADE 和 FDE 方面分别实现了 12.50\% 和 10.20\% 的改进。与 CHD 上表现最佳的模型相比，\emph{PishguVe} 在眼平数据上的 ADE 和 FDE 分别降低了 14.58% 和 27.38%，在高角度数据上分别提高了 ADE 和 FDE 8.3% 和 6.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Carolinas Highway Dataset (CHD)的高速公路车辆轨迹数据集，并设计了一种基于注意力机制的图同构网络与卷积神经网络结合的轨迹预测架构PishguVe。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹数据集缺乏多视角（POV）的全面性和多样性，难以捕捉复杂道路场景中车辆与基础设施的交互细节，限制了交通安全管理应用的效果。
AI.method: 采集了卡罗莱纳州8个地点1.6百万帧的高低视角视频数据，构建包含338,000条轨迹的CHD数据集；提出PishguVe模型，结合注意力机制的图同构网络与卷积神经网络进行轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在NGSIM数据集上，PishguVe相比现有算法ADE/FDE指标分别提升12.50%/10.20%；在CHD数据集上，眼平视角ADE/FDE降低14.58%/27.38%，高视角提升8.3%/6.9%。
AI.conclusion: CHD数据集为多视角交通研究提供了新资源，PishguVe模型在多种视角下均达到当前最优性能，推动了基于深度学习的轨迹预测技术发展。

ai_content_json.method: 采集了卡罗莱纳州8个地点1.6百万帧的高低视角视频数据，构建包含338,000条轨迹的CHD数据集；提出PishguVe模型，结合注意力机制的图同构网络与卷积神经网络进行轨迹预测。
ai_content_json.result: 在NGSIM数据集上，PishguVe相比现有算法ADE/FDE指标分别提升12.50%/10.20%；在CHD数据集上，眼平视角ADE/FDE降低14.58%/27.38%，高视角提升8.3%/6.9%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: CHD数据集为多视角交通研究提供了新资源，PishguVe模型在多种视角下均达到当前最优性能，推动了基于深度学习的轨迹预测技术发展。
