search_text: A POV-based Highway Vehicle Trajectory Dataset and Prediction Architecture 基于 POV 的公路车辆轨迹数据集和预测架构 Vehicle Trajectory datasets that provide multiple point-of-views (POVs) can be valuable for various traffic safety and management applications. Despite the abundance of trajectory datasets, few offer a comprehensive and diverse range of driving scenes, capturing multiple viewpoints of various highway layouts, merging lanes, and configurations. This limits their ability to capture the nuanced interactions between drivers, vehicles, and the roadway infrastructure. We introduce the \emph{Carolinas Highway Dataset (CHD\footnote{\emph{CHD} available at: \url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/Carolinas\_Dataset}})}, a vehicle trajectory, detection, and tracking dataset. \emph{CHD} is a collection of 1.6 million frames captured in highway-based videos from eye-level and high-angle POVs at eight locations across Carolinas with 338,000 vehicle trajectories. The locations, timing of recordings, and camera angles were carefully selected to capture various road geometries, traffic patterns, lighting conditions, and driving behaviors. We also present \emph{PishguVe}\footnote{\emph{PishguVe} code available at: \url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/PishguVe}}, a novel vehicle trajectory prediction architecture that uses attention-based graph isomorphism and convolutional neural networks. The results demonstrate that \emph{PishguVe} outperforms existing algorithms to become the new state-of-the-art (SotA) in bird's-eye, eye-level, and high-angle POV trajectory datasets. Specifically, it achieves a 12.50\% and 10.20\% improvement in ADE and FDE, respectively, over the current SotA on NGSIM dataset. Compared to best-performing models on CHD, \emph{PishguVe} achieves lower ADE and FDE on eye-level data by 14.58\% and 27.38\%, respectively, and improves ADE and FDE on high-angle data by 8.3\% and 6.9\%, respectively. 提供多个视角 (POV) 的车辆轨迹数据集对于各种交通安全和管理应用程序非常有价值。尽管轨迹数据集非常丰富，但很少有数据集能够提供全面且多样化的驾驶场景，捕捉各种高速公路布局、合并车道和配置的多个视角。这限制了他们捕捉驾驶员、车辆和道路基础设施之间微妙相互作用的能力。我们介绍了 \emph{Carolinas Highway Dataset（CHD\footnote{\emph{CHD}，可在：\url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/Carolinas\_Dataset}}）}，这是一个车辆轨迹、检测和跟踪数据集。 \emph{CHD} 是在卡罗来纳州八个地点以视线水平和高角度 POV 拍摄的高速公路视频中捕获的 160 万帧的集合，包含 338,000 条车辆轨迹。地点、录制时间和摄像机角度都经过精心选择，以捕捉各种道路几何形状、交通模式、照明条件和驾驶行为。我们还提供了 \emph{PishguVe}\footnote{\emph{PishguVe} 代码，可在以下位置获得：\url{https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/PishguVe}}，这是一种新颖的车辆轨迹预测架构，它使用基于注意力的图同构和卷积神经网络。结果表明，\emph{PishguVe} 的性能优于现有算法，成为鸟瞰、平视和高角度 POV 轨迹数据集的最新算法 (SotA)。具体来说，与 NGSIM 数据集上当前的 SotA 相比，它在 ADE 和 FDE 方面分别实现了 12.50\% 和 10.20\% 的改进。与 CHD 上表现最佳的模型相比，\emph{PishguVe} 在眼平数据上的 ADE 和 FDE 分别降低了 14.58% 和 27.38%，在高角度数据上分别提高了 ADE 和 FDE 8.3% 和 6.9%。 本文提出一个名为Carolinas Highway Dataset (CHD)的高速公路车辆轨迹数据集，并设计了一种基于注意力机制的图同构网络与卷积神经网络结合的轨迹预测架构PishguVe。 Vinit Katariya,Ghazal Alinezhad Noghre,Armin Danesh Pazho,Hamed Tabkhi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Fangda Li,Zhiqiang Hu,Wen Chen,Avinash Kak
title: Adaptive Supervised PatchNCE Loss for Learning H&E-to-IHC Stain Translation with Inconsistent Groundtruth Image Pairs
title_zh: 用于学习具有不一致的地面实况图像对的 H&E 到 IHC 染色转换的自适应监督补丁损失
abstract: Immunohistochemical (IHC) staining highlights the molecular information critical to diagnostics in tissue samples. However, compared to H&E staining, IHC staining can be much more expensive in terms of both labor and the laboratory equipment required. This motivates recent research that demonstrates that the correlations between the morphological information present in the H&E-stained slides and the molecular information in the IHC-stained slides can be used for H&E-to-IHC stain translation. However, due to a lack of pixel-perfect H&E-IHC groundtruth pairs, most existing methods have resorted to relying on expert annotations. To remedy this situation, we present a new loss function, Adaptive Supervised PatchNCE (ASP), to directly deal with the input to target inconsistencies in a proposed H&E-to-IHC image-to-image translation framework. The ASP loss is built upon a patch-based contrastive learning criterion, named Supervised PatchNCE (SP), and augments it further with weight scheduling to mitigate the negative impact of noisy supervision. Lastly, we introduce the Multi-IHC Stain Translation (MIST) dataset, which contains aligned H&E-IHC patches for 4 different IHC stains critical to breast cancer diagnosis. In our experiment, we demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms existing image-to-image translation methods for stain translation to multiple IHC stains. All of our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/lifangda01/AdaptiveSupervisedPatchNCE.
summary: Immunohistochemical (IHC) staining highlights the molecular information critical to diagnostics in tissue samples. However, compared to H&E staining, IHC staining can be much more expensive in terms of both labor and the laboratory equipment required. This motivates recent research that demonstrates that the correlations between the morphological information present in the H&E-stained slides and the molecular information in the IHC-stained slides can be used for H&E-to-IHC stain translation. However, due to a lack of pixel-perfect H&E-IHC groundtruth pairs, most existing methods have resorted to relying on expert annotations. To remedy this situation, we present a new loss function, Adaptive Supervised PatchNCE (ASP), to directly deal with the input to target inconsistencies in a proposed H&E-to-IHC image-to-image translation framework. The ASP loss is built upon a patch-based contrastive learning criterion, named Supervised PatchNCE (SP), and augments it further with weight scheduling to mitigate the negative impact of noisy supervision. Lastly, we introduce the Multi-IHC Stain Translation (MIST) dataset, which contains aligned H&E-IHC patches for 4 different IHC stains critical to breast cancer diagnosis. In our experiment, we demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms existing image-to-image translation methods for stain translation to multiple IHC stains. All of our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/lifangda01/AdaptiveSupervisedPatchNCE.
abstract_zh: 免疫组织化学 (IHC) 染色突出显示了对组织样本诊断至关重要的分子信息。然而，与 H&E 染色相比，IHC 染色在所需的劳动力和实验室设备方面可能要昂贵得多。这激发了最近的研究表明，H&E 染色载玻片中存在的形态信息与 IHC 染色载玻片中的分子信息之间的相关性可用于 H&E 到 IHC 染色的转换。然而，由于缺乏像素完美的 H&E-IHC 真实值对，大多数现有方法都依赖于专家注释。为了解决这种情况，我们提出了一种新的损失函数，自适应监督 PatchNCE (ASP)，以直接处理所提出的 H&E-to-IHC 图像到图像翻译框架中的输入到目标的不一致问题。 ASP 损失建立在基于补丁的对比学习标准之上，称为监督 PatchNCE (SP)，并通过权重调度进一步增强它，以减轻噪声监督的负面影响。最后，我们介绍了多 IHC 染色翻译 (MIST) 数据集，其中包含对乳腺癌诊断至关重要的 4 种不同 IHC 染色的对齐 H&E-IHC 补丁。在我们的实验中，我们证明我们提出的方法优于现有的图像到图像转换方法，用于将染色剂转换为多种 IHC 染色剂。我们所有的代码和数据集都可以在 https://github.com/lifangda01/AdaptiveSupervisedPatchNCE 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应监督PatchNCE损失函数（ASP），用于解决H&E染色向IHC染色转换时因缺乏完美配对数据导致的图像翻译问题。
AI.motivation: IHC染色成本高昂且难以获取精确配对数据，现有方法依赖专家标注导致性能受限，需开发能处理不一致标注的新型损失函数。
AI.method: 设计基于补丁对比学习的ASP损失函数，结合权重调度机制降低噪声影响，并构建包含4种乳腺癌关键IHC染色配对的MIST数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多IHC染色翻译任务中优于现有图像翻译方法，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: ASP损失函数有效解决了不一致标注下的染色转换问题，MIST数据集为相关研究提供了新资源。

authors_text: Pranav Kulkarni,Adway Kanhere,Paul H. Yi,Vishwa S. Parekh
title: Optimizing Federated Learning for Medical Image Classification on Distributed Non-iid Datasets with Partial Labels
title_zh: 优化带有部分标签的分布式非独立同分布数据集上医学图像分类的联合学习
abstract: Numerous large-scale chest x-ray datasets have spearheaded expert-level detection of abnormalities using deep learning. However, these datasets focus on detecting a subset of disease labels that could be present, thus making them distributed and non-iid with partial labels. Recent literature has indicated the impact of batch normalization layers on the convergence of federated learning due to domain shift associated with non-iid data with partial labels. To that end, we propose FedFBN, a federated learning framework that draws inspiration from transfer learning by using pretrained networks as the model backend and freezing the batch normalization layers throughout the training process. We evaluate FedFBN with current FL strategies using synthetic iid toy datasets and large-scale non-iid datasets across scenarios with partial and complete labels. Our results demonstrate that FedFBN outperforms current aggregation strategies for training global models using distributed and non-iid data with partial labels.
summary: Numerous large-scale chest x-ray datasets have spearheaded expert-level detection of abnormalities using deep learning. However, these datasets focus on detecting a subset of disease labels that could be present, thus making them distributed and non-iid with partial labels. Recent literature has indicated the impact of batch normalization layers on the convergence of federated learning due to domain shift associated with non-iid data with partial labels. To that end, we propose FedFBN, a federated learning framework that draws inspiration from transfer learning by using pretrained networks as the model backend and freezing the batch normalization layers throughout the training process. We evaluate FedFBN with current FL strategies using synthetic iid toy datasets and large-scale non-iid datasets across scenarios with partial and complete labels. Our results demonstrate that FedFBN outperforms current aggregation strategies for training global models using distributed and non-iid data with partial labels.
abstract_zh: 许多大规模胸部 X 射线数据集率先使用深度学习进行专家级异常检测。然而，这些数据集侧重于检测可能存在的疾病标签的子集，从而使它们分布且具有部分标签的非独立同分布。最近的文献表明，由于与具有部分标签的非独立同分布数据相关的域转移，批量归一化层对联邦学习的收敛产生影响。为此，我们提出了 FedFBN，这是一种联邦学习框架，它通过使用预训练网络作为模型后端并在整个训练过程中冻结批量归一化层，从迁移学习中汲取灵感。我们使用合成独立同分布玩具数据集和跨具有部分和完整标签的场景的大规模非独立同分布数据集，通过当前的 FL 策略来评估 FedFBN。我们的结果表明，FedFBN 优于当前使用带有部分标签的分布式和非独立同分布数据训练全局模型的聚合策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedFBN框架，优化联邦学习在分布式非独立同分布（non-iid）医疗图像分类任务中的性能，尤其针对部分标签数据场景。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗图像数据集存在标签不完整和分布不均问题，导致联邦学习中批量归一化层因领域偏移影响收敛，需改进模型适应性。
AI.method: 基于迁移学习思想，采用预训练网络作为后端模型，并冻结批量归一化层参数，结合联邦学习策略进行训练与评估。
AI.result: FedFBN在合成i.i.d数据集和大规模非i.i.d医疗数据集上均优于现有聚合策略，尤其在部分标签场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 冻结批量归一化层的FedFBN框架有效缓解了非i.i.d数据与部分标签对联邦学习的负面影响，提升了全局模型性能。

search_text: Optimizing Federated Learning for Medical Image Classification on Distributed Non-iid Datasets with Partial Labels 优化带有部分标签的分布式非独立同分布数据集上医学图像分类的联合学习 Numerous large-scale chest x-ray datasets have spearheaded expert-level detection of abnormalities using deep learning. However, these datasets focus on detecting a subset of disease labels that could be present, thus making them distributed and non-iid with partial labels. Recent literature has indicated the impact of batch normalization layers on the convergence of federated learning due to domain shift associated with non-iid data with partial labels. To that end, we propose FedFBN, a federated learning framework that draws inspiration from transfer learning by using pretrained networks as the model backend and freezing the batch normalization layers throughout the training process. We evaluate FedFBN with current FL strategies using synthetic iid toy datasets and large-scale non-iid datasets across scenarios with partial and complete labels. Our results demonstrate that FedFBN outperforms current aggregation strategies for training global models using distributed and non-iid data with partial labels. 许多大规模胸部 X 射线数据集率先使用深度学习进行专家级异常检测。然而，这些数据集侧重于检测可能存在的疾病标签的子集，从而使它们分布且具有部分标签的非独立同分布。最近的文献表明，由于与具有部分标签的非独立同分布数据相关的域转移，批量归一化层对联邦学习的收敛产生影响。为此，我们提出了 FedFBN，这是一种联邦学习框架，它通过使用预训练网络作为模型后端并在整个训练过程中冻结批量归一化层，从迁移学习中汲取灵感。我们使用合成独立同分布玩具数据集和跨具有部分和完整标签的场景的大规模非独立同分布数据集，通过当前的 FL 策略来评估 FedFBN。我们的结果表明，FedFBN 优于当前使用带有部分标签的分布式和非独立同分布数据训练全局模型的聚合策略。 本文提出FedFBN框架，优化联邦学习在分布式非独立同分布（non-iid）医疗图像分类任务中的性能，尤其针对部分标签数据场景。 Pranav Kulkarni,Adway Kanhere,Paul H. Yi,Vishwa S. Parekh cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Junyu Chen,Yihao Liu,Yufan He,Yong Du
title: Deformable Cross-Attention Transformer for Medical Image Registration
title_zh: 用于医学图像配准的可变形交叉注意力变压器
abstract: Transformers have recently shown promise for medical image applications, leading to an increasing interest in developing such models for medical image registration. Recent advancements in designing registration Transformers have focused on using cross-attention (CA) to enable a more precise understanding of spatial correspondences between moving and fixed images. Here, we propose a novel CA mechanism that computes windowed attention using deformable windows. In contrast to existing CA mechanisms that require intensive computational complexity by either computing CA globally or locally with a fixed and expanded search window, the proposed deformable CA can selectively sample a diverse set of features over a large search window while maintaining low computational complexity. The proposed model was extensively evaluated on multi-modal, mono-modal, and atlas-to-patient registration tasks, demonstrating promising performance against state-of-the-art methods and indicating its effectiveness for medical image registration. The source code for this work will be available after publication.
summary: Transformers have recently shown promise for medical image applications, leading to an increasing interest in developing such models for medical image registration. Recent advancements in designing registration Transformers have focused on using cross-attention (CA) to enable a more precise understanding of spatial correspondences between moving and fixed images. Here, we propose a novel CA mechanism that computes windowed attention using deformable windows. In contrast to existing CA mechanisms that require intensive computational complexity by either computing CA globally or locally with a fixed and expanded search window, the proposed deformable CA can selectively sample a diverse set of features over a large search window while maintaining low computational complexity. The proposed model was extensively evaluated on multi-modal, mono-modal, and atlas-to-patient registration tasks, demonstrating promising performance against state-of-the-art methods and indicating its effectiveness for medical image registration. The source code for this work will be available after publication.
abstract_zh: Transformer 最近在医学图像应用中展现出了良好的前景，导致人们对开发此类医学图像配准模型的兴趣日益浓厚。设计配准 Transformer 的最新进展主要集中在使用交叉注意力 (CA) 来更精确地理解移动图像和固定图像之间的空间对应关系。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的 CA 机制，使用可变形窗口来计算窗口注意力。现有的 CA 机制需要通过固定和扩展的搜索窗口全局或本地计算 CA 来实现密集的计算复杂性，相比之下，所提出的可变形 CA 可以在大搜索窗口上选择性地采样不同的特征集，同时保持较低的计算复杂性。所提出的模型在多模态、单模态和图谱到患者配准任务上进行了广泛评估，证明了与最先进方法相比的良好性能，并表明了其在医学图像配准方面的有效性。这项工作的源代码将在出版后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可变形交叉注意力机制的Transformer模型，用于改进医学图像配准任务。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉注意力机制在医学图像配准中存在计算复杂度高或特征采样受限的问题，需设计更高效且精准的注意力机制。
AI.method: 设计可变形窗口交叉注意力机制，通过动态调整搜索窗口形状，在保持低计算量的同时实现大范围特征多样性采样。
AI.result: 在多模态、单模态及图谱到患者配准任务中均优于现有最先进方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 可变形交叉注意力Transformer为医学图像配准提供了高效且精确的解决方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Khadija Hanifi,Ramin F Fouladi,Basak Gencer Unsalver,Goksu Karadag
title: Software Vulnerability Prediction Knowledge Transferring Between Programming Languages
title_zh: 软件漏洞预测编程语言之间的知识转移
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, Accepted for presentation in 18th International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches to Software engineering (ENASE 2023), PRAUGE, CZECH REPUBLIC
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures, Accepted for presentation in 18th International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches to Software engineering (ENASE 2023), PRAUGE, CZECH REPUBLIC
abstract: Developing automated and smart software vulnerability detection models has been receiving great attention from both research and development communities. One of the biggest challenges in this area is the lack of code samples for all different programming languages. In this study, we address this issue by proposing a transfer learning technique to leverage available datasets and generate a model to detect common vulnerabilities in different programming languages. We use C source code samples to train a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model, then, we use Java source code samples to adopt and evaluate the learned model. We use code samples from two benchmark datasets: NIST Software Assurance Reference Dataset (SARD) and Draper VDISC dataset. The results show that proposed model detects vulnerabilities in both C and Java codes with average recall of 72\%. Additionally, we employ explainable AI to investigate how much each feature contributes to the knowledge transfer mechanisms between C and Java in the proposed model.
summary: Developing automated and smart software vulnerability detection models has been receiving great attention from both research and development communities. One of the biggest challenges in this area is the lack of code samples for all different programming languages. In this study, we address this issue by proposing a transfer learning technique to leverage available datasets and generate a model to detect common vulnerabilities in different programming languages. We use C source code samples to train a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model, then, we use Java source code samples to adopt and evaluate the learned model. We use code samples from two benchmark datasets: NIST Software Assurance Reference Dataset (SARD) and Draper VDISC dataset. The results show that proposed model detects vulnerabilities in both C and Java codes with average recall of 72\%. Additionally, we employ explainable AI to investigate how much each feature contributes to the knowledge transfer mechanisms between C and Java in the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 开发自动化、智能的软件漏洞检测模型一直受到研究和开发社区的高度关注。该领域最大的挑战之一是缺乏所有不同编程语言的代码示例。在本研究中，我们通过提出一种迁移学习技术来解决这个问题，该技术利用可用的数据集并生成模型来检测不同编程语言中的常见漏洞。我们使用 C 源代码示例来训练卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型，然后使用 Java 源代码示例来采用和评估学习的模型。我们使用来自两个基准数据集的代码示例：NIST 软件保障参考数据集 (SARD) 和 Draper VDISC 数据集。结果表明，所提出的模型可以检测 C 和 Java 代码中的漏洞，平均召回率为 72%。此外，我们采用可解释的人工智能来研究每个特征对所提出的模型中 C 和 Java 之间的知识转移机制的贡献有多大。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨编程语言的软件漏洞预测知识迁移方法，通过迁移学习实现不同语言间的漏洞检测模型构建。
AI.motivation: 不同编程语言的代码样本数据不足，限制了自动化漏洞检测模型的泛化能力，需解决跨语言知识迁移问题。
AI.method: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）构建迁移学习框架，使用C语言代码训练模型后迁移至Java语言，并结合可解释AI分析特征贡献度。
AI.result: 模型在C和Java代码中实现平均72%的召回率，验证了跨语言知识迁移的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多语言漏洞检测数据不足的问题，且通过可解释AI揭示了特征迁移机制的关键影响因素。

authors_text: Xander Davies,Lauro Langosco,David Krueger
title: Unifying Grokking and Double Descent
title_zh: 统一 Grokking 和双重下降
comment: ML Safety Workshop, 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: ML Safety Workshop, 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: A principled understanding of generalization in deep learning may require unifying disparate observations under a single conceptual framework. Previous work has studied \emph{grokking}, a training dynamic in which a sustained period of near-perfect training performance and near-chance test performance is eventually followed by generalization, as well as the superficially similar \emph{double descent}. These topics have so far been studied in isolation. We hypothesize that grokking and double descent can be understood as instances of the same learning dynamics within a framework of pattern learning speeds. We propose that this framework also applies when varying model capacity instead of optimization steps, and provide the first demonstration of model-wise grokking.
summary: A principled understanding of generalization in deep learning may require unifying disparate observations under a single conceptual framework. Previous work has studied \emph{grokking}, a training dynamic in which a sustained period of near-perfect training performance and near-chance test performance is eventually followed by generalization, as well as the superficially similar \emph{double descent}. These topics have so far been studied in isolation. We hypothesize that grokking and double descent can be understood as instances of the same learning dynamics within a framework of pattern learning speeds. We propose that this framework also applies when varying model capacity instead of optimization steps, and provide the first demonstration of model-wise grokking.
abstract_zh: 对深度学习泛化的原则性理解可能需要在单一概念框架下统一不同的观察结果。之前的工作研究了\emph{grokking}，这是一种训练动态，其中持续一段时间的近乎完美的训练表现和接近机会的测试表现最终会泛化，以及表面上相似的\emph{双下降}。迄今为止，这些主题都是孤立研究的。我们假设 grokking 和双重下降可以被理解为模式学习速度框架内相同学习动态的实例。我们建议该框架也适用于改变模型容量而不是优化步骤的情况，并提供模型明智的探索的第一个演示。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过模式学习速度框架统一解释深度学习中的Grokking和Double Descent现象，并首次展示模型层面的Grokking。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将Grokking与Double Descent视为独立现象，缺乏统一理论框架，需建立普适性解释以深入理解深度学习泛化机制。
AI.method: 提出基于模式学习速度的理论框架，分析优化步骤与模型容量变化对学习动态的影响，并通过实验验证模型容量变化下的Grokking现象。
AI.result: 验证了模式学习速度框架可同时解释Grokking与Double Descent，首次在模型容量维度观测到Grokking现象。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架揭示了泛化行为的内在规律，表明模型容量变化与优化过程均可能触发类似Grokking的相变现象。

search_text: Unifying Grokking and Double Descent 统一 Grokking 和双重下降 A principled understanding of generalization in deep learning may require unifying disparate observations under a single conceptual framework. Previous work has studied \emph{grokking}, a training dynamic in which a sustained period of near-perfect training performance and near-chance test performance is eventually followed by generalization, as well as the superficially similar \emph{double descent}. These topics have so far been studied in isolation. We hypothesize that grokking and double descent can be understood as instances of the same learning dynamics within a framework of pattern learning speeds. We propose that this framework also applies when varying model capacity instead of optimization steps, and provide the first demonstration of model-wise grokking. 对深度学习泛化的原则性理解可能需要在单一概念框架下统一不同的观察结果。之前的工作研究了\emph{grokking}，这是一种训练动态，其中持续一段时间的近乎完美的训练表现和接近机会的测试表现最终会泛化，以及表面上相似的\emph{双下降}。迄今为止，这些主题都是孤立研究的。我们假设 grokking 和双重下降可以被理解为模式学习速度框架内相同学习动态的实例。我们建议该框架也适用于改变模型容量而不是优化步骤的情况，并提供模型明智的探索的第一个演示。 本文旨在通过模式学习速度框架统一解释深度学习中的Grokking和Double Descent现象，并首次展示模型层面的Grokking。 Xander Davies,Lauro Langosco,David Krueger cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nazish Tahir,Ramviyas Parasuraman
title: Mobile Robot Control and Autonomy Through Collaborative Simulation Twin
title_zh: 通过协作仿真双胞胎实现移动机器人控制和自主性
comment: Accepted to the IEEE PERCOM 2023 Workshop on Pervasive Digital Twins
comments: Accepted to the IEEE PERCOM 2023 Workshop on Pervasive Digital Twins
abstract: When a mobile robot lacks high onboard computing or networking capabilities, it can rely on remote computing architecture for its control and autonomy. This paper introduces a novel collaborative Simulation Twin (ST) strategy for control and autonomy on resource-constrained robots. The practical implementation of such a strategy entails a mobile robot system divided into a cyber (simulated) and physical (real) space separated over a communication channel where the physical robot resides on the site of operation guided by a simulated autonomous agent from a remote location maintained over a network. Building on top of the digital twin concept, our collaborative twin is capable of autonomous navigation through an advanced SLAM-based path planning algorithm, while the physical robot is capable of tracking the Simulated twin's velocity and communicating feedback generated through interaction with its environment. We proposed a prioritized path planning application to the test in a collaborative teleoperation system of a physical robot guided by ST's autonomous navigation. We examine the performance of a physical robot led by autonomous navigation from the Collaborative Twin and assisted by a predicted force received from the physical robot. The experimental findings indicate the practicality of the proposed simulation-physical twinning approach and provide computational and network performance improvements compared to typical remote computing (or offloading), and digital twin approaches.
summary: When a mobile robot lacks high onboard computing or networking capabilities, it can rely on remote computing architecture for its control and autonomy. This paper introduces a novel collaborative Simulation Twin (ST) strategy for control and autonomy on resource-constrained robots. The practical implementation of such a strategy entails a mobile robot system divided into a cyber (simulated) and physical (real) space separated over a communication channel where the physical robot resides on the site of operation guided by a simulated autonomous agent from a remote location maintained over a network. Building on top of the digital twin concept, our collaborative twin is capable of autonomous navigation through an advanced SLAM-based path planning algorithm, while the physical robot is capable of tracking the Simulated twin's velocity and communicating feedback generated through interaction with its environment. We proposed a prioritized path planning application to the test in a collaborative teleoperation system of a physical robot guided by ST's autonomous navigation. We examine the performance of a physical robot led by autonomous navigation from the Collaborative Twin and assisted by a predicted force received from the physical robot. The experimental findings indicate the practicality of the proposed simulation-physical twinning approach and provide computational and network performance improvements compared to typical remote computing (or offloading), and digital twin approaches.
abstract_zh: 当移动机器人缺乏高机载计算或网络能力时，它可以依靠远程计算架构来实现控制和自主。本文介绍了一种新颖的协作仿真孪生 (ST) 策略，用于资源受限机器人的控制和自主。这种策略的实际实施需要将移动机器人系统分为通过通信通道分开的网络（模拟）空间和物理（真实）空间，其中物理机器人驻留在操作现场，由来自通过网络维护的远程位置的模拟自主代理引导。基于数字孪生概念，我们的协作孪生能够通过基于 SLAM 的先进路径规划算法进行自主导航，而物理机器人能够跟踪模拟孪生的速度并传达通过与其环境交互生成的反馈。我们提出了一种优先路径规划应用程序，用于在 ST 自主导航引导的物理机器人协作远程操作系统中进行测试。我们检查了物理机器人的性能，该机器人由协作双胞胎的自主导航引导并由从物理机器人接收的预测力辅助。实验结果表明所提出的模拟物理孪生方法的实用性，并且与典型的远程计算（或卸载）和数字孪生方法相比，提供了计算和网络性能的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种协作模拟孪生策略，通过将移动机器人分为模拟与物理空间，利用远程计算实现资源受限机器人的控制与自主导航。
AI.motivation: 资源受限的移动机器人难以直接完成复杂控制任务，传统远程计算与数字孪生方法存在性能瓶颈，需更高效的协同方案。
AI.method: 基于数字孪生概念，构建包含模拟自主代理与物理机器人的协作系统，采用SLAM路径规划算法，并通过通信反馈实现物理机器人运动跟踪与环境交互。
AI.result: 实验验证了协作孪生方法的可行性，相比传统远程计算与数字孪生，在计算与网络性能上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 协作模拟孪生策略有效解决了资源受限机器人的控制问题，为高实时性自主导航提供了优化方案。

authors_text: Dimitrios Dimou,Jose Santos-Victor,Plinio Moreno
title: Force Feedback Control For Dexterous Robotic Hands Using Conditional Postural Synergies
title_zh: 利用条件姿势协同作用对灵巧机械手进行力反馈控制
abstract: We present a force feedback controller for a dexterous robotic hand equipped with force sensors on its fingertips. Our controller uses the conditional postural synergies framework to generate the grasp postures, i.e. the finger configuration of the robot, at each time step based on forces measured on the robot's fingertips. Using this framework we are able to control the hand during different grasp types using only one variable, the grasp size, which we define as the distance between the tip of the thumb and the index finger. Instead of controlling the finger limbs independently, our controller generates control signals for all the hand joints in a (low-dimensional) shared space (i.e. synergy space). In addition, our approach is modular, which allows to execute various types of precision grips, by changing the synergy space according to the type of grasp. We show that our controller is able to lift objects of various weights and materials, adjust the grasp configuration during changes in the object's weight, and perform object placements and object handovers.
summary: We present a force feedback controller for a dexterous robotic hand equipped with force sensors on its fingertips. Our controller uses the conditional postural synergies framework to generate the grasp postures, i.e. the finger configuration of the robot, at each time step based on forces measured on the robot's fingertips. Using this framework we are able to control the hand during different grasp types using only one variable, the grasp size, which we define as the distance between the tip of the thumb and the index finger. Instead of controlling the finger limbs independently, our controller generates control signals for all the hand joints in a (low-dimensional) shared space (i.e. synergy space). In addition, our approach is modular, which allows to execute various types of precision grips, by changing the synergy space according to the type of grasp. We show that our controller is able to lift objects of various weights and materials, adjust the grasp configuration during changes in the object's weight, and perform object placements and object handovers.
abstract_zh: 我们为灵巧的机器人手提供了一种力反馈控制器，其指尖配备了力传感器。我们的控制器使用条件姿势协同框架根据机器人指尖上测量的力在每个时间步生成抓取姿势，即机器人的手指配置。使用这个框架，我们能够在不同的抓握类型中仅使用一个变量（抓握尺寸）来控制手，我们将其定义为拇指尖和食指之间的距离。我们的控制器不是独立控制手指肢体，而是在（低维）共享空间（即协同空间）中为所有手关节生成控制信号。此外，我们的方法是模块化的，可以根据抓握类型改变协同空间，从而执行各种类型的精确抓握。我们表明，我们的控制器能够举起各种重量和材料的物体，在物体重量变化时调整抓取配置，并执行物体放置和物体切换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件姿势协同框架的力反馈控制器，用于控制配备指尖力传感器的灵巧机械手，通过抓取尺寸变量生成抓取姿势并实现多类型抓取任务。
AI.motivation: 传统机械手控制需独立调节多关节，复杂且难以适应不同抓取类型。通过引入协同框架可降低控制维度，提升抓取灵活性和适应性。
AI.method: 利用条件姿势协同框架，根据指尖力反馈生成抓取姿势；以抓取尺寸（拇指与食指尖距离）为单一变量，在协同空间中生成所有关节控制信号，并通过模块化设计适配不同抓取类型。
AI.result: 控制器可抓取不同重量和材质的物体，动态调整抓取配置，成功完成物体放置与交接任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过协同空间简化控制维度，模块化设计增强灵活性，验证了基于条件姿势协同的力反馈控制在灵巧机械手抓取任务中的有效性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过协同空间简化控制维度，模块化设计增强灵活性，验证了基于条件姿势协同的力反馈控制在灵巧机械手抓取任务中的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件姿势协同框架的力反馈控制器，用于控制配备指尖力传感器的灵巧机械手，通过抓取尺寸变量生成抓取姿势并实现多类型抓取任务。
motivation: 传统机械手控制需独立调节多关节，复杂且难以适应不同抓取类型。通过引入协同框架可降低控制维度，提升抓取灵活性和适应性。
method: 利用条件姿势协同框架，根据指尖力反馈生成抓取姿势；以抓取尺寸（拇指与食指尖距离）为单一变量，在协同空间中生成所有关节控制信号，并通过模块化设计适配不同抓取类型。
result: 控制器可抓取不同重量和材质的物体，动态调整抓取配置，成功完成物体放置与交接任务。
conclusion: 该方法通过协同空间简化控制维度，模块化设计增强灵活性，验证了基于条件姿势协同的力反馈控制在灵巧机械手抓取任务中的有效性。
search_text: Force Feedback Control For Dexterous Robotic Hands Using Conditional Postural Synergies 利用条件姿势协同作用对灵巧机械手进行力反馈控制 We present a force feedback controller for a dexterous robotic hand equipped with force sensors on its fingertips. Our controller uses the conditional postural synergies framework to generate the grasp postures, i.e. the finger configuration of the robot, at each time step based on forces measured on the robot's fingertips. Using this framework we are able to control the hand during different grasp types using only one variable, the grasp size, which we define as the distance between the tip of the thumb and the index finger. Instead of controlling the finger limbs independently, our controller generates control signals for all the hand joints in a (low-dimensional) shared space (i.e. synergy space). In addition, our approach is modular, which allows to execute various types of precision grips, by changing the synergy space according to the type of grasp. We show that our controller is able to lift objects of various weights and materials, adjust the grasp configuration during changes in the object's weight, and perform object placements and object handovers. 我们为灵巧的机器人手提供了一种力反馈控制器，其指尖配备了力传感器。我们的控制器使用条件姿势协同框架根据机器人指尖上测量的力在每个时间步生成抓取姿势，即机器人的手指配置。使用这个框架，我们能够在不同的抓握类型中仅使用一个变量（抓握尺寸）来控制手，我们将其定义为拇指尖和食指之间的距离。我们的控制器不是独立控制手指肢体，而是在（低维）共享空间（即协同空间）中为所有手关节生成控制信号。此外，我们的方法是模块化的，可以根据抓握类型改变协同空间，从而执行各种类型的精确抓握。我们表明，我们的控制器能够举起各种重量和材料的物体，在物体重量变化时调整抓取配置，并执行物体放置和物体切换。 本文提出一种基于条件姿势协同框架的力反馈控制器，用于控制配备指尖力传感器的灵巧机械手，通过抓取尺寸变量生成抓取姿势并实现多类型抓取任务。 Dimitrios Dimou,Jose Santos-Victor,Plinio Moreno cs.RO

authors_text: Junyu Chen,Yihao Liu,Yufan He,Yong Du
title: Spatially-varying Regularization with Conditional Transformer for Unsupervised Image Registration
title_zh: 使用条件变换器进行空间变化正则化，用于无监督图像配准
abstract: In the past, optimization-based registration models have used spatially-varying regularization to account for deformation variations in different image regions. However, deep learning-based registration models have mostly relied on spatially-invariant regularization. Here, we introduce an end-to-end framework that uses neural networks to learn a spatially-varying deformation regularizer directly from data. The hyperparameter of the proposed regularizer is conditioned into the network, enabling easy tuning of the regularization strength. The proposed method is built upon a Transformer-based model, but it can be readily adapted to any network architecture. We thoroughly evaluated the proposed approach using publicly available datasets and observed a significant performance improvement while maintaining smooth deformation. The source code of this work will be made available after publication.
summary: In the past, optimization-based registration models have used spatially-varying regularization to account for deformation variations in different image regions. However, deep learning-based registration models have mostly relied on spatially-invariant regularization. Here, we introduce an end-to-end framework that uses neural networks to learn a spatially-varying deformation regularizer directly from data. The hyperparameter of the proposed regularizer is conditioned into the network, enabling easy tuning of the regularization strength. The proposed method is built upon a Transformer-based model, but it can be readily adapted to any network architecture. We thoroughly evaluated the proposed approach using publicly available datasets and observed a significant performance improvement while maintaining smooth deformation. The source code of this work will be made available after publication.
abstract_zh: 过去，基于优化的配准模型使用空间变化的正则化来解释不同图像区域的变形变化。然而，基于深度学习的配准模型主要依赖于空间不变的正则化。在这里，我们引入了一个端到端框架，该框架使用神经网络直接从数据中学习空间变化的变形正则化器。所提出的正则化器的超参数被调节到网络中，从而可以轻松调整正则化强度。所提出的方法建立在基于 Transformer 的模型之上，但它可以轻松适应任何网络架构。我们使用公开数据集彻底评估了所提出的方法，并观察到在保持平滑变形的同时显着的性能改进。本作品的源代码将在出版后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件Transformer的无监督图像配准方法，通过神经网络学习空间可变的形变正则化器。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习配准模型多采用空间不变正则化，难以适应图像不同区域的形变差异，需改进正则化策略。
AI.method: 构建端到端框架，利用Transformer网络学习空间可变正则化器，通过条件化超参数实现正则化强度自适应调节。
AI.result: 在公开数据集测试中，相较现有方法显著提升配准性能且保持形变平滑性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了深度学习配准中的空间正则化局限性，具有架构通用性且代码将公开共享。

authors_text: Angelina Wang,Olga Russakovsky
title: Overwriting Pretrained Bias with Finetuning Data
title_zh: 用微调数据覆盖预训练偏差
abstract: Transfer learning is beneficial by allowing the expressive features of models pretrained on large-scale datasets to be finetuned for the target task of smaller, more domain-specific datasets. However, there is a concern that these pretrained models may come with their own biases which would propagate into the finetuned model. In this work, we investigate bias when conceptualized as both spurious correlations between the target task and a sensitive attribute as well as underrepresentation of a particular group in the dataset. Under both notions of bias, we find that (1) models finetuned on top of pretrained models can indeed inherit their biases, but (2) this bias can be corrected for through relatively minor interventions to the finetuning dataset, and often with a negligible impact to performance. Our findings imply that careful curation of the finetuning dataset is important for reducing biases on a downstream task, and doing so can even compensate for bias in the pretrained model.
summary: Transfer learning is beneficial by allowing the expressive features of models pretrained on large-scale datasets to be finetuned for the target task of smaller, more domain-specific datasets. However, there is a concern that these pretrained models may come with their own biases which would propagate into the finetuned model. In this work, we investigate bias when conceptualized as both spurious correlations between the target task and a sensitive attribute as well as underrepresentation of a particular group in the dataset. Under both notions of bias, we find that (1) models finetuned on top of pretrained models can indeed inherit their biases, but (2) this bias can be corrected for through relatively minor interventions to the finetuning dataset, and often with a negligible impact to performance. Our findings imply that careful curation of the finetuning dataset is important for reducing biases on a downstream task, and doing so can even compensate for bias in the pretrained model.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习的好处在于，它允许对大规模数据集上预训练的模型的表达特征进行微调，以适应更小、更特定领域的数据集的目标任务。然而，人们担心这些预训练模型可能带有自己的偏差，这些偏差会传播到微调模型中。在这项工作中，我们研究了将偏差概念化为目标任务和敏感属性之间的虚假相关性以及数据集中特定群体的代表性不足的情况。在这两种偏差概念下，我们发现（1）在预训练模型之上进行微调的模型确实可以继承其偏差，但是（2）可以通过对微调数据集进行相对较小的干预来纠正这种偏差，并且通常对性能的影响可以忽略不计。我们的研究结果表明，仔细管理微调数据集对于减少下游任务的偏差非常重要，这样做甚至可以补偿预训练模型中的偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过微调数据集的精心设计，可以消除预训练模型中的偏见，从而在下游任务中减少偏见传播。
AI.motivation: 预训练模型可能包含固有偏见，这些偏见会在微调过程中传递到下游任务中，影响模型公平性。
AI.method: 通过分析概念性偏见（如敏感属性间的虚假关联及数据集中群体欠代表问题），设计实验验证微调数据集的调整对偏见的修正效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，微调数据集通过少量干预即可有效纠正预训练模型的偏见，且对模型性能影响极小。
AI.conclusion: 微调数据集的精心设计是降低下游任务偏见的关键，甚至可抵消预训练模型本身的偏见影响。

authors_text: Guanrui Li,Giuseppe Loianno
title: Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for Cooperative Transportation and Manipulation of Cable Suspended Payloads with Multiple Quadrotors
title_zh: 多个四旋翼飞行器协同运输和操纵缆绳悬挂有效载荷的非线性模型预测控制
comment: This paper has been presented in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023. Please cite the paper with the appropriate formats
comments: This paper has been presented in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023. Please cite the paper with the appropriate formats
abstract: Autonomous Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) such as quadrotors equipped with manipulation mechanisms have the potential to assist humans in tasks such as construction and package delivery. Cables are a promising option for manipulation mechanisms due to their low weight, low cost, and simple design. However, designing control and planning strategies for cable mechanisms presents challenges due to indirect load actuation, nonlinear configuration space, and highly coupled system dynamics. In this paper, we propose a novel Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) method that enables a team of quadrotors to manipulate a rigid-body payload in all 6 degrees of freedom via suspended cables. Our approach can concurrently exploit, as part of the receding horizon optimization, the available mechanical system redundancies to perform additional tasks such as inter-robot separation and obstacle avoidance while respecting payload dynamics and actuator constraints. To address real-time computational requirements and scalability, we employ a lightweight state vector parametrization that includes only payload states in all six degrees of freedom. This also enables the planning of trajectories on the $SE(3)$ manifold load configuration space, thereby also reducing planning complexity. We validate the proposed approach through simulation and real-world experiments.
summary: Autonomous Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) such as quadrotors equipped with manipulation mechanisms have the potential to assist humans in tasks such as construction and package delivery. Cables are a promising option for manipulation mechanisms due to their low weight, low cost, and simple design. However, designing control and planning strategies for cable mechanisms presents challenges due to indirect load actuation, nonlinear configuration space, and highly coupled system dynamics. In this paper, we propose a novel Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) method that enables a team of quadrotors to manipulate a rigid-body payload in all 6 degrees of freedom via suspended cables. Our approach can concurrently exploit, as part of the receding horizon optimization, the available mechanical system redundancies to perform additional tasks such as inter-robot separation and obstacle avoidance while respecting payload dynamics and actuator constraints. To address real-time computational requirements and scalability, we employ a lightweight state vector parametrization that includes only payload states in all six degrees of freedom. This also enables the planning of trajectories on the $SE(3)$ manifold load configuration space, thereby also reducing planning complexity. We validate the proposed approach through simulation and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 配备操纵机构的四旋翼飞行器等自主微型飞行器 (MAV) 有潜力协助人类完成建筑和包裹递送等任务。由于其重量轻、成本低且设计简单，电缆是操纵机构的一个有前途的选择。然而，由于间接负载驱动、非线性配置空间和高度耦合的系统动力学，设计电缆机构的控制和规划策略面临着挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）方法，该方法使四旋翼飞行器团队能够通过悬挂电缆在所有 6 个自由度上操纵刚体有效负载。作为后退地平线优化的一部分，我们的方法可以同时利用可用的机械系统冗余来执行额外的任务，例如机器人间分离和避障，同时尊重有效负载动态和执行器约束。为了满足实时计算要求和可扩展性，我们采用了轻量级状态向量参数化，其中仅包括所有六个自由度的有效负载状态。这还可以在 $SE(3)$ 流形负载配置空间上规划轨迹，从而降低规划复杂性。我们通过模拟和现实实验验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）方法，使多个四旋翼无人机能够通过悬吊电缆协作运输和操控刚体负载。
AI.motivation: 电缆机制因重量轻、成本低且设计简单而具有潜力，但其间接负载驱动、非线性配置空间和高度耦合的动力学特性使得控制与规划策略设计面临挑战。
AI.method: 采用轻量级状态向量参数化方法，仅包含负载的六自由度状态，并在SE(3)流形上进行轨迹规划，结合滚动时域优化实现冗余利用与避障。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实际实验验证了该方法在负载动力学约束和执行器限制下的实时性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了电缆悬吊负载的协同操控难题，为复杂环境下的自主无人机系统提供了可行方案。

search_text: Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for Cooperative Transportation and Manipulation of Cable Suspended Payloads with Multiple Quadrotors 多个四旋翼飞行器协同运输和操纵缆绳悬挂有效载荷的非线性模型预测控制 Autonomous Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) such as quadrotors equipped with manipulation mechanisms have the potential to assist humans in tasks such as construction and package delivery. Cables are a promising option for manipulation mechanisms due to their low weight, low cost, and simple design. However, designing control and planning strategies for cable mechanisms presents challenges due to indirect load actuation, nonlinear configuration space, and highly coupled system dynamics. In this paper, we propose a novel Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) method that enables a team of quadrotors to manipulate a rigid-body payload in all 6 degrees of freedom via suspended cables. Our approach can concurrently exploit, as part of the receding horizon optimization, the available mechanical system redundancies to perform additional tasks such as inter-robot separation and obstacle avoidance while respecting payload dynamics and actuator constraints. To address real-time computational requirements and scalability, we employ a lightweight state vector parametrization that includes only payload states in all six degrees of freedom. This also enables the planning of trajectories on the $SE(3)$ manifold load configuration space, thereby also reducing planning complexity. We validate the proposed approach through simulation and real-world experiments. 配备操纵机构的四旋翼飞行器等自主微型飞行器 (MAV) 有潜力协助人类完成建筑和包裹递送等任务。由于其重量轻、成本低且设计简单，电缆是操纵机构的一个有前途的选择。然而，由于间接负载驱动、非线性配置空间和高度耦合的系统动力学，设计电缆机构的控制和规划策略面临着挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）方法，该方法使四旋翼飞行器团队能够通过悬挂电缆在所有 6 个自由度上操纵刚体有效负载。作为后退地平线优化的一部分，我们的方法可以同时利用可用的机械系统冗余来执行额外的任务，例如机器人间分离和避障，同时尊重有效负载动态和执行器约束。为了满足实时计算要求和可扩展性，我们采用了轻量级状态向量参数化，其中仅包括所有六个自由度的有效负载状态。这还可以在 $SE(3)$ 流形负载配置空间上规划轨迹，从而降低规划复杂性。我们通过模拟和现实实验验证了所提出的方法。 本文提出了一种非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）方法，使多个四旋翼无人机能够通过悬吊电缆协作运输和操控刚体负载。 Guanrui Li,Giuseppe Loianno cs.RO

authors_text: Bryan Lim,Manon Flageat,Antoine Cully
title: Understanding the Synergies between Quality-Diversity and Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 了解质量多样性和深度强化学习之间的协同作用
abstract: The synergies between Quality-Diversity (QD) and Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) have led to powerful hybrid QD-RL algorithms that have shown tremendous potential, and brings the best of both fields. However, only a single deep RL algorithm (TD3) has been used in prior hybrid methods despite notable progress made by other RL algorithms. Additionally, there are fundamental differences in the optimization procedures between QD and RL which would benefit from a more principled approach. We propose Generalized Actor-Critic QD-RL, a unified modular framework for actor-critic deep RL methods in the QD-RL setting. This framework provides a path to study insights from Deep RL in the QD-RL setting, which is an important and efficient way to make progress in QD-RL. We introduce two new algorithms, PGA-ME (SAC) and PGA-ME (DroQ) which apply recent advancements in Deep RL to the QD-RL setting, and solves the humanoid environment which was not possible using existing QD-RL algorithms. However, we also find that not all insights from Deep RL can be effectively translated to QD-RL. Critically, this work also demonstrates that the actor-critic models in QD-RL are generally insufficiently trained and performance gains can be achieved without any additional environment evaluations.
summary: The synergies between Quality-Diversity (QD) and Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) have led to powerful hybrid QD-RL algorithms that have shown tremendous potential, and brings the best of both fields. However, only a single deep RL algorithm (TD3) has been used in prior hybrid methods despite notable progress made by other RL algorithms. Additionally, there are fundamental differences in the optimization procedures between QD and RL which would benefit from a more principled approach. We propose Generalized Actor-Critic QD-RL, a unified modular framework for actor-critic deep RL methods in the QD-RL setting. This framework provides a path to study insights from Deep RL in the QD-RL setting, which is an important and efficient way to make progress in QD-RL. We introduce two new algorithms, PGA-ME (SAC) and PGA-ME (DroQ) which apply recent advancements in Deep RL to the QD-RL setting, and solves the humanoid environment which was not possible using existing QD-RL algorithms. However, we also find that not all insights from Deep RL can be effectively translated to QD-RL. Critically, this work also demonstrates that the actor-critic models in QD-RL are generally insufficiently trained and performance gains can be achieved without any additional environment evaluations.
abstract_zh: 质量多样性 (QD) 和深度强化学习 (RL) 之间的协同作用催生了强大的混合 QD-RL 算法，该算法显示出巨大的潜力，并结合了这两个领域的优点。然而，尽管其他 RL 算法取得了显着的进展，但之前的混合方法中仅使用了一种深度 RL 算法 (TD3)。此外，QD 和 RL 之间的优化程序存在根本差异，这将受益于更有原则的方法。我们提出了广义 Actor-Critic QD-RL，这是 QD-RL 设置中用于 Actor-Critic 深度 RL 方法的统一模块化框架。该框架提供了在 QD-RL 设置中研究深度 RL 见解的路径，这是在 QD-RL 方面取得进展的重要且有效的方法。我们引入了两种新算法：PGA-ME (SAC) 和 PGA-ME (DroQ)，它们将深度 RL 的最新进展应用于 QD-RL 设置，并解决了使用现有 QD-RL 算法无法实现的人形环境。然而，我们还发现，并非 Deep RL 的所有见解都可以有效地转化为 QD-RL。重要的是，这项工作还表明，QD-RL 中的行动者批评家模型通常训练不足，并且无需任何额外的环境评估即可实现性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的模块化框架，将深度强化学习（RL）中的actor-critic方法应用于质量多样性（QD-RL）领域，并引入两种新算法解决QD-RL的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有QD-RL方法仅依赖单一RL算法（TD3），且QD与RL的优化过程存在本质差异，需更系统的整合方式以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出通用的actor-critic QD-RL框架，设计两种新算法PGA-ME（SAC）和PGA-ME（DroQ），将深度RL的最新进展应用于QD-RL场景。
AI.result: 新算法成功解决此前QD-RL无法处理的人形环境任务，同时发现并非所有深度RL的优化思路均适用于QD-RL，且未增加环境评估即可提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 框架有效整合了深度RL与QD的优势，但需注意两者差异性，未来需进一步优化actor-critic模型的训练机制。

authors_text: Yichen Li,Kaichun Mo,Yueqi Duan,He Wang,Jiequan Zhang,Lin Shao,Wojciech Matusik,Leonidas Guibas
title: Category-Level Multi-Part Multi-Joint 3D Shape Assembly
title_zh: 类别级多零件多关节3D形状装配
abstract: Shape assembly composes complex shapes geometries by arranging simple part geometries and has wide applications in autonomous robotic assembly and CAD modeling. Existing works focus on geometry reasoning and neglect the actual physical assembly process of matching and fitting joints, which are the contact surfaces connecting different parts. In this paper, we consider contacting joints for the task of multi-part assembly. A successful joint-optimized assembly needs to satisfy the bilateral objectives of shape structure and joint alignment. We propose a hierarchical graph learning approach composed of two levels of graph representation learning. The part graph takes part geometries as input to build the desired shape structure. The joint-level graph uses part joints information and focuses on matching and aligning joints. The two kinds of information are combined to achieve the bilateral objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms previous methods, achieving better shape structure and higher joint alignment accuracy.
summary: Shape assembly composes complex shapes geometries by arranging simple part geometries and has wide applications in autonomous robotic assembly and CAD modeling. Existing works focus on geometry reasoning and neglect the actual physical assembly process of matching and fitting joints, which are the contact surfaces connecting different parts. In this paper, we consider contacting joints for the task of multi-part assembly. A successful joint-optimized assembly needs to satisfy the bilateral objectives of shape structure and joint alignment. We propose a hierarchical graph learning approach composed of two levels of graph representation learning. The part graph takes part geometries as input to build the desired shape structure. The joint-level graph uses part joints information and focuses on matching and aligning joints. The two kinds of information are combined to achieve the bilateral objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms previous methods, achieving better shape structure and higher joint alignment accuracy.
abstract_zh: 形状装配通过排列简单的零件几何形状来组成复杂的形状几何形状，在自主机器人装配和 CAD 建模中具有广泛的应用。现有的工作侧重于几何推理，而忽略了匹配和装配接头的实际物理装配过程，这些接头是连接不同零件的接触面。在本文中，我们考虑用于多部件组装任务的接触接头。成功的关节优化装配需要满足形状结构和关节对准的双边目标。我们提出了一种由两个级别的图表示学习组成的分层图学习方法。零件图将零件几何形状作为输入来构建所需的形状结构。关节级图使用零件关节信息并侧重于匹配和对齐关节。将两种信息结合起来以实现双边目标。大量的实验表明，我们的方法优于以前的方法，实现了更好的形状结构和更高的关节对准精度。

AI.tldr: 提出一种分层图学习方法，解决多部件3D形状组装中的关节匹配与对齐问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注几何推理而忽略物理组装中的关节接触面匹配，导致结构合理性与对齐精度不足
AI.method: 构建双层级图表示学习框架，部分图建模几何结构，关节级图处理接触面匹配，通过信息融合实现双向优化
AI.result: 实验验证方法在形状结构完整性与关节对齐精度指标上均优于现有算法
AI.conclusion: 分层图学习框架有效结合结构与关节信息，为机器人自主组装和CAD建模提供新解决方案

ai_content.motivation: 现有方法仅关注几何推理而忽略物理组装中的关节接触面匹配，导致结构合理性与对齐精度不足

search_text: Category-Level Multi-Part Multi-Joint 3D Shape Assembly 类别级多零件多关节3D形状装配 Shape assembly composes complex shapes geometries by arranging simple part geometries and has wide applications in autonomous robotic assembly and CAD modeling. Existing works focus on geometry reasoning and neglect the actual physical assembly process of matching and fitting joints, which are the contact surfaces connecting different parts. In this paper, we consider contacting joints for the task of multi-part assembly. A successful joint-optimized assembly needs to satisfy the bilateral objectives of shape structure and joint alignment. We propose a hierarchical graph learning approach composed of two levels of graph representation learning. The part graph takes part geometries as input to build the desired shape structure. The joint-level graph uses part joints information and focuses on matching and aligning joints. The two kinds of information are combined to achieve the bilateral objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms previous methods, achieving better shape structure and higher joint alignment accuracy. 形状装配通过排列简单的零件几何形状来组成复杂的形状几何形状，在自主机器人装配和 CAD 建模中具有广泛的应用。现有的工作侧重于几何推理，而忽略了匹配和装配接头的实际物理装配过程，这些接头是连接不同零件的接触面。在本文中，我们考虑用于多部件组装任务的接触接头。成功的关节优化装配需要满足形状结构和关节对准的双边目标。我们提出了一种由两个级别的图表示学习组成的分层图学习方法。零件图将零件几何形状作为输入来构建所需的形状结构。关节级图使用零件关节信息并侧重于匹配和对齐关节。将两种信息结合起来以实现双边目标。大量的实验表明，我们的方法优于以前的方法，实现了更好的形状结构和更高的关节对准精度。 提出一种分层图学习方法，解决多部件3D形状组装中的关节匹配与对齐问题 Yichen Li,Kaichun Mo,Yueqi Duan,He Wang,Jiequan Zhang,Lin Shao,Wojciech Matusik,Leonidas Guibas cs.CV

authors_text: Xiucheng Wang,Nan Cheng,Longfei Ma,Ruijin Sun,Rong Chai,Ning Lu
title: Digital Twin-Assisted Knowledge Distillation Framework for Heterogeneous Federated Learning
title_zh: 异构联邦学习的数字孪生辅助知识蒸馏框架
abstract: In this paper, to deal with the heterogeneity in federated learning (FL) systems, a knowledge distillation (KD) driven training framework for FL is proposed, where each user can select its neural network model on demand and distill knowledge from a big teacher model using its own private dataset. To overcome the challenge of train the big teacher model in resource limited user devices, the digital twin (DT) is exploit in the way that the teacher model can be trained at DT located in the server with enough computing resources. Then, during model distillation, each user can update the parameters of its model at either the physical entity or the digital agent. The joint problem of model selection and training offloading and resource allocation for users is formulated as a mixed integer programming (MIP) problem. To solve the problem, Q-learning and optimization are jointly used, where Q-learning selects models for users and determines whether to train locally or on the server, and optimization is used to allocate resources for users based on the output of Q-learning. Simulation results show the proposed DT-assisted KD framework and joint optimization method can significantly improve the average accuracy of users while reducing the total delay.
summary: In this paper, to deal with the heterogeneity in federated learning (FL) systems, a knowledge distillation (KD) driven training framework for FL is proposed, where each user can select its neural network model on demand and distill knowledge from a big teacher model using its own private dataset. To overcome the challenge of train the big teacher model in resource limited user devices, the digital twin (DT) is exploit in the way that the teacher model can be trained at DT located in the server with enough computing resources. Then, during model distillation, each user can update the parameters of its model at either the physical entity or the digital agent. The joint problem of model selection and training offloading and resource allocation for users is formulated as a mixed integer programming (MIP) problem. To solve the problem, Q-learning and optimization are jointly used, where Q-learning selects models for users and determines whether to train locally or on the server, and optimization is used to allocate resources for users based on the output of Q-learning. Simulation results show the proposed DT-assisted KD framework and joint optimization method can significantly improve the average accuracy of users while reducing the total delay.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，为了处理联邦学习（FL）系统中的异构性，提出了一种知识蒸馏（KD）驱动的 FL 训练框架，其中每个用户可以按需选择其神经网络模型，并使用自己的私有数据集从大型教师模型中提取知识。为了克服在资源有限的用户设备中训练大型教师模型的挑战，人们利用了数字孪生（DT），使得教师模型可以在具有足够计算资源的服务器中的 DT 上进行训练。然后，在模型蒸馏过程中，每个用户都可以在物理实体或数字代理上更新其模型的参数。模型选择、训练卸载以及用户资源分配的联合问题被表述为混合整数规划（MIP）问题。为了解决这个问题，Q-learning和优化结合使用，Q-learning为用户选择模型并决定是在本地还是在服务器上训练，而优化则根据Q-learning的输出为用户分配资源。仿真结果表明，所提出的DT辅助KD框架和联合优化方法可以显着提高用户的平均准确率，同时降低总延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合数字孪生与知识蒸馏的异构联邦学习框架，通过服务器端训练教师模型并分发知识，提升用户模型性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中用户设备异构性导致模型训练效率低下，传统方法难以平衡模型性能与资源消耗。
AI.method: 利用数字孪生在服务器端训练大教师模型，用户通过知识蒸馏适配本地数据；结合Q学习与优化算法解决模型选择、训练卸载及资源分配问题。
AI.result: 仿真表明，该框架显著提升用户平均准确率，同时降低总延迟。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生辅助的知识蒸馏框架有效解决了异构联邦学习中的模型异质性与资源限制问题。

authors_text: Seng-Beng Ho
title: Why is That a Good or Not a Good Frying Pan? -- Knowledge Representation for Functions of Objects and Tools for Design Understanding, Improvement, and Generation
title_zh: 为什么这是一个好煎锅或不好的煎锅？ -- 对象功能的知识表示和设计理解、改进和生成的工具
abstract: The understanding of the functional aspects of objects and tools is of paramount importance in supporting an intelligent system in navigating around in the environment and interacting with various objects, structures, and systems, to help fulfil its goals. A detailed understanding of functionalities can also lead to design improvements and novel designs that would enhance the operations of AI and robotic systems on the one hand, and human lives on the other. This paper demonstrates how a particular object - in this case, a frying pan - and its participation in the processes it is designed to support - in this case, the frying process - can be represented in a general function representational language and framework, that can be used to flesh out the processes and functionalities involved, leading to a deep conceptual understanding with explainability of functionalities that allows the system to answer "why" questions - why is something a good frying pan, say, or why a certain part on the frying pan is designed in a certain way? Or, why is something not a good frying pan? This supports the re-design and improvement on design of objects, artifacts, and tools, as well as the potential for generating novel designs that are functionally accurate, usable, and satisfactory.
summary: The understanding of the functional aspects of objects and tools is of paramount importance in supporting an intelligent system in navigating around in the environment and interacting with various objects, structures, and systems, to help fulfil its goals. A detailed understanding of functionalities can also lead to design improvements and novel designs that would enhance the operations of AI and robotic systems on the one hand, and human lives on the other. This paper demonstrates how a particular object - in this case, a frying pan - and its participation in the processes it is designed to support - in this case, the frying process - can be represented in a general function representational language and framework, that can be used to flesh out the processes and functionalities involved, leading to a deep conceptual understanding with explainability of functionalities that allows the system to answer "why" questions - why is something a good frying pan, say, or why a certain part on the frying pan is designed in a certain way? Or, why is something not a good frying pan? This supports the re-design and improvement on design of objects, artifacts, and tools, as well as the potential for generating novel designs that are functionally accurate, usable, and satisfactory.
abstract_zh: 对对象和工具功能方面的理解对于支持智能系统在环境中导航以及与各种对象、结构和系统交互以帮助实现其目标至关重要。对功能的详细了解还可以带来设计改进和新颖的设计，一方面增强人工智能和机器人系统的操作，另一方面增强人类的生活。本文演示了如何使用通用功能表示语言和框架来表示特定对象（在本例中为煎锅）及其对其设计支持的过程（在本例中为煎炸过程）的参与，该语言和框架可用于充实所涉及的过程和功能，从而导致对功能的可解释性进行深入的概念理解，从而使系统能够回答“为什么”问题（例如，为什么某物是一个好的煎锅，或者为什么煎锅上的某个部分以某种方式设计？）或者，为什么有些东西不是一个好的煎锅？这支持对象、工件和工具的设计的重新设计和改进，以及生成功能准确、可用和令人满意的新颖设计的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的功能表示语言和框架，用于分析物体（如煎锅）的功能特性，以支持设计改进和新型设计生成。
AI.motivation: 理解物体的功能性对智能系统与环境交互及设计优化至关重要，需解决如何解释物体功能合理性（如为何某设计是好的或不好的煎锅）的问题。
AI.method: 通过构建通用功能表示框架，将煎锅及其参与的煎制过程进行形式化建模，分析功能特性并回答‘为何’类问题。
AI.result: 实现了对煎锅功能特性的深度解析，可解释设计合理性，并支持重新设计及生成符合功能需求的新方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为物体功能分析与设计优化提供了理论基础，可推广至其他工具和系统的功能研究与创新设计中。

This supports the re-design and improvement on design of objects, artifacts, and tools, as well as the potential for generating novel designs that are functionally accurate, usable, and satisfactory. 对对象和工具功能方面的理解对于支持智能系统在环境中导航以及与各种对象、结构和系统交互以帮助实现其目标至关重要。对功能的详细了解还可以带来设计改进和新颖的设计，一方面增强人工智能和机器人系统的操作，另一方面增强人类的生活。本文演示了如何使用通用功能表示语言和框架来表示特定对象（在本例中为煎锅）及其对其设计支持的过程（在本例中为煎炸过程）的参与，该语言和框架可用于充实所涉及的过程和功能，从而导致对功能的可解释性进行深入的概念理解，从而使系统能够回答“为什么”问题（例如，为什么某物是一个好的煎锅，或者为什么煎锅上的某个部分以某种方式设计？）或者，为什么有些东西不是一个好的煎锅？这支持对象、工件和工具的设计的重新设计和改进，以及生成功能准确、可用和令人满意的新颖设计的潜力。 本文提出一种通用的功能表示语言和框架，用于分析物体（如煎锅）的功能特性，以支持设计改进和新型设计生成。 Seng-Beng Ho cs.AI

authors_text: Wenkai Tan,Justus Renkhoff,Alvaro Velasquez,Ziyu Wang,Lusi Li,Jian Wang,Shuteng Niu,Fan Yang,Yongxin Liu,Houbing Song
title: NoiseCAM: Explainable AI for the Boundary Between Noise and Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: NoiseCAM：可解释的人工智能，用于区分噪声和对抗性攻击之间的界限
comment: Submitted to IEEE Fuzzy 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.06032
comments: Submitted to IEEE Fuzzy 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.06032
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) and Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are widely used in various domains. However, adversarial attacks can easily mislead a neural network and lead to wrong decisions. Defense mechanisms are highly preferred in safety-critical applications. In this paper, firstly, we use the gradient class activation map (GradCAM) to analyze the behavior deviation of the VGG-16 network when its inputs are mixed with adversarial perturbation or Gaussian noise. In particular, our method can locate vulnerable layers that are sensitive to adversarial perturbation and Gaussian noise. We also show that the behavior deviation of vulnerable layers can be used to detect adversarial examples. Secondly, we propose a novel NoiseCAM algorithm that integrates information from globally and pixel-level weighted class activation maps. Our algorithm is susceptible to adversarial perturbations and will not respond to Gaussian random noise mixed in the inputs. Third, we compare detecting adversarial examples using both behavior deviation and NoiseCAM, and we show that NoiseCAM outperforms behavior deviation modeling in its overall performance. Our work could provide a useful tool to defend against certain adversarial attacks on deep neural networks.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) and Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are widely used in various domains. However, adversarial attacks can easily mislead a neural network and lead to wrong decisions. Defense mechanisms are highly preferred in safety-critical applications. In this paper, firstly, we use the gradient class activation map (GradCAM) to analyze the behavior deviation of the VGG-16 network when its inputs are mixed with adversarial perturbation or Gaussian noise. In particular, our method can locate vulnerable layers that are sensitive to adversarial perturbation and Gaussian noise. We also show that the behavior deviation of vulnerable layers can be used to detect adversarial examples. Secondly, we propose a novel NoiseCAM algorithm that integrates information from globally and pixel-level weighted class activation maps. Our algorithm is susceptible to adversarial perturbations and will not respond to Gaussian random noise mixed in the inputs. Third, we compare detecting adversarial examples using both behavior deviation and NoiseCAM, and we show that NoiseCAM outperforms behavior deviation modeling in its overall performance. Our work could provide a useful tool to defend against certain adversarial attacks on deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）和深度神经网络（DNN）广泛应用于各个领域。然而，对抗性攻击很容易误导神经网络并导致错误的决策。防御机制在安全关键型应用中受到高度青睐。在本文中，我们首先使用梯度类激活图（GradCAM）来分析VGG-16网络的输入与对抗性扰动或高斯噪声混合时的行为偏差。特别是，我们的方法可以定位对对抗性扰动和高斯噪声敏感的脆弱层。我们还表明，易受攻击层的行为偏差可用于检测对抗性示例。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的 NoiseCAM 算法，该算法集成了全局和像素级加权类激活图的信息。我们的算法容易受到对抗性扰动的影响，并且不会响应输入中混合的高斯随机噪声。第三，我们比较了使用行为偏差和 NoiseCAM 检测对抗性示例，结果表明 NoiseCAM 的整体性能优于行为偏差建模。我们的工作可以提供一个有用的工具来防御对深度神经网络的某些对抗性攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NoiseCAM算法，用于区分深度神经网络输入中的对抗攻击与高斯噪声，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击易误导深度学习模型，而现有防御机制难以有效区分对抗样本与随机噪声，亟需可解释的检测方法。
AI.method: 基于GradCAM分析VGG-16网络脆弱层行为偏差，提出结合全局与像素级加权类激活图的NoiseCAM算法，利用对抗扰动敏感性实现检测。
AI.result: 实验表明NoiseCAM在对抗样本检测性能上优于行为偏差建模方法，且对高斯噪声具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: NoiseCAM为防御特定对抗攻击提供了有效的可解释AI工具，有助于提升深度学习系统的安全性。

authors_text: Shuai Yang,Liming Jiang,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy
title: StyleGANEX: StyleGAN-Based Manipulation Beyond Cropped Aligned Faces
title_zh: StyleGANEX：基于 StyleGAN 的超越裁剪对齐面的操作
abstract: Recent advances in face manipulation using StyleGAN have produced impressive results. However, StyleGAN is inherently limited to cropped aligned faces at a fixed image resolution it is pre-trained on. In this paper, we propose a simple and effective solution to this limitation by using dilated convolutions to rescale the receptive fields of shallow layers in StyleGAN, without altering any model parameters. This allows fixed-size small features at shallow layers to be extended into larger ones that can accommodate variable resolutions, making them more robust in characterizing unaligned faces. To enable real face inversion and manipulation, we introduce a corresponding encoder that provides the first-layer feature of the extended StyleGAN in addition to the latent style code. We validate the effectiveness of our method using unaligned face inputs of various resolutions in a diverse set of face manipulation tasks, including facial attribute editing, super-resolution, sketch/mask-to-face translation, and face toonification.
summary: Recent advances in face manipulation using StyleGAN have produced impressive results. However, StyleGAN is inherently limited to cropped aligned faces at a fixed image resolution it is pre-trained on. In this paper, we propose a simple and effective solution to this limitation by using dilated convolutions to rescale the receptive fields of shallow layers in StyleGAN, without altering any model parameters. This allows fixed-size small features at shallow layers to be extended into larger ones that can accommodate variable resolutions, making them more robust in characterizing unaligned faces. To enable real face inversion and manipulation, we introduce a corresponding encoder that provides the first-layer feature of the extended StyleGAN in addition to the latent style code. We validate the effectiveness of our method using unaligned face inputs of various resolutions in a diverse set of face manipulation tasks, including facial attribute editing, super-resolution, sketch/mask-to-face translation, and face toonification.
abstract_zh: 使用 StyleGAN 进行面部处理的最新进展已经产生了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，StyleGAN 本质上仅限于以预先训练的固定图像分辨率裁剪对齐的脸部。在本文中，我们针对这一限制提出了一种简单有效的解决方案，即使用扩张卷积来重新调整 StyleGAN 中浅层感受野的大小，而无需更改任何模型参数。这使得浅层的固定大小的小特征可以扩展到可以容纳可变分辨率的较大特征，从而使它们在表征未对齐的面部时更加稳健。为了实现真人脸反转和操作，我们引入了相应的编码器，除了潜在风格代码之外，它还提供扩展 StyleGAN 的第一层特征。我们在一系列不同的面部操作任务中使用各种分辨率的未对齐面部输入来验证我们的方法的有效性，包括面部属性编辑、超分辨率、草图/掩模到面部的转换和面部美化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleGANEX方法，通过扩展StyleGAN的浅层感受野，实现对未对齐人脸和多分辨率图像的操控。
AI.motivation: StyleGAN在固定分辨率和对齐人脸上表现优异，但难以处理未对齐人脸及不同分辨率的输入，限制了其应用范围。
AI.method: 采用空洞卷积扩展StyleGAN浅层网络的感受野，无需修改模型参数；设计对应编码器获取扩展后的第一层特征与潜在风格码。
AI.result: 在面部属性编辑、超分辨率、素描/掩码到人脸转换及卡通化等任务中，验证了方法在多分辨率未对齐人脸输入下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单修改网络结构，有效解决了StyleGAN的分辨率和对齐限制，为复杂人脸操控提供了新方案。

However, StyleGAN is inherently limited to cropped aligned faces at a fixed image resolution it is pre-trained on. In this paper, we propose a simple and effective solution to this limitation by using dilated convolutions to rescale the receptive fields of shallow layers in StyleGAN, without altering any model parameters. This allows fixed-size small features at shallow layers to be extended into larger ones that can accommodate variable resolutions, making them more robust in characterizing unaligned faces. To enable real face inversion and manipulation, we introduce a corresponding encoder that provides the first-layer feature of the extended StyleGAN in addition to the latent style code. authors_text: Yunzhong Hou,Stephen Gould,Liang Zheng
title: Learning to Select Camera Views: Efficient Multiview Understanding at Few Glances
title_zh: 学习选择相机视图：快速了解多视图
abstract: Multiview camera setups have proven useful in many computer vision applications for reducing ambiguities, mitigating occlusions, and increasing field-of-view coverage. However, the high computational cost associated with multiple views poses a significant challenge for end devices with limited computational resources. To address this issue, we propose a view selection approach that analyzes the target object or scenario from given views and selects the next best view for processing. Our approach features a reinforcement learning based camera selection module, MVSelect, that not only selects views but also facilitates joint training with the task network. Experimental results on multiview classification and detection tasks show that our approach achieves promising performance while using only 2 or 3 out of N available views, significantly reducing computational costs. Furthermore, analysis on the selected views reveals that certain cameras can be shut off with minimal performance impact, shedding light on future camera layout optimization for multiview systems. Code is available at https://github.com/hou-yz/MVSelect.
summary: Multiview camera setups have proven useful in many computer vision applications for reducing ambiguities, mitigating occlusions, and increasing field-of-view coverage. However, the high computational cost associated with multiple views poses a significant challenge for end devices with limited computational resources. To address this issue, we propose a view selection approach that analyzes the target object or scenario from given views and selects the next best view for processing. Our approach features a reinforcement learning based camera selection module, MVSelect, that not only selects views but also facilitates joint training with the task network. Experimental results on multiview classification and detection tasks show that our approach achieves promising performance while using only 2 or 3 out of N available views, significantly reducing computational costs. Furthermore, analysis on the selected views reveals that certain cameras can be shut off with minimal performance impact, shedding light on future camera layout optimization for multiview systems. Code is available at https://github.com/hou-yz/MVSelect.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，多视图相机设置在许多计算机视觉应用中非常有用，可以减少模糊性、减轻遮挡并增加视场覆盖范围。然而，与多个视图相关的高计算成本对计算资源有限的终端设备构成了重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种视图选择方法，该方法可以从给定的视图中分析目标对象或场景，并选择下一个最佳视图进行处理。我们的方法采用基于强化学习的相机选择模块 MVSelect，它不仅可以选择视图，还可以促进与任务网络的联合训练。多视图分类和检测任务的实验结果表明，我们的方法仅使用 N 个可用视图中的 2 或 3 个视图即可实现良好的性能，从而显着降低了计算成本。此外，对所选视图的分析表明，某些摄像机可以在对性能影响最小的情况下关闭，这为未来多视图系统的摄像机布局优化提供了线索。代码可在 https://github.com/hou-yz/MVSelect 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的多视角相机选择方法MVSelect，通过选择少量关键视角实现高效的多视角理解。
AI.motivation: 多视角相机系统虽能提升视觉任务性能，但计算成本高，尤其在计算资源受限的设备上存在显著挑战。
AI.method: 设计强化学习模块MVSelect，通过分析目标对象动态选择最优视角，并与任务网络进行联合训练。
AI.result: 在分类和检测任务中，仅使用2-3个视角即可达到接近全视角的性能，计算成本降低显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了视角选择的有效性，为多视角系统的相机布局优化提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning to Select Camera Views: Efficient Multiview Understanding at Few Glances 学习选择相机视图：快速了解多视图 Multiview camera setups have proven useful in many computer vision applications for reducing ambiguities, mitigating occlusions, and increasing field-of-view coverage. However, the high computational cost associated with multiple views poses a significant challenge for end devices with limited computational resources. To address this issue, we propose a view selection approach that analyzes the target object or scenario from given views and selects the next best view for processing. Our approach features a reinforcement learning based camera selection module, MVSelect, that not only selects views but also facilitates joint training with the task network. Experimental results on multiview classification and detection tasks show that our approach achieves promising performance while using only 2 or 3 out of N available views, significantly reducing computational costs. Furthermore, analysis on the selected views reveals that certain cameras can be shut off with minimal performance impact, shedding light on future camera layout optimization for multiview systems. Code is available at https://github.com/hou-yz/MVSelect. 事实证明，多视图相机设置在许多计算机视觉应用中非常有用，可以减少模糊性、减轻遮挡并增加视场覆盖范围。然而，与多个视图相关的高计算成本对计算资源有限的终端设备构成了重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种视图选择方法，该方法可以从给定的视图中分析目标对象或场景，并选择下一个最佳视图进行处理。我们的方法采用基于强化学习的相机选择模块 MVSelect，它不仅可以选择视图，还可以促进与任务网络的联合训练。多视图分类和检测任务的实验结果表明，我们的方法仅使用 N 个可用视图中的 2 或 3 个视图即可实现良好的性能，从而显着降低了计算成本。此外，对所选视图的分析表明，某些摄像机可以在对性能影响最小的情况下关闭，这为未来多视图系统的摄像机布局优化提供了线索。代码可在 https://github.com/hou-yz/MVSelect 获取。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的多视角相机选择方法MVSelect，通过选择少量关键视角实现高效的多视角理解。 Yunzhong Hou,Stephen Gould,Liang Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Hong-Xing Yu,Michelle Guo,Alireza Fathi,Yen-Yu Chang,Eric Ryan Chan,Ruohan Gao,Thomas Funkhouser,Jiajun Wu
title: Learning Object-Centric Neural Scattering Functions for Free-Viewpoint Relighting and Scene Composition
title_zh: 学习以对象为中心的神经散射函数以进行自由视点重新照明和场景合成
comment: Journal extension of arXiv:2012.08503 (TMLR 2023). The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Project page: https://kovenyu.com/osf/
comments: Journal extension of arXiv:2012.08503 (TMLR 2023). The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Project page: https://kovenyu.com/osf/
abstract: Photorealistic object appearance modeling from 2D images is a constant topic in vision and graphics. While neural implicit methods (such as Neural Radiance Fields) have shown high-fidelity view synthesis results, they cannot relight the captured objects. More recent neural inverse rendering approaches have enabled object relighting, but they represent surface properties as simple BRDFs, and therefore cannot handle translucent objects. We propose Object-Centric Neural Scattering Functions (OSFs) for learning to reconstruct object appearance from only images. OSFs not only support free-viewpoint object relighting, but also can model both opaque and translucent objects. While accurately modeling subsurface light transport for translucent objects can be highly complex and even intractable for neural methods, OSFs learn to approximate the radiance transfer from a distant light to an outgoing direction at any spatial location. This approximation avoids explicitly modeling complex subsurface scattering, making learning a neural implicit model tractable. Experiments on real and synthetic data show that OSFs accurately reconstruct appearances for both opaque and translucent objects, allowing faithful free-viewpoint relighting as well as scene composition.
summary: Photorealistic object appearance modeling from 2D images is a constant topic in vision and graphics. While neural implicit methods (such as Neural Radiance Fields) have shown high-fidelity view synthesis results, they cannot relight the captured objects. More recent neural inverse rendering approaches have enabled object relighting, but they represent surface properties as simple BRDFs, and therefore cannot handle translucent objects. We propose Object-Centric Neural Scattering Functions (OSFs) for learning to reconstruct object appearance from only images. OSFs not only support free-viewpoint object relighting, but also can model both opaque and translucent objects. While accurately modeling subsurface light transport for translucent objects can be highly complex and even intractable for neural methods, OSFs learn to approximate the radiance transfer from a distant light to an outgoing direction at any spatial location. This approximation avoids explicitly modeling complex subsurface scattering, making learning a neural implicit model tractable. Experiments on real and synthetic data show that OSFs accurately reconstruct appearances for both opaque and translucent objects, allowing faithful free-viewpoint relighting as well as scene composition.
abstract_zh: 从 2D 图像进行逼真的物体外观建模是视觉和图形领域的一个永恒话题。虽然神经隐式方法（例如神经辐射场）已显示出高保真度视图合成结果，但它们无法重新照亮捕获的对象。最近的神经逆向渲染方法已经启用了对象重新照明，但它们将表面属性表示为简单的 BRDF，因此无法处理半透明对象。我们提出了以对象为中心的神经散射函数（OSF）来学习仅从图像重建对象外观。 OSF 不仅支持自由视点对象重新照明，而且还可以对不透明和半透明对象进行建模。虽然对半透明物体的地下光传输进行精确建模可能非常复杂，甚至对于神经方法来说是棘手的，但 OSF 学习近似从远处光到任何空间位置的出射方向的辐射传输。这种近似避免了对复杂的次表面散射进行显式建模，使得学习神经隐式模型变得容易处理。对真实数据和合成数据的实验表明，OSF 可以准确地重建不透明和半透明物体的外观，从而实现忠实的自由视点重新照明以及场景合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对象中心的神经散射函数（OSFs）方法，用于从2D图像中重建物体外观，支持自由视角重照明和场景合成。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式方法无法实现物体重照明，而基于BRDF的逆渲染方法难以处理半透明物体，需解决复杂次表面散射建模难题。
AI.method: 通过学习近似远距离光源到出射方向的辐射传输，OSFs无需显式建模次表面散射，使神经隐式模型训练可行。
AI.result: 实验表明OSFs能准确重建不透明和半透明物体外观，实现逼真的自由视角重照明与场景合成。
AI.conclusion: OSFs有效解决了物体外观建模中的关键挑战，为复杂光照条件下的视图合成提供了新方法。

While neural implicit methods (such as Neural Radiance Fields) have shown high-fidelity view synthesis results, they cannot relight the captured objects. More recent neural inverse rendering approaches have enabled object relighting, but they represent surface properties as simple BRDFs, and therefore cannot handle translucent objects. authors_text: Manon Flageat,Bryan Lim,Antoine Cully
title: Enhancing MAP-Elites with Multiple Parallel Evolution Strategies
title_zh: 通过多种并行进化策略增强 MAP 精英
abstract: With the development of fast and massively parallel evaluations in many domains, Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms, that already proved promising in a large range of applications, have seen their potential multiplied. However, we have yet to understand how to best use a large number of evaluations as using them for random variations alone is not always effective. High-dimensional search spaces are a typical situation where random variations struggle to effectively search. Another situation is uncertain settings where solutions can appear better than they truly are and naively evaluating more solutions might mislead QD algorithms. In this work, we propose MAP-Elites-Multi-ES (MEMES), a novel QD algorithm based on Evolution Strategies (ES) designed to exploit fast parallel evaluations more effectively. MEMES maintains multiple (up to 100) simultaneous ES processes, each with its own independent objective and reset mechanism designed for QD optimisation, all on just a single GPU. We show that MEMES outperforms both gradient-based and mutation-based QD algorithms on black-box optimisation and QD-Reinforcement-Learning tasks, demonstrating its benefit across domains. Additionally, our approach outperforms sampling-based QD methods in uncertain domains when given the same evaluation budget. Overall, MEMES generates reproducible solutions that are high-performing and diverse through large-scale ES optimisation on easily accessible hardware.
summary: With the development of fast and massively parallel evaluations in many domains, Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms, that already proved promising in a large range of applications, have seen their potential multiplied. However, we have yet to understand how to best use a large number of evaluations as using them for random variations alone is not always effective. High-dimensional search spaces are a typical situation where random variations struggle to effectively search. Another situation is uncertain settings where solutions can appear better than they truly are and naively evaluating more solutions might mislead QD algorithms. In this work, we propose MAP-Elites-Multi-ES (MEMES), a novel QD algorithm based on Evolution Strategies (ES) designed to exploit fast parallel evaluations more effectively. MEMES maintains multiple (up to 100) simultaneous ES processes, each with its own independent objective and reset mechanism designed for QD optimisation, all on just a single GPU. We show that MEMES outperforms both gradient-based and mutation-based QD algorithms on black-box optimisation and QD-Reinforcement-Learning tasks, demonstrating its benefit across domains. Additionally, our approach outperforms sampling-based QD methods in uncertain domains when given the same evaluation budget. Overall, MEMES generates reproducible solutions that are high-performing and diverse through large-scale ES optimisation on easily accessible hardware.
abstract_zh: 随着许多领域快速、大规模并行评估的发展，质量多样性 (QD) 算法已在大量应用中被证明具有前景，其潜力已成倍增加。然而，我们尚未了解如何最好地使用大量评估，因为仅将它们用于随机变化并不总是有效。高维搜索空间是随机变化难以有效搜索的典型情况。另一种情况是不确定的设置，其中解决方案可能看起来比实际情况更好，并且天真地评估更多解决方案可能会误导 QD 算法。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MAP-Elites-Multi-ES (MEMES)，这是一种基于进化策略 (ES) 的新型 QD 算法，旨在更有效地利用快速并行评估。 MEMES 维护多个（最多 100 个）同步 ES 进程，每个进程都有自己独立的目标和重置机制，专为 QD 优化而设计，所有这些都在单个 GPU 上进行。我们证明，MEMES 在黑盒优化和 QD 强化学习任务上优于基于梯度和基于突变的 QD 算法，展示了其跨领域的优势。此外，当给定相同的评估预算时，我们的方法在不确定领域优于基于采样的 QD 方法。总体而言，MEMES 通过在易于访问的硬件上进行大规模 ES 优化，生成高性能且多样化的可重复解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MEMES的新型质量-多样性(QD)算法，通过多并行进化策略增强MAP-Elites，以更高效地利用快速并行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有QD算法在高维搜索空间和不确定环境中难以有效利用大量评估资源，随机变异方法存在局限性，需探索更高效的并行优化方案。
AI.method: 设计MEMES算法，基于进化策略(ES)在单GPU上维护多达100个独立ES进程，每个进程具备专属目标函数和重置机制，专门用于QD优化。
AI.result: MEMES在黑箱优化和QD强化学习任务中优于梯度法和突变法QD算法，在不确定环境中比采样法QD方法表现更优，且能生成高性能且多样化的解。
AI.conclusion: MEMES通过大规模ES优化充分利用易获取硬件资源，在多领域展现出提升QD算法性能的显著优势。
