search_text: Non-invasive Waveform Analysis for Emergency Triage via Simulated Hemorrhage: An Experimental Study using Novel Dynamic Lower Body Negative Pressure Model 通过模拟出血进行紧急分诊的无创波形分析：使用新型动态下半身负压模型的实验研究 The extent to which advanced waveform analysis of non-invasive physiological signals can diagnose levels of hypovolemia remains insufficiently explored. The present study explores the discriminative ability of a deep learning (DL) framework to classify levels of ongoing hypovolemia, simulated via novel dynamic lower body negative pressure (LBNP) model among healthy volunteers. We used a dynamic LBNP protocol as opposed to the traditional model, where LBNP is applied in a predictable step-wise, progressively descending manner. This dynamic LBNP version assists in circumventing the problem posed in terms of time dependency, as in real-life pre-hospital settings, intravascular blood volume may fluctuate due to volume resuscitation. A supervised DL-based framework for ternary classification was realized by segmenting the underlying noninvasive signal and labeling segments with corresponding LBNP target levels. The proposed DL model with two inputs was trained with respective time-frequency representations extracted on waveform segments to classify each of them into blood volume loss: Class 1 (mild); Class 2 (moderate); or Class 3 (severe). At the outset, the latent space derived at the end of the DL model via late fusion among both inputs assists in enhanced classification performance. When evaluated in a 3-fold cross-validation setup with stratified subjects, the experimental findings demonstrated PPG to be a potential surrogate for variations in blood volume with average classification performance, AUROC: 0.8861, AUPRC: 0.8141, $F1$-score:72.16%, Sensitivity:79.06 %, and Specificity:89.21 %. Our proposed DL algorithm on PPG signal demonstrates the possibility of capturing the complex interplay in physiological responses related to both bleeding and fluid resuscitation using this challenging LBNP setup. 非侵入性生理信号的先进波形分析在多大程度上可以诊断血容量不足的水平尚未得到充分探索。本研究探讨了深度学习（DL）框架对持续性低血容量水平进行分类的辨别能力，通过新型动态下半身负压（LBNP）模型在健康志愿者中进行模拟。我们使用动态 LBNP 协议，而不是传统模型，其中 LBNP 以可预测的逐步、逐步下降的方式应用。这种动态 LBNP 版本有助于规避时间依赖性带来的问题，因为在现实生活中的院前环境中，血管内血容量可能会因容量复苏而波动。通过分割底层非侵入性信号并用相应的 LBNP 目标水平标记片段，实现了基于监督 DL 的三元分类框架。所提出的具有两个输入的深度学习模型使用在波形片段上提取的各自时频表示进行训练，以将它们分类为血容量损失：1 类（轻度）； 2 级（中等）；或 3 级（严重）。首先，通过两个输入之间的后期融合在深度学习模型末尾导出的潜在空间有助于增强分类性能。当在分层受试者的 3 倍交叉验证设置中进行评估时，实验结果表明 PPG 是血容量变化的潜在替代品，具有平均分类性能，AUROC：0.8861，AUPRC：0.8141，$F1$-score：72.16％，敏感性：79.06％，特异性：89.21％。我们提出的 PPG 信号 DL 算法证明了使用这种具有挑战性的 LBNP 设置捕获与出血和液体复苏相关的生理反应中复杂的相互作用的可能性。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的非侵入式波形分析方法，通过动态下肢负压（LBNP）模型模拟失血，对健康志愿者的生理信号进行分类，以评估低血容量水平。 Naimahmed Nesaragi,Lars Øivind Høiseth,Hemin Ali Qadir,Leiv Arne Rosseland,Per Steinar Halvorsen,Ilangko Balasingham eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Liwei Huang,Zhengyu Ma,Liutao Yu,Huihui Zhou,Yonghong Tian
title: Deep Spiking Neural Networks with High Representation Similarity Model Visual Pathways of Macaque and Mouse
title_zh: 具有高表示相似性的深度尖峰神经网络模型猕猴和小鼠的视觉通路
comment: Accepted by Proceedings of the 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-23)
comments: Accepted by Proceedings of the 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-23)
abstract: Deep artificial neural networks (ANNs) play a major role in modeling the visual pathways of primate and rodent. However, they highly simplify the computational properties of neurons compared to their biological counterparts. Instead, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are more biologically plausible models since spiking neurons encode information with time sequences of spikes, just like biological neurons do. However, there is a lack of studies on visual pathways with deep SNNs models. In this study, we model the visual cortex with deep SNNs for the first time, and also with a wide range of state-of-the-art deep CNNs and ViTs for comparison. Using three similarity metrics, we conduct neural representation similarity experiments on three neural datasets collected from two species under three types of stimuli. Based on extensive similarity analyses, we further investigate the functional hierarchy and mechanisms across species. Almost all similarity scores of SNNs are higher than their counterparts of CNNs with an average of 6.6%. Depths of the layers with the highest similarity scores exhibit little differences across mouse cortical regions, but vary significantly across macaque regions, suggesting that the visual processing structure of mice is more regionally homogeneous than that of macaques. Besides, the multi-branch structures observed in some top mouse brain-like neural networks provide computational evidence of parallel processing streams in mice, and the different performance in fitting macaque neural representations under different stimuli exhibits the functional specialization of information processing in macaques. Taken together, our study demonstrates that SNNs could serve as promising candidates to better model and explain the functional hierarchy and mechanisms of the visual system.
summary: Deep artificial neural networks (ANNs) play a major role in modeling the visual pathways of primate and rodent. However, they highly simplify the computational properties of neurons compared to their biological counterparts. Instead, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are more biologically plausible models since spiking neurons encode information with time sequences of spikes, just like biological neurons do. However, there is a lack of studies on visual pathways with deep SNNs models. In this study, we model the visual cortex with deep SNNs for the first time, and also with a wide range of state-of-the-art deep CNNs and ViTs for comparison. Using three similarity metrics, we conduct neural representation similarity experiments on three neural datasets collected from two species under three types of stimuli. Based on extensive similarity analyses, we further investigate the functional hierarchy and mechanisms across species. Almost all similarity scores of SNNs are higher than their counterparts of CNNs with an average of 6.6%. Depths of the layers with the highest similarity scores exhibit little differences across mouse cortical regions, but vary significantly across macaque regions, suggesting that the visual processing structure of mice is more regionally homogeneous than that of macaques. Besides, the multi-branch structures observed in some top mouse brain-like neural networks provide computational evidence of parallel processing streams in mice, and the different performance in fitting macaque neural representations under different stimuli exhibits the functional specialization of information processing in macaques. Taken together, our study demonstrates that SNNs could serve as promising candidates to better model and explain the functional hierarchy and mechanisms of the visual system.
abstract_zh: 深度人工神经网络 (ANN) 在灵长类动物和啮齿类动物的视觉通路建模中发挥着重要作用。然而，与生物神经元相比，它们极大地简化了神经元的计算特性。相反，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是在生物学上更合理的模型，因为尖峰神经元使用尖峰时间序列编码信息，就像生物神经元一样。然而，目前缺乏对深度 SNN 模型视觉通路的研究。在这项研究中，我们首次使用深度 SNN 对视觉皮层进行建模，并使用各种最先进的深度 CNN 和 ViT 进行比较。使用三个相似性度量，我们对在三种类型的刺激下从两个物种收集的三个神经数据集进行神经表示相似性实验。基于广泛的相似性分析，我们进一步研究了跨物种的功能层次和机制。几乎所有 SNN 的相似度得分都高于 CNN 的相似度，平均为 6.6%。具有最高相似性得分的层的深度在小鼠皮质区域之间表现出很小的差异，但在猕猴区域之间差异显着，这表明小鼠的视觉处理结构比猕猴的视觉处理结构在区域上更加均匀。此外，在一些顶级小鼠类脑神经网络中观察到的多分支结构提供了小鼠并行处理流的计算证据，并且在不同刺激下拟合猕猴神经表征的不同性能表现出猕猴信息处理的功能专业化。总而言之，我们的研究表明，SNN 可以作为有希望的候选者，以更好地建模和解释视觉系统的功能层次结构和机制。

AI.tldr: 该论文首次使用深度脉冲神经网络（SNNs）建模灵长类和啮齿类动物的视觉皮层，并与卷积神经网络（CNNs）和视觉Transformer（ViTs）进行对比，分析其神经表征相似性。
AI.motivation: 传统人工神经网络（ANNs）简化了神经元的计算特性，而脉冲神经网络（SNNs）更符合生物神经元的时序编码机制，但缺乏在深度模型中对视觉通路的研究。
AI.method: 通过三种相似性指标，在两种物种的三个刺激类型下，对比SNNs、CNNs和ViTs在三个神经数据集上的神经表征相似性，并分析跨物种的功能层次和机制差异。
AI.result: SNNs的相似性得分平均比CNNs高6.6%；小鼠皮层区域的相似性得分层深差异较小，而猕猴区域差异显著；小鼠多分支结构支持并行处理流，猕猴在不同刺激下的表现差异体现功能特化。
AI.conclusion: SNNs能更有效地建模和解释视觉系统的功能层次与机制，为生物视觉研究提供有前景的计算框架。

search_text: Deep Spiking Neural Networks with High Representation Similarity Model Visual Pathways of Macaque and Mouse 具有高表示相似性的深度尖峰神经网络模型猕猴和小鼠的视觉通路 Deep artificial neural networks (ANNs) play a major role in modeling the visual pathways of primate and rodent. However, they highly simplify the computational properties of neurons compared to their biological counterparts. Instead, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are more biologically plausible models since spiking neurons encode information with time sequences of spikes, just like biological neurons do. However, there is a lack of studies on visual pathways with deep SNNs models. In this study, we model the visual cortex with deep SNNs for the first time, and also with a wide range of state-of-the-art deep CNNs and ViTs for comparison. Using three similarity metrics, we conduct neural representation similarity experiments on three neural datasets collected from two species under three types of stimuli. Based on extensive similarity analyses, we further investigate the functional hierarchy and mechanisms across species. Almost all similarity scores of SNNs are higher than their counterparts of CNNs with an average of 6.6%. Depths of the layers with the highest similarity scores exhibit little differences across mouse cortical regions, but vary significantly across macaque regions, suggesting that the visual processing structure of mice is more regionally homogeneous than that of macaques. Besides, the multi-branch structures observed in some top mouse brain-like neural networks provide computational evidence of parallel processing streams in mice, and the different performance in fitting macaque neural representations under different stimuli exhibits the functional specialization of information processing in macaques. Taken together, our study demonstrates that SNNs could serve as promising candidates to better model and explain the functional hierarchy and mechanisms of the visual system. 深度人工神经网络 (ANN) 在灵长类动物和啮齿类动物的视觉通路建模中发挥着重要作用。然而，与生物神经元相比，它们极大地简化了神经元的计算特性。相反，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是在生物学上更合理的模型，因为尖峰神经元使用尖峰时间序列编码信息，就像生物神经元一样。然而，目前缺乏对深度 SNN 模型视觉通路的研究。在这项研究中，我们首次使用深度 SNN 对视觉皮层进行建模，并使用各种最先进的深度 CNN 和 ViT 进行比较。使用三个相似性度量，我们对在三种类型的刺激下从两个物种收集的三个神经数据集进行神经表示相似性实验。基于广泛的相似性分析，我们进一步研究了跨物种的功能层次和机制。几乎所有 SNN 的相似度得分都高于 CNN 的相似度，平均为 6.6%。具有最高相似性得分的层的深度在小鼠皮质区域之间表现出很小的差异，但在猕猴区域之间差异显着，这表明小鼠的视觉处理结构比猕猴的视觉处理结构在区域上更加均匀。此外，在一些顶级小鼠类脑神经网络中观察到的多分支结构提供了小鼠并行处理流的计算证据，并且在不同刺激下拟合猕猴神经表征的不同性能表现出猕猴信息处理的功能专业化。总而言之，我们的研究表明，SNN 可以作为有希望的候选者，以更好地建模和解释视觉系统的功能层次结构和机制。 该论文首次使用深度脉冲神经网络（SNNs）建模灵长类和啮齿类动物的视觉皮层，并与卷积神经网络（CNNs）和视觉Transformer（ViTs）进行对比，分析其神经表征相似性。 Liwei Huang,Zhengyu Ma,Liutao Yu,Huihui Zhou,Yonghong Tian q-bio.NC,cs.NE

authors_text: Konstantin Rink,Tristan Gruschka,Patrick Palsbröker,Marcos Baez,Dominic Becking,Udo Seelmeyer,Gudrun Dobslaw,Patricia Stolz
title: Walking Down the Road to Independent Mobility: An Adaptive Route Training System for the Cognitively Impaired
title_zh: 走独立行动之路：认知障碍者自适应路线训练系统
comment: This is a post-peer-review, pre-copyedit version of an article accepted to the "Software Engineering in Society" (SEIS) track of the 45th Internationl Conference on Software Engineering, ICSE 2023
comments: This is a post-peer-review, pre-copyedit version of an article accepted to the "Software Engineering in Society" (SEIS) track of the 45th Internationl Conference on Software Engineering, ICSE 2023
abstract: In this paper we describe the design and development of a route training system for individuals with cognitive impairments (CIs) living in residential care facilities. Learning to move autonomously in public spaces is a fundamental skill for people with CI, who face several challenges to independently and safely move around. Yet, exploring opportunities for route training support, especially in residential settings, has received very little attention. To explore these opportunities, we followed a design and development process based on inclusive design practices that considered the organisational context and aimed at involving people with CI in the software design. To ensure our solution addressed the identified needs and abilities of this heterogeneous population, we further framed the route training definition as a design process that is enacted by the system, making the trainer and user co-creators of a personalised training. In this paper we report on the needs and challenges for mobility training in residential settings, introduce the design and formative evaluation of the route training system, to conclude with reflections and considerations on our methodological approach.
summary: In this paper we describe the design and development of a route training system for individuals with cognitive impairments (CIs) living in residential care facilities. Learning to move autonomously in public spaces is a fundamental skill for people with CI, who face several challenges to independently and safely move around. Yet, exploring opportunities for route training support, especially in residential settings, has received very little attention. To explore these opportunities, we followed a design and development process based on inclusive design practices that considered the organisational context and aimed at involving people with CI in the software design. To ensure our solution addressed the identified needs and abilities of this heterogeneous population, we further framed the route training definition as a design process that is enacted by the system, making the trainer and user co-creators of a personalised training. In this paper we report on the needs and challenges for mobility training in residential settings, introduce the design and formative evaluation of the route training system, to conclude with reflections and considerations on our methodological approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了针对居住在住宿护理机构中的认知障碍（CI）患者的路线培训系统的设计和开发。学习在公共场所自主移动是 CI 患者的一项基本技能，他们在独立、安全地移动方面面临着一些挑战。然而，探索路线培训支持的机会，特别是在住宅环境中，却很少受到关注。为了探索这些机会，我们遵循了基于包容性设计实践的设计和开发流程，该实践考虑了组织环境，旨在让 CI 人员参与软件设计。为了确保我们的解决方案满足这种异质人群的已确定的需求和能力，我们进一步将路线培训定义框架为由系统制定的设计过程，使培训师和用户共同创建个性化培训。在本文中，我们报告了住宅环境中移动培训的需求和挑战，介绍了路线培训系统的设计和形成性评估，最后对我们的方法进行了反思和考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并开发了一种适应性路线训练系统，旨在帮助认知障碍者在住宅护理机构中安全独立地移动。
AI.motivation: 认知障碍者在公共空间自主移动是基本技能，但现有研究对住宅环境中路线训练支持的关注不足，需开发针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 基于包容性设计实践，结合机构环境并邀请认知障碍者参与软件设计，将路线训练定义为系统与用户共同创作的个性化过程，并进行形成性评估。
AI.result: 提出了住宅场景下认知障碍者移动训练的需求与挑战，介绍了路线训练系统的设计及评估结果，验证了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: 强调在异质性群体中需通过用户参与设计以满足多样化需求，方法论为类似研究提供了参考。

authors_text: Si-An Chen,Chun-Liang Li,Nate Yoder,Sercan O. Arik,Tomas Pfister
title: TSMixer: An All-MLP Architecture for Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: TSMixer：用于时间序列预测的全 MLP 架构
abstract: Real-world time-series datasets are often multivariate with complex dynamics. To capture this complexity, high capacity architectures like recurrent- or attention-based sequential deep learning models have become popular. However, recent work demonstrates that simple univariate linear models can outperform such deep learning models on several commonly used academic benchmarks. Extending them, in this paper, we investigate the capabilities of linear models for time-series forecasting and present Time-Series Mixer (TSMixer), a novel architecture designed by stacking multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). TSMixer is based on mixing operations along both the time and feature dimensions to extract information efficiently. On popular academic benchmarks, the simple-to-implement TSMixer is comparable to specialized state-of-the-art models that leverage the inductive biases of specific benchmarks. On the challenging and large scale M5 benchmark, a real-world retail dataset, TSMixer demonstrates superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art alternatives. Our results underline the importance of efficiently utilizing cross-variate and auxiliary information for improving the performance of time series forecasting. We present various analyses to shed light into the capabilities of TSMixer. The design paradigms utilized in TSMixer are expected to open new horizons for deep learning-based time series forecasting. The implementation is available at https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/tsmixer
summary: Real-world time-series datasets are often multivariate with complex dynamics. To capture this complexity, high capacity architectures like recurrent- or attention-based sequential deep learning models have become popular. However, recent work demonstrates that simple univariate linear models can outperform such deep learning models on several commonly used academic benchmarks. Extending them, in this paper, we investigate the capabilities of linear models for time-series forecasting and present Time-Series Mixer (TSMixer), a novel architecture designed by stacking multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). TSMixer is based on mixing operations along both the time and feature dimensions to extract information efficiently. On popular academic benchmarks, the simple-to-implement TSMixer is comparable to specialized state-of-the-art models that leverage the inductive biases of specific benchmarks. On the challenging and large scale M5 benchmark, a real-world retail dataset, TSMixer demonstrates superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art alternatives. Our results underline the importance of efficiently utilizing cross-variate and auxiliary information for improving the performance of time series forecasting. We present various analyses to shed light into the capabilities of TSMixer. The design paradigms utilized in TSMixer are expected to open new horizons for deep learning-based time series forecasting. The implementation is available at https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/tsmixer
abstract_zh: 现实世界的时间序列数据集通常是具有复杂动态的多变量。为了捕捉这种复杂性，高容量架构（例如基于循环或基于注意力的顺序深度学习模型）已变得流行。然而，最近的工作表明，简单的单变量线性模型可以在几个常用的学术基准上优于此类深度学习模型。在本文中，我们对它们进行了扩展，研究了用于时间序列预测的线性模型的功能，并提出了时间序列混合器（TSMixer），这是一种通过堆叠多层感知器（MLP）设计的新颖架构。 TSMixer 基于时间和特征维度的混合操作来有效地提取信息。在流行的学术基准上，易于实现的 TSMixer 与利用特定基准的归纳偏差的专门最先进模型相当。在具有挑战性的大规模 M5 基准（现实世界的零售数据集）上，TSMixer 与最先进的替代方案相比表现出了卓越的性能。我们的结果强调了有效利用跨变量和辅助信息对于提高时间序列预测性能的重要性。我们提供各种分析来阐明 TSMixer 的功能。 TSMixer 中使用的设计范例预计将为基于深度学习的时间序列预测开辟新的视野。该实现位于 https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/tsmixer

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多层感知机（MLP）的新型时间序列预测架构TSMixer，通过在时间与特征维度上进行混合操作以高效提取信息。
AI.motivation: 尽管复杂模型（如RNN或注意力机制）在时间序列预测中广泛应用，但简单线性模型在部分基准测试中表现更优。作者旨在探索线性模型的潜力并设计更高效的架构。
AI.method: TSMixer通过堆叠MLP并引入时间与特征维度的混合操作，实现跨变量和辅助信息的高效利用，无需复杂结构。
AI.result: 在多个学术基准测试中，TSMixer性能与先进模型相当，且在大型真实零售数据集M5上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TSMixer的设计范式为基于深度学习的时间序列预测提供了新方向，强调了有效利用跨变量信息的重要性。

The implementation is available at https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/tsmixer 现实世界的时间序列数据集通常是具有复杂动态的多变量。为了捕捉这种复杂性，高容量架构（例如基于循环或基于注意力的顺序深度学习模型）已变得流行。然而，最近的工作表明，简单的单变量线性模型可以在几个常用的学术基准上优于此类深度学习模型。在本文中，我们对它们进行了扩展，研究了用于时间序列预测的线性模型的功能，并提出了时间序列混合器（TSMixer），这是一种通过堆叠多层感知器（MLP）设计的新颖架构。 TSMixer 基于时间和特征维度的混合操作来有效地提取信息。在流行的学术基准上，易于实现的 TSMixer 与利用特定基准的归纳偏差的专门最先进模型相当。在具有挑战性的大规模 M5 基准（现实世界的零售数据集）上，TSMixer 与最先进的替代方案相比表现出了卓越的性能。我们的结果强调了有效利用跨变量和辅助信息对于提高时间序列预测性能的重要性。我们提供各种分析来阐明 TSMixer 的功能。 TSMixer 中使用的设计范例预计将为基于深度学习的时间序列预测开辟新的视野。该实现位于 https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/tsmixer 本文提出了一种基于多层感知机（MLP）的新型时间序列预测架构TSMixer，通过在时间与特征维度上进行混合操作以高效提取信息。 Si-An Chen,Chun-Liang Li,Nate Yoder,Sercan O. Arik,Tomas Pfister cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hao Tang,Aref Miri Rekavandi,Dharjinder Rooprai,Girish Dwivedi,Frank Sanfilippo,Farid Boussaid,Mohammed Bennamoun
title: Analysis and Evaluation of Explainable Artificial Intelligence on Suicide Risk Assessment
title_zh: 可解释人工智能对自杀风险评估的分析与评估
abstract: This study investigates the effectiveness of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques in predicting suicide risks and identifying the dominant causes for such behaviours. Data augmentation techniques and ML models are utilized to predict the associated risk. Furthermore, SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and correlation analysis are used to rank the importance of variables in predictions. Experimental results indicate that Decision Tree (DT), Random Forest (RF) and eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) models achieve the best results while DT has the best performance with an accuracy of 95:23% and an Area Under Curve (AUC) of 0.95. As per SHAP results, anger problems, depression, and social isolation are the leading variables in predicting the risk of suicide, and patients with good incomes, respected occupations, and university education have the least risk. Results demonstrate the effectiveness of machine learning and XAI framework for suicide risk prediction, and they can assist psychiatrists in understanding complex human behaviours and can also assist in reliable clinical decision-making.
summary: This study investigates the effectiveness of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques in predicting suicide risks and identifying the dominant causes for such behaviours. Data augmentation techniques and ML models are utilized to predict the associated risk. Furthermore, SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and correlation analysis are used to rank the importance of variables in predictions. Experimental results indicate that Decision Tree (DT), Random Forest (RF) and eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) models achieve the best results while DT has the best performance with an accuracy of 95:23% and an Area Under Curve (AUC) of 0.95. As per SHAP results, anger problems, depression, and social isolation are the leading variables in predicting the risk of suicide, and patients with good incomes, respected occupations, and university education have the least risk. Results demonstrate the effectiveness of machine learning and XAI framework for suicide risk prediction, and they can assist psychiatrists in understanding complex human behaviours and can also assist in reliable clinical decision-making.
abstract_zh: 本研究调查了可解释人工智能 (XAI) 技术在预测自杀风险和确定此类行为的主要原因方面的有效性。利用数据增强技术和机器学习模型来预测相关风险。此外，SHApley 加法解释 (SHAP) 和相关分析用于对预测中变量的重要性进行排名。实验结果表明，决策树（DT）、随机森林（RF）和极限梯度提升（XGBoost）模型取得了最好的结果，其中DT的性能最好，准确率为95:23%，曲线下面积（AUC）为0.95。根据 SHAP 结果，愤怒问题、抑郁和社会孤立是预测自杀风险的主要变量，而收入良好、受人尊敬的职业和大学教育的患者风险最小。结果证明了机器学习和 XAI 框架对于自杀风险预测的有效性，它们可以帮助精神科医生理解复杂的人类行为，也可以协助做出可靠的临床决策。

AI.tldr: 本研究评估可解释人工智能（XAI）技术在预测自杀风险及识别主导因素方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 通过结合机器学习与可解释性方法，提高自杀风险预测的准确性与透明度，辅助精神科医生临床决策。
AI.method: 采用数据增强技术与机器学习模型（决策树、随机森林、XGBoost），结合SHAP值和相关性分析评估变量重要性。
AI.result: 决策树模型表现最佳（准确率95.23%，AUC 0.95），愤怒问题、抑郁和社会孤立是关键预测因素，高收入、受尊重职业和大学教育者风险最低。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习与XAI框架有效提升自杀风险预测能力，可辅助理解复杂人类行为并支持临床决策。

authors_text: Gorka Muñoz-Gil,Andrea López-Incera,Lukas J. Fiderer,Hans J. Briegel
title: Optimal foraging strategies can be learned
title_zh: 可以学习最佳的觅食策略
comment: 12 pages (6 main text) and 9 figures. Codes and tutorials available at: https://gorkamunoz.github.io/rl_opts/
comments: 12 pages (6 main text) and 9 figures. Codes and tutorials available at: https://gorkamunoz.github.io/rl_opts/
abstract: The foraging behavior of animals is a paradigm of target search in nature. Understanding which foraging strategies are optimal and how animals learn them are central challenges in modeling animal foraging. While the question of optimality has wide-ranging implications across fields such as economy, physics, and ecology, the question of learnability is a topic of ongoing debate in evolutionary biology. Recognizing the interconnected nature of these challenges, this work addresses them simultaneously by exploring optimal foraging strategies through a reinforcement learning framework. To this end, we model foragers as learning agents. We first prove theoretically that maximizing rewards in our reinforcement learning model is equivalent to optimizing foraging efficiency. We then show with numerical experiments that, in the paradigmatic model of non-destructive search, our agents learn foraging strategies which outperform the efficiency of some of the best known strategies such as Lévy walks. These findings highlight the potential of reinforcement learning as a versatile framework not only for optimizing search strategies but also to model the learning process, thus shedding light on the role of learning in natural optimization processes.
summary: The foraging behavior of animals is a paradigm of target search in nature. Understanding which foraging strategies are optimal and how animals learn them are central challenges in modeling animal foraging. While the question of optimality has wide-ranging implications across fields such as economy, physics, and ecology, the question of learnability is a topic of ongoing debate in evolutionary biology. Recognizing the interconnected nature of these challenges, this work addresses them simultaneously by exploring optimal foraging strategies through a reinforcement learning framework. To this end, we model foragers as learning agents. We first prove theoretically that maximizing rewards in our reinforcement learning model is equivalent to optimizing foraging efficiency. We then show with numerical experiments that, in the paradigmatic model of non-destructive search, our agents learn foraging strategies which outperform the efficiency of some of the best known strategies such as Lévy walks. These findings highlight the potential of reinforcement learning as a versatile framework not only for optimizing search strategies but also to model the learning process, thus shedding light on the role of learning in natural optimization processes.
abstract_zh: 动物的觅食行为是自然界中目标搜索的范例。了解哪些觅食策略是最佳的以及动物如何学习这些策略是动物觅食建模的核心挑战。虽然最优性问题在经济、物理学和生态学等领域具有广泛的影响，但可学习性问题是进化生物学中持续争论的话题。认识到这些挑战的相互关联性，这项工作通过强化学习框架探索最佳觅食策略，同时解决这些挑战。为此，我们将觅食者建模为学习代理。我们首先从理论上证明，在强化学习模型中最大化奖励相当于优化觅食效率。然后，我们通过数值实验表明，在非破坏性搜索的范式模型中，我们的智能体学习的觅食策略优于一些最著名的策略（例如 Lévy 行走）的效率。这些发现凸显了强化学习作为通用框架的潜力，不仅可以优化搜索策略，还可以对学习过程进行建模，从而揭示学习在自然优化过程中的作用。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过强化学习框架研究动物最优觅食策略的学习机制，证明最大化奖励等同于优化觅食效率，并验证代理能学习出优于Lévy行走的策略。
AI.motivation: 理解动物如何学习最优觅食策略对生态学、经济学等领域具有重要意义，但传统方法难以同时解决策略优化与学习机制的关联问题。
AI.method: 将觅食者建模为强化学习代理，理论证明奖励最大化与觅食效率优化的等价性，并通过非破坏性搜索模型的数值实验验证策略有效性。
AI.result: 实验显示代理学习出的觅食策略在效率上超越了Lévy行走等经典方法，证实了强化学习框架在优化搜索策略中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习不仅可优化搜索策略，还能有效模拟自然界的策略学习过程，为理解生物优化机制提供新视角。

authors_text: Peeyush Kumar,Andrew Nelson,Zerina Kapetanovic,Ranveer Chandra
title: Affordable Artificial Intelligence -- Augmenting Farmer Knowledge with AI
title_zh: 经济实惠的人工智能——利用人工智能增强农民知识
comment: Digital agriculture in action- Artificial Intelligence for agriculture. Bangkok, FAO and ITU, 2021
comments: Digital agriculture in action- Artificial Intelligence for agriculture. Bangkok, FAO and ITU, 2021
abstract: Farms produce hundreds of thousands of data points on the ground daily. Farming technique which combines farming practices with the insights uncovered in these data points using AI technology is called precision farming. Precision farming technology augments and extends farmers' deep knowledge about their land, making production more sustainable and profitable. As part of the larger effort at Microsoft for empowering agricultural labor force to be more productive and sustainable, this paper presents the AI technology for predicting micro-climate conditions on the farm. This article is a chapter in publication by Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations and International Telecommunication Union Bangkok, 2021. This publication on artificial intelligence (AI) for agriculture is the fifth in the E-agriculture in Action series, launched in 2016 and jointly produced by FAO and ITU. It aims to raise awareness about existing AI applications in agriculture and to inspire stakeholders to develop and replicate the new ones. Improvement of capacity and tools for capturing and processing data and substantial advances in the field of machine learning open new horizons for data-driven solutions that can support decision-making, facilitate supervision and monitoring, improve the timeliness and effectiveness of safety measures (e.g. use of pesticides), and support automation of many resource-consuming tasks in agriculture. This publication presents the reader with a collection of informative applications highlighting various ways AI is used in agriculture and offering valuable insights on the implementation process, success factors, and lessons learnt.
summary: Farms produce hundreds of thousands of data points on the ground daily. Farming technique which combines farming practices with the insights uncovered in these data points using AI technology is called precision farming. Precision farming technology augments and extends farmers' deep knowledge about their land, making production more sustainable and profitable. As part of the larger effort at Microsoft for empowering agricultural labor force to be more productive and sustainable, this paper presents the AI technology for predicting micro-climate conditions on the farm. This article is a chapter in publication by Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations and International Telecommunication Union Bangkok, 2021. This publication on artificial intelligence (AI) for agriculture is the fifth in the E-agriculture in Action series, launched in 2016 and jointly produced by FAO and ITU. It aims to raise awareness about existing AI applications in agriculture and to inspire stakeholders to develop and replicate the new ones. Improvement of capacity and tools for capturing and processing data and substantial advances in the field of machine learning open new horizons for data-driven solutions that can support decision-making, facilitate supervision and monitoring, improve the timeliness and effectiveness of safety measures (e.g. use of pesticides), and support automation of many resource-consuming tasks in agriculture. This publication presents the reader with a collection of informative applications highlighting various ways AI is used in agriculture and offering valuable insights on the implementation process, success factors, and lessons learnt.
abstract_zh: 农场每天在地面产生数十万个数据点。将农业实践与使用人工智能技术从这些数据点中发现的见解相结合的农业技术称为精准农业。精准农业技术增强和扩展了农民对其土地的深入了解，使生产更加可持续和有利可图。作为微软为提高农业劳动力生产力和可持续性而做出的更大努力的一部分，本文介绍了用于预测农场微气候条件的人工智能技术。本文是联合国粮食及农业组织和国际电信联盟曼谷出版社 2021 年出版的章节。这份关于农业人工智能 (AI) 的出版物是《行动中的电子农业》系列的第五本，该系列于 2016 年推出，由粮农组织和国际电联联合制作。它旨在提高人们对农业中现有人工智能应用的认识，并激励利益相关者开发和复制新的应用。捕获和处理数据的能力和工具的改进以及机器学习领域的重大进步为数据驱动的解决方案开辟了新的视野，这些解决方案可以支持决策，促进监督和监测，提高安全措施（例如农药的使用）的及时性和有效性，并支持农业中许多资源消耗任务的自动化。本出版物向读者提供了一系列信息丰富的应用程序，重点介绍了人工智能在农业中的各种应用方式，并提供了有关实施过程、成功因素和经验教训的宝贵见解。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了利用人工智能技术预测农场微气候条件，以增强农民知识并推动精准农业发展的方法。
AI.motivation: 通过结合农业实践与AI数据分析，提升农业生产可持续性和盈利能力，同时为农业劳动力提供更高效的工具和解决方案。
AI.method: 开发基于人工智能的微气候预测技术，整合农场实时数据并结合机器学习算法进行分析。
AI.result: 作为联合国粮农组织与国际电信联盟联合出版物的一部分，展示了AI在农业中的应用案例及实施经验。
AI.conclusion: AI技术通过数据驱动的解决方案，能够优化农业决策、监督和自动化任务，为农业可持续发展提供新机遇。

authors_text: Xin Li
title: On Broken Symmetry in Cognition
title_zh: 论认知中的破缺对称性
abstract: Cognition is not passive data accumulation but the active resolution of uncertainty through symmetry breaking. This paper argues that both cognitive evolution and development unfold via sequential symmetry-breaking transitions that disrupt innate regularities across space, time, self, and representation. First, spatial symmetry is broken through bilateral body plans and neural codes like grid and place cells, which privilege egocentric orientation and localized encoding. Second, reinforcement learning introduces temporal asymmetry by favoring future rewards, establishing a directional flow of inference. Third, goal-directed simulation breaks spatiotemporal symmetry between internal self-models and the external world, enabling embodied inference and solving the combinatorial search problem. Fourth, social cognition via mentalizing and imitation breaks the symmetry between minds, allowing agents to infer others' beliefs. Finally, language imposes a linear, recursive structure onto unordered thought, breaking expressive symmetry through syntax and grammar. These asymmetries are unified by the Context-Content Uncertainty Principle (CCUP), which frames cognition as a cyclical entropy-minimizing process. At the core lies the principle of structure-before-specificity: ambiguous input is first mapped onto stable latent structures before being bound to specific instances. This promotes generalization, reduces sample complexity, and prevents overfitting. Inverting inference, from content back to context, further breaks the curse of dimensionality by constraining inference to goal-consistent manifolds. Thus, symmetry breaking is not incidental but the foundational mechanism by which cognition organizes, stabilizes, and scales intelligent behavior in an uncertain and dynamic world.

abstract_zh: 认知不是被动的数据积累，而是通过对称性破缺主动解决不确定性。本文认为，认知进化和发展都是通过连续的对称性破缺转变来展开的，这种转变破坏了空间、时间、自我和表征的固有规律。首先，空间对称性被双边身体计划和神经编码（如网格和位置细胞）打破，这些编码优先考虑以自我为中心的取向和局部编码。其次，强化学习通过有利于未来奖励、建立定向推理流来引入时间不对称。第三，目标导向模拟打破了内部自我模型与外部世界之间的时空对称性，从而实现了具体推理并解决了组合搜索问题。第四，通过心智化和模仿的社会认知打破了思想之间的对称性，使主体能够推断他人的信念。最后，语言将线性的、递归的结构强加给无序的思想，通过句法和语法打破表达的对称性。这些不对称性由上下文内容不确定性原理（CCUP）统一，该原理将认知定义为循环熵最小化过程。其核心在于先结构后特异性的原则：模糊输入首先映射到稳定的潜在结构，然后再绑定到特定实例。这可以促进泛化，降低样本复杂性，并防止过度拟合。反转推理，从内容回到上下文，通过将推理限制在目标一致的流形上，进一步打破了维度的诅咒。因此，对称性破缺不是偶然的，而是认知在不确定和动态的世界中组织、稳定和扩展智能行为的基本机制。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨认知通过打破对称性（如空间、时间、自我与环境关系等）来解决不确定性，提出认知发展的核心机制是逐步打破固有规律以实现智能行为的组织与扩展。
AI.motivation: 传统认知模型强调数据积累，但无法解释如何在不确定环境中主动构建结构化知识，需重新审视对称性打破在认知演化与发育中的作用。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，分阶段阐述空间、时间、自他关系、社会认知及语言等层面的对称性打破过程，并提出‘上下文-内容不确定性原理’（CCUP）与‘结构先于具体性’原则作为统一框架。
AI.result: 构建了认知的分层对称性打破模型，证明其可减少样本复杂度、避免过拟合并通过逆向推理约束高维空间，实现认知的泛化与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 对称性打破是认知应对不确定性的基础机制，通过结构化先验约束，使智能行为在动态世界中高效组织与扩展。

authors_text: Xianggang Yu,Mutian Xu,Yidan Zhang,Haolin Liu,Chongjie Ye,Yushuang Wu,Zizheng Yan,Chenming Zhu,Zhangyang Xiong,Tianyou Liang,Guanying Chen,Shuguang Cui,Xiaoguang Han
title: MVImgNet: A Large-scale Dataset of Multi-view Images
title_zh: MVImgNet：大规模多视图图像数据集
comment: To be appear in CVPR2023. Project page: https://gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/MVImgNet/
comments: To be appear in CVPR2023. Project page: https://gaplab.cuhk.edu.cn/projects/MVImgNet/
abstract: Being data-driven is one of the most iconic properties of deep learning algorithms. The birth of ImageNet drives a remarkable trend of "learning from large-scale data" in computer vision. Pretraining on ImageNet to obtain rich universal representations has been manifested to benefit various 2D visual tasks, and becomes a standard in 2D vision. However, due to the laborious collection of real-world 3D data, there is yet no generic dataset serving as a counterpart of ImageNet in 3D vision, thus how such a dataset can impact the 3D community is unraveled. To remedy this defect, we introduce MVImgNet, a large-scale dataset of multi-view images, which is highly convenient to gain by shooting videos of real-world objects in human daily life. It contains 6.5 million frames from 219,188 videos crossing objects from 238 classes, with rich annotations of object masks, camera parameters, and point clouds. The multi-view attribute endows our dataset with 3D-aware signals, making it a soft bridge between 2D and 3D vision. We conduct pilot studies for probing the potential of MVImgNet on a variety of 3D and 2D visual tasks, including radiance field reconstruction, multi-view stereo, and view-consistent image understanding, where MVImgNet demonstrates promising performance, remaining lots of possibilities for future explorations. Besides, via dense reconstruction on MVImgNet, a 3D object point cloud dataset is derived, called MVPNet, covering 87,200 samples from 150 categories, with the class label on each point cloud. Experiments show that MVPNet can benefit the real-world 3D object classification while posing new challenges to point cloud understanding. MVImgNet and MVPNet will be publicly available, hoping to inspire the broader vision community.

Pretraining on ImageNet to obtain rich universal representations has been manifested to benefit various 2D visual tasks, and becomes a standard in 2D vision. However, due to the laborious collection of real-world 3D data, there is yet no generic dataset serving as a counterpart of ImageNet in 3D vision, thus how such a dataset can impact the 3D community is unraveled. To remedy this defect, we introduce MVImgNet, a large-scale dataset of multi-view images, which is highly convenient to gain by shooting videos of real-world objects in human daily life. It contains 6.5 million frames from 219,188 videos crossing objects from 238 classes, with rich annotations of object masks, camera parameters, and point clouds. The multi-view attribute endows our dataset with 3D-aware signals, making it a soft bridge between 2D and 3D vision. We conduct pilot studies for probing the potential of MVImgNet on a variety of 3D and 2D visual tasks, including radiance field reconstruction, multi-view stereo, and view-consistent image understanding, where MVImgNet demonstrates promising performance, remaining lots of possibilities for future explorations. Besides, via dense reconstruction on MVImgNet, a 3D object point cloud dataset is derived, called MVPNet, covering 87,200 samples from 150 categories, with the class label on each point cloud. Experiments show that MVPNet can benefit the real-world 3D object classification while posing new challenges to point cloud understanding. MVImgNet and MVPNet will be publicly available, hoping to inspire the broader vision community.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动是深度学习算法最具标志性的属性之一。 ImageNet的诞生带动了计算机视觉领域“从大规模数据中学习”的显着趋势。在 ImageNet 上进行预训练以获得丰富的通用表示已被证明有利于各种 2D 视觉任务，并成为 2D 视觉的标准。然而，由于现实世界 3D 数据的收集工作非常繁重，目前还没有通用的数据集作为 3D 视觉中 ImageNet 的对应数据集，因此这样的数据集如何影响 3D 社区尚不清楚。为了弥补这一缺陷，我们引入了 MVImgNet，这是一个大规模的多视图图像数据集，可以非常方便地通过拍摄人类日常生活中的真实世界物体的视频来获得。它包含来自 219,188 个视频的 650 万帧，涉及 238 个类别的对象，并具有丰富的对象蒙版、相机参数和点云注释。多视图属性赋予我们的数据集 3D 感知信号，使其成为 2D 和 3D 视觉之间的软桥梁。我们进行了试点研究，以探索 MVImgNet 在各种 3D 和 2D 视觉任务上的潜力，包括辐射场重建、多视图立体和视图一致图像理解，其中 MVImgNet 表现出了良好的性能，为未来的探索留下了很多可能性。此外，通过在 MVImgNet 上进行密集重建，导出了一个 3D 对象点云数据集，称为 MVPNet，涵盖 150 个类别的 87,200 个样本，每个点云上都有类别标签。实验表明，MVPNet 可以有益于现实世界的 3D 对象分类，同时对点云理解提出新的挑战。 MVImgNet 和 MVPNet 将公开发布，希望能够激励更广泛的视觉社区。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MVImgNet，一个大规模多视角图像数据集，旨在为3D视觉领域提供类似ImageNet的基准数据，并衍生出点云数据集MVPNet。
AI.motivation: 尽管ImageNet推动了2D视觉的发展，但缺乏类似规模的3D视觉数据集，限制了3D任务的预训练和研究进展。
AI.method: 通过采集日常生活中物体的视频，生成650万帧多视角图像，包含物体掩码、相机参数和点云注释，并通过密集重建生成点云数据集MVPNet。
AI.result: MVImgNet在辐射场重建、多视角立体视觉等任务中表现优异，MVPNet提升了现实场景3D分类效果，但带来新的点云理解挑战。
AI.conclusion: MVImgNet和MVPNet为2D/3D视觉提供了桥梁，未来可推动更多跨模态研究，并促进3D视觉技术的实际应用。

authors_text: Yunguan Fu,Yiwen Li,Shaheer U. Saeed,Matthew J. Clarkson,Yipeng Hu
title: Importance of Aligning Training Strategy with Evaluation for Diffusion Models in 3D Multiclass Segmentation
title_zh: 将训练策略与 3D 多类分割中的扩散模型评估相结合的重要性
comment: Accepted at Deep Generative Models workshop at MICCAI 2023
comments: Accepted at Deep Generative Models workshop at MICCAI 2023
abstract: Recently, denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPM) have been applied to image segmentation by generating segmentation masks conditioned on images, while the applications were mainly limited to 2D networks without exploiting potential benefits from the 3D formulation. In this work, we studied the DDPM-based segmentation model for 3D multiclass segmentation on two large multiclass data sets (prostate MR and abdominal CT). We observed that the difference between training and test methods led to inferior performance for existing DDPM methods. To mitigate the inconsistency, we proposed a recycling method which generated corrupted masks based on the model's prediction at a previous time step instead of using ground truth. The proposed method achieved statistically significantly improved performance compared to existing DDPMs, independent of a number of other techniques for reducing train-test discrepancy, including performing mask prediction, using Dice loss, and reducing the number of diffusion time steps during training. The performance of diffusion models was also competitive and visually similar to non-diffusion-based U-net, within the same compute budget. The JAX-based diffusion framework has been released at https://github.com/mathpluscode/ImgX-DiffSeg.
summary: Recently, denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPM) have been applied to image segmentation by generating segmentation masks conditioned on images, while the applications were mainly limited to 2D networks without exploiting potential benefits from the 3D formulation. In this work, we studied the DDPM-based segmentation model for 3D multiclass segmentation on two large multiclass data sets (prostate MR and abdominal CT). We observed that the difference between training and test methods led to inferior performance for existing DDPM methods. To mitigate the inconsistency, we proposed a recycling method which generated corrupted masks based on the model's prediction at a previous time step instead of using ground truth. The proposed method achieved statistically significantly improved performance compared to existing DDPMs, independent of a number of other techniques for reducing train-test discrepancy, including performing mask prediction, using Dice loss, and reducing the number of diffusion time steps during training. The performance of diffusion models was also competitive and visually similar to non-diffusion-based U-net, within the same compute budget. The JAX-based diffusion framework has been released at https://github.com/mathpluscode/ImgX-DiffSeg.
abstract_zh: 最近，去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）已通过生成以图像为条件的分割掩模来应用于图像分割，而该应用主要限于 2D 网络，而没有利用 3D 公式的潜在优势。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于 DDPM 的分割模型，用于在两个大型多类数据集（前列腺 MR 和腹部 CT）上进行 3D 多类分割。我们观察到训练和测试方法之间的差异导致现有 DDPM 方法的性能较差。为了减轻这种不一致，我们提出了一种回收方法，该方法根据模型在前一个时间步的预测而不是使用地面实况来生成损坏的掩模。与现有的 DDPM 相比，所提出的方法在统计上显着提高了性能，独立于许多其他减少训练测试差异的技术，包括执行掩模预测、使用 Dice 损失以及减少训练期间的扩散时间步数。在相同的计算预算下，扩散模型的性能也具有竞争力，并且在视觉上与基于非扩散的 U-net 相似。基于 JAX 的扩散框架已在 https://github.com/mathpluscode/ImgX-DiffSeg 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于扩散概率模型（DDPM）的3D多类别分割模型，并提出了改进训练策略以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的DDPM方法在3D多类别分割任务中因训练与测试方法的不一致而表现不佳，因此需要改进训练策略以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种回收方法，通过在前一时间步使用模型预测生成损坏的掩码，而不是使用真实标签，从而减少训练与测试间的差异。
AI.result: 该方法在两个大型多类别数据集上显著提升了性能，且与非扩散的U-net模型在相同计算预算下表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过调整训练策略，可以有效提升扩散模型在3D多类别分割任务中的性能，并且其效果与非扩散方法相当。

authors_text: Raveen Wijewickrama,Sameer Anis Dohadwalla,Anindya Maiti,Murtuza Jadliwala,Sashank Narain
title: SkinSense: Efficient Vibration-based Communications Over Human Body Using Motion Sensors
title_zh: SkinSense：使用运动传感器在人体上进行基于振动的高效通信
abstract: Recent growth in popularity of mobile and wearable devices has re-ignited the need for reliable and stealthy communication side-channels to enable applications such as secret/PIN sharing, co-location proofs and user authentication. Existing short-range wireless radio technology such as Bluetooth/BLE and NFC, although mature and robust, is prone to eavesdropping, jamming and/or interference, and is not very useful as a covert communication side-channel. This paper designs and implements SkinSense, a vibration-based communication protocol which uses human body/skin as a communication medium to create a low-bandwidth and covert communication channel between user-held mobile and wearable devices. SkinSense employs a novel frequency modulation technique for encoding bits as vibration pulses and a spectrogram-based approach to decode the sensed motion data (corresponding to the encoded vibration pulses) to reconstruct the transmitted bits. SkinSense is comprehensively evaluated for a variety of operational parameters, hardware setups and communication settings by means of data collected from human subject participants. Results from these empirical evaluations demonstrate that SkinSense is able to achieve a stable bandwidth of upto 6.6 bps, with bit error rates below 0.1 in our custom hardware setup, and can be employed as a practical communication side-channel.
summary: Recent growth in popularity of mobile and wearable devices has re-ignited the need for reliable and stealthy communication side-channels to enable applications such as secret/PIN sharing, co-location proofs and user authentication. Existing short-range wireless radio technology such as Bluetooth/BLE and NFC, although mature and robust, is prone to eavesdropping, jamming and/or interference, and is not very useful as a covert communication side-channel. SkinSense employs a novel frequency modulation technique for encoding bits as vibration pulses and a spectrogram-based approach to decode the sensed motion data (corresponding to the encoded vibration pulses) to reconstruct the transmitted bits. SkinSense is comprehensively evaluated for a variety of operational parameters, hardware setups and communication settings by means of data collected from human subject participants. Results from these empirical evaluations demonstrate that SkinSense is able to achieve a stable bandwidth of upto 6.6 bps, with bit error rates below 0.1 in our custom hardware setup, and can be employed as a practical communication side-channel.
abstract_zh: 最近移动和可穿戴设备的普及重新激发了对可靠且隐秘的通信侧通道的需求，以支持秘密/PIN 共享、协同定位证明和用户身份验证等应用。现有的短距离无线电技术（例如蓝牙/BLE 和 NFC）虽然成熟且强大，但容易被窃听、干扰和/或干扰，并且作为隐蔽通信侧信道不是很有用。本文设计并实现了 SkinSense，这是一种基于振动的通信协议，它使用人体/皮肤作为通信媒介，在用户手持移动设备和可穿戴设备之间创建低带宽和隐蔽的通信通道。 SkinSense 采用新颖的频率调制技术将比特编码为振动脉冲，并采用基于频谱图的方法来解码感测到的运动数据（对应于编码的振动脉冲）以重建传输的比特。通过从人类受试者参与者收集的数据，对 SkinSense 的各种操作参数、硬件设置和通信设置进行全面评估。这些实证评估的结果表明，SkinSense 能够实现高达 6.6 bps 的稳定带宽，在我们的定制硬件设置中误码率低于 0.1，并且可以用作实际的通信侧通道。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一种基于振动的人体通信协议SkinSense，利用人体作为介质在移动设备和可穿戴设备间建立隐蔽通信通道。
AI.motivation: 现有无线通信技术（如蓝牙/NFC）存在易被窃听、干扰等问题，难以满足隐蔽通信需求，需探索新型低带宽隐蔽通信方案。
AI.method: 采用频率调制技术将比特编码为振动脉冲，通过频谱图分析解码运动传感器采集的振动数据以重建传输比特。
AI.result: 实测显示自定义硬件环境下带宽达6.6 bps，误码率低于0.1，且在多种硬件配置和通信场景中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: SkinSense验证了基于人体振动的隐蔽通信可行性，为隐私保护场景提供了一种实用的低带宽侧信道通信方案。

search_text: SkinSense: Efficient Vibration-based Communications Over Human Body Using Motion Sensors SkinSense：使用运动传感器在人体上进行基于振动的高效通信 Recent growth in popularity of mobile and wearable devices has re-ignited the need for reliable and stealthy communication side-channels to enable applications such as secret/PIN sharing, co-location proofs and user authentication. Existing short-range wireless radio technology such as Bluetooth/BLE and NFC, although mature and robust, is prone to eavesdropping, jamming and/or interference, and is not very useful as a covert communication side-channel. This paper designs and implements SkinSense, a vibration-based communication protocol which uses human body/skin as a communication medium to create a low-bandwidth and covert communication channel between user-held mobile and wearable devices. SkinSense employs a novel frequency modulation technique for encoding bits as vibration pulses and a spectrogram-based approach to decode the sensed motion data (corresponding to the encoded vibration pulses) to reconstruct the transmitted bits. SkinSense is comprehensively evaluated for a variety of operational parameters, hardware setups and communication settings by means of data collected from human subject participants. Results from these empirical evaluations demonstrate that SkinSense is able to achieve a stable bandwidth of upto 6.6 bps, with bit error rates below 0.1 in our custom hardware setup, and can be employed as a practical communication side-channel. 最近移动和可穿戴设备的普及重新激发了对可靠且隐秘的通信侧通道的需求，以支持秘密/PIN 共享、协同定位证明和用户身份验证等应用。现有的短距离无线电技术（例如蓝牙/BLE 和 NFC）虽然成熟且强大，但容易被窃听、干扰和/或干扰，并且作为隐蔽通信侧信道不是很有用。本文设计并实现了 SkinSense，这是一种基于振动的通信协议，它使用人体/皮肤作为通信媒介，在用户手持移动设备和可穿戴设备之间创建低带宽和隐蔽的通信通道。 SkinSense 采用新颖的频率调制技术将比特编码为振动脉冲，并采用基于频谱图的方法来解码感测到的运动数据（对应于编码的振动脉冲）以重建传输的比特。通过从人类受试者参与者收集的数据，对 SkinSense 的各种操作参数、硬件设置和通信设置进行全面评估。这些实证评估的结果表明，SkinSense 能够实现高达 6.6 bps 的稳定带宽，在我们的定制硬件设置中误码率低于 0.1，并且可以用作实际的通信侧通道。 设计并实现一种基于振动的人体通信协议SkinSense，利用人体作为介质在移动设备和可穿戴设备间建立隐蔽通信通道。 Raveen Wijewickrama,Sameer Anis Dohadwalla,Anindya Maiti,Murtuza Jadliwala,Sashank Narain eess.SP,cs.HC

authors_text: Kei Ota,Devesh K. Jha,Hsiao-Yu Tung,Joshua B. Tenenbaum
title: Tactile-Filter: Interactive Tactile Perception for Part Mating
title_zh: 触觉过滤器：用于零件配合的交互式触觉感知
abstract: Humans rely on touch and tactile sensing for a lot of dexterous manipulation tasks. Our tactile sensing provides us with a lot of information regarding contact formations as well as geometric information about objects during any interaction. With this motivation, vision-based tactile sensors are being widely used for various robotic perception and control tasks. In this paper, we present a method for interactive perception using vision-based tactile sensors for a part mating task, where a robot can use tactile sensors and a feedback mechanism using a particle filter to incrementally improve its estimate of objects (pegs and holes) that fit together. To do this, we first train a deep neural network that makes use of tactile images to predict the probabilistic correspondence between arbitrarily shaped objects that fit together. The trained model is used to design a particle filter which is used twofold. First, given one partial (or non-unique) observation of the hole, it incrementally improves the estimate of the correct peg by sampling more tactile observations. Second, it selects the next action for the robot to sample the next touch (and thus image) which results in maximum uncertainty reduction to minimize the number of interactions during the perception task. We evaluate our method on several part-mating tasks with novel objects using a robot equipped with a vision-based tactile sensor. We also show the efficiency of the proposed action selection method against a naive method. See supplementary video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jMVBg_e3gLw .
summary: Humans rely on touch and tactile sensing for a lot of dexterous manipulation tasks. Our tactile sensing provides us with a lot of information regarding contact formations as well as geometric information about objects during any interaction. With this motivation, vision-based tactile sensors are being widely used for various robotic perception and control tasks. In this paper, we present a method for interactive perception using vision-based tactile sensors for a part mating task, where a robot can use tactile sensors and a feedback mechanism using a particle filter to incrementally improve its estimate of objects (pegs and holes) that fit together. To do this, we first train a deep neural network that makes use of tactile images to predict the probabilistic correspondence between arbitrarily shaped objects that fit together. The trained model is used to design a particle filter which is used twofold. First, given one partial (or non-unique) observation of the hole, it incrementally improves the estimate of the correct peg by sampling more tactile observations. Second, it selects the next action for the robot to sample the next touch (and thus image) which results in maximum uncertainty reduction to minimize the number of interactions during the perception task. We evaluate our method on several part-mating tasks with novel objects using a robot equipped with a vision-based tactile sensor. We also show the efficiency of the proposed action selection method against a naive method. See supplementary video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jMVBg_e3gLw .
abstract_zh: 人类依靠触摸和触觉感知来完成许多灵巧的操作任务。我们的触觉感知为我们提供了大量有关接触形式的信息以及任何交互过程中物体的几何信息。出于这种动机，基于视觉的触觉传感器被广泛用于各种机器人感知和控制任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于视觉的触觉传感器进行零件配合任务的交互式感知方法，其中机器人可以使用触觉传感器和使用粒子滤波器的反馈机制来逐步改进其对配合在一起的物体（钉子和孔）的估计。为此，我们首先训练一个深度神经网络，利用触觉图像来预测组合在一起的任意形状的物体之间的概率对应关系。训练后的模型用于设计双重使用的粒子滤波器。首先，给定对孔的部分（或非唯一）观察，它通过采样更多的触觉观察来逐步改进正确钉子的估计。其次，它选择机器人的下一个动作来采样下一个触摸（以及图像），从而最大限度地减少不确定性，从而最大限度地减少感知任务期间的交互次数。我们使用配备基于视觉的触觉传感器的机器人，在与新物体的几个零件配合任务上评估我们的方法。我们还展示了所提出的动作选择方法相对于朴素方法的效率。请参阅 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jMVBg_e3gLw 上的补充视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉触觉传感器的交互式触觉感知方法，用于解决机器人部件配对（如插头与孔洞匹配）任务。
AI.motivation: 人类依赖触觉完成精细操作任务，但现有机器人触觉感知方法在部件配对场景中存在效率低、交互次数多的问题，需通过智能反馈机制优化感知过程。
AI.method: 训练深度神经网络从触觉图像预测物体间概率对应关系，并设计粒子滤波器：1）通过多次触觉采样增量优化部件匹配估计；2）选择使不确定度最小化的下一次触碰动作以减少交互次数。
AI.result: 在多种新型部件配对任务中验证了方法有效性，相比基准方法显著降低了交互次数，补充视频展示了实际操作效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过触觉反馈与智能动作选择相结合，有效提升了机器人部件配对任务的感知效率与准确性。

authors_text: Justus Renkhoff,Wenkai Tan,Alvaro Velasquez,illiam Yichen Wang,Yongxin Liu,Jian Wang,Shuteng Niu,Lejla Begic Fazlic,Guido Dartmann,Houbing Song
title: Exploring Adversarial Attacks on Neural Networks: An Explainable Approach
title_zh: 探索神经网络的对抗性攻击：一种可解释的方法
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) is being applied in various domains, especially in safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving. Consequently, it is of great significance to ensure the robustness of these methods and thus counteract uncertain behaviors caused by adversarial attacks. In this paper, we use gradient heatmaps to analyze the response characteristics of the VGG-16 model when the input images are mixed with adversarial noise and statistically similar Gaussian random noise. In particular, we compare the network response layer by layer to determine where errors occurred. Several interesting findings are derived. First, compared to Gaussian random noise, intentionally generated adversarial noise causes severe behavior deviation by distracting the area of concentration in the networks. Second, in many cases, adversarial examples only need to compromise a few intermediate blocks to mislead the final decision. Third, our experiments revealed that specific blocks are more vulnerable and easier to exploit by adversarial examples. Finally, we demonstrate that the layers $Block4\_conv1$ and $Block5\_cov1$ of the VGG-16 model are more susceptible to adversarial attacks. Our work could provide valuable insights into developing more reliable Deep Neural Network (DNN) models.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) is being applied in various domains, especially in safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving. Consequently, it is of great significance to ensure the robustness of these methods and thus counteract uncertain behaviors caused by adversarial attacks. In this paper, we use gradient heatmaps to analyze the response characteristics of the VGG-16 model when the input images are mixed with adversarial noise and statistically similar Gaussian random noise. In particular, we compare the network response layer by layer to determine where errors occurred. Several interesting findings are derived. First, compared to Gaussian random noise, intentionally generated adversarial noise causes severe behavior deviation by distracting the area of concentration in the networks. Second, in many cases, adversarial examples only need to compromise a few intermediate blocks to mislead the final decision. Third, our experiments revealed that specific blocks are more vulnerable and easier to exploit by adversarial examples. Finally, we demonstrate that the layers $Block4\_conv1$ and $Block5\_cov1$ of the VGG-16 model are more susceptible to adversarial attacks. Our work could provide valuable insights into developing more reliable Deep Neural Network (DNN) models.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）正在各个领域得到应用，特别是在自动驾驶等安全关键应用中。因此，确保这些方法的鲁棒性，从而抵消对抗性攻击引起的不确定行为具有重要意义。在本文中，我们使用梯度热图来分析当输入图像与对抗性噪声和统计上相似的高斯随机噪声混合时，VGG-16模型的响应特性。特别是，我们逐层比较网络响应以确定错误发生的位置。得出了一些有趣的发现。首先，与高斯随机噪声相比，故意生成的对抗性噪声会分散网络中的集中区域，从而导致严重的行为偏差。其次，在很多情况下，对抗性例子只需要妥协几个中间块就可以误导最终的决定。第三，我们的实验表明，特定的区块更容易受到攻击，更容易被对抗性例子利用。最后，我们证明 VGG-16 模型的 $Block4\_conv1$ 和 $Block5\_cov1$ 层更容易受到对抗性攻击。我们的工作可以为开发更可靠的深度神经网络（DNN）模型提供宝贵的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对抗性攻击对神经网络的影响，并通过可解释方法分析了VGG-16模型在对抗噪声和高斯噪声下的响应特性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习被广泛应用于安全关键领域，如自动驾驶，因此确保模型鲁棒性并抵御对抗性攻击至关重要。
AI.method: 使用梯度热图分析VGG-16模型在输入图像混合对抗噪声和统计相似的高斯随机噪声时的响应特征，并逐层比较网络响应以确定错误发生的位置。
AI.result: 对抗噪声相比高斯噪声更容易引起行为偏差，并且只需攻击少数中间块即可误导最终决策。实验还发现某些块更容易被利用，特别是Block4_conv1和Block5_cov1层更易受到对抗攻击。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为开发更可靠的深度神经网络模型提供了有价值的见解。

search_text: Exploring Adversarial Attacks on Neural Networks: An Explainable Approach 探索神经网络的对抗性攻击：一种可解释的方法 Deep Learning (DL) is being applied in various domains, especially in safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving. Consequently, it is of great significance to ensure the robustness of these methods and thus counteract uncertain behaviors caused by adversarial attacks. In this paper, we use gradient heatmaps to analyze the response characteristics of the VGG-16 model when the input images are mixed with adversarial noise and statistically similar Gaussian random noise. In particular, we compare the network response layer by layer to determine where errors occurred. Several interesting findings are derived. First, compared to Gaussian random noise, intentionally generated adversarial noise causes severe behavior deviation by distracting the area of concentration in the networks. Second, in many cases, adversarial examples only need to compromise a few intermediate blocks to mislead the final decision. Third, our experiments revealed that specific blocks are more vulnerable and easier to exploit by adversarial examples. Finally, we demonstrate that the layers $Block4\_conv1$ and $Block5\_cov1$ of the VGG-16 model are more susceptible to adversarial attacks. Our work could provide valuable insights into developing more reliable Deep Neural Network (DNN) models. 深度学习（DL）正在各个领域得到应用，特别是在自动驾驶等安全关键应用中。因此，确保这些方法的鲁棒性，从而抵消对抗性攻击引起的不确定行为具有重要意义。在本文中，我们使用梯度热图来分析当输入图像与对抗性噪声和统计上相似的高斯随机噪声混合时，VGG-16模型的响应特性。特别是，我们逐层比较网络响应以确定错误发生的位置。得出了一些有趣的发现。首先，与高斯随机噪声相比，故意生成的对抗性噪声会分散网络中的集中区域，从而导致严重的行为偏差。其次，在很多情况下，对抗性例子只需要妥协几个中间块就可以误导最终的决定。第三，我们的实验表明，特定的区块更容易受到攻击，更容易被对抗性例子利用。最后，我们证明 VGG-16 模型的 $Block4\_conv1$ 和 $Block5\_cov1$ 层更容易受到对抗性攻击。我们的工作可以为开发更可靠的深度神经网络（DNN）模型提供宝贵的见解。 本文研究了对抗性攻击对神经网络的影响，并通过可解释方法分析了VGG-16模型在对抗噪声和高斯噪声下的响应特性。 Justus Renkhoff,Wenkai Tan,Alvaro Velasquez,illiam Yichen Wang,Yongxin Liu,Jian Wang,Shuteng Niu,Lejla Begic Fazlic,Guido Dartmann,Houbing Song cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Michael Fleck,Wolfgang Göderle
title: wav2vec and its current potential to Automatic Speech Recognition in German for the usage in Digital History: A comparative assessment of available ASR-technologies for the use in cultural heritage contexts
title_zh: wav2vec 及其当前在数字历史中使用德语自动语音识别的潜力：对文化遗产背景下使用的可用 ASR 技术的比较评估
abstract: In this case study we trained and published a state-of-the-art open-source model for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) for German to evaluate the current potential of this technology for the use in the larger context of Digital Humanities and cultural heritage indexation. Along with this paper we publish our wav2vec2 based speech to text model while we evaluate its performance on a corpus of historical recordings we assembled compared against commercial cloud-based and proprietary services. While our model achieves moderate results, we see that proprietary cloud services fare significantly better. As our results show, recognition rates over 90 percent can currently be achieved, however, these numbers drop quickly once the recordings feature limited audio quality or use of non-every day or outworn language. A big issue is the high variety of different dialects and accents in the German language. Nevertheless, this paper highlights that the currently available quality of recognition is high enough to address various use cases in the Digital Humanities. We argue that ASR will become a key technology for the documentation and analysis of audio-visual sources and identify an array of important questions that the DH community and cultural heritage stakeholders will have to address in the near future.
summary: In this case study we trained and published a state-of-the-art open-source model for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) for German to evaluate the current potential of this technology for the use in the larger context of Digital Humanities and cultural heritage indexation. Along with this paper we publish our wav2vec2 based speech to text model while we evaluate its performance on a corpus of historical recordings we assembled compared against commercial cloud-based and proprietary services. While our model achieves moderate results, we see that proprietary cloud services fare significantly better. As our results show, recognition rates over 90 percent can currently be achieved, however, these numbers drop quickly once the recordings feature limited audio quality or use of non-every day or outworn language. A big issue is the high variety of different dialects and accents in the German language. Nevertheless, this paper highlights that the currently available quality of recognition is high enough to address various use cases in the Digital Humanities. We argue that ASR will become a key technology for the documentation and analysis of audio-visual sources and identify an array of important questions that the DH community and cultural heritage stakeholders will have to address in the near future.
abstract_zh: 在本案例研究中，我们训练并发布了最先进的德语自动语音识别 (ASR) 开源模型，以评估该技术在数字人文和文化遗产索引的更大背景下使用的当前潜力。除了本文之外，我们还发布了基于 wav2vec2 的语音转文本模型，同时我们在我们收集的历史录音语料库上与基于商业云的专有服务进行比较，评估其性能。虽然我们的模型取得了中等结果，但我们发现专有云服务的表现要好得多。正如我们的结果所示，目前可以实现超过 90% 的识别率，但是，一旦录音的音频质量有限或使用非日常或过时的语言，这些数字就会迅速下降。一个大问题是德语中存在多种不同的方言和口音。尽管如此，本文强调，当前可用的识别质量足够高，足以解决数字人文中的各种用例。我们认为，ASR 将成为记录和分析视听源的关键技术，并确定 DH 社区和文化遗产利益相关者在不久的将来必须解决的一系列重要问题。

AI.tldr: 评估wav2vec2等ASR技术在德语历史录音中的应用潜力，并与商业服务进行比较。
AI.motivation: 评估当前ASR技术在数字人文和文化遗产场景中的适用性，特别是针对历史录音的挑战。
AI.method: 训练并发布基于wav2vec2的德语ASR模型，评估其在历史录音语料库上的表现，并与商业云服务进行对比。
AI.result: 模型表现中等，商业服务识别率更高（超90%），但音频质量差或语言非日常时识别率下降，方言和口音影响显著。
AI.conclusion: 当前ASR技术已具备应用于数字人文的潜力，但需解决方言、口音及历史语言多样性等问题。

authors_text: Bahman Madadi,Goncalo Homem de Almeida Correia
title: A hybrid deep-learning-metaheuristic framework for bi-level network design problems
title_zh: 用于双层网络设计问题的混合深度学习元启发式框架
comment: Two case studies added, intro, discussion and conclusion extended, details added to method and experiments, typos fixed, title revised, references added
comments: Two case studies added, intro, discussion and conclusion extended, details added to method and experiments, typos fixed, title revised, references added
abstract: This study proposes a hybrid deep-learning-metaheuristic framework with a bi-level architecture for road network design problems (NDPs). We train a graph neural network (GNN) to approximate the solution of the user equilibrium (UE) traffic assignment problem and use inferences made by the trained model to calculate fitness function evaluations of a genetic algorithm (GA) to approximate solutions for NDPs. Using three test networks, two NDP variants and an exact solver as benchmark, we show that on average, our proposed framework can provide solutions within 1.5% gap of the best results in less than 0.5% of the time used by the exact solution procedure. Our framework can be utilized within an expert system for infrastructure planning to determine the best infrastructure planning and management decisions under different scenarios. Given the flexibility of the framework, it can easily be adapted to many other decision problems that can be modeled as bi-level problems on graphs. Moreover, we foreseen interesting future research directions, thus we also put forward a brief research agenda for this topic. The key observation from our research that can shape future research is that the fitness function evaluation time using the inferences made by the GNN model was in the order of milliseconds, which points to an opportunity and a need for novel heuristics that 1) can cope well with noisy fitness function values provided by deep learning models, and 2) can use the significantly enlarged efficiency of the evaluation step to explore the search space effectively (rather than efficiently). This opens a new avenue for a modern class of metaheuristics that are crafted for use with AI-powered predictors.
summary: This study proposes a hybrid deep-learning-metaheuristic framework with a bi-level architecture for road network design problems (NDPs). We train a graph neural network (GNN) to approximate the solution of the user equilibrium (UE) traffic assignment problem and use inferences made by the trained model to calculate fitness function evaluations of a genetic algorithm (GA) to approximate solutions for NDPs. Using three test networks, two NDP variants and an exact solver as benchmark, we show that on average, our proposed framework can provide solutions within 1.5% gap of the best results in less than 0.5% of the time used by the exact solution procedure. Our framework can be utilized within an expert system for infrastructure planning to determine the best infrastructure planning and management decisions under different scenarios. Given the flexibility of the framework, it can easily be adapted to many other decision problems that can be modeled as bi-level problems on graphs. Moreover, we foreseen interesting future research directions, thus we also put forward a brief research agenda for this topic. The key observation from our research that can shape future research is that the fitness function evaluation time using the inferences made by the GNN model was in the order of milliseconds, which points to an opportunity and a need for novel heuristics that 1) can cope well with noisy fitness function values provided by deep learning models, and 2) can use the significantly enlarged efficiency of the evaluation step to explore the search space effectively (rather than efficiently). This opens a new avenue for a modern class of metaheuristics that are crafted for use with AI-powered predictors.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种混合深度学习元启发式框架，具有用于道路网络设计问题（NDP）的双层架构。我们训练图神经网络 (GNN) 来近似解决用户均衡 (UE) 流量分配问题，并使用训练模型做出的推论来计算遗传算法 (GA) 的适应度函数评估，以近似 NDP 的解决方案。使用三个测试网络、两个 NDP 变体和一个精确求解器作为基准，我们表明，平均而言，我们提出的框架可以在不到精确求解过程所用时间 0.5% 的时间内提供与最佳结果相差 1.5% 以内的解决方案。我们的框架可以在基础设施规划专家系统中使用，以确定不同场景下的最佳基础设施规划和管理决策。鉴于该框架的灵活性，它可以轻松地适应许多其他决策问题，这些决策问题可以建模为图上的双层问题。此外，我们预见了未来有趣的研究方向，因此我们还为此主题提出了一个简短的研究议程。我们的研究中可以塑造未来研究的关键观察结果是，使用 GNN 模型做出的推论的适应度函数评估时间为毫秒量级，这表明了对新颖启发式方法的机会和需求：1）可以很好地应对深度学习模型提供的噪声适应度函数值，2）可以使用评估步骤的显着提高的效率来有效（而不是高效）地探索搜索空间。这为现代元启发法开辟了一条新途径，这些元启发法是为与人工智能驱动的预测器一起使用而设计的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与元启发式算法的双层网络设计问题解决框架。
AI.motivation: 传统精确求解方法计算效率低，需开发适用于基础设施规划的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 训练图神经网络近似用户均衡交通分配解，并利用其推断结果作为遗传算法适应度函数，求解网络设计问题。
AI.result: 在三个测试网络上，框架以不足精确方法0.5%的时间达到1.5%的解质量差距。
AI.conclusion: 框架可扩展至其他双层图问题，并为结合AI预测器的新型元启发式算法研究提供方向。

search_text: A hybrid deep-learning-metaheuristic framework for bi-level network design problems 用于双层网络设计问题的混合深度学习元启发式框架 This study proposes a hybrid deep-learning-metaheuristic framework with a bi-level architecture for road network design problems (NDPs). We train a graph neural network (GNN) to approximate the solution of the user equilibrium (UE) traffic assignment problem and use inferences made by the trained model to calculate fitness function evaluations of a genetic algorithm (GA) to approximate solutions for NDPs. Using three test networks, two NDP variants and an exact solver as benchmark, we show that on average, our proposed framework can provide solutions within 1.5% gap of the best results in less than 0.5% of the time used by the exact solution procedure. Our framework can be utilized within an expert system for infrastructure planning to determine the best infrastructure planning and management decisions under different scenarios. Given the flexibility of the framework, it can easily be adapted to many other decision problems that can be modeled as bi-level problems on graphs. Moreover, we foreseen interesting future research directions, thus we also put forward a brief research agenda for this topic. The key observation from our research that can shape future research is that the fitness function evaluation time using the inferences made by the GNN model was in the order of milliseconds, which points to an opportunity and a need for novel heuristics that 1) can cope well with noisy fitness function values provided by deep learning models, and 2) can use the significantly enlarged efficiency of the evaluation step to explore the search space effectively (rather than efficiently). This opens a new avenue for a modern class of metaheuristics that are crafted for use with AI-powered predictors. 本研究提出了一种混合深度学习元启发式框架，具有用于道路网络设计问题（NDP）的双层架构。我们训练图神经网络 (GNN) 来近似解决用户均衡 (UE) 流量分配问题，并使用训练模型做出的推论来计算遗传算法 (GA) 的适应度函数评估，以近似 NDP 的解决方案。使用三个测试网络、两个 NDP 变体和一个精确求解器作为基准，我们表明，平均而言，我们提出的框架可以在不到精确求解过程所用时间 0.5% 的时间内提供与最佳结果相差 1.5% 以内的解决方案。我们的框架可以在基础设施规划专家系统中使用，以确定不同场景下的最佳基础设施规划和管理决策。鉴于该框架的灵活性，它可以轻松地适应许多其他决策问题，这些决策问题可以建模为图上的双层问题。此外，我们预见了未来有趣的研究方向，因此我们还为此主题提出了一个简短的研究议程。我们的研究中可以塑造未来研究的关键观察结果是，使用 GNN 模型做出的推论的适应度函数评估时间为毫秒量级，这表明了对新颖启发式方法的机会和需求：1）可以很好地应对深度学习模型提供的噪声适应度函数值，2）可以使用评估步骤的显着提高的效率来有效（而不是高效）地探索搜索空间。这为现代元启发法开辟了一条新途径，这些元启发法是为与人工智能驱动的预测器一起使用而设计的。 本文提出一种结合深度学习与元启发式算法的双层网络设计问题解决框架。 Bahman Madadi,Goncalo Homem de Almeida Correia cs.NE,cs.GT,cs.LG,math.OC

authors_text: Md Shofiqul Islam,Khondokar Fida Hasan,Sunjida Sultana,Shahadat Uddin,Pietro Lio,Julian M. W. Quinn,Mohammad Ali Moni
title: HARDC : A novel ECG-based heartbeat classification method to detect arrhythmia using hierarchical attention based dual structured RNN with dilated CNN
title_zh: HARDC：一种新颖的基于 ECG 的心跳分类方法，使用基于分层注意力的双结构 RNN 和扩张 CNN 来检测心律失常
abstract: In this paper have developed a novel hybrid hierarchical attention-based bidirectional recurrent neural network with dilated CNN (HARDC) method for arrhythmia classification. This solves problems that arise when traditional dilated convolutional neural network (CNN) models disregard the correlation between contexts and gradient dispersion. The proposed HARDC fully exploits the dilated CNN and bidirectional recurrent neural network unit (BiGRU-BiLSTM) architecture to generate fusion features. As a result of incorporating both local and global feature information and an attention mechanism, the model's performance for prediction is improved.By combining the fusion features with a dilated CNN and a hierarchical attention mechanism, the trained HARDC model showed significantly improved classification results and interpretability of feature extraction on the PhysioNet 2017 challenge dataset. Sequential Z-Score normalization, filtering, denoising, and segmentation are used to prepare the raw data for analysis. CGAN (Conditional Generative Adversarial Network) is then used to generate synthetic signals from the processed data. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed HARDC model significantly outperforms other existing models, achieving an accuracy of 99.60\%, F1 score of 98.21\%, a precision of 97.66\%, and recall of 99.60\% using MIT-BIH generated ECG. In addition, this approach substantially reduces run time when using dilated CNN compared to normal convolution. Overall, this hybrid model demonstrates an innovative and cost-effective strategy for ECG signal compression and high-performance ECG recognition. Our results indicate that an automated and highly computed method to classify multiple types of arrhythmia signals holds considerable promise.
summary: In this paper have developed a novel hybrid hierarchical attention-based bidirectional recurrent neural network with dilated CNN (HARDC) method for arrhythmia classification. This solves problems that arise when traditional dilated convolutional neural network (CNN) models disregard the correlation between contexts and gradient dispersion. The proposed HARDC fully exploits the dilated CNN and bidirectional recurrent neural network unit (BiGRU-BiLSTM) architecture to generate fusion features. As a result of incorporating both local and global feature information and an attention mechanism, the model's performance for prediction is improved.By combining the fusion features with a dilated CNN and a hierarchical attention mechanism, the trained HARDC model showed significantly improved classification results and interpretability of feature extraction on the PhysioNet 2017 challenge dataset. Sequential Z-Score normalization, filtering, denoising, and segmentation are used to prepare the raw data for analysis. CGAN (Conditional Generative Adversarial Network) is then used to generate synthetic signals from the processed data. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed HARDC model significantly outperforms other existing models, achieving an accuracy of 99.60\%, F1 score of 98.21\%, a precision of 97.66\%, and recall of 99.60\% using MIT-BIH generated ECG. In addition, this approach substantially reduces run time when using dilated CNN compared to normal convolution. Overall, this hybrid model demonstrates an innovative and cost-effective strategy for ECG signal compression and high-performance ECG recognition. Our results indicate that an automated and highly computed method to classify multiple types of arrhythmia signals holds considerable promise.
abstract_zh: 本文开发了一种新颖的基于混合分层注意力的双向循环神经网络与扩张 CNN (HARDC) 方法，用于心律失常分类。这解决了传统扩张卷积神经网络（CNN）模型忽视上下文和梯度弥散之间的相关性时出现的问题。所提出的 HARDC 充分利用扩张的 CNN 和双向循环神经网络单元 (BiGRU-BiLSTM) 架构来生成融合特征。由于融合了局部和全局特征信息以及注意力机制，模型的预测性能得到了提高。通过将融合特征与扩张的 CNN 和分层注意力机制相结合，训练后的 HARDC 模型在 PhysioNet 2017 挑战数据集上显示出显着改善的分类结果和特征提取的可解释性。使用顺序 Z 分数归一化、过滤、去噪和分割来准备用于分析的原始数据。然后使用 CGAN（条件生成对抗网络）从处理后的数据生成合成信号。实验结果表明，所提出的 HARDC 模型显着优于其他现有模型，使用 MIT-BIH 生成的心电图实现了 99.60% 的准确率、98.21% 的 F1 分数、97.66% 的精度和 99.60% 的召回率。此外，与普通卷积相比，这种方法大大减少了使用扩张 CNN 时的运行时间。总体而言，这种混合模型展示了心电图信号压缩和高性能心电图识别的创新且经济高效的策略。我们的结果表明，一种自动化且高度计算的方法来对多种类型的心律失常信号进行分类具有很大的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ECG信号的新型心律失常分类方法HARDC，结合层次注意力机制与双结构RNN及扩张CNN。
AI.motivation: 传统扩张CNN模型忽视上下文关联与梯度分散问题，导致分类性能不足，需改进特征提取与模型效率。
AI.method: 设计HARDC模型，融合扩张CNN与双向GRU-LSTM结构，引入层次注意力机制，结合CGAN生成合成信号增强数据，采用Z-Score归一化等预处理方法。
AI.result: 在PhysioNet 2017数据集上实现99.60%准确率、98.21% F1分数，较传统模型显著提升，且运行时间缩短。
AI.conclusion: HARDC模型通过混合架构有效提升ECG分类性能与可解释性，为心律失常检测提供高效自动化方案。

authors_text: Jinlong Dong,Milana Komosar,Johannes Vorwerk,Daniel Baumgarten,Jens Haueisen
title: Scatter-based common spatial patterns -- a unified spatial filtering framework
title_zh: 基于散点的常见空间模式——统一的空间过滤框架
abstract: The common spatial pattern (CSP) approach is known as one of the most popular spatial filtering techniques for EEG classification in motor imagery (MI) based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). However, it still suffers some drawbacks such as sensitivity to noise, non-stationarity, and limitation to binary classification.Therefore, we propose a novel spatial filtering framework called scaCSP based on the scatter matrices of spatial covariances of EEG signals, which works generally in both binary and multi-class problems whereas CSP can be cast into our framework as a special case when only the range space of the between-class scatter matrix is used in binary cases.We further propose subspace enhanced scaCSP algorithms which easily permit incorporating more discriminative information contained in other range spaces and null spaces of the between-class and within-class scatter matrices in two scenarios: a nullspace components reduction scenario and an additional spatial filter learning scenario.The proposed algorithms are evaluated on two data sets including 4 MI tasks. The classification performance is compared against state-of-the-art competing algorithms: CSP, Tikhonov regularized CSP (TRCSP), stationary CSP (sCSP) and stationary TRCSP (sTRCSP) in the binary problems whilst multi-class extensions of CSP based on pair-wise and one-versus-rest techniques in the multi-class problems. The results show that the proposed framework outperforms all the competing algorithms in terms of average classification accuracy and computational efficiency in both binary and multi-class problems.The proposed scsCSP works as a unified framework for general multi-class problems and is promising for improving the performance of MI-BCIs.
summary: The common spatial pattern (CSP) approach is known as one of the most popular spatial filtering techniques for EEG classification in motor imagery (MI) based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). However, it still suffers some drawbacks such as sensitivity to noise, non-stationarity, and limitation to binary classification.Therefore, we propose a novel spatial filtering framework called scaCSP based on the scatter matrices of spatial covariances of EEG signals, which works generally in both binary and multi-class problems whereas CSP can be cast into our framework as a special case when only the range space of the between-class scatter matrix is used in binary cases.We further propose subspace enhanced scaCSP algorithms which easily permit incorporating more discriminative information contained in other range spaces and null spaces of the between-class and within-class scatter matrices in two scenarios: a nullspace components reduction scenario and an additional spatial filter learning scenario.The proposed algorithms are evaluated on two data sets including 4 MI tasks. The classification performance is compared against state-of-the-art competing algorithms: CSP, Tikhonov regularized CSP (TRCSP), stationary CSP (sCSP) and stationary TRCSP (sTRCSP) in the binary problems whilst multi-class extensions of CSP based on pair-wise and one-versus-rest techniques in the multi-class problems. The results show that the proposed framework outperforms all the competing algorithms in terms of average classification accuracy and computational efficiency in both binary and multi-class problems.The proposed scsCSP works as a unified framework for general multi-class problems and is promising for improving the performance of MI-BCIs.
abstract_zh: 通用空间模式（CSP）方法被认为是基于运动想象（MI）的脑机接口（BCI）中最流行的脑电图分类空间过滤技术之一。然而，它仍然存在一些缺点，如对噪声敏感、非平稳性和二元分类的限制等。因此，我们提出了一种基于脑电信号空间协方差散布矩阵的新型空间滤波框架 scaCSP，该框架通常适用于二元和多类问题，而当在二元情况下仅使用类间散布矩阵的范围空间时，CSP 可以作为特殊情况放入我们的框架中。我们进一步提出了子空间增强 scaCSP 算法它很容易允许在两种情况下合并类间和类内散布矩阵的其他范围空间和零空间中包含的更具辨别力的信息：零空间分量减少场景和附加空间滤波器学习场景。所提出的算法在包括 4 个 MI 任务的两个数据集上进行评估。分类性能与最先进的竞争算法进行了比较：二元问题中的 CSP、Tikhonov 正则化 CSP (TRCSP)、固定 CSP (sCSP) 和固定 TRCSP (sTRCSP)，而多类问题中基于成对和一对一技术的 CSP 多类扩展。结果表明，所提出的框架在二元和多类问题的平均分类精度和计算效率方面均优于所有竞争算法。所提出的 scsCSP 作为一般多类问题的统一框架，有望提高 MI-BCI 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于散度矩阵的统一空间滤波框架scaCSP，用于改进脑电信号分类中的常见空间模式（CSP）方法。
AI.motivation: 传统CSP方法存在对噪声敏感、非平稳性问题及仅适用于二分类任务的局限性，需开发更鲁棒且适用于多分类的改进框架。
AI.method: 通过构建脑电信号空间协方差的散度矩阵，提出scaCSP框架，并引入子空间增强算法以利用类间/类内散度矩阵的零空间和范围空间信息。
AI.result: 在包含4个运动想象任务的两个数据集上，scaCSP在二分类和多分类问题中均优于CSP、TRCSP、sCSP等现有算法，具有更高的分类准确率和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: scaCSP作为统一的多分类框架，为提升运动想象脑机接口性能提供了有效解决方案。
