search_text: Scatter-based common spatial patterns -- a unified spatial filtering framework 基于散点的常见空间模式——统一的空间过滤框架 The common spatial pattern (CSP) approach is known as one of the most popular spatial filtering techniques for EEG classification in motor imagery (MI) based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). However, it still suffers some drawbacks such as sensitivity to noise, non-stationarity, and limitation to binary classification.Therefore, we propose a novel spatial filtering framework called scaCSP based on the scatter matrices of spatial covariances of EEG signals, which works generally in both binary and multi-class problems whereas CSP can be cast into our framework as a special case when only the range space of the between-class scatter matrix is used in binary cases.We further propose subspace enhanced scaCSP algorithms which easily permit incorporating more discriminative information contained in other range spaces and null spaces of the between-class and within-class scatter matrices in two scenarios: a nullspace components reduction scenario and an additional spatial filter learning scenario.The proposed algorithms are evaluated on two data sets including 4 MI tasks. The classification performance is compared against state-of-the-art competing algorithms: CSP, Tikhonov regularized CSP (TRCSP), stationary CSP (sCSP) and stationary TRCSP (sTRCSP) in the binary problems whilst multi-class extensions of CSP based on pair-wise and one-versus-rest techniques in the multi-class problems. The results show that the proposed framework outperforms all the competing algorithms in terms of average classification accuracy and computational efficiency in both binary and multi-class problems.The proposed scsCSP works as a unified framework for general multi-class problems and is promising for improving the performance of MI-BCIs. 通用空间模式（CSP）方法被认为是基于运动想象（MI）的脑机接口（BCI）中最流行的脑电图分类空间过滤技术之一。然而，它仍然存在一些缺点，如对噪声敏感、非平稳性和二元分类的限制等。因此，我们提出了一种基于脑电信号空间协方差散布矩阵的新型空间滤波框架 scaCSP，该框架通常适用于二元和多类问题，而当在二元情况下仅使用类间散布矩阵的范围空间时，CSP 可以作为特殊情况放入我们的框架中。我们进一步提出了子空间增强 scaCSP 算法它很容易允许在两种情况下合并类间和类内散布矩阵的其他范围空间和零空间中包含的更具辨别力的信息：零空间分量减少场景和附加空间滤波器学习场景。所提出的算法在包括 4 个 MI 任务的两个数据集上进行评估。分类性能与最先进的竞争算法进行了比较：二元问题中的 CSP、Tikhonov 正则化 CSP (TRCSP)、固定 CSP (sCSP) 和固定 TRCSP (sTRCSP)，而多类问题中基于成对和一对一技术的 CSP 多类扩展。结果表明，所提出的框架在二元和多类问题的平均分类精度和计算效率方面均优于所有竞争算法。所提出的 scsCSP 作为一般多类问题的统一框架，有望提高 MI-BCI 的性能。 本文提出了一种基于散度矩阵的统一空间滤波框架scaCSP，用于改进脑电信号分类中的常见空间模式（CSP）方法。 Jinlong Dong,Milana Komosar,Johannes Vorwerk,Daniel Baumgarten,Jens Haueisen eess.SP,cs.HC,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Linghan Zhong,Ryan Lindeborg,Jesse Zhang,Joseph J. Lim,Shao-Hua Sun
title: Hierarchical Neural Program Synthesis
title_zh: 分层神经程序合成
abstract: Program synthesis aims to automatically construct human-readable programs that satisfy given task specifications, such as input/output pairs or demonstrations. Recent works have demonstrated encouraging results in a variety of domains, such as string transformation, tensor manipulation, and describing behaviors of embodied agents. Most existing program synthesis methods are designed to synthesize programs from scratch, generating a program token by token, line by line. This fundamentally prevents these methods from scaling up to synthesize programs that are longer or more complex. In this work, we present a scalable program synthesis framework that instead synthesizes a program by hierarchically composing programs. Specifically, we first learn a task embedding space and a program decoder that can decode a task embedding into a program. Then, we train a high-level module to comprehend the task specification (e.g., input/output pairs or demonstrations) from long programs and produce a sequence of task embeddings, which are then decoded by the program decoder and composed to yield the synthesized program. We extensively evaluate our proposed framework in a string transformation domain with input/output pairs. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework can synthesize programs that are significantly longer and more complex than the programs considered in prior program synthesis works. Website at https://thoughtp0lice.github.io/hnps_web/
summary: Program synthesis aims to automatically construct human-readable programs that satisfy given task specifications, such as input/output pairs or demonstrations. Recent works have demonstrated encouraging results in a variety of domains, such as string transformation, tensor manipulation, and describing behaviors of embodied agents. Most existing program synthesis methods are designed to synthesize programs from scratch, generating a program token by token, line by line. This fundamentally prevents these methods from scaling up to synthesize programs that are longer or more complex. In this work, we present a scalable program synthesis framework that instead synthesizes a program by hierarchically composing programs. Specifically, we first learn a task embedding space and a program decoder that can decode a task embedding into a program. Then, we train a high-level module to comprehend the task specification (e.g., input/output pairs or demonstrations) from long programs and produce a sequence of task embeddings, which are then decoded by the program decoder and composed to yield the synthesized program. We extensively evaluate our proposed framework in a string transformation domain with input/output pairs. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework can synthesize programs that are significantly longer and more complex than the programs considered in prior program synthesis works. Website at https://thoughtp0lice.github.io/hnps_web/
abstract_zh: 程序综合旨在自动构建满足给定任务规范的人类可读程序，例如输入/输出对或演示。最近的工作在多个领域展示了令人鼓舞的结果，例如字符串变换、张量操作和描述实体的行为。大多数现有的程序合成方法都是从头开始合成程序，逐个令牌、逐行生成程序令牌。这从根本上阻止了这些方法扩大规模以合成更长或更复杂的程序。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个可扩展的程序综合框架，它通过分层组合程序来综合程序。具体来说，我们首先学习一个任务嵌入空间和一个可以将任务嵌入解码到程序中的程序解码器。然后，我们训练一个高级模块来理解长程序中的任务规范（例如，输入/输出对或演示）并生成一系列任务嵌入，然后由程序解码器解码并组合以产生合成程序。我们在具有输入/输出对的字符串转换域中广泛评估了我们提出的框架。实验结果表明，所提出的框架可以合成比先前程序合成工作中考虑的程序明显更长、更复杂的程序。网站 https://thoughtp0lice.github.io/hnps_web/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的分层神经程序合成框架，通过分层组合程序来生成更长更复杂的程序。
AI.motivation: 现有程序合成方法逐行生成程序，难以扩展到长而复杂的程序，需解决可扩展性问题。
AI.method: 学习任务嵌入空间和程序解码器，通过高层模块生成任务嵌入序列并解码组合，实现分层程序合成。
AI.result: 在字符串转换领域实验表明，该框架能合成显著长于和复杂于先前工作的程序。
AI.conclusion: 分层合成方法有效提升了程序合成的可扩展性，可生成更复杂的程序。

authors_text: Qingming Li,H. Vicky Zhao
title: Probe: Learning Users' Personalized Projection Bias in Intertemporal Choices
title_zh: 探究：学习用户在跨期选择中的个性化投射偏差
abstract: Intertemporal choices involve making decisions that require weighing the costs in the present against the benefits in the future. One specific type of intertemporal choice is the decision between purchasing an individual item or opting for a bundle that includes that item. Previous research assumes that individuals have accurate expectations of the factors involved in these choices. However, in reality, users' perceptions of these factors are often biased, leading to irrational and suboptimal decision-making. In this work, we specifically focus on two commonly observed biases: projection bias and the reference-point effect. To address these biases, we propose a novel bias-embedded preference model called Probe. The Probe incorporates a weight function to capture users' projection bias and a value function to account for the reference-point effect, and introduce prospect theory from behavioral economics to combine the weight and value functions. This allows us to determine the probability of users selecting the bundle or a single item. We provide a thorough theoretical analysis to demonstrate the impact of projection bias on the design of bundle sales strategies. Through experimental results, we show that the proposed Probe model outperforms existing methods and contributes to a better understanding of users' irrational behaviors in bundle purchases. This investigation can facilitate a deeper comprehension of users' decision-making mechanisms, enable the provision of personalized services, and assist users in making more rational and optimal decisions.
summary: Intertemporal choices involve making decisions that require weighing the costs in the present against the benefits in the future. One specific type of intertemporal choice is the decision between purchasing an individual item or opting for a bundle that includes that item. Previous research assumes that individuals have accurate expectations of the factors involved in these choices. However, in reality, users' perceptions of these factors are often biased, leading to irrational and suboptimal decision-making. In this work, we specifically focus on two commonly observed biases: projection bias and the reference-point effect. To address these biases, we propose a novel bias-embedded preference model called Probe. The Probe incorporates a weight function to capture users' projection bias and a value function to account for the reference-point effect, and introduce prospect theory from behavioral economics to combine the weight and value functions. This allows us to determine the probability of users selecting the bundle or a single item. We provide a thorough theoretical analysis to demonstrate the impact of projection bias on the design of bundle sales strategies. Through experimental results, we show that the proposed Probe model outperforms existing methods and contributes to a better understanding of users' irrational behaviors in bundle purchases. This investigation can facilitate a deeper comprehension of users' decision-making mechanisms, enable the provision of personalized services, and assist users in making more rational and optimal decisions.
abstract_zh: 跨期选择涉及做出需要权衡当前成本与未来收益的决策。一种特定类型的跨期选择是在购买单个商品还是选择包含该商品的捆绑包之间做出决定。先前的研究假设个人对这些选择所涉及的因素有准确的期望。然而，现实中，用户对这些因素的认知往往存在偏差，从而导致不理性和次优的决策。在这项工作中，我们特别关注两种常见的偏差：投影偏差和参考点效应。为了解决这些偏见，我们提出了一种新颖的嵌入偏见的偏好模型，称为 Probe。该探针结合了一个权重函数来捕捉用户的预测偏差和一个价值函数来解释参考点效应，并引入行为经济学的前景理论将权重函数和价值函数结合起来。这使我们能够确定用户选择捆绑包或单个项目的概率。我们提供了全面的理论分析来证明预测偏差对捆绑销售策略设计的影响。通过实验结果，我们表明所提出的 Probe 模型优于现有方法，有助于更好地理解用户在捆绑购买中的非理性行为。这项调查有助于更深入地了解用户的决策机制，提供个性化服务，帮助用户做出更理性、更优化的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Probe模型，通过捕捉用户的投影偏差和参考点效应，改进对跨期选择中捆绑购买决策的建模。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设用户对跨期选择因素有准确预期，但实际中用户感知存在偏差导致非理性决策，需针对性建模以优化策略设计。
AI.method: 基于行为经济学前景理论，设计包含权重函数（捕捉投影偏差）和价值函数（反映参考点效应）的Probe模型，结合概率计算用户选择倾向。
AI.result: 实验表明Probe模型优于现有方法，能更准确揭示用户捆绑购买中的非理性行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了对用户决策机制的理解，可支持个性化服务设计并辅助用户做出更优决策。

search_text: Probe: Learning Users' Personalized Projection Bias in Intertemporal Choices 探究：学习用户在跨期选择中的个性化投射偏差 Intertemporal choices involve making decisions that require weighing the costs in the present against the benefits in the future. One specific type of intertemporal choice is the decision between purchasing an individual item or opting for a bundle that includes that item. Previous research assumes that individuals have accurate expectations of the factors involved in these choices. However, in reality, users' perceptions of these factors are often biased, leading to irrational and suboptimal decision-making. In this work, we specifically focus on two commonly observed biases: projection bias and the reference-point effect. To address these biases, we propose a novel bias-embedded preference model called Probe. The Probe incorporates a weight function to capture users' projection bias and a value function to account for the reference-point effect, and introduce prospect theory from behavioral economics to combine the weight and value functions. This allows us to determine the probability of users selecting the bundle or a single item. We provide a thorough theoretical analysis to demonstrate the impact of projection bias on the design of bundle sales strategies. Through experimental results, we show that the proposed Probe model outperforms existing methods and contributes to a better understanding of users' irrational behaviors in bundle purchases. This investigation can facilitate a deeper comprehension of users' decision-making mechanisms, enable the provision of personalized services, and assist users in making more rational and optimal decisions. 跨期选择涉及做出需要权衡当前成本与未来收益的决策。一种特定类型的跨期选择是在购买单个商品还是选择包含该商品的捆绑包之间做出决定。先前的研究假设个人对这些选择所涉及的因素有准确的期望。然而，现实中，用户对这些因素的认知往往存在偏差，从而导致不理性和次优的决策。在这项工作中，我们特别关注两种常见的偏差：投影偏差和参考点效应。为了解决这些偏见，我们提出了一种新颖的嵌入偏见的偏好模型，称为 Probe。该探针结合了一个权重函数来捕捉用户的预测偏差和一个价值函数来解释参考点效应，并引入行为经济学的前景理论将权重函数和价值函数结合起来。这使我们能够确定用户选择捆绑包或单个项目的概率。我们提供了全面的理论分析来证明预测偏差对捆绑销售策略设计的影响。通过实验结果，我们表明所提出的 Probe 模型优于现有方法，有助于更好地理解用户在捆绑购买中的非理性行为。这项调查有助于更深入地了解用户的决策机制，提供个性化服务，帮助用户做出更理性、更优化的决策。 本文提出Probe模型，通过捕捉用户的投影偏差和参考点效应，改进对跨期选择中捆绑购买决策的建模。 Qingming Li,H. Vicky Zhao cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Mathieu Pagé-Fortin,Brahim Chaib-draa
title: Dynamic Y-KD: A Hybrid Approach to Continual Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 动态 Y-KD：连续实例分割的混合方法
abstract: Despite the success of deep learning models on instance segmentation, current methods still suffer from catastrophic forgetting in continual learning scenarios. In this paper, our contributions for continual instance segmentation are threefold. First, we propose the Y-knowledge distillation (Y-KD), a technique that shares a common feature extractor between the teacher and student networks. As the teacher is also updated with new data in Y-KD, the increased plasticity results in new modules that are specialized on new classes. Second, our Y-KD approach is supported by a dynamic architecture method that trains task-specific modules with a unique instance segmentation head, thereby significantly reducing forgetting. Third, we complete our approach by leveraging checkpoint averaging as a simple method to manually balance the trade-off between performance on the various sets of classes, thus increasing control over the model's behavior without any additional cost. These contributions are united in our model that we name the Dynamic Y-KD network. We perform extensive experiments on several single-step and multi-steps incremental learning scenarios, and we show that our approach outperforms previous methods both on past and new classes. For instance, compared to recent work, our method obtains +2.1% mAP on old classes in 15-1, +7.6% mAP on new classes in 19-1 and reaches 91.5% of the mAP obtained by joint-training on all classes in 15-5.
summary: Despite the success of deep learning models on instance segmentation, current methods still suffer from catastrophic forgetting in continual learning scenarios. In this paper, our contributions for continual instance segmentation are threefold. First, we propose the Y-knowledge distillation (Y-KD), a technique that shares a common feature extractor between the teacher and student networks. As the teacher is also updated with new data in Y-KD, the increased plasticity results in new modules that are specialized on new classes. Second, our Y-KD approach is supported by a dynamic architecture method that trains task-specific modules with a unique instance segmentation head, thereby significantly reducing forgetting. Third, we complete our approach by leveraging checkpoint averaging as a simple method to manually balance the trade-off between performance on the various sets of classes, thus increasing control over the model's behavior without any additional cost. These contributions are united in our model that we name the Dynamic Y-KD network. We perform extensive experiments on several single-step and multi-steps incremental learning scenarios, and we show that our approach outperforms previous methods both on past and new classes. For instance, compared to recent work, our method obtains +2.1% mAP on old classes in 15-1, +7.6% mAP on new classes in 19-1 and reaches 91.5% of the mAP obtained by joint-training on all classes in 15-5.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习模型在实例分割方面取得了成功，但当前的方法在持续学习场景中仍然遭受灾难性遗忘。在本文中，我们对连续实例分割的贡献有三个方面。首先，我们提出了 Y 知识蒸馏（Y-KD），这是一种在教师和学生网络之间共享公共特征提取器的技术。由于教师也使用 Y-KD 中的新数据进行更新，可塑性的增加导致专门针对新课程的新模块。其次，我们的 Y-KD 方法得到了动态架构方法的支持，该方法使用独特的实例分割头来训练特定于任务的模块，从而显着减少遗忘。第三，我们通过利用检查点平均作为一种简单的方法来完成我们的方法，以手动平衡各种类集的性能之间的权衡，从而增强对模型行为的控制，而无需任何额外成本。这些贡献统一在我们的模型中，我们将其命名为动态 Y-KD 网络。我们对几个单步和多步增量学习场景进行了广泛的实验，我们表明我们的方法在过去和新的课程上都优于以前的方法。例如，与最近的工作相比，我们的方法在 15-1 中在旧类上获得了 +2.1% mAP，在 19-1 中在新类上获得了 +7.6% mAP，并达到了 15-5 中所有类联合训练获得的 mAP 的 91.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dynamic Y-KD的混合方法，用于解决持续实例分割中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在实例分割任务中取得成功，但现有方法在持续学习场景中仍面临灾难性遗忘问题，需在新旧类任务间保持性能平衡。
AI.method: 提出Y-KD知识蒸馏技术，通过共享教师网络与学生网络的特征提取器，并动态更新任务特定模块；结合检查点平均法手动平衡新旧类性能，无需额外成本。
AI.result: 在多个增量学习场景中，Dynamic Y-KD在旧类任务上较现有方法提升2.1% mAP（如15-1场景），新类任务提升7.6% mAP（如19-1场景），且达到联合训练91.5%的mAP性能（15-5场景）。
AI.conclusion: Dynamic Y-KD通过动态架构与知识蒸馏有效缓解灾难性遗忘，在持续实例分割任务中显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Olaf Wysocki,Eleonora Grilli,Ludwig Hoegner,Uwe Stilla
title: Combining visibility analysis and deep learning for refinement of semantic 3D building models by conflict classification
title_zh: 结合可见性分析和深度学习，通过冲突分类细化语义 3D 建筑模型
abstract: Semantic 3D building models are widely available and used in numerous applications. Such 3D building models display rich semantics but no façade openings, chiefly owing to their aerial acquisition techniques. Hence, refining models' façades using dense, street-level, terrestrial point clouds seems a promising strategy. In this paper, we propose a method of combining visibility analysis and neural networks for enriching 3D models with window and door features. In the method, occupancy voxels are fused with classified point clouds, which provides semantics to voxels. Voxels are also used to identify conflicts between laser observations and 3D models. The semantic voxels and conflicts are combined in a Bayesian network to classify and delineate façade openings, which are reconstructed using a 3D model library. Unaffected building semantics is preserved while the updated one is added, thereby upgrading the building model to LoD3. Moreover, Bayesian network results are back-projected onto point clouds to improve points' classification accuracy. We tested our method on a municipal CityGML LoD2 repository and the open point cloud datasets: TUM-MLS-2016 and TUM-FAÇADE. Validation results revealed that the method improves the accuracy of point cloud semantic segmentation and upgrades buildings with façade elements. The method can be applied to enhance the accuracy of urban simulations and facilitate the development of semantic segmentation algorithms.

Such 3D building models display rich semantics but no façade openings, chiefly owing to their aerial acquisition techniques. The semantic voxels and conflicts are combined in a Bayesian network to classify and delineate façade openings, which are reconstructed using a 3D model library. Unaffected building semantics is preserved while the updated one is added, thereby upgrading the building model to LoD3. Moreover, Bayesian network results are back-projected onto point clouds to improve points' classification accuracy. We tested our method on a municipal CityGML LoD2 repository and the open point cloud datasets: TUM-MLS-2016 and TUM-FAÇADE. Validation results revealed that the method improves the accuracy of point cloud semantic segmentation and upgrades buildings with façade elements. The method can be applied to enhance the accuracy of urban simulations and facilitate the development of semantic segmentation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 语义 3D 建筑模型广泛可用并用于众多应用中。此类 3D 建筑模型显示丰富的语义，但没有立面开口，这主要归功于其空中采集技术。因此，使用密集的街道级地面点云来细化模型的外观似乎是一种有前途的策略。在本文中，我们提出了一种将可见性分析和神经网络相结合的方法，以丰富具有门窗特征的 3D 模型。在该方法中，占用体素与分类点云融合，这为体素提供了语义。体素还用于识别激光观测和 3D 模型之间的冲突。语义体素和冲突在贝叶斯网络中组合，以对立面开口进行分类和描绘，并使用 3D 模型库进行重建。未受影响的建筑语义被保留，同时添加了更新的语义，从而将建筑模型升级到 LoD3。此外，贝叶斯网络结果被反投影到点云上，以提高点的分类精度。我们在市政 CityGML LoD2 存储库和开放点云数据集：TUM-MLS-2016 和 TUM-FAÇADE 上测试了我们的方法。验证结果表明，该方法提高了点云语义分割的准确性，并对建筑立面元素进行了升级。该方法可用于提高城市模拟的准确性并促进语义分割算法的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合可见性分析与深度学习的方法，通过冲突分类优化语义化3D建筑模型的立面细节。
AI.motivation: 现有3D建筑模型因依赖航拍技术而缺乏立面开口信息，需利用地面点云数据进行精细化建模。
AI.method: 融合占用体素与分类点云赋予语义，利用贝叶斯网络识别激光观测与模型冲突，结合3D模型库重建立面开口。
AI.result: 方法提升了点云语义分割精度，将建筑模型升级至LoD3，验证数据集包括CityGML及TUM-MLS-2016等。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可增强城市模拟精度，并为语义分割算法开发提供有效支持。

We tested our method on a municipal CityGML LoD2 repository and the open point cloud datasets: TUM-MLS-2016 and TUM-FAÇADE. Validation results revealed that the method improves the accuracy of point cloud semantic segmentation and upgrades buildings with façade elements. The method can be applied to enhance the accuracy of urban simulations and facilitate the development of semantic segmentation algorithms. 语义 3D 建筑模型广泛可用并用于众多应用中。此类 3D 建筑模型显示丰富的语义，但没有立面开口，这主要归功于其空中采集技术。因此，使用密集的街道级地面点云来细化模型的外观似乎是一种有前途的策略。在本文中，我们提出了一种将可见性分析和神经网络相结合的方法，以丰富具有门窗特征的 3D 模型。在该方法中，占用体素与分类点云融合，这为体素提供了语义。体素还用于识别激光观测和 3D 模型之间的冲突。语义体素和冲突在贝叶斯网络中组合，以对立面开口进行分类和描绘，并使用 3D 模型库进行重建。未受影响的建筑语义被保留，同时添加了更新的语义，从而将建筑模型升级到 LoD3。此外，贝叶斯网络结果被反投影到点云上，以提高点的分类精度。我们在市政 CityGML LoD2 存储库和开放点云数据集：TUM-MLS-2016 和 TUM-FAÇADE 上测试了我们的方法。验证结果表明，该方法提高了点云语义分割的准确性，并对建筑立面元素进行了升级。该方法可用于提高城市模拟的准确性并促进语义分割算法的开发。 本文提出结合可见性分析与深度学习的方法，通过冲突分类优化语义化3D建筑模型的立面细节。 Olaf Wysocki,Eleonora Grilli,Ludwig Hoegner,Uwe Stilla cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiwei Zhang,Yuliang Liu
title: Accountable Textual-Visual Chat Learns to Reject Human Instructions in Image Re-creation
title_zh: 负责任的文本视觉聊天学会在图像重新创建中拒绝人类指令
abstract: The recent success of ChatGPT and GPT-4 has drawn widespread attention to multimodal dialogue systems. However, there is a lack of datasets in the academic community that can effectively evaluate the multimodal generation capabilities of Visual Language Models (VLMs) in textual-visual chat tasks. In this paper, we address this gap by introducing two novel multimodal datasets: the synthetic CLEVR-ATVC dataset (620K) and the manually pictured Fruit-ATVC dataset (50K). These datasets incorporate both visual and text-based inputs and outputs. Furthermore, to facilitate the accountability of multimodal systems in rejecting human requests, similar to language-based ChatGPT conversations, we introduce specific rules as supervisory signals within the datasets. This allows the trained VLM to provide a yes or no answer after engaging in visual and textual reasoning, accompanied by a language explanation to clarify the reasons behind the inability to execute the given human instruction. Our proposed method involves a two-stage training procedure, which includes training the image auto-encoder and the auto-regressive transformer from scratch. The first stage employs a discrete variational autoencoder (dVAE) to compress each image into concise tokens, which are then combined with text tokens into a single data stream. This stream is subsequently fed into the decoder-based transformer to generate visual re-creations and textual feedback in the second stage. We conduct comprehensive analyses of experimental results, focusing on re-created image quality, answer accuracy, and the model's behavior when faced with uncertainty and imperfect user queries. Through our explorations and findings, we aim to contribute valuable insights into the accountability of textual-visual generative models.
summary: The recent success of ChatGPT and GPT-4 has drawn widespread attention to multimodal dialogue systems. However, there is a lack of datasets in the academic community that can effectively evaluate the multimodal generation capabilities of Visual Language Models (VLMs) in textual-visual chat tasks. In this paper, we address this gap by introducing two novel multimodal datasets: the synthetic CLEVR-ATVC dataset (620K) and the manually pictured Fruit-ATVC dataset (50K). These datasets incorporate both visual and text-based inputs and outputs. Furthermore, to facilitate the accountability of multimodal systems in rejecting human requests, similar to language-based ChatGPT conversations, we introduce specific rules as supervisory signals within the datasets. This allows the trained VLM to provide a yes or no answer after engaging in visual and textual reasoning, accompanied by a language explanation to clarify the reasons behind the inability to execute the given human instruction. Our proposed method involves a two-stage training procedure, which includes training the image auto-encoder and the auto-regressive transformer from scratch. The first stage employs a discrete variational autoencoder (dVAE) to compress each image into concise tokens, which are then combined with text tokens into a single data stream. This stream is subsequently fed into the decoder-based transformer to generate visual re-creations and textual feedback in the second stage. We conduct comprehensive analyses of experimental results, focusing on re-created image quality, answer accuracy, and the model's behavior when faced with uncertainty and imperfect user queries. Through our explorations and findings, we aim to contribute valuable insights into the accountability of textual-visual generative models.
abstract_zh: ChatGPT 和 GPT-4 最近的成功引起了人们对多模态对话系统的广泛关注。然而，学术界缺乏能够有效评估视觉语言模型（VLM）在文本-视觉聊天任务中的多模态生成能力的数据集。在本文中，我们通过引入两个新颖的多模态数据集来解决这一差距：合成的 CLEVR-ATVC 数据集（620K）和手动拍摄的 Fruit-ATVC 数据集（50K）。这些数据集包含视觉和基于文本的输入和输出。此外，为了促进多模式系统拒绝人类请求的责任，类似于基于语言的 ChatGPT 对话，我们在数据集中引入了特定的规则作为监督信号。这使得训练有素的 VLM 在进行视觉和文本推理后能够提供是或否的答案，并附有语言解释，以澄清无法执行给定人类指令的原因。我们提出的方法涉及两阶段训练过程，其中包括从头开始训练图像自动编码器和自回归变压器。第一阶段采用离散变分自动编码器（dVAE）将每个图像压缩为简洁的标记，然后将其与文本标记组合成单个数据流。该流随后被输入基于解码器的转换器，以在第二阶段生成视觉重建和文本反馈。我们对实验结果进行全面分析，重点关注重新创建的图像质量、答案准确性以及模型在面对不确定性和不完美的用户查询时的行为。通过我们的探索和发现，我们的目标是为文本视觉生成模型的责任提供有价值的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种多模态数据集及可解释的视觉语言模型训练方法，用于在文本-视觉对话任务中实现图像重生成与人类指令拒绝的问责机制。
AI.motivation: 现有学术界缺乏有效评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）多模态生成能力的数据集，且需建立类似ChatGPT的问责机制以处理用户指令的拒绝与解释。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练流程：第一阶段使用离散变分自编码器（dVAE）压缩图像为紧凑token，与文本token融合后输入解码器Transformer，生成图像重生成结果及文本反馈。
AI.result: 实验验证了重生成图像质量、回答准确性及模型在处理不确定性和不完整用户查询时的行为表现，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建新型数据集与训练框架，为文本-视觉生成模型的问责机制提供了可复用的技术方案与研究洞察。

authors_text: Tom van Sonsbeek,Mohammad Mahdi Derakhshani,Ivona Najdenkoska,Cees G. M. Snoek,Marcel Worring
title: Open-Ended Medical Visual Question Answering Through Prefix Tuning of Language Models
title_zh: 通过语言模型前缀调整的开放式医学视觉问答
abstract: Medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) is an important challenge, as it would lead to faster and more accurate diagnoses and treatment decisions. Most existing methods approach it as a multi-class classification problem, which restricts the outcome to a predefined closed-set of curated answers. We focus on open-ended VQA and motivated by the recent advances in language models consider it as a generative task. Leveraging pre-trained language models, we introduce a novel method particularly suited for small, domain-specific, medical datasets. To properly communicate the medical images to the language model, we develop a network that maps the extracted visual features to a set of learnable tokens. Then, alongside the question, these learnable tokens directly prompt the language model. We explore recent parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategies for language models, which allow for resource- and data-efficient fine-tuning. We evaluate our approach on the prime medical VQA benchmarks, namely, Slake, OVQA and PathVQA. The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing methods across various training settings while also being computationally efficient.
summary: Medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) is an important challenge, as it would lead to faster and more accurate diagnoses and treatment decisions. Most existing methods approach it as a multi-class classification problem, which restricts the outcome to a predefined closed-set of curated answers. We focus on open-ended VQA and motivated by the recent advances in language models consider it as a generative task. Leveraging pre-trained language models, we introduce a novel method particularly suited for small, domain-specific, medical datasets. To properly communicate the medical images to the language model, we develop a network that maps the extracted visual features to a set of learnable tokens. Then, alongside the question, these learnable tokens directly prompt the language model. We explore recent parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategies for language models, which allow for resource- and data-efficient fine-tuning. We evaluate our approach on the prime medical VQA benchmarks, namely, Slake, OVQA and PathVQA. The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing methods across various training settings while also being computationally efficient.
abstract_zh: 医学视觉问答 (VQA) 是一项重要的挑战，因为它将带来更快、更准确的诊断和治疗决策。大多数现有方法将其视为多类分类问题，这将结果限制为预定义的封闭组精选答案。我们专注于开放式 VQA，并受到语言模型最新进展的推动，将其视为一项生成任务。利用预先训练的语言模型，我们引入了一种特别适合小型、特定领域的医学数据集的新颖方法。为了将医学图像正确地传达给语言模型，我们开发了一个网络，将提取的视觉特征映射到一组可学习的标记。然后，与问题一起，这些可学习的标记直接提示语言模型。我们探索了最近的语言模型参数高效微调策略，该策略允许资源和数据高效的微调。我们根据主要医疗 VQA 基准（即 Slake、OVQA 和 PathVQA）评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法在各种训练环境中都优于现有方法，同时计算效率也很高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语言模型前缀调优的开放性医学视觉问答方法，解决传统封闭式答案限制的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉问答方法多采用封闭式分类，限制了答案多样性。开放性问答能更灵活应对复杂医疗场景，但需处理小数据集和高效调优的挑战。
AI.method: 通过预训练语言模型，将医学图像的视觉特征映射为可学习的token序列，作为前缀提示语言模型生成答案，并采用参数高效微调策略优化模型。
AI.result: 在Slake、OVQA和PathVQA基准测试中，该方法在多种训练设置下均优于现有方法，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 前缀调优方法有效提升了开放性医学视觉问答性能，为小数据医疗场景提供了高效解决方案。

The results demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing methods across various training settings while also being computationally efficient. 医学视觉问答 (VQA) 是一项重要的挑战，因为它将带来更快、更准确的诊断和治疗决策。大多数现有方法将其视为多类分类问题，这将结果限制为预定义的封闭组精选答案。我们专注于开放式 VQA，并受到语言模型最新进展的推动，将其视为一项生成任务。利用预先训练的语言模型，我们引入了一种特别适合小型、特定领域的医学数据集的新颖方法。为了将医学图像正确地传达给语言模型，我们开发了一个网络，将提取的视觉特征映射到一组可学习的标记。然后，与问题一起，这些可学习的标记直接提示语言模型。我们探索了最近的语言模型参数高效微调策略，该策略允许资源和数据高效的微调。我们根据主要医疗 VQA 基准（即 Slake、OVQA 和 PathVQA）评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法在各种训练环境中都优于现有方法，同时计算效率也很高。 本文提出一种基于语言模型前缀调优的开放性医学视觉问答方法，解决传统封闭式答案限制的问题。 Tom van Sonsbeek,Mohammad Mahdi Derakhshani,Ivona Najdenkoska,Cees G. M. Snoek,Marcel Worring cs.CV

authors_text: David Quesada,Pedro Larrañaga,Concha Bielza
title: Classifying the evolution of COVID-19 severity on patients with combined dynamic Bayesian networks and neural networks
title_zh: 结合动态贝叶斯网络和神经网络对患者的 COVID-19 严重程度演变进行分类
abstract: When we face patients arriving to a hospital suffering from the effects of some illness, one of the main problems we can encounter is evaluating whether or not said patients are going to require intensive care in the near future. This intensive care requires allotting valuable and scarce resources, and knowing beforehand the severity of a patients illness can improve both its treatment and the organization of resources. We illustrate this issue in a dataset consistent of Spanish COVID-19 patients from the sixth epidemic wave where we label patients as critical when they either had to enter the intensive care unit or passed away. We then combine the use of dynamic Bayesian networks, to forecast the vital signs and the blood analysis results of patients over the next 40 hours, and neural networks, to evaluate the severity of a patients disease in that interval of time. Our empirical results show that the transposition of the current state of a patient to future values with the DBN for its subsequent use in classification obtains better the accuracy and g-mean score than a direct application with a classifier.
summary: When we face patients arriving to a hospital suffering from the effects of some illness, one of the main problems we can encounter is evaluating whether or not said patients are going to require intensive care in the near future. This intensive care requires allotting valuable and scarce resources, and knowing beforehand the severity of a patients illness can improve both its treatment and the organization of resources. We illustrate this issue in a dataset consistent of Spanish COVID-19 patients from the sixth epidemic wave where we label patients as critical when they either had to enter the intensive care unit or passed away. We then combine the use of dynamic Bayesian networks, to forecast the vital signs and the blood analysis results of patients over the next 40 hours, and neural networks, to evaluate the severity of a patients disease in that interval of time. Our empirical results show that the transposition of the current state of a patient to future values with the DBN for its subsequent use in classification obtains better the accuracy and g-mean score than a direct application with a classifier.
abstract_zh: 当我们面对因某种疾病的影响而到达医院的患者时，我们可能遇到的主要问题之一是评估这些患者在不久的将来是否需要重症监护。这种重症监护需要分配宝贵且稀缺的资源，提前了解患者疾病的严重程度可以改善治疗和资源的组织。我们在第六次流行病中西班牙 COVID-19 患者的数据集中说明了这个问题，当患者必须进入重症监护室或死亡时，我们将患者标记为危重患者。然后，我们结合使用动态贝叶斯网络来预测患者在接下来的 40 小时内的生命体征和血液分析结果，并结合神经网络来评估患者在该时间间隔内疾病的严重程度。我们的实证结果表明，与直接应用分类器相比，使用 DBN 将患者的当前状态转置为未来值以便随后用于分类，可以获得更好的准确性和 g 均值得分。

AI.tldr: 本文结合动态贝叶斯网络（DBN）与神经网络，预测COVID-19患者未来40小时的病情严重程度，以辅助医疗资源分配。
AI.motivation: 医院需提前判断患者是否需要重症监护，但传统分类方法难以准确预测病情演变，需更有效的预测模型。
AI.method: 使用动态贝叶斯网络预测患者生命体征与血液指标的未来值，并将结果输入神经网络评估病情严重程度。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于DBN预测值的分类方法在准确率和g-mean指标上优于直接分类方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合DBN与神经网络的预测框架能更准确评估患者病情演变，为临床决策和资源管理提供支持。

authors_text: Chunrui Han,Jinrong Yang,Jianjian Sun,Zheng Ge,Runpei Dong,Hongyu Zhou,Weixin Mao,Yuang Peng,Xiangyu Zhang
title: Exploring Recurrent Long-term Temporal Fusion for Multi-view 3D Perception
title_zh: 探索多视图 3D 感知的循环长期时间融合
abstract: Long-term temporal fusion is a crucial but often overlooked technique in camera-based Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) 3D perception. Existing methods are mostly in a parallel manner. While parallel fusion can benefit from long-term information, it suffers from increasing computational and memory overheads as the fusion window size grows. Alternatively, BEVFormer adopts a recurrent fusion pipeline so that history information can be efficiently integrated, yet it fails to benefit from longer temporal frames. In this paper, we explore an embarrassingly simple long-term recurrent fusion strategy built upon the LSS-based methods and find it already able to enjoy the merits from both sides, i.e., rich long-term information and efficient fusion pipeline. A temporal embedding module is further proposed to improve the model's robustness against occasionally missed frames in practical scenarios. We name this simple but effective fusing pipeline VideoBEV. Experimental results on the nuScenes benchmark show that VideoBEV obtains strong performance on various camera-based 3D perception tasks, including object detection (55.4\% mAP and 62.9\% NDS), segmentation (48.6\% vehicle mIoU), tracking (54.8\% AMOTA), and motion prediction (0.80m minADE and 0.463 EPA).
summary: Long-term temporal fusion is a crucial but often overlooked technique in camera-based Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) 3D perception. Existing methods are mostly in a parallel manner. While parallel fusion can benefit from long-term information, it suffers from increasing computational and memory overheads as the fusion window size grows. Alternatively, BEVFormer adopts a recurrent fusion pipeline so that history information can be efficiently integrated, yet it fails to benefit from longer temporal frames. In this paper, we explore an embarrassingly simple long-term recurrent fusion strategy built upon the LSS-based methods and find it already able to enjoy the merits from both sides, i.e., rich long-term information and efficient fusion pipeline. A temporal embedding module is further proposed to improve the model's robustness against occasionally missed frames in practical scenarios. We name this simple but effective fusing pipeline VideoBEV. Experimental results on the nuScenes benchmark show that VideoBEV obtains strong performance on various camera-based 3D perception tasks, including object detection (55.4\% mAP and 62.9\% NDS), segmentation (48.6\% vehicle mIoU), tracking (54.8\% AMOTA), and motion prediction (0.80m minADE and 0.463 EPA).
abstract_zh: 在基于相机的鸟瞰 (BEV) 3D 感知中，长期时间融合是一项至关重要但经常被忽视的技术。现有方法大多采用并行方式。虽然并行融合可以从长期信息中受益，但随着融合窗口大小的增加，它会遭受计算和内存开销的增加。或者，BEVFormer 采用循环融合管道，以便可以有效地集成历史信息，但它无法从较长的时间帧中受益。在本文中，我们探索了一种基于 LSS 方法的极其简单的长期循环融合策略，发现它已经能够享受双方的优点，即丰富的长期信息和高效的融合管道。进一步提出了时间嵌入模块，以提高模型对实际场景中偶尔丢失帧的鲁棒性。我们将这个简单但有效的融合管道命名为VideoBEV。 nuScenes 基准测试的实验结果表明，VideoBEV 在各种基于相机的 3D 感知任务上获得了强大的性能，包括对象检测（55.4\% mAP 和 62.9\% NDS）、分割（48.6\% 车辆 mIoU）、跟踪（54.8\% AMOTA）和运动预测（0.80m minADE 和 0.463 EPA）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于长期递归融合的多视角3D感知方法VideoBEV，以提高基于摄像头的鸟瞰图（BEV）3D感知性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于摄像头的BEV 3D感知方法在融合长期信息时存在计算和内存开销大的问题，而递归融合方法如BEVFormer无法有效利用更长的时序信息。
AI.method: 本文在LSS方法基础上提出了一种简单但有效的长期递归融合策略，并引入时间嵌入模块以增强模型对偶尔丢失帧的鲁棒性，命名为VideoBEV。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，VideoBEV在多个3D感知任务中表现优异，包括目标检测（55.4% mAP和62.9% NDS）、分割（48.6% vehicle mIoU）、跟踪（54.8% AMOTA）和运动预测（0.80m minADE和0.463 EPA）。
AI.conclusion: VideoBEV通过结合长期递归融合和时间嵌入模块，有效提升了基于摄像头的BEV 3D感知任务的性能，为未来研究提供了新的思路。

conclusion: VideoBEV通过结合长期递归融合和时间嵌入模块，有效提升了基于摄像头的BEV 3D感知任务的性能，为未来研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Lea Bogensperger,Dominik Narnhofer,Filip Ilic,Thomas Pock
title: Score-Based Generative Models for Medical Image Segmentation using Signed Distance Functions
title_zh: 使用符号距离函数进行医学图像分割的基于分数的生成模型
abstract: Medical image segmentation is a crucial task that relies on the ability to accurately identify and isolate regions of interest in medical images. Thereby, generative approaches allow to capture the statistical properties of segmentation masks that are dependent on the respective structures. In this work we propose a conditional score-based generative modeling framework to represent the signed distance function (SDF) leading to an implicit distribution of segmentation masks. The advantage of leveraging the SDF is a more natural distortion when compared to that of binary masks. By learning the score function of the conditional distribution of SDFs we can accurately sample from the distribution of segmentation masks, allowing for the evaluation of statistical quantities. Thus, this probabilistic representation allows for the generation of uncertainty maps represented by the variance, which can aid in further analysis and enhance the predictive robustness. We qualitatively and quantitatively illustrate competitive performance of the proposed method on a public nuclei and gland segmentation data set, highlighting its potential utility in medical image segmentation applications.
summary: Medical image segmentation is a crucial task that relies on the ability to accurately identify and isolate regions of interest in medical images. Thereby, generative approaches allow to capture the statistical properties of segmentation masks that are dependent on the respective structures. In this work we propose a conditional score-based generative modeling framework to represent the signed distance function (SDF) leading to an implicit distribution of segmentation masks. The advantage of leveraging the SDF is a more natural distortion when compared to that of binary masks. By learning the score function of the conditional distribution of SDFs we can accurately sample from the distribution of segmentation masks, allowing for the evaluation of statistical quantities. Thus, this probabilistic representation allows for the generation of uncertainty maps represented by the variance, which can aid in further analysis and enhance the predictive robustness. We qualitatively and quantitatively illustrate competitive performance of the proposed method on a public nuclei and gland segmentation data set, highlighting its potential utility in medical image segmentation applications.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分割是一项至关重要的任务，它依赖于准确识别和隔离医学图像中感兴趣区域的能力。因此，生成方法允许捕获依赖于各自结构的分割掩模的统计特性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于条件分数的生成建模框架来表示符号距离函数（SDF），从而导致分割掩模的隐式分布。与二进制掩模相比，利用 SDF 的优点是失真更自然。通过学习 SDF 条件分布的得分函数，我们可以从分割掩模的分布中准确采样，从而可以评估统计量。因此，这种概率表示允许生成由方差表示的不确定性图，这可以帮助进一步分析并增强预测稳健性。我们定性和定量地说明了所提出的方法在公共细胞核和腺体分割数据集上的竞争性能，突出了其在医学图像分割应用中的潜在效用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号距离函数（SDF）的条件分数生成模型，用于医学图像分割任务，通过隐式分布生成分割掩码并评估统计量。
AI.motivation: 传统二值分割掩码在变形时不够自然，而符号距离函数能更精确地描述结构边界，从而提升分割的鲁棒性和不确定性分析能力。
AI.method: 构建条件分数生成模型，学习SDF的条件分布得分函数，通过采样生成分割掩码，并利用方差生成不确定性图。
AI.result: 在公开的细胞核和腺体分割数据集上，该方法在定性和定量评估中均表现出竞争力，验证了其在医学图像分割中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 基于SDF的生成模型能够有效捕捉分割掩码的统计特性，为医学图像分割提供更自然的变形和不确定性估计，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Score-Based Generative Models for Medical Image Segmentation using Signed Distance Functions 使用符号距离函数进行医学图像分割的基于分数的生成模型 Medical image segmentation is a crucial task that relies on the ability to accurately identify and isolate regions of interest in medical images. Thereby, generative approaches allow to capture the statistical properties of segmentation masks that are dependent on the respective structures. In this work we propose a conditional score-based generative modeling framework to represent the signed distance function (SDF) leading to an implicit distribution of segmentation masks. The advantage of leveraging the SDF is a more natural distortion when compared to that of binary masks. By learning the score function of the conditional distribution of SDFs we can accurately sample from the distribution of segmentation masks, allowing for the evaluation of statistical quantities. Thus, this probabilistic representation allows for the generation of uncertainty maps represented by the variance, which can aid in further analysis and enhance the predictive robustness. We qualitatively and quantitatively illustrate competitive performance of the proposed method on a public nuclei and gland segmentation data set, highlighting its potential utility in medical image segmentation applications. 医学图像分割是一项至关重要的任务，它依赖于准确识别和隔离医学图像中感兴趣区域的能力。因此，生成方法允许捕获依赖于各自结构的分割掩模的统计特性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于条件分数的生成建模框架来表示符号距离函数（SDF），从而导致分割掩模的隐式分布。与二进制掩模相比，利用 SDF 的优点是失真更自然。通过学习 SDF 条件分布的得分函数，我们可以从分割掩模的分布中准确采样，从而可以评估统计量。因此，这种概率表示允许生成由方差表示的不确定性图，这可以帮助进一步分析并增强预测稳健性。我们定性和定量地说明了所提出的方法在公共细胞核和腺体分割数据集上的竞争性能，突出了其在医学图像分割应用中的潜在效用。 本文提出了一种基于符号距离函数（SDF）的条件分数生成模型，用于医学图像分割任务，通过隐式分布生成分割掩码并评估统计量。 Lea Bogensperger,Dominik Narnhofer,Filip Ilic,Thomas Pock cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammad Zeineldeen,Kartik Audhkhasi,Murali Karthick Baskar,Bhuvana Ramabhadran
title: Robust Knowledge Distillation from RNN-T Models With Noisy Training Labels Using Full-Sum Loss
title_zh: 使用全和损失从带有噪声训练标签的 RNN-T 模型中进行稳健的知识蒸馏
abstract: This work studies knowledge distillation (KD) and addresses its constraints for recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) models. In hard distillation, a teacher model transcribes large amounts of unlabelled speech to train a student model. Soft distillation is another popular KD method that distills the output logits of the teacher model. Due to the nature of RNN-T alignments, applying soft distillation between RNN-T architectures having different posterior distributions is challenging. In addition, bad teachers having high word-error-rate (WER) reduce the efficacy of KD. We investigate how to effectively distill knowledge from variable quality ASR teachers, which has not been studied before to the best of our knowledge. We show that a sequence-level KD, full-sum distillation, outperforms other distillation methods for RNN-T models, especially for bad teachers. We also propose a variant of full-sum distillation that distills the sequence discriminative knowledge of the teacher leading to further improvement in WER. We conduct experiments on public datasets namely SpeechStew and LibriSpeech, and on in-house production data.
summary: This work studies knowledge distillation (KD) and addresses its constraints for recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) models. In hard distillation, a teacher model transcribes large amounts of unlabelled speech to train a student model. Soft distillation is another popular KD method that distills the output logits of the teacher model. Due to the nature of RNN-T alignments, applying soft distillation between RNN-T architectures having different posterior distributions is challenging. In addition, bad teachers having high word-error-rate (WER) reduce the efficacy of KD. We investigate how to effectively distill knowledge from variable quality ASR teachers, which has not been studied before to the best of our knowledge. We show that a sequence-level KD, full-sum distillation, outperforms other distillation methods for RNN-T models, especially for bad teachers. We also propose a variant of full-sum distillation that distills the sequence discriminative knowledge of the teacher leading to further improvement in WER. We conduct experiments on public datasets namely SpeechStew and LibriSpeech, and on in-house production data.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究知识蒸馏（KD）并解决其对循环神经网络换能器（RNN-T）模型的约束。在硬蒸馏中，教师模型转录大量未标记的语音来训练学生模型。软蒸馏是另一种流行的 KD 方法，用于蒸馏教师模型的输出 logits。由于 RNN-T 对齐的性质，在具有不同后验分布的 RNN-T 架构之间应用软蒸馏具有挑战性。此外，单词错误率 (WER) 较高的不良教师也会降低 KD 的效果。我们研究如何有效地从质量参差不齐的 ASR 教师中提取知识，据我们所知，此前尚未对此进行过研究。我们证明，对于 RNN-T 模型，序列级 KD（全和蒸馏）优于其他蒸馏方法，尤其是对于糟糕的教师而言。我们还提出了一种全和蒸馏的变体，它可以蒸馏教师的序列判别知识，从而进一步提高 WER。我们对公共数据集 SpeechStew 和 LibriSpeech 以及内部生产数据进行实验。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在噪声训练标签的情况下，如何通过全和损失函数从不同质量的RNN-T模型中进行鲁棒知识蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法在RNN-T模型间应用时，因对齐特性和教师模型质量差异导致效果受限，尤其当教师模型存在高词错误率时问题更显著。
AI.method: 提出基于序列级别的全和蒸馏方法，并设计变体以提取教师模型的序列判别知识，结合公共数据集和内部数据进行实验验证。
AI.result: 全和蒸馏方法在SpeechStew、LibriSpeech及内部数据集上均优于其他蒸馏方法，尤其在低质量教师模型场景下显著降低词错误率。
AI.conclusion: 全和蒸馏及其变体能有效提升RNN-T模型的知识蒸馏鲁棒性，为处理噪声标签和差异质量教师模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zehui Zhu,Imad L. Al-Qadi
title: Automated crack propagation measurement on asphalt concrete specimens using an optical flow-based deep neural network
title_zh: 使用基于光流的深度神经网络对沥青混凝土样本进行自动裂纹扩展测量
abstract: This article proposes a deep neural network, namely CrackPropNet, to measure crack propagation on asphalt concrete (AC) specimens. It offers an accurate, flexible, efficient, and low-cost solution for crack propagation measurement using images collected during cracking tests. CrackPropNet significantly differs from traditional deep learning networks, as it involves learning to locate displacement field discontinuities by matching features at various locations in the reference and deformed images. An image library representing the diversified cracking behavior of AC was developed for supervised training. CrackPropNet achieved an optimal dataset scale F-1 of 0.755 and optimal image scale F-1 of 0.781 on the testing dataset at a running speed of 26 frame-per-second. Experiments demonstrated that low to medium-level Gaussian noises had a limited impact on the measurement accuracy of CrackPropNet. Moreover, the model showed promising generalization on fundamentally different images. As a crack measurement technique, the CrackPropNet can detect complex crack patterns accurately and efficiently in AC cracking tests. It can be applied to characterize the cracking phenomenon, evaluate AC cracking potential, validate test protocols, and verify theoretical models.
summary: This article proposes a deep neural network, namely CrackPropNet, to measure crack propagation on asphalt concrete (AC) specimens. It offers an accurate, flexible, efficient, and low-cost solution for crack propagation measurement using images collected during cracking tests. CrackPropNet significantly differs from traditional deep learning networks, as it involves learning to locate displacement field discontinuities by matching features at various locations in the reference and deformed images. An image library representing the diversified cracking behavior of AC was developed for supervised training. CrackPropNet achieved an optimal dataset scale F-1 of 0.755 and optimal image scale F-1 of 0.781 on the testing dataset at a running speed of 26 frame-per-second. Experiments demonstrated that low to medium-level Gaussian noises had a limited impact on the measurement accuracy of CrackPropNet. Moreover, the model showed promising generalization on fundamentally different images. As a crack measurement technique, the CrackPropNet can detect complex crack patterns accurately and efficiently in AC cracking tests. It can be applied to characterize the cracking phenomenon, evaluate AC cracking potential, validate test protocols, and verify theoretical models.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种深度神经网络，即 CrackPropNet，用于测量沥青混凝土 (AC) 样本上的裂纹扩展。它使用裂纹测试期间收集的图像，为裂纹扩展测量提供了准确、灵活、高效且低成本的解决方案。 CrackPropNet 与传统深度学习网络显着不同，因为它涉及通过匹配参考图像和变形图像中各个位置的特征来学习定位位移场不连续性。开发了代表AC多样化破解行为的图像库用于监督训练。 CrackPropNet 在测试数据集上以每秒 26 帧的运行速度实现了 0.755 的最佳数据集尺度 F-1 和 0.781 的最佳图像尺度 F-1。实验表明，低到中等水平的高斯噪声对 CrackPropNet 的测量精度影响有限。此外，该模型在根本不同的图像上显示出有希望的泛化能力。作为一种裂纹测量技术，CrackPropNet 可以在 AC 裂纹测试中准确有效地检测复杂的裂纹模式。它可用于表征裂纹现象、评估交流裂纹潜力、验证测试协议并验证理论模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于光流的深度神经网络CrackPropNet，用于准确高效地测量沥青混凝土试件的裂缝扩展。
AI.motivation: 传统裂缝测量方法存在成本高、效率低等问题，现有深度学习方法难以有效处理裂缝扩展的位移场不连续性，需开发更精准的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建基于光流的深度神经网络，通过匹配参考图像与变形图像的特征来定位位移场不连续性，并使用多样化裂缝行为的图像库进行监督训练。
AI.result: 测试数据集上达到0.755（数据集尺度）和0.781（图像尺度）的F1分数，运行速度26帧/秒，对低至中等高斯噪声具有鲁棒性，且能有效泛化到不同图像。
AI.conclusion: CrackPropNet能准确高效检测复杂裂缝模式，适用于表征裂缝现象、评估裂缝潜力、验证测试协议和理论模型。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于光流的深度神经网络CrackPropNet，用于准确高效地测量沥青混凝土试件的裂缝扩展。
ai_content.motivation: 传统裂缝测量方法存在成本高、效率低等问题，现有深度学习方法难以有效处理裂缝扩展的位移场不连续性，需开发更精准的自动化解决方案。
ai_content.method: 构建基于光流的深度神经网络，通过匹配参考图像与变形图像的特征来定位位移场不连续性，并使用多样化裂缝行为的图像库进行监督训练。
ai_content.result: 测试数据集上达到0.755（数据集尺度）和0.781（图像尺度）的F1分数，运行速度26帧/秒，对低至中等高斯噪声具有鲁棒性，且能有效泛化到不同图像。
ai_content.conclusion: CrackPropNet能准确高效检测复杂裂缝模式，适用于表征裂缝现象、评估裂缝潜力、验证测试协议和理论模型。

search_text: Automated crack propagation measurement on asphalt concrete specimens using an optical flow-based deep neural network 使用基于光流的深度神经网络对沥青混凝土样本进行自动裂纹扩展测量 This article proposes a deep neural network, namely CrackPropNet, to measure crack propagation on asphalt concrete (AC) specimens. It offers an accurate, flexible, efficient, and low-cost solution for crack propagation measurement using images collected during cracking tests. CrackPropNet significantly differs from traditional deep learning networks, as it involves learning to locate displacement field discontinuities by matching features at various locations in the reference and deformed images. An image library representing the diversified cracking behavior of AC was developed for supervised training. CrackPropNet achieved an optimal dataset scale F-1 of 0.755 and optimal image scale F-1 of 0.781 on the testing dataset at a running speed of 26 frame-per-second. Experiments demonstrated that low to medium-level Gaussian noises had a limited impact on the measurement accuracy of CrackPropNet. Moreover, the model showed promising generalization on fundamentally different images. As a crack measurement technique, the CrackPropNet can detect complex crack patterns accurately and efficiently in AC cracking tests. It can be applied to characterize the cracking phenomenon, evaluate AC cracking potential, validate test protocols, and verify theoretical models. 本文提出了一种深度神经网络，即 CrackPropNet，用于测量沥青混凝土 (AC) 样本上的裂纹扩展。它使用裂纹测试期间收集的图像，为裂纹扩展测量提供了准确、灵活、高效且低成本的解决方案。 CrackPropNet 与传统深度学习网络显着不同，因为它涉及通过匹配参考图像和变形图像中各个位置的特征来学习定位位移场不连续性。开发了代表AC多样化破解行为的图像库用于监督训练。 CrackPropNet 在测试数据集上以每秒 26 帧的运行速度实现了 0.755 的最佳数据集尺度 F-1 和 0.781 的最佳图像尺度 F-1。实验表明，低到中等水平的高斯噪声对 CrackPropNet 的测量精度影响有限。此外，该模型在根本不同的图像上显示出有希望的泛化能力。作为一种裂纹测量技术，CrackPropNet 可以在 AC 裂纹测试中准确有效地检测复杂的裂纹模式。它可用于表征裂纹现象、评估交流裂纹潜力、验证测试协议并验证理论模型。 提出一种基于光流的深度神经网络CrackPropNet，用于准确高效地测量沥青混凝土试件的裂缝扩展。 Zehui Zhu,Imad L. Al-Qadi cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Lu,Zitong Yu,Xuesong Niu,Yingcong Chen
title: Neuron Structure Modeling for Generalizable Remote Physiological Measurement
title_zh: 用于通用远程生理测量的神经元结构建模
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) technology has drawn increasing attention in recent years. It can extract Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) from facial videos, making many applications like health monitoring and emotional analysis more accessible. However, as the BVP signal is easily affected by environmental changes, existing methods struggle to generalize well for unseen domains. In this paper, we systematically address the domain shift problem in the rPPG measurement task. We show that most domain generalization methods do not work well in this problem, as domain labels are ambiguous in complicated environmental changes. In light of this, we propose a domain-label-free approach called NEuron STructure modeling (NEST). NEST improves the generalization capacity by maximizing the coverage of feature space during training, which reduces the chance for under-optimized feature activation during inference. Besides, NEST can also enrich and enhance domain invariant features across multi-domain. We create and benchmark a large-scale domain generalization protocol for the rPPG measurement task. Extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both cross-dataset and intra-dataset settings.
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) technology has drawn increasing attention in recent years. It can extract Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) from facial videos, making many applications like health monitoring and emotional analysis more accessible. However, as the BVP signal is easily affected by environmental changes, existing methods struggle to generalize well for unseen domains. In this paper, we systematically address the domain shift problem in the rPPG measurement task. We show that most domain generalization methods do not work well in this problem, as domain labels are ambiguous in complicated environmental changes. In light of this, we propose a domain-label-free approach called NEuron STructure modeling (NEST). NEST improves the generalization capacity by maximizing the coverage of feature space during training, which reduces the chance for under-optimized feature activation during inference. Besides, NEST can also enrich and enhance domain invariant features across multi-domain. We create and benchmark a large-scale domain generalization protocol for the rPPG measurement task. Extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both cross-dataset and intra-dataset settings.
abstract_zh: 近年来，远程光电体积描记法（rPPG）技术引起了越来越多的关注。它可以从面部视频中提取血量脉冲（BVP），使健康监测和情绪分析等许多应用变得更加容易。然而，由于 BVP 信号很容易受到环境变化的影响，现有方法很难很好地推广到未知领域。在本文中，我们系统地解决了 rPPG 测量任务中的域转移问题。我们表明，大多数领域泛化方法在这个问题上效果不佳，因为领域标签在复杂的环境变化中是不明确的。鉴于此，我们提出了一种称为神经元结构建模（NEST）的无域标签方法。 NEST 通过在训练期间最大化特征空间的覆盖范围来提高泛化能力，从而减少推理期间特征激活不足的机会。此外，NEST还可以丰富和增强跨多域的域不变特征。我们为 rPPG 测量任务创建一个大规模域泛化协议并对其进行基准测试。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在跨数据集和数据集内设置上都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需领域标签的神经结构建模方法（NEST），以解决远程光电容积描记（rPPG）测量任务中的领域迁移问题，提升模型在不同环境下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有rPPG方法在环境变化下泛化能力不足，领域标签在复杂环境变化中模糊且难以获取，传统领域自适应方法难以有效应用。
AI.method: 设计NEST方法，通过最大化训练时特征空间覆盖范围，减少推理时未优化特征激活的可能性，并增强跨领域的不变特征。
AI.result: 在跨数据集和同数据集实验中，NEST方法均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在领域泛化任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NEST通过结构化特征建模有效解决了rPPG领域的泛化难题，为复杂环境下的生理信号远程测量提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qian Jiang,Changyou Chen,Han Zhao,Liqun Chen,Qing Ping,Son Dinh Tran,Yi Xu,Belinda Zeng,Trishul Chilimbi
title: Understanding and Constructing Latent Modality Structures in Multi-modal Representation Learning
title_zh: 理解和构建多模态表示学习中的潜在模态结构
abstract: Contrastive loss has been increasingly used in learning representations from multiple modalities. In the limit, the nature of the contrastive loss encourages modalities to exactly match each other in the latent space. Yet it remains an open question how the modality alignment affects the downstream task performance. In this paper, based on an information-theoretic argument, we first prove that exact modality alignment is sub-optimal in general for downstream prediction tasks. Hence we advocate that the key of better performance lies in meaningful latent modality structures instead of perfect modality alignment. To this end, we propose three general approaches to construct latent modality structures. Specifically, we design 1) a deep feature separation loss for intra-modality regularization; 2) a Brownian-bridge loss for inter-modality regularization; and 3) a geometric consistency loss for both intra- and inter-modality regularization. Extensive experiments are conducted on two popular multi-modal representation learning frameworks: the CLIP-based two-tower model and the ALBEF-based fusion model. We test our model on a variety of tasks including zero/few-shot image classification, image-text retrieval, visual question answering, visual reasoning, and visual entailment. Our method achieves consistent improvements over existing methods, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalizability of our proposed approach on latent modality structure regularization.
summary: Contrastive loss has been increasingly used in learning representations from multiple modalities. In the limit, the nature of the contrastive loss encourages modalities to exactly match each other in the latent space. Yet it remains an open question how the modality alignment affects the downstream task performance. In this paper, based on an information-theoretic argument, we first prove that exact modality alignment is sub-optimal in general for downstream prediction tasks. Hence we advocate that the key of better performance lies in meaningful latent modality structures instead of perfect modality alignment. To this end, we propose three general approaches to construct latent modality structures. Specifically, we design 1) a deep feature separation loss for intra-modality regularization; 2) a Brownian-bridge loss for inter-modality regularization; and 3) a geometric consistency loss for both intra- and inter-modality regularization. Extensive experiments are conducted on two popular multi-modal representation learning frameworks: the CLIP-based two-tower model and the ALBEF-based fusion model. We test our model on a variety of tasks including zero/few-shot image classification, image-text retrieval, visual question answering, visual reasoning, and visual entailment. Our method achieves consistent improvements over existing methods, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalizability of our proposed approach on latent modality structure regularization.
abstract_zh: 对比损失越来越多地用于学习多种模式的表示。在极限情况下，对比损失的性质鼓励模态在潜在空间中彼此精确匹配。然而，模态对齐如何影响下游任务性能仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，基于信息论论证，我们首先证明对于下游预测任务来说，精确的模态对齐通常不是最优的。因此，我们主张更好性能的关键在于有意义的潜在模态结构，而不是完美的模态对齐。为此，我们提出了三种构建潜在模态结构的通用方法。具体来说，我们设计了1）用于模态内正则化的深度特征分离损失； 2）用于模态间正则化的布朗桥损失； 3）模态内和模间正则化的几何一致性损失。在两种流行的多模态表示学习框架上进行了大量的实验：基于 CLIP 的双塔模型和基于 ALBEF 的融合模型。我们在各种任务上测试我们的模型，包括零/少样本图像分类、图像文本检索、视觉问答、视觉推理和视觉蕴涵。我们的方法对现有方法实现了一致的改进，证明了我们提出的潜在模态结构正则化方法的有效性和普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态表征学习中潜在模态结构的构建方法，提出通过非完美对齐的模态结构提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 对比损失虽被广泛用于多模态表征学习，但其强制模态在潜在空间完全对齐的特性可能损害下游任务性能，现有研究缺乏对此的理论分析与改进方法。
AI.method: 基于信息论证明精确对齐的次优性，提出三种正则化损失：1) 深度特征分离损失（内模态正则化）；2) 布朗桥损失（跨模态正则化）；3) 几何一致性损失（兼顾内外模态）。
AI.result: 在CLIP和ALBEF框架下，于零样本分类、图文检索等任务中持续优于现有方法，验证了潜在模态结构正则化的有效性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: 精确模态对齐非最优，构建有意义的潜在模态结构是提升多模态表征性能的关键，所提方法在多种任务和框架中均表现优异。

tldr: 本文研究多模态表征学习中潜在模态结构的构建方法，提出通过非完美对齐的模态结构提升下游任务性能。
motivation: 对比损失虽被广泛用于多模态表征学习，但其强制模态在潜在空间完全对齐的特性可能损害下游任务性能，现有研究缺乏对此的理论分析与改进方法。
method: 基于信息论证明精确对齐的次优性，提出三种正则化损失：1) 深度特征分离损失（内模态正则化）；2) 布朗桥损失（跨模态正则化）；3) 几何一致性损失（兼顾内外模态）。
result: 在CLIP和ALBEF框架下，于零样本分类、图文检索等任务中持续优于现有方法，验证了潜在模态结构正则化的有效性与通用性。
conclusion: 精确模态对齐非最优，构建有意义的潜在模态结构是提升多模态表征性能的关键，所提方法在多种任务和框架中均表现优异。
search_text: Understanding and Constructing Latent Modality Structures in Multi-modal Representation Learning 理解和构建多模态表示学习中的潜在模态结构 Contrastive loss has been increasingly used in learning representations from multiple modalities. In the limit, the nature of the contrastive loss encourages modalities to exactly match each other in the latent space. Yet it remains an open question how the modality alignment affects the downstream task performance. In this paper, based on an information-theoretic argument, we first prove that exact modality alignment is sub-optimal in general for downstream prediction tasks. Hence we advocate that the key of better performance lies in meaningful latent modality structures instead of perfect modality alignment. To this end, we propose three general approaches to construct latent modality structures. Specifically, we design 1) a deep feature separation loss for intra-modality regularization; 2) a Brownian-bridge loss for inter-modality regularization; and 3) a geometric consistency loss for both intra- and inter-modality regularization. Extensive experiments are conducted on two popular multi-modal representation learning frameworks: the CLIP-based two-tower model and the ALBEF-based fusion model. We test our model on a variety of tasks including zero/few-shot image classification, image-text retrieval, visual question answering, visual reasoning, and visual entailment. Our method achieves consistent improvements over existing methods, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalizability of our proposed approach on latent modality structure regularization. 对比损失越来越多地用于学习多种模式的表示。在极限情况下，对比损失的性质鼓励模态在潜在空间中彼此精确匹配。然而，模态对齐如何影响下游任务性能仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，基于信息论论证，我们首先证明对于下游预测任务来说，精确的模态对齐通常不是最优的。因此，我们主张更好性能的关键在于有意义的潜在模态结构，而不是完美的模态对齐。为此，我们提出了三种构建潜在模态结构的通用方法。具体来说，我们设计了1）用于模态内正则化的深度特征分离损失； 2）用于模态间正则化的布朗桥损失； 3）模态内和模间正则化的几何一致性损失。在两种流行的多模态表示学习框架上进行了大量的实验：基于 CLIP 的双塔模型和基于 ALBEF 的融合模型。我们在各种任务上测试我们的模型，包括零/少样本图像分类、图像文本检索、视觉问答、视觉推理和视觉蕴涵。我们的方法对现有方法实现了一致的改进，证明了我们提出的潜在模态结构正则化方法的有效性和普遍性。 本文研究多模态表征学习中潜在模态结构的构建方法，提出通过非完美对齐的模态结构提升下游任务性能。 Qian Jiang,Changyou Chen,Han Zhao,Liqun Chen,Qing Ping,Son Dinh Tran,Yi Xu,Belinda Zeng,Trishul Chilimbi cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Kyle M. Hart,Brendan Englot,Ryan P. O'Shea,John D. Kelly,David Martinez
title: Monocular Simultaneous Localization and Mapping using Ground Textures
title_zh: 使用地面纹理的单目同步定位和建图
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures. To appear at ICRA 2023, London, UK. Distribution Statement A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited, as submitted under NAVAIR Public Release Authorization 2022-0586. The views expressed here are those of the authors and do not reflect the official policy or position of the U.S. Navy, Department of Defense, or U.S. Government
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures. To appear at ICRA 2023, London, UK. Distribution Statement A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited, as submitted under NAVAIR Public Release Authorization 2022-0586. The views expressed here are those of the authors and do not reflect the official policy or position of the U.S. Navy, Department of Defense, or U.S. Government
abstract: Recent work has shown impressive localization performance using only images of ground textures taken with a downward facing monocular camera. This provides a reliable navigation method that is robust to feature sparse environments and challenging lighting conditions. However, these localization methods require an existing map for comparison. Our work aims to relax the need for a map by introducing a full simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system. By not requiring an existing map, setup times are minimized and the system is more robust to changing environments. This SLAM system uses a combination of several techniques to accomplish this. Image keypoints are identified and projected into the ground plane. These keypoints, visual bags of words, and several threshold parameters are then used to identify overlapping images and revisited areas. The system then uses robust M-estimators to estimate the transform between robot poses with overlapping images and revisited areas. These optimized estimates make up the map used for navigation. We show, through experimental data, that this system performs reliably on many ground textures, but not all.
summary: Recent work has shown impressive localization performance using only images of ground textures taken with a downward facing monocular camera. This provides a reliable navigation method that is robust to feature sparse environments and challenging lighting conditions. However, these localization methods require an existing map for comparison. Our work aims to relax the need for a map by introducing a full simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system. By not requiring an existing map, setup times are minimized and the system is more robust to changing environments. This SLAM system uses a combination of several techniques to accomplish this. Image keypoints are identified and projected into the ground plane. These keypoints, visual bags of words, and several threshold parameters are then used to identify overlapping images and revisited areas. The system then uses robust M-estimators to estimate the transform between robot poses with overlapping images and revisited areas. These optimized estimates make up the map used for navigation. We show, through experimental data, that this system performs reliably on many ground textures, but not all.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作仅使用朝下的单目相机拍摄的地面纹理图像就显示出了令人印象深刻的定位性能。这提供了一种可靠的导航方法，对于稀疏环境和具有挑战性的照明条件具有鲁棒性。然而，这些定位方法需要现有的地图进行比较。我们的工作旨在通过引入完整的同步定位和地图构建（SLAM）系统来放松对地图的需求。由于不需要现有地图，设置时间被最小化，并且系统对于不断变化的环境更加稳健。该 SLAM 系统结合使用多种技术来实现这一目标。识别图像关键点并将其投影到地平面中。然后使用这些关键点、视觉词袋和几个阈值参数来识别重叠图像和重新访问的区域。然后，系统使用鲁棒的 M 估计器来估计具有重叠图像和重新访问区域的机器人姿势之间的变换。这些优化的估计构成了用于导航的地图。我们通过实验数据表明，该系统在许多地面纹理上都能可靠地运行，但并非全部。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于地面纹理的单目同时定位与建图（SLAM）系统，无需预先存在的地图即可实现可靠导航。
AI.motivation: 现有基于地面纹理的定位方法依赖预存地图，限制了在动态环境中的适用性，需开发无需地图的SLAM系统以提高鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.method: 通过识别图像关键点并投影至地面平面，结合视觉词袋模型和阈值参数检测重叠区域，利用M-估计器优化机器人姿态变换，构建增量式地图。
AI.result: 实验表明系统在多种地面纹理场景下表现稳定，但对部分纹理特征不足的环境仍存在定位失效问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无先验地图的SLAM，拓展了单目视觉导航的应用场景，但需进一步优化以提升复杂环境适应性。

This provides a reliable navigation method that is robust to feature sparse environments and challenging lighting conditions. However, these localization methods require an existing map for comparison. Our work aims to relax the need for a map by introducing a full simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system. These keypoints, visual bags of words, and several threshold parameters are then used to identify overlapping images and revisited areas. The system then uses robust M-estimators to estimate the transform between robot poses with overlapping images and revisited areas. These optimized estimates make up the map used for navigation. authors_text: Zhengdi Yu,Shaoli Huang,Chen Fang,Toby P. Breckon,Jue Wang
title: ACR: Attention Collaboration-based Regressor for Arbitrary Two-Hand Reconstruction
title_zh: ACR：用于任意双手重建的基于注意力协作的回归器
abstract: Reconstructing two hands from monocular RGB images is challenging due to frequent occlusion and mutual confusion. Existing methods mainly learn an entangled representation to encode two interacting hands, which are incredibly fragile to impaired interaction, such as truncated hands, separate hands, or external occlusion. This paper presents ACR (Attention Collaboration-based Regressor), which makes the first attempt to reconstruct hands in arbitrary scenarios. To achieve this, ACR explicitly mitigates interdependencies between hands and between parts by leveraging center and part-based attention for feature extraction. However, reducing interdependence helps release the input constraint while weakening the mutual reasoning about reconstructing the interacting hands. Thus, based on center attention, ACR also learns cross-hand prior that handle the interacting hands better. We evaluate our method on various types of hand reconstruction datasets. Our method significantly outperforms the best interacting-hand approaches on the InterHand2.6M dataset while yielding comparable performance with the state-of-the-art single-hand methods on the FreiHand dataset. More qualitative results on in-the-wild and hand-object interaction datasets and web images/videos further demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for arbitrary hand reconstruction. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZhengdiYu/Arbitrary-Hands-3D-Reconstruction.
summary: Reconstructing two hands from monocular RGB images is challenging due to frequent occlusion and mutual confusion. Existing methods mainly learn an entangled representation to encode two interacting hands, which are incredibly fragile to impaired interaction, such as truncated hands, separate hands, or external occlusion. This paper presents ACR (Attention Collaboration-based Regressor), which makes the first attempt to reconstruct hands in arbitrary scenarios. To achieve this, ACR explicitly mitigates interdependencies between hands and between parts by leveraging center and part-based attention for feature extraction. However, reducing interdependence helps release the input constraint while weakening the mutual reasoning about reconstructing the interacting hands. Thus, based on center attention, ACR also learns cross-hand prior that handle the interacting hands better. We evaluate our method on various types of hand reconstruction datasets. Our method significantly outperforms the best interacting-hand approaches on the InterHand2.6M dataset while yielding comparable performance with the state-of-the-art single-hand methods on the FreiHand dataset. More qualitative results on in-the-wild and hand-object interaction datasets and web images/videos further demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for arbitrary hand reconstruction. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZhengdiYu/Arbitrary-Hands-3D-Reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 由于频繁的遮挡和相互混淆，从单眼 RGB 图像重建两只手具有挑战性。现有的方法主要学习纠缠表示来编码两只交互的手，这对于交互受损（例如截断的手、分开的手或外部遮挡）来说非常脆弱。本文提出了ACR（Attention Collaboration-based Regressor），首次尝试在任意场景下重建手部。为了实现这一目标，ACR 通过利用基于中心和基于部件的注意力进行特征提取，明确地减轻了手之间和部件之间的相互依赖性。然而，减少相互依赖有助于释放输入约束，同时削弱重建交互手的相互推理。因此，基于中心注意力，ACR 还可以先学习交叉手，从而更好地处理交互的手。我们在各种类型的手重建数据集上评估我们的方法。我们的方法显着优于 InterHand2.6M 数据集上的最佳交互手方法，同时在 FreiHand 数据集上产生与最先进的单手方法相当的性能。在野外和手部物体交互数据集和网络图像/视频上的更多定性结果进一步证明了我们的任意手部重建方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ZhengdiYu/Arbitrary-Hands-3D-Reconstruction 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACR方法，旨在从单目RGB图像中重建任意场景下的双手三维结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理双手遮挡和相互干扰时表现脆弱，难以应对截断手、分离手或外部遮挡等复杂场景。
AI.method: 通过中心注意力和部件注意力机制解耦双手及部件间的依赖关系，并基于中心注意力学习跨手先验知识以增强交互建模。
AI.result: 在InterHand2.6M数据集上显著优于现有交互手方法，在FreiHand数据集上与单手方法性能相当，且在真实场景和手物交互数据集上展现良好效果。
AI.conclusion: ACR通过注意力协作机制有效解决了任意场景下双手重建的挑战，代码已开源供验证。

Our method significantly outperforms the best interacting-hand approaches on the InterHand2.6M dataset while yielding comparable performance with the state-of-the-art single-hand methods on the FreiHand dataset. More qualitative results on in-the-wild and hand-object interaction datasets and web images/videos further demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for arbitrary hand reconstruction. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZhengdiYu/Arbitrary-Hands-3D-Reconstruction. 由于频繁的遮挡和相互混淆，从单眼 RGB 图像重建两只手具有挑战性。现有的方法主要学习纠缠表示来编码两只交互的手，这对于交互受损（例如截断的手、分开的手或外部遮挡）来说非常脆弱。本文提出了ACR（Attention Collaboration-based Regressor），首次尝试在任意场景下重建手部。为了实现这一目标，ACR 通过利用基于中心和基于部件的注意力进行特征提取，明确地减轻了手之间和部件之间的相互依赖性。然而，减少相互依赖有助于释放输入约束，同时削弱重建交互手的相互推理。因此，基于中心注意力，ACR 还可以先学习交叉手，从而更好地处理交互的手。我们在各种类型的手重建数据集上评估我们的方法。我们的方法显着优于 InterHand2.6M 数据集上的最佳交互手方法，同时在 FreiHand 数据集上产生与最先进的单手方法相当的性能。在野外和手部物体交互数据集和网络图像/视频上的更多定性结果进一步证明了我们的任意手部重建方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ZhengdiYu/Arbitrary-Hands-3D-Reconstruction 获取。 本文提出ACR方法，旨在从单目RGB图像中重建任意场景下的双手三维结构。 Zhengdi Yu,Shaoli Huang,Chen Fang,Toby P. Breckon,Jue Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Mingfang Zhang,Jinglu Wang,Xiao Li,Yifei Huang,Yoichi Sato,Yan Lu
title: Structural Multiplane Image: Bridging Neural View Synthesis and 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 结构多平面图像：桥接神经视图合成和 3D 重建
abstract: The Multiplane Image (MPI), containing a set of fronto-parallel RGBA layers, is an effective and efficient representation for view synthesis from sparse inputs. Yet, its fixed structure limits the performance, especially for surfaces imaged at oblique angles. We introduce the Structural MPI (S-MPI), where the plane structure approximates 3D scenes concisely. Conveying RGBA contexts with geometrically-faithful structures, the S-MPI directly bridges view synthesis and 3D reconstruction. It can not only overcome the critical limitations of MPI, i.e., discretization artifacts from sloped surfaces and abuse of redundant layers, and can also acquire planar 3D reconstruction. Despite the intuition and demand of applying S-MPI, great challenges are introduced, e.g., high-fidelity approximation for both RGBA layers and plane poses, multi-view consistency, non-planar regions modeling, and efficient rendering with intersected planes. Accordingly, we propose a transformer-based network based on a segmentation model. It predicts compact and expressive S-MPI layers with their corresponding masks, poses, and RGBA contexts. Non-planar regions are inclusively handled as a special case in our unified framework. Multi-view consistency is ensured by sharing global proxy embeddings, which encode plane-level features covering the complete 3D scenes with aligned coordinates. Intensive experiments show that our method outperforms both previous state-of-the-art MPI-based view synthesis methods and planar reconstruction methods.
summary: The Multiplane Image (MPI), containing a set of fronto-parallel RGBA layers, is an effective and efficient representation for view synthesis from sparse inputs. Yet, its fixed structure limits the performance, especially for surfaces imaged at oblique angles. We introduce the Structural MPI (S-MPI), where the plane structure approximates 3D scenes concisely. Conveying RGBA contexts with geometrically-faithful structures, the S-MPI directly bridges view synthesis and 3D reconstruction. It can not only overcome the critical limitations of MPI, i.e., discretization artifacts from sloped surfaces and abuse of redundant layers, and can also acquire planar 3D reconstruction. Despite the intuition and demand of applying S-MPI, great challenges are introduced, e.g., high-fidelity approximation for both RGBA layers and plane poses, multi-view consistency, non-planar regions modeling, and efficient rendering with intersected planes. Accordingly, we propose a transformer-based network based on a segmentation model. It predicts compact and expressive S-MPI layers with their corresponding masks, poses, and RGBA contexts. Non-planar regions are inclusively handled as a special case in our unified framework. Multi-view consistency is ensured by sharing global proxy embeddings, which encode plane-level features covering the complete 3D scenes with aligned coordinates. Intensive experiments show that our method outperforms both previous state-of-the-art MPI-based view synthesis methods and planar reconstruction methods.
abstract_zh: 多平面图像 (MPI) 包含一组正面并行 RGBA 层，是稀疏输入视图合成的有效且高效的表示。然而，其固定结构限制了性能，特别是对于以倾斜角度成像的表面。我们引入了结构 MPI (S-MPI)，其中平面结构简洁地近似 3D 场景。 S-MPI 通过几何忠实结构传达 RGBA 上下文，直接连接视图合成和 3D 重建。它不仅可以克服 MPI 的关键局限性，即倾斜表面的离散伪影和滥用冗余层，而且还可以获得平面 3D 重建。尽管应用 S-MPI 具有直觉和需求，但也带来了巨大的挑战，例如 RGBA 层和平面姿态的高保真近似、多视图一致性、非平面区域建模以及相交平面的高效渲染。因此，我们提出了一种基于分段模型的基于变压器的网络。它预测紧凑且富有表现力的 S-MPI 层及其相应的掩模、姿势和 RGBA 上下文。非平面区域在我们的统一框架中作为特殊情况进行包容性处理。通过共享全局代理嵌入来确保多视图一致性，该代理嵌入对覆盖具有对齐坐标的完整 3D 场景的平面级特征进行编码。大量实验表明，我们的方法优于以前最先进的基于 MPI 的视图合成方法和平面重建方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结构化多平面图像（S-MPI），通过几何保真结构直接连接视图合成与三维重建，解决传统MPI在斜面建模和冗余层使用中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统多平面图像（MPI）因固定结构难以处理斜面表面和冗余层问题，限制了视图合成与三维重建的性能，需设计更符合三维场景结构的表示方法。
AI.method: 基于分割模型的Transformer网络，预测紧凑且具表现力的S-MPI层及其掩码、位姿和RGBA上下文，通过共享全局代理嵌入确保多视角一致性，并统一处理非平面区域。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在视图合成和三维重建任务上均优于现有MPI基方法及平面重建方法。
AI.conclusion: S-MPI通过几何感知的平面结构有效弥合了神经视图合成与三维重建的鸿沟，为复杂场景建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Abu Bakar Dawood,Claudio Coppola,Kaspar Althoefer
title: Learning Decoupled Multi-touch Force Estimation, Localization and Stretch for Soft Capacitive E-skin
title_zh: 学习软电容电子皮肤的解耦多点触摸力估计、定位和拉伸
abstract: Distributed sensor arrays capable of detecting multiple spatially distributed stimuli are considered an important element in the realisation of exteroceptive and proprioceptive soft robots. This paper expands upon the previously presented idea of decoupling the measurements of pressure and location of a local indentation from global deformation, using the overall stretch experienced by a soft capacitive e-skin. We employed machine learning methods to decouple and predict these highly coupled deformation stimuli, collecting data from a soft sensor e-skin which was then fed to a machine learning system comprising of linear regressor, gaussian process regressor, SVM and random forest classifier for stretch, force, detection and localisation respectively. We also studied how the localisation and forces are affected when two forces are applied simultaneously. Soft sensor arrays aided by appropriately chosen machine learning techniques can pave the way to e-skins capable of deciphering multi-modal stimuli in soft robots.
summary: Distributed sensor arrays capable of detecting multiple spatially distributed stimuli are considered an important element in the realisation of exteroceptive and proprioceptive soft robots. This paper expands upon the previously presented idea of decoupling the measurements of pressure and location of a local indentation from global deformation, using the overall stretch experienced by a soft capacitive e-skin. We employed machine learning methods to decouple and predict these highly coupled deformation stimuli, collecting data from a soft sensor e-skin which was then fed to a machine learning system comprising of linear regressor, gaussian process regressor, SVM and random forest classifier for stretch, force, detection and localisation respectively. We also studied how the localisation and forces are affected when two forces are applied simultaneously. Soft sensor arrays aided by appropriately chosen machine learning techniques can pave the way to e-skins capable of deciphering multi-modal stimuli in soft robots.
abstract_zh: 能够检测多个空间分布刺激的分布式传感器阵列被认为是实现外感受和本体感受软机器人的重要元素。本文扩展了先前提出的想法，即利用软电容电子皮肤所经历的整体拉伸，将压力测量和局部压痕位置与全局变形解耦。我们采用机器学习方法来解耦和预测这些高度耦合的变形刺激，从软传感器电子皮肤收集数据，然后将其馈送到由线性回归器、高斯过程回归器、SVM 和随机森林分类器组成的机器学习系统，分别用于拉伸、力、检测和定位。我们还研究了同时施加两个力时定位和力如何受到影响。软传感器阵列在适当选择的机器学习技术的帮助下，可以为能够解读软机器人中多模式刺激的电子皮肤铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的软电容电子皮肤方法，用于解耦多点触控的力估计、定位和拉伸测量。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人需要感知外部和本体感觉刺激，但传统传感器难以同时精确解耦力、位置和拉伸等耦合变形信号。
AI.method: 通过软传感器采集数据，采用线性回归、高斯过程回归、SVM和随机森林分类器分别预测拉伸、力、检测和定位，研究双力同时作用下的性能。
AI.result: 成功解耦了压力、位置与全局形变，验证了系统在多触点场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合软传感器阵列与机器学习技术可实现多模态刺激感知，为软体机器人电子皮肤发展提供新路径。
