authors_text: Ziteng Cui,Lin Gu,Xiao Sun,Xianzheng Ma,Yu Qiao,Tatsuya Harada
title: Aleth-NeRF: Low-light Condition View Synthesis with Concealing Fields
title_zh: Aleth-NeRF：具有隐藏场的低光条件视图合成
comment: website page: https://cuiziteng.github.io/Aleth_NeRF_web/, refer to new version: arXiv:2312.09093
comments: website page: https://cuiziteng.github.io/Aleth_NeRF_web/, refer to new version: arXiv:2312.09093
abstract: Common capture low-light scenes are challenging for most computer vision techniques, including Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF). Vanilla NeRF is viewer-centred simplifies the rendering process only as light emission from 3D locations in the viewing direction, thus failing to model the low-illumination induced darkness. Inspired by the emission theory of ancient Greeks that visual perception is accomplished by rays casting from eyes, we make slight modifications on vanilla NeRF to train on multiple views of low-light scenes, we can thus render out the well-lit scene in an unsupervised manner. We introduce a surrogate concept, Concealing Fields, that reduces the transport of light during the volume rendering stage. Specifically, our proposed method, Aleth-NeRF, directly learns from the dark image to understand volumetric object representation and concealing field under priors. By simply eliminating Concealing Fields, we can render a single or multi-view well-lit image(s) and gain superior performance over other 2D low-light enhancement methods. Additionally, we collect the first paired LOw-light and normal-light Multi-view (LOM) datasets for future research. This version is invalid, please refer to our new AAAI version: arXiv:2312.09093
summary: Common capture low-light scenes are challenging for most computer vision techniques, including Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF). Vanilla NeRF is viewer-centred simplifies the rendering process only as light emission from 3D locations in the viewing direction, thus failing to model the low-illumination induced darkness. Inspired by the emission theory of ancient Greeks that visual perception is accomplished by rays casting from eyes, we make slight modifications on vanilla NeRF to train on multiple views of low-light scenes, we can thus render out the well-lit scene in an unsupervised manner. We introduce a surrogate concept, Concealing Fields, that reduces the transport of light during the volume rendering stage. Specifically, our proposed method, Aleth-NeRF, directly learns from the dark image to understand volumetric object representation and concealing field under priors. By simply eliminating Concealing Fields, we can render a single or multi-view well-lit image(s) and gain superior performance over other 2D low-light enhancement methods. Additionally, we collect the first paired LOw-light and normal-light Multi-view (LOM) datasets for future research. This version is invalid, please refer to our new AAAI version: arXiv:2312.09093
abstract_zh: 对于大多数计算机视觉技术（包括神经辐射场 (NeRF)）来说，常见的低光场景捕捉都具有挑战性。 Vanilla NeRF 以观察者为中心，仅将渲染过程简化为观察方向上 3D 位置的光发射，因此无法对低照度引起的黑暗进行建模。受到古希腊人的发射理论的启发，即视觉感知是通过从眼睛投射的光线来完成的，我们对 vanilla NeRF 进行了轻微修改，以训练低光场景的多个视图，从而可以以无人监督的方式渲染光线充足的场景。我们引入了一个替代概念“隐藏场”，它可以减少体渲染阶段的光传输。具体来说，我们提出的方法 Aleth-NeRF 直接从暗图像中学习，以理解先验下的体积对象表示和隐藏场。通过简单地消除隐藏场，我们可以渲染单视图或多视图明亮的图像，并获得比其他 2D 低光增强方法更优越的性能。此外，我们还收集了第一对配对的低光和正常光多视图（LOM）数据集以供将来的研究使用。该版本无效，请参考我们新的AAAI版本：arXiv:2312.09093

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Aleth-NeRF的方法，用于在低光条件下合成视图，通过引入遮蔽场来解决NeRF在低光照场景中的渲染问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法在低光照场景中表现不佳，因为其假设光线仅从3D位置向视图方向发射，无法建模低光照引起的黑暗问题。
AI.method: 受古希腊视觉理论启发，作者对NeRF进行了改进，引入了遮蔽场概念，以减少体积渲染阶段的光线传输，从而从低光图像中学习体积物体表示和遮蔽场。
AI.result: 该方法能够在无监督条件下渲染出单视图或多视图的正常光照图像，并在低光照增强方法中表现出优越性能。同时，作者还收集了首个低光和正常光多视图数据集LOM。
AI.conclusion: Aleth-NeRF通过引入遮蔽场，有效解决了低光照场景下的视图合成问题，并为未来研究提供了新的数据集。

authors_text: Yuval Meir,Yarden Tzach,Ronit D. Gross,Ofek Tevet,Roni Vardi,Ido Kanter
title: Enhancing the accuracies by performing pooling decisions adjacent to the output layer
title_zh: 通过在输出层附近执行池化决策来提高准确性
comment: 29 pages, 3 figures, 1 table, and Supplementary Information
comments: 29 pages, 3 figures, 1 table, and Supplementary Information
abstract: Learning classification tasks of (2^nx2^n) inputs typically consist of \le n (2x2) max-pooling (MP) operators along the entire feedforward deep architecture. Here we show, using the CIFAR-10 database, that pooling decisions adjacent to the last convolutional layer significantly enhance accuracies. In particular, average accuracies of the advanced-VGG with m layers (A-VGGm) architectures are 0.936, 0.940, 0.954, 0.955, and 0.955 for m=6, 8, 14, 13, and 16, respectively. The results indicate A-VGG8s' accuracy is superior to VGG16s', and that the accuracies of A-VGG13 and A-VGG16 are equal, and comparable to that of Wide-ResNet16. In addition, replacing the three fully connected (FC) layers with one FC layer, A-VGG6 and A-VGG14, or with several linear activation FC layers, yielded similar accuracies. These significantly enhanced accuracies stem from training the most influential input-output routes, in comparison to the inferior routes selected following multiple MP decisions along the deep architecture. In addition, accuracies are sensitive to the order of the non-commutative MP and average pooling operators adjacent to the output layer, varying the number and location of training routes. The results call for the reexamination of previously proposed deep architectures and their accuracies by utilizing the proposed pooling strategy adjacent to the output layer.
summary: Learning classification tasks of (2^nx2^n) inputs typically consist of \le n (2x2) max-pooling (MP) operators along the entire feedforward deep architecture. Here we show, using the CIFAR-10 database, that pooling decisions adjacent to the last convolutional layer significantly enhance accuracies. In particular, average accuracies of the advanced-VGG with m layers (A-VGGm) architectures are 0.936, 0.940, 0.954, 0.955, and 0.955 for m=6, 8, 14, 13, and 16, respectively. The results indicate A-VGG8s' accuracy is superior to VGG16s', and that the accuracies of A-VGG13 and A-VGG16 are equal, and comparable to that of Wide-ResNet16. In addition, replacing the three fully connected (FC) layers with one FC layer, A-VGG6 and A-VGG14, or with several linear activation FC layers, yielded similar accuracies. These significantly enhanced accuracies stem from training the most influential input-output routes, in comparison to the inferior routes selected following multiple MP decisions along the deep architecture. In addition, accuracies are sensitive to the order of the non-commutative MP and average pooling operators adjacent to the output layer, varying the number and location of training routes. The results call for the reexamination of previously proposed deep architectures and their accuracies by utilizing the proposed pooling strategy adjacent to the output layer.
abstract_zh: (2^nx2^n) 个输入的学习分类任务通常由整个前馈深度架构中的 \le n (2x2) 个最大池 (MP) 运算符组成。在这里，我们使用 CIFAR-10 数据库表明，与最后一个卷积层相邻的池决策可显着提高准确性。特别是，当 m=6、8、14、13 和 16 时，具有 m 层的高级 VGG (A-VGGm) 架构的平均精度分别为 0.936、0.940、0.954、0.955 和 0.955。结果表明，A-VGG8s 的准确率优于 VGG16s，并且 A-VGG13 和 A-VGG16 的准确率相当，与 Wide-ResNet16 相当。此外，用一个 FC 层 A-VGG6 和 A-VGG14 或几个线性激活 FC 层替换三个全连接 (FC) 层，也能获得相似的精度。这些显着提高的准确性源于训练最有影响力的输入输出路线，与沿深层架构的多个 MP 决策选择的较差路线相比。此外，精度对邻近输出层的非交换 MP 和平均池算子的顺序很敏感，从而改变训练路线的数量和位置。结果要求通过利用与输出层相邻的提议的池化策略来重新检查先前提出的深度架构及其准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在输出层附近调整池化策略以提升深度神经网络的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统深度架构通过多层池化操作选择特征路径，但可能忽略对输出层附近关键路径的优化，导致准确率受限。
AI.method: 基于CIFAR-10数据集，修改VGG架构（如A-VGGm）的池化层位置与数量，替换全连接层并测试不同池化顺序对准确率的影响。
AI.result: A-VGG8准确率优于VGG16，A-VGG13/A-VGG16与Wide-ResNet16相当；替换全连接层后准确率保持稳定，池化顺序显著影响结果。
AI.conclusion: 输出层附近池化策略能有效提升准确率，需重新评估现有深度架构的设计合理性。

authors_text: Thierry Lecroq
title: Optimal-Hash Exact String Matching Algorithms
title_zh: 最优哈希精确字符串匹配算法
abstract: String matching is the problem of finding all the occurrences of a pattern in a text. We propose improved versions of the fast family of string matching algorithms based on hashing $q$-grams. The improvement consists of considering minimal values $q$ such that each $q$-grams of the pattern has a unique hash value. The new algorithms are fastest than algorithm of the HASH family for short patterns on large size alphabets.
summary: String matching is the problem of finding all the occurrences of a pattern in a text. We propose improved versions of the fast family of string matching algorithms based on hashing $q$-grams. The improvement consists of considering minimal values $q$ such that each $q$-grams of the pattern has a unique hash value. The new algorithms are fastest than algorithm of the HASH family for short patterns on large size alphabets.
abstract_zh: 字符串匹配是查找文本中某个模式的所有出现的问题。我们提出了基于散列 $q$-grams 的快速字符串匹配算法系列的改进版本。改进包括考虑最小值 $q$，以便模式的每个 $q$-gram 都具有唯一的哈希值。对于大尺寸字母表上的短模式，新算法比 HASH 系列算法更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的基于哈希q-gram的精确字符串匹配算法，通过优化q值选择提升算法效率。
AI.motivation: 现有哈希家族算法在短模式与大字母表场景下效率不足，需寻找更优解决方案。
AI.method: 通过确定最小q值使模式中每个q-gram哈希值唯一，改进传统哈希算法实现高效匹配。
AI.result: 新算法在短模式和大字母表情况下优于传统HASH家族算法，匹配速度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为字符串匹配问题提供了更高效的算法框架，尤其适用于特定数据规模场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出改进的基于哈希q-gram的精确字符串匹配算法，通过优化q值选择提升算法效率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有哈希家族算法在短模式与大字母表场景下效率不足，需寻找更优解决方案。
ai_content.method: 通过确定最小q值使模式中每个q-gram哈希值唯一，改进传统哈希算法实现高效匹配。

search_text: Optimal-Hash Exact String Matching Algorithms 最优哈希精确字符串匹配算法 String matching is the problem of finding all the occurrences of a pattern in a text. We propose improved versions of the fast family of string matching algorithms based on hashing $q$-grams. The improvement consists of considering minimal values $q$ such that each $q$-grams of the pattern has a unique hash value. The new algorithms are fastest than algorithm of the HASH family for short patterns on large size alphabets. 字符串匹配是查找文本中某个模式的所有出现的问题。我们提出了基于散列 $q$-grams 的快速字符串匹配算法系列的改进版本。改进包括考虑最小值 $q$，以便模式的每个 $q$-gram 都具有唯一的哈希值。对于大尺寸字母表上的短模式，新算法比 HASH 系列算法更快。 本文提出改进的基于哈希q-gram的精确字符串匹配算法，通过优化q值选择提升算法效率。 Thierry Lecroq cs.DS

authors_text: Aminul Huq,Md Tanzim Reza,Shahriar Hossain,Shakib Mahmud Dipto
title: AnoMalNet: Outlier Detection based Malaria Cell Image Classification Method Leveraging Deep Autoencoder
title_zh: AnoMalNet：利用深度自动编码器的基于异常值检测的疟疾细胞图像分类方法
comment: Accepted and Published at International Journal of Reconfigurable and Embedded Systems (IJRES)
comments: Accepted and Published at International Journal of Reconfigurable and Embedded Systems (IJRES)
abstract: Class imbalance is a pervasive issue in the field of disease classification from medical images. It is necessary to balance out the class distribution while training a model for decent results. However, in the case of rare medical diseases, images from affected patients are much harder to come by compared to images from non-affected patients, resulting in unwanted class imbalance. Various processes of tackling class imbalance issues have been explored so far, each having its fair share of drawbacks. In this research, we propose an outlier detection based binary medical image classification technique which can handle even the most extreme case of class imbalance. We have utilized a dataset of malaria parasitized and uninfected cells. An autoencoder model titled AnoMalNet is trained with only the uninfected cell images at the beginning and then used to classify both the affected and non-affected cell images by thresholding a loss value. We have achieved an accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score of 98.49%, 97.07%, 100%, and 98.52% respectively, performing better than large deep learning models and other published works. As our proposed approach can provide competitive results without needing the disease-positive samples during training, it should prove to be useful in binary disease classification on imbalanced datasets.

However, in the case of rare medical diseases, images from affected patients are much harder to come by compared to images from non-affected patients, resulting in unwanted class imbalance. Various processes of tackling class imbalance issues have been explored so far, each having its fair share of drawbacks. In this research, we propose an outlier detection based binary medical image classification technique which can handle even the most extreme case of class imbalance. We have utilized a dataset of malaria parasitized and uninfected cells. An autoencoder model titled AnoMalNet is trained with only the uninfected cell images at the beginning and then used to classify both the affected and non-affected cell images by thresholding a loss value. We have achieved an accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score of 98.49%, 97.07%, 100%, and 98.52% respectively, performing better than large deep learning models and other published works. As our proposed approach can provide competitive results without needing the disease-positive samples during training, it should prove to be useful in binary disease classification on imbalanced datasets.
abstract_zh: 类别不平衡是医学图像疾病分类领域中普遍存在的问题。在训练模型以获得良好结果的同时，有必要平衡班级分布。然而，对于罕见的医学疾病，与未受影响患者的图像相比，受影响患者的图像更难获得，从而导致不必要的类别不平衡。迄今为止，人们已经探索了解决阶级不平衡问题的各种流程，但每种流程都有其相当的缺点。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于异常值检测的二值医学图像分类技术，该技术甚至可以处理最极端的类别不平衡情况。我们利用了疟疾寄生和未感染细胞的数据集。名为 AnoMalNet 的自动编码器模型在开始时仅使用未感染的细胞图像进行训练，然后用于通过对损失值进行阈值化来对受影响和未受影响的细胞图像进行分类。我们的准确率、精确率、召回率和 F1 分数分别为 98.49%、97.07%、100% 和 98.52%，表现优于大型深度学习模型和其他已发表的作品。由于我们提出的方法可以在训练期间不需要疾病阳性样本的情况下提供有竞争力的结果，因此它应该被证明在不平衡数据集的二元疾病分类中是有用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异常检测的深度自编码器方法AnoMalNet，用于解决疟疾细胞图像分类中的类别不平衡问题，无需使用患病样本进行训练。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分类中罕见疾病的患病样本稀缺导致类别不平衡，传统方法依赖患病样本且效果有限，需探索无需患病样本的分类技术。
AI.method: 使用自编码器AnoMalNet仅以未感染细胞图像训练，通过阈值化损失值区分感染与未感染细胞，避免直接使用患病样本。
AI.result: 在疟疾细胞数据集上达到98.49%准确率、97.07%精确率、100%召回率和98.52% F1分数，优于现有深度学习模型和其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在类别不平衡数据集上表现优异，无需患病样本即可实现有效二分类，适用于其他罕见疾病的医学图像分类任务。
